C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
开拓者每日登录游戏后，可在「旅情事记」中领取当日奖励。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
奖励将根据开拓者累计登录天数依次解锁，当日奖励将在<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）刷新。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
Trailblazers can receive daily rewards in the Travel Log after logging in to the game each day.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
The rewards will be unlocked in sequential order according to the Trailblazer's accrued login days. Daily rewards will be refreshed at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM (server time) every day.

E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
Trailblazers can receive daily rewards in the Travel Log after logging in to the game each day.

◆ Event Rewards ◆

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
空间站的科员布凯辛在主持一项神秘测试，这一次她带上她的搭档找到了你，希望你能施以援手……

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 活动开启后，每日将会开启新的挑战关，共计8关。
● 每一个挑战关拥有两种难度：「矮星」「超巨星」，完成「矮星」挑战后，解锁「超巨星」难度。
● 每一个挑战关拥有一个固定关卡机制，为角色提供增益效果。
● 在「超巨星」难度中，轮次结束前击败全部6波次敌人，将会获得「完美击破」的评价。
● 当开拓者提升「均衡等级」时，敌方强度将同步提升。
● 开拓者可以选择试用角色参与挑战。
● 我方角色击败敌方目标时恢复的能量，在「星芒烁变」活动中，为常规战斗的<unbreak>50%</unbreak>。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
● 活动期间，在关卡内达成指定挑战目标后，可以在「限时奖励」中领取奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
Researcher Grumpy from the space station is hosting a mysterious test. This time she has found you with her partner, hoping you can lend a hand...

◆ Event Rules ◆
● After the event begins, a new challenge stage will open daily, totaling 8 stages.
● Each challenge stage has 2 difficulty levels: Dwarf Star and Supergiant Star. Completing the Dwarf Star challenge unlocks the Supergiant Star difficulty.
● Each challenge stage features a fixed stage mechanism that provides buff effects to characters.
● In the Supergiant Star difficulty, defeating all 6 waves of enemies before the end of the Cycle will earn a Perfect Win rating.
● As Trailblazers increase their Equilibrium Level, enemy strength will increase accordingly.
● Trailblazers can choose trial characters to participate in the challenge.
● Energy regenerated by allies when defeating enemy targets is <unbreak>50%</unbreak> in the Stellar Shimmer event compared to regular battles.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
● During the event period, rewards can be claimed via Limited-Time Rewards upon achieving specific challenge goals within the stages.

E: Reaching Styxia, encircled by the River of Souls, was no easy feat. Aglaea spared no expense to summon Cipher, the demigod of Trickery, back to the city, hoping she could lend a hand. One midnight, you heard Castorice knocking on your door, and together you wandered through Okhema City, discussing her past in Aidonia. However, a well-planned gift she prepared was stolen by a thief. After a chaotic pursuit, you arranged to meet Cipher outside the city and set off for Styxia.

C: 一切真相水落石出，白厄与心中的英雄告别，接下三千万次轮回积累的火种，决意正面对抗自己的命运。而你肩负着翁法罗斯的黎明，步入了新的世界。
E: Every truth now stands revealed. Phainon bid farewell to the Hero Within and embraced the Coreflame accumulated through thirty million Cycles, determined to confront his fate. And you, carrying the promise of dawn for Amphoreus, stepped forward into a new world.

C: 重新回到翁法罗斯的丹恒需要锁定「长夜月」的藏身处，在昔日敌人「赞达尔」的帮助下，丹恒登上了黎明云崖用净世金血召唤来了白厄。借助白厄「毁灭天地」的金光，「大地」的封印被彻底洞穿。丹恒跟随指引，启程前往神悟树庭。
E: Back in Amphoreus, Dan Heng searched for Evernight's hideout. With help from your former enemy Zandar, he ascended to Dawncloud and uses the world-cleansing golden blood to summon Phainon. Thanks to the golden light of Phainon that could "destroy the world," the seal of Earth was shattered completely. Following this guidance, Dan Heng journeyed toward the Grove of Epiphany.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n你成功协助展品修复员鲍里斯修好了古董收音机，进一步丰富了博物馆的库存。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nYou have helped Exhibit Restorer Boris restore the antique radio, adding another valuable piece to the museum's collection.

C: 钟表小子和船员们不计前嫌，救出了废墟下的鳄鱼。但鳄鱼对此没有表示感激，反倒是呵斥船员们的救援弄疼了他，傲慢地离去了。\n「滴答，鳄鱼肉有这么细嫩吗？」
E: Clockie and the crew disregard previous grudges and rescue the crocodile from the rubble. However, the crocodile expresses no gratitude for this, and instead actually berates the crew for hurting him during the rescue before leaving brashly.\n"Tick-tock, who knew crocodile meat was this tender?"

C: 骗人杯调制了感人的谎言，杯中浮现出一个自我牺牲的钟表英雄。
E: Scammer Cup comes up with a touching white lie, and a self-sacrificing clock-face hero floats to the surface of the cup.

C: 镇民们追随哈努兄弟的号召，随时准备为亲友复仇。\n「为了我英年早逝的太奶奶！」
E: The townsfolk heed Brother Hanu's call, and are always ready to avenge their loved ones.\n"This is for my great-grandma who died far too young!"

C: 哈努兄弟猜了双数，叶子店长摇了摇头。但哈努兄弟没有支付宝石，而是用炮口让他屈服了…炮弹成本也是赌资。
E: Brother Hanu guesses "even," and Shopkeeper Leaf shakes his head. But instead of paying up in gems, Brother Hanu uses his weapon to subdue him... The cost of cannonballs is all part of the gamble anyway, isn't it?

C: 哈努兄弟想揭穿石头老板，但他的*哼*远没有石头老板的大嘴有说服力。\n「哈努兄弟，你还是学学说话吧。」
E: Brother Hanu wants to expose Boss Stone, but his *hmph* is far less persuasive than Boss Stone and his big mouth.\n"Brother Hanu, you'd best learn how to talk."

C: 钟表小子收集了自己旅途至今的所有回忆——罗盘号的舵盘、左轮队长的子弹、镜子公主的镜片。这些冒险的证明成为了这颗种子的养料，终于，种子冒出了一点绿色……
E: Clockie collects all the memories of his own journey so far — the Compass' steering wheel, Captain Revolver's bullet, and Mirror Princess' mirror. The proof of these adventures becomes nutrients for the seed, and finally from out of the seed sprouts a shoot of green...

C: 但钟表小子仍抱有警惕：石头老板真的如此好心吗？
E: But Clockie is still very cautious: Could Boss Stone really be that kind?

C: 石头老板正在收集小镇的情报，事情越来越危险了……
E: Boss Stone was gathering intel about the town. Danger was looming...

C: 他们聊清楚了第一个目标：为美梦小镇建立一座漂亮的宾馆！\n「滴答，它的层数要比钟表的秒数还多！」
E: They reached a consensus over their first goal: To build a beautiful hotel in Dreamville!\n"Tick-tock, it must have more floors than there are seconds on a clock!"

C: 钟表小子决定要在美梦小镇留下更多属于自己的传奇，他那伶俐的指针又开始旋转起来。
E: With the determination to create more legends in Dreamville, Clockie's nimble hands started moving again.

C: 木头老爷希望大家能够好好相处，不要在美好的小镇中争斗，但这份劝告却让他们把矛头对准了木头老爷……\n「咳咳，怪我都怪我，就怪我是木头！」
E: Old Man Wood wished everyone could get along nicely instead of fighting in Dreamville, but his advice eventually made him the target of everyone's resentment...\n"Ahem, go ahead and pin the blame on me. It's because I'm only a piece of wood!"

C: 钢琴大叔诬陷音符小姐的靡靡之音让镇民们都学坏了，一些老派的镇民开始批判音符小姐，但她的人气还是没有受到影响。\n「听她的歌就是跟钢琴大叔作对？这下不得不听了！」
E: Uncle Piano showed Miss Note in a bad light by accusing her of corrupting the townsfolk's minds with her beguiling voice. Some traditionally-minded townsfolk started criticizing Miss Note, but it wasn't enough to undermine her popularity.\n"Listening to her songs makes me an enemy of Uncle Piano? That's all the more reason to keep listening!"

C: 钟表小子开来了自己的大船，把蓝调街的海水泼到了街上，浇灭了火焰，\n「滴答，怎么在美梦小镇老得灭火啊！」
E: Clockie drove his ship into the town and poured the seawater from Blues Street all over the streets, extinguishing the fire.\n"Tick-tock, why am I always putting out fires in Dreamville?"

C: 钟表小子把美梦小镇的过去拍进了影片，但影片胶卷很快就被没收了。\n「滴答，但真相是没收不掉的！」
E: Clockie made Dreamville's history into a film, but the film reel was soon confiscated.\n"Tick-tock, the truth can never be confiscated!"

C: 不，美梦小镇没人迷失在荒原。\n「因为他抹除了一切荒原。」
E: No. No one in Dreamville lost their way in the wilderness.\n"Because he has wiped out all wildernesses."

C: 钟表小子白天觐见了国王，听到了一个故事：镜子王国曾经封闭而落后，是一位镜子英雄用大海中的知识开化了这里，然后消失在了镜子中……
E: Clockie meets with the king in broad daylight and hears a story: The Mirror Kingdom once was closed off and backward, until a hero from the mirror used knowledge from the ocean to enlighten this place before disappearing off into the mirror world...

C: 哈努兄弟继续深入阵地，越来越多的鳄鱼包围了过来，而哈努兄弟依然没有逃跑的意图。
E: Brother Hanu continues to penetrate deeper into the enemy position, and is surrounded by increasingly more crocodiles — yet Brother Hanu has no intention of fleeing.

C: 钟表小子掏出帽子师傅留下的宽檐帽，抓紧帽子，乘着气流快速前进。
E: Clockie whips out the wide-brimmed hat left behind by Master Hat, grabs hold of it, and quickly moves off in a thermal air vent.

C: 美梦小镇开始容纳越来越多的游客，许多人来到这里就不愿离开，成为了本地的居民，但街道容不下这么多的人……
E: More and more tourists swarmed to Dreamville. Some pirates had infiltrated the throng and disrupted the peace in Dreamville... Many came and decided to stay as permanent residents, but the streets couldn't accommodate so many people...

C: 独当一面
E: Crème de la Crème

C: 邪鳄归来
E: The Return of the Croc

C: 至于钟表小子…没人再见过钟表小子的身影。
E: As for Clockie... No one ever sees Clockie again.

C: 钟表小子也不明白，为什么木头老爷一定要夺走牛仔们的土地，那是他们通过努力才得到的东西呀！
E: Clockie also doesn't understand why Old Man Wood insists on taking away the cowboys' turf. It's something the cowboys earned through hard work!

C: 光鲜亮丽的小镇宾馆里，每天都有着招待不完的客人，他们都希望能在美梦小镇寻找到自己的幸福。
E: In the glamorous Town Hotel, an unending stream of guests throngs at the lobby — they all hope to find their own happiness in Dreamville.

C: 哈努兄弟会不会回来保护小镇？叶子店长会不会卖了不该卖的东西？木头老爷能不能想起原本的承诺呢？
E: Will Brother Hanu return to protect the town? Will Shopkeeper Leaf sell things that shouldn't be sold? Will Old Man Wood remember his original promise?

C: 颤栗

C: 恨意Ⅳ
E: Hatred IV

C:
戴罪负枷的仙舟重犯怎么会出现在盛会之星的梦中游戏里呢？不可能，绝对不可能，这一定是梦。

不过，若有人怀着对罗浮前任剑首的恐惧抵达匹诺康尼，将她孤剑披靡、纵横战阵的故事作为火种投入这场赛事，想必也会召来一位了不得的英灵吧？

那位女剑士以身为剑，虽已超脱人间胜负，但若能让她以寰宇间的英雄传奇作为磨剑砥石，她谅必不会拒绝。
E:
How could a felon shackled in sin from the Xianzhou appear in a game in the Planet of Festivities' dream? No. Absolutely not. This must be a dream.

But if someone arrived at Penacony with terror in their heart toward the former Sword Champion of the Luofu and dropped the tale of her slaughtering armies into the competition as a kindling, they would have summoned a mighty Heroic Spirit, right?

That woman had become the blade itself. Though she has transcended mortal competitions, she will not refuse to use the legends of all heroes in the cosmos as her whetstone.

C: 让下一次开拓之旅平安无虞。
E: To have the next trailblazing expedition be a smooth-sailing one.

C: <color=#42a8b9>#见鬼实录#</color>家人们！常走夜路终见鬼了！捉鬼小队遭遇最大危机！！我们某位队员在几天前的捉鬼行动后便失去了踪迹！我们遍寻了住处和平时去的地方都没有找到她的下落！如果有人看到她！请务必第一时间联系小桂子！拜托了！！
E: Folks! Something eerie has happened during our nightly adventures! The ghost-hunting squad is facing its greatest crisis ever! One of our team members has gone missing ever since our ghost-hunting mission a few days ago! We've searched everywhere, including her usual haunts, but we can't find any trace of her! If anyone has seen her, please contact Little Gui immediately! We're counting on you! <color=#42a8b9>#GhostSighting</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#捉鬼小队#</color>接到<color=#42a8b9>@里生外熟</color> 求助后，捉鬼队的队员第一时间赶到了长乐天，果然看到了那位古怪的棋手，旁边也站着很多面容呆滞的人。小桂子落子后发现这是伪装成棋盘的量子玉兆，棋手的思路会被瞬间学习模仿，继而被轻松拿捏。最后，完全心无挂碍的素裳队员轻松的战胜了棋手。棋鬼被击败后露出本相！原来它是对仙舟人的大脑进行采样学习的步离间谍。目前该人员已移交地衡司处理！
E: Upon receiving a report from <color=#42a8b9>@Extra-Introvert</color>, members of the squad rushed to Exalting Sanctum as fast as we could. We indeed saw that strange chess player with many dazed people standing around them. After Little Gui placed a piece on the chess board, I realized it was a quantum jade abacus disguised as a chessboard. The thought processes of the player will be instantly learned, emulated, and thus easily defeated. In the end, it was Sushang, who was unburdened with thoughts or strategies, that defeated the Chess Ghost with ease. Then that Chess Ghost revealed their true form! It turns out to be a borisin spy coming here to sample and study the brains of Xianzhou natives. They have been handed over to the Realm-Keeping Commission for proper punishment! <color=#42a8b9>#GhostHuntingSquad</color>

C: ◆沉浸奖励说明◆\n●从第三世界开始，在「区域-精英」或「区域-首领」击败敌人后，将解锁本层的沉浸装置，可以消耗<unbreak>40</unbreak>开拓力或1沉浸器兑换「位面饰品」奖励。\n●游玩「模拟宇宙」后，可在模拟宇宙积分奖励中获取沉浸器，也可消耗开拓力*<unbreak>40</unbreak>兑换，最高可拥有沉浸器*<unbreak>12</unbreak>。
E: ◆ Immersion Reward Details ◆\n● Starting from World 3, defeating enemies in "Domain — Elite" or "Domain — Boss" will unlock the immersion device for that floor. You can exchange <unbreak>40</unbreak> Trailblaze Power or 1 Immersifier for Planar Ornaments.\n● After exploring the Simulated Universe, you can obtain Immersifiers from the Point Rewards. One Immersifier can also be exchanged for <unbreak>40</unbreak> Trailblaze Power. Up to <unbreak>12</unbreak> Immersifiers can be held simultaneously at any given time.

E: Immersion Reward

C: 仙舟「罗浮」丹鼎司新任司鼎，伶俐秀慧的持明医士。\n嗅觉敏锐，常以此识别病症，并以香薰安定他人心神。\n善于处理混杂的人际关系，即使心底暴躁如雷，表面上依旧滴水不漏。
E: The new Cauldron Master of the Xianzhou Luofu's Alchemy Commission is one perceptive and intelligent Vidyadhara healer.\nWith a keen sense of smell, she diagnoses ailments and calms minds with aromatic therapy.\nAdept at navigating complex social relationships, she can remain impeccably composed even when turmoil rages within.

C: 流星划过夜空，生命的长河荡起涟漪，闪烁十三种光彩。\n哀丽秘榭的女儿，哺育「██」的黄金裔，栽下记忆的种子，让往昔的花朵在明日绽放\n——「然后，一起写下不同以往的诗篇吧♪」
E: A meteor streaks across the night sky, stirring ripples in the river of life, shimmering with thirteen hues.\nDaughter of Aedes Elysiae, nurturer of the Chrysos Heir of "███," plants the Seed of Memory, letting yesterday's flowers bloom in tomorrow\n—"Now, let's write a different kind of poem together♪"

C: 你踏上「毁灭」命途后所生成的星魂投影，无尽可能中的一种。
E: Eidolon Projection generated when you tread on the Path of Destruction. One of the countless existing possibilities.

C: 春天，她们播下种子。 夏日，她们灌溉花野。 秋夕，她们撷取硕果。 冬夜，她们踏雪欢歌。 …… 原本荒芜的土地花朵盛放，蝴蝶被那银铃般的笑声吸引，停驻指尖。 「姐姐，我们以后也会一起，把这里变作盛大的花海！」 「看，我们的约定……」 蝴蝶向着彼岸飞去，那稍显沉默的少女轻轻抚过温暖的花瓣，就像妹妹依然在身旁。 「我，和我们照顾的那些花儿…都不曾忘记。」
E: In spring, they sowed seeds. In summer, they irrigated the fields. In autumn, they harvested the fruits. In winter, they sang as they walked in the snow. ... The land that was originally barren now blooms with flowers, and butterflies are drawn by the peals of laughter and land on the girls' fingertips. "Big sis! We'll keep working together to turn this into a huge sea of flowers!" "See. Our promise..." The butterfly flies to the other shore. The rather taciturn girl softly caresses the warm flower petals as if her little sister is still there with her. "...Wasn't forgotten by me or the flowers we once attended."

C:
若是担心脚下，只需再度抬头凝望，
当繁星温柔地注视，心已乘风而上。
每一个念想，每一声低语，
都化作生命中的承载，再不会失去。
E:
If you are concerned for the road, just look up again.
When the stars look gently down, the heart would already be soaring.
Every thought and every whisper,
becomes a life experience that would never leave.

C:
平原上业火纷飞。不知何人的理想化作灰烬。不知何人的理想熊熊燃起。

守护者穿梭于枪弹弓矢之间。
这里没有他可以拯救的对象。这里满是他希望拯救的对象。

救一人，杀一人。救万人，杀万人。自相践踏的命运，亦是人类延续的一环。

早已习惯了一切，守护者的脚步从未迟疑。
覆盖双腿的意志如风。覆盖双臂的意志如火。

他仍在寻找属于拯救的奇迹。
E:
The flames of karma ignite the plains. The ideals of unknowns turn to ashes, as the ideals of others burn passionately.

The Guardian traverses between bullets and arrowheads.
He can save no one here. He can save everyone here.

Kill one person to save one person. Kill ten thousand to save ten thousand. The fate of trampling over our peers is one part of humanity's continued existence.

The Guardian had already grown used to all this, and his steps never hesitated.
The determination that covers his legs is like wind. The determination that covers his arms is like fire.

He is still seeking a miracle that can bring forth salvation.

C: 用以改变面貌的面具，结合精湛的演技便能以假乱真。
E: A mask used to change one's facial appearance. Coupled with evocative acting skills, it can help you deceive anyone.

C: 位面封装的是青丘步离的穹窿金帐。与步离人留在银河中的蛮野名声不同，他们拥有非凡的生物技术。狼子们汇聚在伟大的巢父都蓝之侧，将天上众星视为牧畜，逐驰其间。
E: Encapsulated in the plane is the Golden Sky Tent belonging to the borisins of Verdantia. Different to the savage name that borisin left in the cosmos, the borisins of Verdantia possess outstanding biotechnology. The children of the wolves gather next to the great Brood Lord Duran, and regard the celestial objects in the sky as their herd as they gallop between the stars.

C: 兽骨、箭镞与铁蒺藜，将哀地里亚人与那亡者的世界相连。荒原上的苦行者只愿自己的灵魂能够渡过寒溟，不因其贫瘠与软弱而彷徨失落于面见尊神的路上。
E: Animal bones, arrowheads, and caltrops bind the world of the Aidonians with that of the dead. The ascetics of the wastelands only hoped that their souls, unyielding, could pass through the frozen depths, and would not become lost from poverty or weakness on the way to seeing their god.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《星文照旅魂》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track, "Ave Astra et Viator."

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《漂浮节奏》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Floating Tempo."

C: 《多少个这样的清晨》
E: "Morns Like These"

C: 《天霄登临》
E: Welkin's Advent

C: 《黎明座下》
E: Under the Seat of Dawn

C: 《神话公理》
E: Mythical Axiom

C: 描绘磐岩镇街头的油画。桑博以名誉担保这就是正品。\n\n「一眼假，但好像也无所谓。」
E: An oil painting depicting the streets of Boulder Town. Sampo guarantees this is the real deal.\n\n"It looks fake at first glance, but does that really matter?"

C: 播放着轻松欢脱的日常小调。 尽管曲调异常简单，但凡是略懂乐理之人都能听出，其作曲者必定是广识天下音律的大师。 「牵起家人的手，让我们一同起舞！」
E: It plays a relaxing and joyful tune. Even through the simplistic tune, anyone with the slightest understanding of music can tell the mastery of the composer of the piece. "Grab the hands of your Family and let us dance!"

C: 此物本不存在，直到你见到、听到、感受到某物。这因感受诞生的存在很快便会沉寂，埋在思维的苗床里，或许会在某日发芽，或许不会。\n\n「那是构成我们身体的质料，因你的铭记而存在。」
E: This thing does not truly exist until you see, hear, or sense something. This existence born from sensations soon falls silent, buried in the soil of thought — it may sprout one day, or it may not.\n\n"Such is the substance that forms our bodies, existing because you remember."

C: 在早期计划中，黑塔币是数字货币，但在种种原因下最终改为实体。\n值得一提的是，现行流通的黑塔币不含任何贵金属成分，但它内含的黑塔高清侧影数字藏品却远比贵金属珍稀。
E: Hertareum was planned as a digital currency, but eventually settled as a physical currency.\nIt's worth mentioning that even though Hertareum coins don't contain any precious metal components, the high-definition silhouette Non-Fungible Token contained inside it is much more valuable than any of them.

C: 星际和平公司人才激励部员工沙马里的证件。公司员工大都很看重自己的证件，据说还有人把它「安装」在脑门上，这样无论走到哪里都能炫耀给别人看。花火将它留在现场，恐怕是为了证明自己真的袭击了一个人。
E: The ID belonging to Shamari, a worker of the Talent Motivation Department in the Interastral Peace Corporation. Most IPC staff value their ID greatly. Apparently, some have even "installed" it onto their forehead, ensuring that they can show it off to people wherever they go. Sparkle probably left it at the crime scene to prove that she really did assault someone.

C: 来自「门径的圣子」——缇里西庇俄丝的馈赠，象征着她千身远行、从未更改的信念与同理。
E: From the "Holy Child of Passage": Tribios's bestowal, symbolizing her unwavering faith and empathy throughout her journey in a thousand bodies.

C: 诡计的泰坦之信物，如同它在神话中的身形，哭笑两面，翻飞自如。最早是欺诈者用来顶替利衡的伪币，他们担忧这样的行为会招来塔兰顿的惩戒，所以将其制成扎格列斯的样子，借此寻求诡计的赐福。 但随着岁月流转，这种硬币反倒因为制作困难而变得比利衡更加珍贵，成为了贵族与艺术家们钟爱的收藏品——当然，这也可能是扎格列斯的诡计之一。 「滚动的金币化作车轮，盗贼隐匿身形，赌徒一掷千金。」——《诡计颂歌》
E: The token of the Trickery Titan. Like the Titan's mythical form, the coin has two faces, one smiling, one crying, effortlessly flipping in the air. It was originally used by fraudsters as counterfeit coins to replace the Balance Coins. Fearing that such actions would invoke Talanton's punishment, they crafted it in the image of Zagreus, seeking the blessing of Trickery. However, as time passed, these coins became more precious than the Balance Coins due to the difficulty of their creation, becoming a favorite collectible of nobles and artists — though this could also be one of Zagreus' tricks. "Rolling coins turn into wheels, thieves conceal their forms, gamblers wager fortunes." — Ode of Trickery

E: Observation on Wubbaboo Behavior

E: Unsent Letter 2

E: THEY have died. THEY still live.

C: 比例尺为1:<unbreak>100</unbreak>。
E: It's sized to a scale of 1:<unbreak>100</unbreak>.

C: 概率组成的骰子在虚空中孤独自转，被包裹住的不确定性点燃又熄灭，如同恒星的创生与坍缩。宇宙间充满变量，连恒星都有重生的可能，何况一枚遗器呢？\n\n「温馨提示：变量有风险，掷骰需谨慎，一个不小心，极品变垃圾。」
E: A die formed from probability spins alone in the void. The bundled uncertainty ignites and goes out like the birth and death of stars. The universe is filled with variables. If even stars have a chance at resurrection, then what say a Relic?\n\n"Attention: Hazardous variable. Be mindful when you roll the die. If you are not careful, a treasure could turn to trash."

E: Silvermane Lieutenant

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 通过极其简单的仪式流程所制作出的秘酿，口感粗糙，但由于价格非常便宜，仍旧有不小的市场。据说当年抗击黑潮时，由于干净的水源十分匮乏，人们曾一度依靠这种粗制秘酿补充水分与养分。\n\n「奥赫玛现在有干净的水喝，孩子他爸，别再找借口天天买秘酿了。」
E: The ambrosia made through an incredibly simple ritual process has a rough taste, but due to its very low price, it still has a considerable market. It is said that during the fight against the black tide, when clean water was scarce, people relied on this rough-brew ambrosia to supplement their hydration and nutrients.\n\n"Okhema now has clean water, o sire of my children. Stop making excuses to buy ambrosia every day."

C: 蕉月蕉日工作安排如下： -脑洞会 -台本监修 -分镜勾兑 -伙计们下班去吃热带香蕉饭吗？ 「兄弟，你怎么把工作安排贴到消耗品制作表里了？」 「蕉糕，忙昏头了…算了，蕉错就错吧。」
E: The work schedule for Banamonth Banaday is as follows: - Brainstorming meeting - Script review - Storyboard adjustments - Are we going out for tropical banana rice after work? "Dude, why did you post the work schedule on the consumables production sheet?" "Oh, banana it, I'm so busy I messed up... Oh well, let's just embrace the mistakenana."

C: 接受前人的勋礼，开启你的开拓之旅。\n\n「经验往往伴随代价，但也因此无可替代。」
E: Accept the gifts of those who came before and begin your own trailblazing expedition.\n\n"Experience often comes at a cost, but that is why they are irreplaceable."

C: 盒子开启前的那一刻，你永远不知道盒中贮装的是什么物品。 「这和买彩票有什么区别？」 「……至少我们不必担心这盒子里装着一只又死又活的猫咪。」
E: You never know what's in the box until you open it. "So it's essentially like buying a lottery ticket?" "At least we don't need to worry about finding a cat that is both dead and alive."

C: 一片自虚空中捕获的黑质。可小幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>虚无</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: A fragment of dark matter captured from the void. Used to level up Traces slightly for <color=#f29e38ff>Nihility</color> characters.

E: Deciduous twigs from an ancient divine construct. Advanced material used for enhancement.

C: 好吃又便宜的朋克洛德零食，可以叠影光锥「新手任务开始前」。
E: A tasty and cheap Punklorde snack. Can be used to Superimpose the Light Cone "Before the Tutorial Mission Starts."

<align="center">细问魈魅踪迹，偏看收容一隅。铁鞋踏破不世，待问三堂深处。</align>

E:
<align="center">Upon the stars, that is where the talent and intellect reside. Oblivious to the world, as the envy becomes blinding.</align>
<align="center">Who knew gentleness and kindness welcomed only pain and suffering. Like the risk of falling into the depths when trying to mount the sky.</align>
<align="center">An inquiry into spirit traces, a glance into the site of storage. Even with iron shoes worn out unearthly, one has to visit the three depths.</align>
<align="center">Better off alone than to be an accomplice. One day, as they turn around, a path will be lit by the radiance of the stars.</align>

<align="right">Cryptologist From Locus Silentii</align>

C: 星域界种编号：无机#27 界种学名称：约特伍德体 银河别名：电光巨人、辉星多面体、吹息地巨砾 分类系统：无机生物界-硅基生物纲-偏晶目-岩巨人科 研究概要： 约特伍德体的故土乃是遍布狂厄风暴之星球。 据说在那里，过境的飓风将毁灭一切，唯有坚硬的生命才能在狂风中挺立。 该种族的生命形态为透明水晶体，内部有名为思想偏晶的逻辑中枢，彼此之间通过该思想器官产生的电讯号进行交流。 故其语言、思想、历史皆不为银河所知。 在机械战争时期，约特伍德体一度成为机械种族最为忠诚的鬣狗。 战败后，遭到了有机生命的联合清算，旋即亡族。 由于约特伍德体死后会成为纯粹的矿物，疾疫在其体内沉积为斑斓的色彩， 约特伍德星就此成为千风过境的百色石窟。 战火散去，唯留一顶寄寓了其君主制历史的王族冠冕，遗落在无声的风中。 相关奇物： 不可承受之重 收容于本空间站内的奇物，外表为镶满水晶的冠冕。 实则是硅基生命约特伍德体的皇族桂冠，是其君主制历史的活化石。 据传，每一任约特伍德统治者在死去后， 其逻辑中枢都将被嵌入这顶由历代帝皇的思想偏晶组成的桂冠。 约特伍德体坚信，这顶桂冠将为统治者带来代际相传的智慧， 因此，约特伍德族的历任统治者总是异乎寻常的坚巨、沉重和美丽。 近几个琥珀纪有学者认为，该冠冕其实存放着约特伍德体的种族记忆与基本细胞， 只需将桂冠置于冷月的光辉之下，便能触摸它们隐秘的历史； 只需一枚来自那位星神的生命火种，这个失落的族群便将迎来重生。
E: Galactic Species Serial Number: Inorganic #27 Species Name: Tottonid Cosmic Nicknames: Electric Giant, Glowing Star Polyhedron, Respiring Boulder Category: Kingdom Inorganic Organism - Class Silica - Order Monotectoid - Family Petragigas Research Summary: The home world of the Tottonids is a planet plagued by catastrophic storms. It was said that tornadoes that pass through will destroy everything in its path, leaving only the strongest and most resilient lives. This species appears as a translucent crystal with an internal logic center called a thought monotectic. Two individuals of this species would communicate with each other by emitting electric signals through this organ. Their language, psyche, and history are unknown to the cosmos. In the era of the Mecha Wars, Tottonids were loyal sidekicks to the Mechas. After their defeat, the Tottonids were eradicated by organic creatures and became extinct. Tottonids turn into mineral ores after their passing, and their past disease develop into splashes of colors within their bodies. The Totton planet thus became a cavernous rocky planet blighted with storms. When the fires of war cleared, only a royal crown, which embodied the history of its monarchy, was left behind in the silent winds. Related Curio: Unbearable Weight A Curio kept within the confines of the space station, appearing as a crystal-encrusted crown. It is actually the imperial crown from the silicon-based lifeforms of the Totton planet, a living fossil of the monarchy's history. According to rumors, each deceased Tottonid emperor will have their logic center embedded in this crown composed of the logic centers of previous emperors. The Tottonids believe this crown brings the wisdom of generations to its rulers. It's also the reason why the rulers of the Tottonid have always been unusually large, heavy, and beautiful. In the past few Amber Eras, there are scholars who believe that the crown actually stores racial memories and basic cells of the Tottonids. They also believe that exposing the crown to moonlight would allow them to touch the buried history of the race. With the kindling of life from that Aeon, this lost people of yesteryear can be given a rebirth.

C:
<align="center"><size=36>魔阴身考 • 弁言</size></align>

自「建木」显化，仙舟人获得无尽形寿，联盟对抗「魔阴身」的历史已逾六千年之久。

一如最初仙舟的启航，是人类对抗衰老、死亡这场漫长战争的尾声。那末至帝弓垂迹，三族共盟，仙舟人开启了与不死身、丰饶之孽的无尽对抗。

也许历史就是一个永不止息的循环，仙舟人摆脱了一个对手，又迎来更艰难的敌人。只是这场战争的尾声不知伊于胡底。

拙作试图梳理「魔阴身」这一概念的发现源起，仙舟人对它的认知变化与相关研究成果，意在让读者更清楚、客观地理解仙舟人长生不死的本质，了解「寿瘟祸祖」对仙舟无法磨灭的影响。

此书撰写的过程中获得了来自丹枢大人及众多医士的帮助，也从丹鼎司「观颐台」的案牍卷宗中摘取了许多一手资料。贤达友朋，馈益良多，恕不在此一一感谢。

<align="right">丹鼎司丹士 华玥</align>
E:
<align="center"><size=36>A Study into the Mara-Struck: Introduction</size></align>

Since the manifestation of the Ambrosial Arbor, the Xianzhou natives have acquired an endless lifespan and the Alliance has been exposed to and resisting the mara for some six thousand years now.

Just like the maiden voyage of the Xianzhou, it represented the end of humanity's long war against aging and death, it's not until Reignbow Arbiter interfered that the three races allied, and the Xianzhou people began their endless conflict against the undying and Abominations of Abundance.

Perhaps time is just a flat circle. The Xianzhou people shook off one opponent, only to welcome an even more powerful foe. But nobody knows from whence the end of this war will come.

This humble manuscript attempts to address the origins of the concept of being "mara-struck," the Xianzhou people's changing perceptions toward it, and related scientific breakthroughs. The intention is for readers to understand the nature of Xianzhou native's longevity more clearly and subjectively, and to understand the Plagues Author's indelible influence on Xianzhou.

Lady Dan Shu and several healers assisted me in piecing together this book, and I also plucked plenty of first-hand information from the Elixir Research Terrace at the Alchemy Commission. O great friends, you have given me so much that I cannot thank you individually here.

<align="right">Alchemy Commission Alchemist, Huayue</align>

C: <align="center">梦中不可能之事并非「死亡」，而是「沉眠」。</align>\n<align="center">活下去。祝你好运。</align>
E: <align="center">The impossible in the Dreamscape is not "Death," but rather "Dormancy."</align>\n<align="center">Do stay alive. I wish you the best of luck.</align>

C: 安索鲁，天环族男性，于「绿洲的时刻」海滨享受日光浴时，遭未知迷因拖入海中，后续搜救行动失败。 注：第一起案件，看不出问题。调查不足？ 茂离，仙舟男性，于「黄金的时刻」进入球笼后，在球笼空中弹射时神秘失踪，经事后检查，球笼并无暴力开启痕迹。 注：似乎可以无视阻碍。常规搜查手段可行性？ 艾玛卡，人类女性，于「热砂的时刻」参加选秀节目，在导师转身前失足坠落台下，消失在阴影中，该期节目录像已删除。 注：速度极快，善于伪装。小心。 韦伯，皮皮西男性，于「烫金的时刻」发薪日当天进入办公室时摔倒，被突然出现的未知迷因杀害，目击者相关记忆已处理。 注：优先袭击受伤和弱小的个体？存疑，疑似受到指使。 契美特，皮皮西男性，于「星辰的时刻」赌场游玩，翻牌时被掳走，赌场工作人员已进行后续处理。 注：翻牌值得注意。 迪凯姆，人类男性，于「蓝调的时刻」跳进梦泡之海，以向女友展现自身气魄，被海中未知迷因缠住并沉没，其女友已接受记忆处理，但效果不佳，有待鼓励师介入。 注：多与海洋相关。会是突破口吗？ 另注：整理后仅见两例，排除。 采夏，狐人女性，于「黄金的时刻」体验美梦排排乐时被未知迷因吞没，引发现场极大混乱，现目击人群记忆处理基本完成。 注：疑似美梦剧团？或者有模仿学习能力？团体作案？有幕后指使者可能性较大。 坎贝加，猎犬男性，于「安谧的时刻」工作换班前夕遭未知迷因袭击，战斗后不敌并被杀害，目前已增派监狱地区看守人员。 注：没什么值得关注的细节。另，需要求猎犬加强监狱等设施防备。 珍妮德，人类女性，于「太阳的时刻」参观博物馆时，在电影史展厅被神秘呼唤吸引，走进屏幕消失，事故现场已封锁。 注：仅一例表明有语言能力，或许为误报。待验证。 蒙克，智械男性，于「薄暮的时刻」拍得高档机械视觉传感器后，更换时遭到袭击。 注：视觉传感器？值得注意。 安妮特，皮皮西女性，于「太阳的时刻」折纸大学毕业典礼前，于卫生间补妆时，被迷因抓进镜子消失，目击者为现场的一名教师。 注：镜子？需留意。现阶段猜想与视线相关。 克罗伊，智械女性，于「蓝调的时刻」邀朋友一同庆祝生日，在吹蛋糕蜡烛时受迷因袭击消失。目击者仍在接受鼓励师治疗。 注：黑暗或受害者视野不佳的环境下多发。真的是视线吗？ 卡瑞莎，天环族女性，于「热砂的时刻」登台表演前，在后台遭狂热粉丝骚扰，在逃离过程中被迷因掳走，该粉丝已由猎犬接收。 注：遭到狂热粉丝掳走？此人需多留意。 多伦，人类男性，于「黎明的时刻」下班前擅自停工打盹休息，被藏在椅子下的未知迷因掳走，经紧急处理，工厂生产仍正常进行。 注：打盹？另，与苜蓿草讨论增加工人假期和额外休息时间。 马洛，人类男性，于「黄金的时刻」遭遇车祸后失踪。据悉，有人在车祸现场目击到了逃进地下的怪异迷因。 注：这是真正的「死亡」。该迷因一定与死亡和谋杀之类概念有关。 …… *整份清单罗列了百余起与忆域迷因「死亡」相关的案件，但清单的整理人似乎依旧没能理清头绪。*
E: Ansorol, a male Halovian, was dragged into the sea by an unknown meme while sunbathing on the beach in the Moment of Oasis. Subsequent search and rescue operations proved unsuccessful. Note: This was the first case. Can't tell if anything is wrong. Insufficient investigation? Mouri, a male from Xianzhou, entered a Spheroid in Golden Hour and mysteriously disappeared while the Spheroid was bouncing in air. Later examinations showed no signs of forced entry or exit on the Spheroid. Note: It seems the culprit can ignore physical barriers. Conventional investigation methods feasible? Emaka, a female human, participated in a talent show in the Moment of Scorchsand but accidentally fell off the stage before the judges turned around and disappeared in the shadows below. The footage for that episode of the show has been deleted. Note: The culprit is swift and skilled at disguises. Caution is advised. Weber, a male Pepeshi, fell down when entering his office on payday in Gilded Hour, and was killed by an unknown meme that suddenly appeared. The memories of witnesses have been processed. Note: Preferring to attack wounded or vulnerable individuals? Uncertain. May be taking orders from someone else. Chemmet, a male Pepeshi, was taken away while flipping over a card at a casino in the Moment of Stars. The casino staff has dealt with the aftermath of the incident. Note: Flipping a card. Interesting. Dekem, a male human, jumped into the ocean of dream bubbles in Blue Hour in an attempt to impress his girlfriend but got entangled by an unknown meme under the sea and drowned. His girlfriend's memories have been processed, but the outcomes are not satisfactory. Further intervention from Motivators may be necessary. Note: Most cases are related to the ocean. Could this be a breakthrough? Additional Note: Scratch that. After checking, only two cases were related to the ocean. Caixia, a female foxian, was engulfed by an unknown meme while playing Dreamy Slots in Golden Hour. The incident caused a huge commotion at the spot. The memories of most witnesses have been processed. Note: Could it be the Sweet Dreams Troupe? Does it have the ability to imitate and learn? Multiple culprits? There is likely a mastermind behind the scenes. Kambega, a male Bloodhound, was attacked by an unknown meme before his shift change in the Moment of Serenity, resulting in his death after a fight. Security measures have been enhanced in the prison area. Note: No notable details in this case. Need to ask the Bloodhound Family to strengthen defenses in the prison and other facilities. Janet, a female human, disappeared while visiting the film history gallery at the museum in the Moment of Sol. She was drawn towards a mysterious sound calling to her and walked into a screen, vanishing without a trace. The site has been cordoned off. Note: This is the only case where the culprit demonstrated speech ability. Further verification is required to determine if this is a false claim. Monk, a male Intellitron, was attacked while replacing his newly purchased high-grade vision sensor in the auction at the Moment of Dusk. Note: Vision sensor? Noteworthy. Annette, a female Pepeshi, vanished while touching up her makeup in the bathroom before the graduation ceremony at Paperfold University in the Moment of Sol. She was caught by a meme, dragged into a mirror, and disappeared. This was witnessed by a teacher at the scene. Note: Mirror? Noteworthy. Current hypothesis is related to sight. Chloe, a female Intellitron, was attacked by a meme and disappeared when she blew out the candles during her birthday celebration with her friends in Blue Hour. All witnesses are currently receiving treatment from Motivators. Note: More attacks occurred in dark or dim environments. Is "sight" really a trigger? Carissa, a female Halovian, was harassed by a fervent fan backstage before her performance in the Moment of Scorchsand and was subsequently abducted by a meme during her escape. The Bloodhound Family has apprehended the fan. Note: Abducted? Keep a lookout for this fervent fan. Dorian, a male human, took a nap before the end of his shift in the Moment of Daybreak without telling his managers and was abducted by an unknown meme hiding under a chair. Emergency intervention was provided, and production at the factory has resumed as usual. Note: Taking a nap? Plus, consider discussing with the Alfalfa Family about increased vacation time and additional breaks for workers. Marlowe, a male human, disappeared after being involved in a car accident in Golden Hour. Witnesses reported the presence of an eerie meme who fled underground at the scene of the accident. Note: This is a genuine case of "Death." The meme must be connected to concepts such as death and murder. ... *This list comprises over a hundred cases related to the Memory Zone Meme "Death." However, the author of the list seems to still struggle with figuring out the pattern.

C:
摘录自《皮皮西秘史》：
1.皮皮西人头上的绒球才是本体，人身是一种拟态。
2.希佩曾试图赐福皮皮西人，但祂发现被赐福的是自己。
3.摸一摸皮皮西的绒球，可以延年益寿。
4.皮皮西的绒球可以在危险时刻脱离本体，并长出新的身体。
5.可惜的是，让皮皮西人感到足够危险的事物并不存在。
6.「毁灭」是皮皮西一族的命途「捣蛋」的衍生品。
7.皮皮西人的绒球可以发射出超光速粒子束。
8.皮皮西人能抓住自己发射的超光速粒子束，在粒子束的终点。
9.皮皮西人不是做梦，是梦在做皮皮西。
<unbreak>10</unbreak>.一位皮皮西在宇宙尽头的餐馆讲了个笑话，于是就有了阿哈。
<unbreak>11</unbreak>.皮皮西数学家曾解开了生命、宇宙和一切问题的答案，但匹诺康尼的梦境放不下这样伟大的真理。
<unbreak>12</unbreak>.最早的黑洞起源于一位皮皮西人，他在和一颗恒星比赛掰手腕时忘了放水。
<unbreak>13</unbreak>.原本绝灭大君有几百位，直到他们在团建时遇见了皮皮西人。
<unbreak>14</unbreak>.所有的皮皮西人其实都是一位皮皮西神在低维空间的投影。
<unbreak>15</unbreak>.皮皮西人想要喝热水，水自己热了。
<unbreak>16</unbreak>.匹诺康尼的大空洞其实是被皮皮西人一拳打出来的。
<unbreak>17</unbreak>.星际和平公司本想公布第<unbreak>16</unbreak>条的事实，但那位皮皮西人对此表达了不满。
<unbreak>18</unbreak>.当死亡找上皮皮西人时，我们会说，「死亡被皮皮西找上了」。
<unbreak>19</unbreak>.丰饶星神拥有几乎无穷的生命，祂唯一的一次濒死是打扰了正在午睡的皮皮西。
<unbreak>20</unbreak>.药师的命是跟皮皮西人借的，岚的弓是跟皮皮西人买的，博识尊是皮皮西人造的，阿哈的笑话是跟皮皮西人偷的，希佩的曲子全是皮皮西人谱的。
<unbreak>21</unbreak>.皮皮西人通过殴打印钞机的方式制造苜蓿币。
<unbreak>22</unbreak>.皮皮西人从不去理发店，他们用等离子枪来打理绒球。
<unbreak>23</unbreak>.万界之癌是皮皮西人在宇宙里野餐时掉下的零食碎屑。
<unbreak>24</unbreak>.「开拓」的列车引擎借鉴了皮皮西人散步时的超光速走路法。
<unbreak>25</unbreak>.《钟表小子》最初的原型是皮皮西人，但摄像机因为恐惧炸掉了。
<unbreak>26</unbreak>.「钟表匠」是不愿意露面的皮皮西人，哈努努是毛比较多的皮皮西人，老奥帝真的是皮皮西人。
……
E: Excerpts from the book The Secret History of the Pepeshi. 1. The fluff ball on the heads of the Pepeshi is actually their core, while their human body is merely a form of mimicry. 2. Xipe once attempted to bestow blessings upon the Pepeshi, only to discover that it was Xipe THEMSELF who received the blessings. 3. Touching the Pepeshi's fluff ball can extend one's lifespan. 4. In times of danger, the Pepeshi's fluffy ball has the ability to detach from their body and regenerate a new body. 5. However, there are no known threats that are capable of making the Pepeshi feel truly endangered. 6. The Destruction is merely a derivative of the Pepeshi's one and only Path — Mischief. 7. The Pepeshi's fluff ball can emit faster-than-light particle beams. 8. The Pepeshi can catch the faster-than-light particle beams they launch at the end of those beams. 9. The Pepeshi do not dream. Instead, dreams dream of the Pepeshi. 10. Once, a Pepeshi told a joke in a restaurant at the end of the universe, leading to the emergence of Aha. 11. Pepeshi mathematicians have discovered the ultimate answers to all questions about life, the universe itself, and everything. However, there is not enough space in Penacony's Dreamscape to embrace the profound answers. 12. The first black hole was created when a Pepeshi forgot to limit their strength while arm-wrestling with a star. 13. Originally, there were several hundred Lord Ravagers until they unfortunately ran into a Pepeshi during a group excursion. 14. All the Pepeshi are actually a Pepeshi Deity's projections in the lower dimension. 15. When the Pepeshi want some hot water, the water heats itself. 16. The great hole in Penacony was actually formed when a Pepeshi punched the Dreamscape. 17. IPC initially intended to publicize the truth stated in Article 16, but that Pepeshi expressed their dissatisfaction, leading to an immediate change of plans. 18. When death approaches a Pepeshi, people will say "death is approached by a Pepeshi." 19. The Aeon of Abundance possesses nearly infinite life, and the only time THEY came close to death was when the Aeon disturbed a Pepeshi during their nap. 20. Yaoshi borrowed THEIR lifespan from the Pepeshi. Lan purchased THEIR bow from the Pepeshi. Nous was actually crafted by the Pepeshi. Aha took THEIR jokes from the Pepeshi, and all of Xipe's music was composed by the Pepeshi. 21. The Pepeshi create Alfalfa credit by punching the money printing machines. 22. The Pepeshi never visit barbershops: They use plasma cannons to groom their fluff ball. 23. The Cancer of All Worlds is merely crumbs left behind by the Pepeshi during picnics throughout the universe. 24. The engine of the Trailblaze draws inspiration from the faster-than-light strides used by the Pepeshi during their leisurely strolls. 25. Clockie was originally based on a Pepeshi, but the camera capturing its image exploded in awe. 26. The Watchmaker is a Pepeshi who prefers to remain hidden from public view. Hanunue is said to be a furry Pepeshi. And Old Oti is actually a Pepeshi. ...

C: 「愚蠢者以肉身为墙，贪婪者以钱财为墙。末日到来时，他们化作相同的灰烬。」 ——佚名，《此生苦短》 传说「存护」的克里珀是最古老的星神。祂沉默持重，以光年为单位修筑着环绕星河的障壁，从不介入银河间嘈杂的争斗纷扰，亦不理会其它星神的嘲弄呼唤。 银河间的文明纷纷揣测祂的动机：一则说古老的星神预见了足以令宇宙湮灭的危机，为「存护」万千世界建筑壁垒；一则说克里珀甘愿沦为其它星神的苦隶，尊奉旨意为祂们修建城墙。真相无从验证，唯有祂孜孜不倦的举动驱策了凡人，他们自发地聚汇成群，开始修筑保护星球的壁垒。筑城者中有人声称自己感受到了「存护」之神的注视：祂的目光透出赞许，捎带锻炉的暖意，掺糅石灰的气味。 一颗恒星的湮灭可能殃及千百光年外的星球，把它们推上存亡的陡崖——偶有世界经历此般浩劫，全因矗立的高墙才得以保全。死里逃生的人们不再讥讽「筑城者」们的固执，并纷纷加入他们的行列，再不过问「存护」的动机或意义。
E: "The foolish have their wall of flesh, and the greedy have their wall of riches. When the end comes, they will all turn to ash." — Life Is Too Short by Anonymous Legend has it, the Aeon of Preservation, Qlipoth, is the oldest Aeon. Silent and mighty, Qlipoth built a light-years long barrier around the cosmos, never engaging in any trivial conflicts or badgering with the other Aeons. Civilizations across the cosmos speculate on the motive of Qlipoth. One said the ancient Aeon foresaw a disaster that could obliterate the cosmos, so Qlipoth built a barrier to protect the worlds; one said Qlipoth was willing to slave for other Aeons and was ordered to build walls for THEM. There is no way to verify the truth, but Qlipoth's tireless actions moved the mortals. They spontaneously gathered in groups to build a barrier to protect their planet. Some Architects have claimed to feel the protective gaze of the Aeon upon them. They liken it to a gaze of approval, tinged with the warmth of the forge and the smell of lime. The annihilation of a single star can devastate planets thousands of light-years away, pushing them to the precipice of extinction. On the rare occasions of such calamities, worlds are saved only by the walls their denizens have built. People who survived their demise no longer mocked the stubbornness of the Architects. Instead, they joined them, never to question their motives or the meaning of Preservation ever again.

C: …… 上一世因阻挡盗火行者而未能目睹的「再创世」，没想到此世竟有机会亲眼见证。 说来奇怪，我居然也习惯了有关「前世今生」的措辞。莫非是肩负起大地火种后，与翁法罗斯更「骨血相融」的缘故？抑或是这段旅程，确切地唤起了我有关轮回蜕生的回忆？ 我无意将开拓日志写成一段自说自话的独白，那是三月才会干的事。 *喂！本姑娘这叫行文生动活泼，富有生趣好不好~* 从列车上归还，投身忆潮以来，光怪陆离的风波便迭起，若不将之一一记下，恐怕也有失客观。 在深入树庭的过程中，我再度与「丹枫」，那个永远无法回避的过去再次相遇。我从未意识到这幅身躯竟将那一幕幕记得如此清晰。如果重来一次，是否会选择守护同伴，即便代价是牺牲一切？我询问荒笛那些「丹枫」曾质问我的问题，说不定…也是再次诘问自己。 当荒笛给出答案时，我也确证了自己的决心…无论回答多少次，我的答案都不会改变。 *如果你问咱们的话，答案肯定也是——是的！* 知晓{NICKNAME}落入「岁月」的忆潮中，协同长夜月构建那片忆潮世界的正是荒笛…现在想来，那「大地」的半神竟然是如此眷恋着翁法罗斯的大地——忆潮中那巨大迷宫便是大地本身，而{NICKNAME}就在其中某处。 我能做的不过是施行大地的权能，将思想汇入巨树，循着瑟希斯所见证的历史，行遍翁法罗斯。 第一个百年，我用指尖划过我们曾踏足的每一条小径，询问溪流、森林、城邦和其中栖居的生灵，亦向亘古久远的砾石、矿藏和山峦探听见闻。但徒劳无获。 第二个百年，我用手掌触摸海浪，将视线投向天空，跟随鱼群窥探最深邃的海沟，同升腾的云雾眺望茫茫天空。亦无功而返。 于是，时间逐渐磨损我启程时的决心，我迷失在古奥的岩层之中。不过，想要在忆潮中寻找一个被忘却的人，所仰赖的只能是与{NICKNAME}的共同回忆，它们在我的脑海中不断浮现，不断唤起我启程时的初心，最终也指引我找到了{NICKNAME}的方向。 幸好，那忆潮虽然无边无际，但是回忆就像是长路上的灯火一样。我找到了{F#她}{M#他}，并与{F#她}{M#他}一同，重新唤回了三月七。 从启程起我便知道，那近千年的旅程，于忆潮之外，不过一瞬而已。但那几近使心志磨灭的体验仍旧令人后怕，不过我已顾不得那么多了。 *真抱歉，给大家添了这么多麻烦…但话又说回来，嘿嘿…咱果然是身藏神秘力量的少女！* 行文至此，昔涟小姐和{NICKNAME}，已近完成「最后的再创世」的筹备。 …以及，三月七吵着要「批阅」这份「久违的」开拓日志。那么，暂且搁笔。 *没错，是时候了…为翁法罗斯，开拓崭新的明天！*
E: ... I did not get to witness the Era Nova in my previous life due to fighting the Flame Reaver. Little did I expect that I now have the chance to witness it firsthand in this life. Odd. I've gotten used to phrases like "past and present lives." Is it because carrying the Coreflame of Earth has made me more "molded" to Amphoreus? Or has this journey genuinely awakened memories of my hatching rebirth? But I have no desire to turn this Trailblaze log into some self-centered soliloquy. That would be March's style. *Hey! For your information, my style is considered dynamic and captivating, thank you very much~* Since my return from the Express and immersion in the memoria tide, strange events have cascaded one after another. I must document everything to maintain objectivity. While heading deeper into the Grove, I faced "Dan Feng" again, that inescapable past of mine. I never imagined this body would retain such clear memories of those moments. Would I choose differently if given another chance? Would I still protect my companions at the cost of everything? When I asked Terravox these questions, the very ones "Dan Feng" once asked me, perhaps... I was interrogating myself once more. Terravox's response helped cement my own conviction... No matter how many times I face these questions, my answers remain unchanged. *If you asked us, the answer would definitely be... yes!* I learned that {NICKNAME} had fallen into Time's memoria tide, and it was Terravox who worked with Evernight to build that memoria world... In retrospect, that demigod of Earth was so deeply attached to the land of Amphoreus. The immense maze within the memoria tide was Earth itself, with {NICKNAME} hidden somewhere inside. My only option was to channel Earth's power, project my consciousness into the giant tree, and journey across Amphoreus through the history that Cerces had witnessed. For the first century, I traced with my fingertips every trail we'd previously walked, questioning rivers, woodlands, city-states, and their inhabitants. I also consulted ancient stones, ore deposits, and mountain ranges, but all efforts proved fruitless. In the next hundred years, I touched with my palm the ocean waves, cast my gaze towards the sky, followed schools of fish to glance into abyssal trenches, and surveyed the clouds alongside rising mists. Again, I found nothing. Slowly, time eroded my initial determination, and I lost myself among the primordial rock strata. Yet, only the shared memories with {NICKNAME} could guide me to locate someone forgotten within the memoria tide. These recollections continuously emerged in my mind, rekindling my original purpose and eventually leading me to {NICKNAME}. Despite the endless expanse of the memoria tide, our memories served as beacons along an endless path. I found {F#her}{M#him}, and together we reawakened March 7th. I always knew that my thousand-year journey would be just a blink outside the tide. Still... that experience, which nearly obliterated my consciousness, remains harrowing. However, I can't afford to worry about that anymore. *So sorry for putting everyone through all that trouble... but then again, hehe... guess I really am a girl with mysterious powers after all!* As I write these words, Miss Cyrene and {NICKNAME} are on the verge of completing preparations for the "Final Era Nova." ...And March 7th keeps badgering me to let her "review" this "seriously delayed" Trailblaze log. I suppose I should set aside my pen for now. *Indeed, the time has come... for us to trailblaze Amphoreus into a brand-new tomorrow!*

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 曾经，「理性」赠予圣城一枚种子，如今这枚种子已然成为花园，为这破碎的世代延续智慧，孕育生机。
E: In the past, "Reason" granted the holy city a seed. Now, this seed has become a garden, passing down wisdom and nurturing life for this broken era.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 自我毁灭亦是毁灭的表征。被囚于匣中的残念，至今仍渴求着彻底的消亡。
E: Self-destruction is yet another form of utter ruin. The restless obsession trapped in the void long ago craves tranquility and peace.

C: 苏乐达能够为美梦小镇带来快乐与欢笑，但邪恶的石头老板讨厌所有美好的东西，于是囚禁了汽水先生，也藏起了小镇中所有的苏乐达…美梦小镇的英雄——钟表小子！将会潜入石头老板的办公楼，为居民们重新带回笑容！
E: SoulGlad brings joy and laughter to Dreamville, but the evil Boss Stone hates all things good. Consequently, he has imprisoned Mr. Soda and hidden all the SoulGlad in the town... The hero of Dreamville — Clockie — will infiltrate Boss Stone's office building to bring back smiles to the townspeople!

C: 具备独立星际航行能力的星际舰船，与基座连接为一体时作为空间站控制中枢而存在。
E: The master control zone can be detached from the station, capable of traversing the Cosmos on its own. It serves as the brain of operations when attached to the main body of the space station.

C: 流云渡中辟作货物堆积之用的平台，箱笼高企，几成迷宫。
E: A platform used to store goods in Cloudford. The crates are stacked high towards the roof, almost forming a maze-like structure.

C: 迴星港入口处的小阁，为工造司匠人们准备的换班休息处。
E: A small building next to the entrance of Stargazer Navalia, made for Artisanship Commission craftsmen to relax in between their shifts.

C: 匹诺康尼大剧院的主厅。「同谐」集群意识的代行者「调弦师」将在此处降临，因此得名。
E: The main hall of the Penacony Grand Theater. The Chordmaster, representative of Harmony's hive mind, will descend here, hence its name.

C: 映射艾格勒心绪的巨大画壁，据说在艾格勒失神以前，画壁上酝酿的气候将会转变为翁法罗斯世界的天象。
E: The colossal mural reflecting Aquila's emotions is said to influence the weather of Amphoreus, transforming the atmospheric phenomena depicted on its surface before Aquila's consciousness fades.

C: 天空堡垒内部的一处悬台，抬头便能瞥见犹如巨骨的机械柱梁。
E: A suspended platform within the sky fortress, where one can glance up and catch sight of mechanical pillars and beams resembling giant bones.

C: 金人巷内随时随地会发生的大小事。帮助街坊邻里解决麻烦，提高商会口碑，说不定会有意料之外的收获。
E: Ordinary life problems that can happen any time in Aurum Alley. Lend a hand to the neighborhood, improve the Merchant Guild's reputation, and you may just stumble upon some unexpected benefits.

C: 充满快乐与回忆的大树，折纸小鸟的聚集地之一。
E: The Great Tree is filled with happiness and memories. A place where Origami Birds gather.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，蕴藏掠夺而来的「理性」。被制造出来的意义并非是研究普遍的知识，而是钻研杀戮的兵法与弱肉强食的残酷理论，散布假名为哲学的疯病。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They contain plundered "rationality" within their vessels. The reason behind their creation is not truly toward the study of universal knowledge, but to delve deep into brutal martial tactics and the merciless laws of survival, further spreading madness masquerading as philosophy.

E: Whenever a character hits an enemy target with a Follow-Up ATK, all allies' actions are Advanced Forward by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect can only be triggered once for each attack.

E: During "Surging Grit", increases all allies SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and after using a Skill, apply <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of "Resound" to all allies.

C: 进入战斗时，随机使<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>名我方目标当前能量恢复至各自的能量上限。
E: Upon entering battle, randomly regenerates energy for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> allies to max.

C: 每次行动消耗<color=#f29e38ff><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color></color>当前生命值，并在行动后回复等同生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color></color>的生命值。\n进入「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」时我方全体获得<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>层<color=#f29e38ff>【<u>呐喊</u>】</color>，我方角色当前生命值每次提升或降低<color=#f29e38ff><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>点</color>时，我方全体额外获得1层<color=#f29e38ff>【<u>呐喊</u>】</color>，每层【<u>呐喊</u>】可使持有者造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color>，最高叠加<unbreak>99</unbreak>层，持续至本阶段结束。
E: Each action consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color> of current HP and restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color> of Max HP.\nAfter entering "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken," all allies will gain <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Bellow</u></color>. Every time an ally's current HP increases or decreases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>, all allies will gain a stack of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Bellow</u></color>. Each stack of <u>Bellow</u> increases the DMG dealt by the affected unit by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color> to a max of <unbreak>99</unbreak> stacks. This effect lasts until the end of the phase.

E: At the start of the turn, consumes HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the unit's current HP, and gains 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Blood Rage</u></color>. Each stack of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Blood Rage</u></color> increases CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> and CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect lasts for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s) and can reach a max of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s).

At the start of their turn, if their current HP percentage is equal to or lower than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP.

C: 「无论人类抑或泰坦，谁都无法独立于世界本身而存在。过去为未来打下烙印，它既是一切的基石，也是一切的束缚。随着这样的束缚越来越多，人也就离原本亲近的泰坦越来越远……最终遗忘了过去，浑然不觉对方也有可能被一种更高的命运主宰。如果按照这个解读，那么牧羊人和羊的解读，放在我们当中任何一个人的身上也都能成立——甚至牧羊人和羊也可以是同一回事。（就像最初的段落里暗示的那样！）」
E: "Neither humans nor Titans can exist independently of the world itself. The past imprints itself upon the future, acting as both the foundation and the constraint of all things. As these constraints multiply, humans grow further and further from the Titans they were once close to... eventually forgetting the past, unaware that both sides could be subject to a higher destiny. If we interpret it this way, then the roles of shepherd and sheep could apply to any of us — they could even be one and the same (just as hinted in the opening passage!)"

To {NICKNAME} and company:
Of the Grove's circumstances we are now fully cognizant, and for thy most diligent efforts we harbor the deepest gratitude — indeed, no words could adequately convey the depth of our appreciation.
Alas, the holy city presently faces sundry complications, and manifold duties command our attention, precluding us from extending proper welcome — for this oversight we express sincere regret.
Furthermore, following thy arduous voyage, rest must be prioritized. The particulars of recent events shall be deliberated upon the morrow. So it is written.

C: 犯尽十恶，永镇于幽狱之底的步离人首领。\n身负七百年苦狱仇恨，在脱出牢笼后，群狼之主向整个罗浮仙舟发起了挑战。但潜藏在疯狂之举的背后，似乎另有目标……
E: A borisin leader who committed the Ten Unpardonable Sins, eternally imprisoned at the bottom of The Shackling Prison.\nBearing the hatred of seven centuries of bitter confinement, the Lord of Wolves challenges the entire Xianzhou Luofu upon breaking free from his cage. Yet, there seems to be another objective hidden behind his maddened actions...

C: 集中了所有拍摄资源，成为大咖中的大咖的主角斯科特。意识和灵魂被从者分散后，以千般面相展开了对开拓者的复仇。
E: Skott, who gathered all the filming resources to become the greatest protagonist of all protagonists. With his consciousness and soul scattered by a Servant, he seeks revenge from the Trailblazer in a thousand different appearances.

C: 「纯美骑士团」的古典骑士，虔诚地仰慕着已失踪的「纯美」星神伊德莉拉。\n为人正直、光明磊落，于宇宙中漫游，宣扬伊德莉拉美名。
E: A paragon knight of the Knights of Beauty who is piously seeking his missing Aeon, Idrila the Beauty.\nForthright and candid, he wanders the cosmos espousing the virtues of Idrila's good name.

C: 在翁法罗斯的野地和巷弄间游荡的双子精灵，以窃取财物、捉弄旅人为乐。往往在寻宝者得手在即时捷足先登，徒留的硬币是它无伤大雅的玩笑。
E: The twin sprites roaming the wilds and alleys of Amphoreus, taking pleasure in stealing valuables and playing tricks on travelers. They often outpace Treasure Hunters at the last moment, leaving only a coin as a harmless joke.

C: 冥河中沉眠的死龙，受炼成召引再度苏醒，化成槁骨腐肉的模样。\n它曾是「死亡」的泰坦，逆溯冥河向上，离开乌有之界于现世搁浅。它曾随冥河潮汐涌上大地，为翁法罗斯的万事万物烙上命定的终局。那些将死的，或已死的存在，皆会因它的归来感受到灵魂深处的颤栗。
E: Netherwing, slumbering dormant in the River of Souls, has been reawakened by an alchemical summoning and morphed into a thing of rot and decay.\nIt once was the Death Titan, swimming upstream in the River of Souls' currents, leaving the realm of non-existence and stranded in the mortal world. Once, they followed the tides of the River of Souls to drown the living lands, branding all things in Amphoreus with a fated end. All the existences that will die or have died will feel a shudder in the depths of their souls with the dragon's return.

E: Deals Imaginary DMG to a single target.

E: Makes all Echoes of Faded Dreams that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to a single target. If there are no Echoes of Faded Dreams that can take action, then this ability will fail to launch. After using this ability, restore Toughness for Echoes of Faded Dreams.

C: 每个我方角色生成1个对应的【征服或被征服】，并使对应角色进入【受征服】状态。【受征服】会降低角色可回复的生命上限，降低对应【征服或被征服】的生命值可恢复对应比例的可回复生命上限。如未消灭对应的【征服或被征服】，剩余【受征服】效果会转化为一定比例的【世代受征服】。
E: Every target character spawns a corresponding "Conquer or Be Conquered," and causes the corresponding character to enter a "Conquered" state. "Conquered" will reduce the character's Maximum Restorable HP. Reducing the HP of the corresponding "Conquer or Be Conquered" restores the corresponding Maximum Restorable HP. If there are undefeated "Conquer or Be Conquered," the remaining "Conquered" effect will be converted into a proportion of "Conquered Eon."

C: 【灰黯之手，遐蝶】或【哀悯长臂】的技能击中我方目标时，会为我方目标施加不可解除的特殊持续伤害状态，该状态下目标当前生命值百分比越高受到的伤害越高，该伤害<u>【不致命】</u>。
E: When "Castorice, Hand of Shadow" or "The Long Arms of Sorrow" hits a target with an ability, applies a special Unremovable DoT DMG state to the target. While under this state, the higher the target's HP percentage is, the more DMG they take. This DMG is "<u>Non-fatal</u>."

C: 对我方单体造成量子属性伤害，对高于一定生命值百分比的目标，该伤害会转化为量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to one target. This DMG converts to Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>" against targets with HP above a certain percentage.

C: 【枯茎朽骨的引路人】没有弱点。当【哀悯长臂】处于弱点击破状态时，其初始弱点会被添加到其他所有敌方目标，直到其从弱点击破状态恢复。
E: "Guide of Withering and Decay" has no Weakness. When "The Long Arms of Sorrow" is in the Weakness Broken state, its initial Weakness will be added to all other enemy targets until it recovers from the Weakness Broken state.

C: 升高【<u>温度</u>】，从我方队伍左侧起发动数次攻击，优先对我方全体目标逐个攻击1次，剩余次数随机攻击我方单体目标，每次攻击根据当前【<u>温度</u>】造成火属性伤害，并<u>修复</u>【百眼之末】。
E: Raises "<u>Temperature</u>." Launches several attacks from the left side of the target team, and delivers a 1-time priority attack to each target, with the remaining attack counts attacking one random target each. Each attack deals Fire DMG based on the current "<u>Temperature</u>," as well as <u>reinstates</u> "Shoot of Hundred Eyes."

C: 对我方全体造成少量物理属性伤害，被击中目标降低生命值的一部分转化为<u>【侵蚀】</u>。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to all targets. Converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to <u>"Corrosion"</u>.

C: 抵抗控制类负面状态。当【？？？】再次施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，若自身曾被该攻击召唤，则与【？？？】一同发起攻击。随后被其吸收，回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值，并使其获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: Resists Crowd Control debuffs. When "???" uses "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" again and if this unit was summoned by that attack type, then this unit will attack alongside "???." E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets and consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to additionally deal several instances of minor Physical DMG.

E: Obtains <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and enters the "Silent Sorrow" state. Uses "Cry Not for the Discarded" in the next action.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成少量量子属性伤害。
E: Deals successive minor Quantum DMG to one random target.

C: 对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害，并使目标降低生命值的一部分转化为【侵蚀】，【旋绕】越多，伤害越高，随后失去所有【旋绕】层数。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets and converts a portion of the targets' reduced HP to "Corrosion." The higher the "Whirl" stacks, the higher the DMG. Then, loses all "Whirl" stacks.

C: 受到致命伤害时不会陷入无法战斗状态，而是回复一定生命值并驱散负面效果。
E: Instead of being knocked down after taking fatal DMG, a certain amount of HP will be recovered and debuffs will be dispelled.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动对我方全体施放【剿灭指令】。
E: Enters the Charging state. The next action uses "Purge Order" on all targets.

C: 当我方目标攻击敌方目标后，对我方全体进行攻击，攻击次数相当于本次攻击击中的敌方目标数量。
E: When a target attacks a friendly target, attacks all targets. Attack count is equal to the amount of friendly targets attacked in this attack.

C: 进入战斗时，为敌方全体提供【保…保护你】，每层【保…保护你】可抵抗1次除持续伤害外的所有伤害。敌方全体共享【保…保护你】层数。
E: When entering battle, applies "P—Protect You" to all friendly units. Each stack of "P—Protect You" can nullify all DMG received from 1 incoming hit except for DoTs. "P—Protect You" stacks are shared across the team.

C: 使自身攻击力提高，被弱点击破时该状态解除。
E: Gains ATK. This buff is dispelled upon Weakness Break.

C: 受到致命攻击后进入【休眠】状态。
E: After suffering a killing blow, enters Repose.

C: 繁殖出1名自身的繁衍体，该效果在2回合后可再次触发。
E: Produces 1 spawn of itself. This effect can be triggered again after 2 turns.

C: 连续对我方随机单体造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals successive minor Imaginary DMG to random targets.

C: 激活所有【「所有或一无所有」】，下次行动施放【逢赌必输】。消灭所有被激活的【「所有或一无所有」】可以阻止【逢赌必输】的施放，并使我方全体激活终结技。
E: Activates all "All or Nothing" and uses Doomed to Lose in the next action. Defeat all activated "All or Nothing" to prevent the use of Doomed to Lose and to activate all targets' Ultimate.

C: 权杖的内核层，因不知名的能量污染，早已破败不堪。在这里，「智识」已然沉寂，「记忆」也黯淡无光，周遭唯有被「毁灭」浸染的数据废墟。
E: The kernel of the Scepter, contaminated by an unknown energy, has long fallen into decay. Here, Erudition lies dormant, Remembrance has dimmed, and only data ruins steeped in Destruction remain in the surroundings.

C: 调整阵基的图案使其与昭示一致
E: Adjust the base terminal to match the declared shape

E: Mutare Magnus

C: 「宇宙浩瀚无垠，智识包罗万象；天才有天才的活法，庸人也有庸人的自足。」 ——黑塔，《我如何加入天才俱乐部并体认万物》 真正能够跻身天才俱乐部的成员仅是少数中的少数，博识学会却从不暴殄天物，他们广泛地从浩渺宇宙中接纳追求博识之人，并承诺一切充分发挥学识的条件。 博识学会提倡：「一切知识必须如货币般流通」。因此，尽管学会中学派繁多，术业专攻各不相同，却无人执着于闭门造车，而是用知识交易智慧，用公式换来配方，以求达到融会贯通之妙。学派就像商业团体一样自负盈亏，而学术流通也借此实现了经济模型中的效率最大化。 某位天才俱乐部大佬将博识学会当作顽愚笑柄，将之称为乌合之众。而作为一个开放的学术组织，博识学会从不屑于如是嘲讽。在长久的研究和探索中，学士们达成了共识：「只有互通有无的学术网络才是超越个体的局限的唯一方法。」
E: "The universe is vast, and knowledge is universal. Both the genius and the mediocre have their own way of living." — How I Joined the Genius Society and Became Enlightened by Herta Only the cream of the crop can become members of the Genius Society, but the Intelligentsia Guild wastes not. The Guild is willing to accept all beings from the infinite universe who seek to learn, as well as providing all that is needed for the full pursuit of knowledge. The Intelligentsia Guild advocates that "all knowledge must be circulated like currency." Therefore, although there are different schools that specialize in different subjects within the Guild, everyone is actively engaged with one another with no isolationism. Members trade knowledge for wisdom and formulas for recipes, seeking to achieve mastery. Each school, like a business, pays for itself, and academic circulation has achieved the maximum efficiency proposed in economic models. An elder in the Genius Society thought the Intelligentsia Guild as laughing stock. However, as an open academic organization, the Intelligentsia Guild was above such mockery. After a long period of research and exploration, its members have reached a consensus that "the only way to transcend the limitations of the individual is to have an academic network of mutual learning."

E: Tayzzyronth the Propagation

E: History Fictionologists — Enigmata

E: Scholars' Strife (Phenomenon)

E: Grand Finale, Round 3

E: Undoubtedly, a real tough guy just gulps down fishbones and never spits them out.

E: "Shine bright like a diamond... Shine bright like a diamond..."

E: After everything has concluded, return to where you were pranked by the Fool

E: Perceive someone's memory about puppets

E: Unlocked by Default

C: 在歌剧院的接待大厅处拾取
E: Obtained at the reception hall of the theater

C: 砂金向你迫近、施压，要求你与他做一笔「无法拒绝」的交易。黄泉出现在客房门口，质问你们在她的房间里做什么。
E: Aventurine moved closer, pushing you to accept a deal that couldn't be refused. Acheron showed up at the doorway, questioning why you were in her room.

C: 吊灯砸下，为你们打开通往下一层地面的道路。
E: The chandelier crashed down, creating a path to the next floor below.

C: 你与三月七、姬子进入画框。此处是幕前剧的第三幕，名为《秩序颂》。
E: You entered the painting frame with March 7th and Himeko. This was Act III of the Stage Play, titled Ode to Order.

C: 那刻夏与盗火行者在悬锋竞技场缠斗。在迷迷和缇宝的能力作用下，在场众人被传送到过去的悬锋城。你与白厄加入战斗。
E: Anaxa and the Flame Reaver were locked in combat at the Kremnos Arena. Under the influence of Mem and Tribbie's powers, everyone present was teleported to Castrum Kremnos of the past. You and Phainon joined the battle.

C: 卡芙卡发动「言灵」平息争斗，景元出现在众人面前。景元向卡芙卡道谢，允许其将刃带走，并邀请丹恒前往「鳞渊境」。
E: Kafka activated her Spirit Whisper to quell the conflict. Jing Yuan appeared before everyone, thanking Kafka and permitting her to take Blade, while inviting Dan Heng to Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 你们整理停云的物品，发现有刀、弓、盒子等未送出的礼物。其中有一件招财猫样式的雕像，你们按字条指示将其送给停云的同僚岩明。
E: While organizing Tingyun's belongings, you found a knife, bow, box, and other unsent gifts. One of them was a sculpture in the shape of a lucky cat. You followed the instructions on a note and gave it to Tingyun's colleague, Yanming.

C: 星期日收到报告，「死亡」带走了知更鸟以及一位偷渡犯。花火化作知更鸟模样与星期日交谈，挑衅其为血亲复仇。星期日称时候未至。
E: Sunday received a report that "Death" had taken Robin and an intruder away. Sparkle transformed into Robin's likeness and spoke to him, instigating him to take revenge for his sister. Sunday proclaimed that the time was not ripe.

C: 瓦尔特与黄泉对峙，要求其表明身份与来意。黄泉称自己为「钟表匠的遗产」而来，至于身份则难以言清。黄泉推测，匹诺康尼的秘密与曾经的「开拓」息息相关，而<color=#f29e38ff>一切悲剧的源头正潜伏于家族中</color>。黄泉邀请瓦尔特共饮长谈，以分享彼此的发现。
E: Welt confronted Acheron, asking her to reveal her identity and purpose. She claimed to have come for "the Watchmaker's Legacy" and that it was difficult to describe her identity. She theorized that Penacony's secret was intricately related to the past Trailblaze, and the <color=#f29e38ff>origin of all tragedies was hidden in The Family</color>. She invited Welt for a long chat to share each of their discoveries.

C: 阿格莱雅念颂祷言，再度开启「纷争」的试炼仪式。神性的回响唤你踏上前来。
E: Aglaea recited the prayer, restarting the trial of Strife. The Divine Echo called for you to step forward.

C: 黑塔借助识刻锚来召开天才俱乐部会议，阮•梅、波尔卡•卡卡目、阿茶和原始博士回应联络。
E: Herta used the Chronocognitive Anchor to convene a Genius Society meeting, with Ruan Mei, Polka Kakamond, Acha, and Dr. Primitive responding to her call.

C: 应星曾经为了白珩的死亡而悲伤，而镜流为他带去的短暂死亡则削减了他的痛苦。
E: Yingxing had once grieved over Baiheng's death, but the brief death brought by Jingliu reduced his pain.

C: 三个垃圾桶正为争夺「好看的垃圾」而争论不休。你施以公正的判决，获得「信任的证明」。
E: Three trashcans were arguing endlessly over who was the most "Pleasant-Looking Trash." You were compelled to deliver a just verdict to obtain a Proof of Trust.

C: 黑天鹅提醒你，砂金十分精明，与他合作需要保持谨慎。在与你总结了当前局势后，黑天鹅提议你去和同伴们仔细聊聊，并送你离开。
E: Black Swan reminded you that Aventurine was very intelligent, and that you should remain wary while cooperating with him. After summarizing the current situation with you, she suggested that you discussed this with your companions in detail, and sent you away.

C: 你将搜集来的材料交给加拉赫。在你的好奇心与加拉赫娴熟调饮技巧的共同作用下，一杯特调饮品由此诞生。
E: You gave the ingredients you had gathered to Gallagher. With your curiosity and Gallagher's skillful mixing techniques, a special beverage was created.

C: 应小卡卡瓦夏的邀请，砂金为其拍照留念。砂金称自己还有一场表演要赶赴，小卡卡瓦夏主动送砂金前往大舞台。
E: At little Kakavasha's invitation, Aventurine took a commemorative photo with him. Aventurine said he still has a performance to catch, and Kakavasha offered to escort him to the grand stage.

C: 你用肢体语言即兴表演沙漠生存、商场奋斗的情景，成功诠释出剧本情绪，获得评委高度评价。
E: Through expressive body language, you vividly depicted survival in the desert and business struggles, successfully conveying the script's emotions and receiving high praise.

C: 你与流萤过关斩将，证明了自己的实力。接下来你们要面对的是热砂盛典第三关——「巨星巅峰战」！
E: You and Firefly overcame numerous challenges, proving your strength and earning the right to face the third stage of the Scorchsand Festival — Superstar Showdown!

C: 你们回到剧院，被人偶引导前往下一场幕前剧的方向。
E: Your party returned to the theater and was guided by the mannequins in the direction of the next stage play.

C: 黄泉超度昔日同伴铁尔南的执念，用「记忆」回应「虚无」，完成死海最后的送别。
E: Acheron let the obsession of her past friend, Tiernan, move on to the other sure. She responded to the Nihility with "memories" and completed the final farewell at the Dead Sea.

C: 你找到「芙莫」娃娃，它一言不发地盯着你。这只娃娃没有任何可疑的地方，它由内而外地散发着一个完美「芙莫」娃娃该有的气息。
E: You found a "Furmur" Doll, who stared at you silently. There was nothing suspicious about this doll at all. It radiated the perfect essence of what a "Furmur" Doll should be, inside and out.

C: 「叆叇馆主」宣讲原始博士的理念，声称乱破本是用<color=#f29e38ff>返祖实验筛选出的基因</color>培育而成的新人类，却被「苦茶大师」变成了一个疯子。
E: Umbra Headmistress expounded Dr. Primitive's views, claiming that Rappa was originally a new human bred from <color=#f29e38ff>genes selected through atavistic experiments</color>, but was then turned into a madman by Master Kucha.

C: 你尝试将炎枪、球棍、自己放上托盘，然而天秤纹丝不动。你与遐蝶等人仔细商讨，何为「比世界的命运更为沉重之物」。
E: You put the flaming lance, bat, and even yourself on the scale, but nothing happened. You and Castorice discussed what could possibly "weigh more than the fate of the world."

C: 你与达米亚诺斯交谈，得知他因立誓不透露「天外之界」而被释放。作为补偿，达米亚诺斯把参观悬锋祭典时拍摄的照片送给你。
E: You talked to Damionis and found out they let him go after he promised not to tell anyone about "the world beyond the sky." To make it up to you, Damionis gave you photos he took at the Kremnos Festival.

C: 阿格莱雅阻止这场高温闹剧，白厄与万敌转而比试谁能护送更多晕倒的浴客离开。缇宝邀请风堇加入，和阿格莱雅一起去浴场放松一下。
E: Aglaea shut down this heated charade. So instead, Phainon and Mydei switched to a new contest of racing to escort as many fainting bathers as they could. Later, Tribbie invited Hyacine to join her and Aglaea to relax and enjoy the baths together.

C: 螺丝咕姆出现，他揭示翁法罗斯是数据世界，因坠入毁灭命途即将进化出绝灭大君。你请缨留作内应，螺丝咕姆将<color=#f29e38ff>「识刻锚」</color>交予你。
E: Screwllum showed up and revealed that Amphoreus was a data world, which had fallen onto the Path of Destruction and was on the brink of spawning a Lord Ravager. You volunteered to stay behind as a mole, and Screwllum handed you the <color=#f29e38ff>Chronocognitive Anchor</color>.

C: 白厄与心中的英雄道别，并投身自己的「毁灭」本源，以此力量反抗黑潮，欺骗世界，夺取火种，阻止「再创世」。
E: Bidding farewell to the hero within, Phainon cast himself into his own essence, that of "The Destruction." He wielded its power to defy the black tide, deceive the world, reclaim the Coreflames, and prevent the Era Nova.

C: 昔涟对你的到来表示问候，希望你先好好休息一下。等你做好准备，就一起再次踏上旅途吧。
E: Cyrene welcomed you and hoped you could get some rest first. When you are ready, you can start the journey together again.

C: 在假圣杯解体之后，你与砂金、波提欧以及三位从者交谈。Lancer与Archer分别与其御主道别，随后身形逐渐消散。
E: When the fake Holy Grail broke apart, you talked with Aventurine, Boothill, and the three Servants. Lancer and Archer said their goodbyes to their Masters before slowly disappearing from sight.

C: 「曳石爵」与「吟风爵」向你们问好。「曳石爵」阿波罗尼是逐火军的参谋，「吟风爵」维吉妮娅则是凯撒大人的御用史官。
E: "Dux Helkolithist" and "Dux Carminum" offered their greetings. "Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius served as the advisor for the Flame-Chase Army, while "Dux Carminum" Verginia was the imperial scribe of the Great Imperator.

C: 断锋爵与冬霖爵重伤倒地，逐火军团被酣歌的鱼群蚕食殆尽。残忍的凯撒和她的骑士统领伫立于对岸，她们的手上都浸满金色的鲜血。
E: Dux Fragoris and Dux Brumalis collapsed, gravely wounded. The Flame-Chase Army was devoured by warbling fish. On the opposite shore stood the ruthless Imperator and her Knight Commander, their hands soaked in golden blood.

C: 从书页中，海瑟音来到记忆里的大海。滩头石板上铭刻着刻律德菈的最后话语：「我承诺你一片崭新的海域，凯撒的承诺从不落空。」
E: From the pages, Hysilens stepped onto the sea she once knew. On a slab of stone by the shore, Cerydra's final words had been etched: "I promised you a new sea. The Imperator's word is never broken."

C: 为脱离囚禁，来古士主动切断部分神经回路，因此失去战斗机能。螺丝咕姆发现「神话之外」的入口，提议扫描来古士的灵感回路来寻找线索。
E: To escape imprisonment, Lygus voluntarily cut off part of his neural circuits, thus losing his ability to fight. Screwllum discovered the entrance to Exomyth and proposed scanning Lygus's Inspiration Circuit for clues.

C: 幼芽绽放出「记忆的花」，向昔涟讲述对「爱」的理解。但昔涟认为，不再「无瑕」的水晶花，才终于有了「心」，也终于学会「爱」。
E: The young bud bloomed into a Flower of Memory, sharing with Cyrene its understanding of "love." But Cyrene believed that only when the crystal flower is no longer "flawless" can it finally gain a "heart" and learn to "love."

C: 你们在时光归墟遇到遐蝶。遐蝶收殓「卡厄斯兰那」的躯壳，并将一朵安提灵花交予你们，与你们一道启程。
E: You encountered Castorice in the Ruins of Time. After laying Khaslana's remains to rest, Castorice handed you an Antila flower and joined you on your journey.

C: 白厄内心的挣扎不断涌现，缇安和缇宁要用「百界门」把它们扔到看不见的角落。缇安请你们继续向前、向下，去往白厄面前。
E: As Phainon's inner struggles continued, Trianne and Trinnon used the Century Gate to cast them into unseen corners. Trianne asked you to keep moving forward and downward, towards Phainon.

C: 回望的终点，是昔涟的故乡。「往昔的涟漪」请昔涟带着仪式剑回到祝祭庭院，让它成为「记忆」的楔子，衔接起熟悉的岁月。
E: The end of this retrospection led to Cyrene's homeland. The "ripples of past reverie" guided Cyrene to bring the ceremonial blade back to the Sacrament Courtyard and make it Remembrance's anchor, tying together the times everyone knew so well.

C: 正如螺丝咕姆所称，灵火无法逃离空间站。你们必须继续追逐，将其逼入绝境。
E: As Screwllum said, the Phase Flame could not escape the space station. You had to continue the pursuit and force it into a corner.

C: 灵火在逐渐熄灭，它还在试图挣扎。从变化的折叠空间中，真理医生追踪到灵火的去向。
E: The Phase Flame was dying out. It still struggled, but Dr. Ratio had tracked its location through the shifting, folded space.

C: 你们跟随账账，发现一位率领员工盘踞此地的公司小组长。你们决定与其沟通以寻求解除封锁。
E: Following Numby, you came upon another IPC Team Leader entrenched with their crew. You decided to talk, hoping to find a way to lift the lockdown.

C: 你再次来到「互助会」，要求对方全数上缴瓦赫留下的「特效药」。警觉的流浪者拒绝合作，号召众人把你赶走。
E: You returned to the mutual aid society and demanded that they hand over all of Vache's "wonder medicine." The alert vagrants refused to cooperate and rallied people to drive you away.

C: 娜塔莎责怪虎克为寻找玩偶而深入裂界的冒险举动，虎克羞怯逃离。娜塔莎检视玩偶，发现玩偶熊的眼睛竟是两颗珍贵的黑宝石。
E: Natasha scolded Hook for her reckless venture into the Fragmentum to find a doll. Hook sheepishly fled. Upon examining the doll, Natasha discovered that the teddy bear's eyes were actually two precious erebus gems.

C: 战斗结束后，你与娜塔莎继续出发调查。
E: After the combat, you and Natasha continued your investigation.

C: 虎克询问你和希儿偷偷摸摸地在干什么。希儿没有回答，劝虎克赶紧回磐岩镇去。虎克则希望你和希儿能在此找到宝贝。
E: Hook asked what you and Seele were sneaking around for. Seele didn't answer, and told Hook to hurry back to Boulder Town. But Hook hoped you'd find something valuable here.

C: 花火误以为在匹诺康尼跟踪她的忆者是黑天鹅，于是在奥迪购物中心为她留下了侦探谜题。而前来送信的桑博则不幸被黑天鹅抓作助手。
E: Sparkle assumed the Memokeeper trailing her through Penacony was Black Swan and left detective puzzles for her at Oti Mall. Meanwhile, Sampo, who arrived to deliver a message, was captured by Black Swan and forced to be her assistant.

C: 据猎犬家系成员的证言，受害者名叫<color=#f29e38ff>沙马里</color>，他被一个<color=#f29e38ff>壮汉</color>用<color=#f29e38ff>锤子</color>砸得退出了梦境；现场的两位美梦剧团成员则是袭击者从别处偷来的；现场的证物仅有<color=#f29e38ff>凶器</color>与<color=#f29e38ff>受害者的证件</color>。由于没办法传唤受害者，黑天鹅只好按花火的规则继续侦探游戏。
E: Based on testimony from a Bloodhound Family member, the victim <color=#f29e38ff>Shamari</color> was knocked out of the dreamscape when a <color=#f29e38ff>burly man</color> struck him with a <color=#f29e38ff>hammer</color>. The attacker had brought the two Sweet Dreams Troupe members from elsewhere. Only the <color=#f29e38ff>weapon</color> and the <color=#f29e38ff>victim's ID</color> remained as evidence. With no way to question the victim, Black Swan had to follow Sparkle's rules and continue the detective game.

C: 一位无名的剑士与「孤云」流落异星，他们在此遭遇了步离人的狩猎。无名剑士没有因绝望而将身体交给「孤云」，他仍存有反抗之心，想教会这片土地的人们去反抗步离人。
E: A nameless swordmaster was stranded on an unfamiliar planet with Guyun, where they were hunted by the borisin. Though driven to despair, the swordsman refused to surrender himself to Guyun. He still held onto hope and wished to teach the people of that land how to resist the borisin.

C: 你与云璃交谈。云璃称演武仪典的擂台不禁外人挑战，鼓励你加入。她觉得彦卿的飞剑可怜，决定将其拿去做个养护，再择机归还。
E: You spoke with Yunli. She said that the Wardance's arena was open to outsiders and encouraged you to join. She decided to give Yanqing's poor Flying Sword some proper maintenance before returning it.

C: 彦卿取得比试的胜利，要求云璃归还飞剑。云璃并不服输，要让彦卿凭实力从她手中夺回飞剑。
E: After winning the duel, Yanqing demanded Yunli to return his Flying Sword. Yunli refused to accept defeat, challenging Yanqing to prove his skill to take the Flying Sword back from her.

C: 彦卿放弃了守擂剑士的身份，对他而言，罗浮眼下的安全更优先。如果不能尽快将逃犯抓捕归案，穷凶极恶的呼雷一定会闹个天翻地覆。
E: Yanqing gave up his role as the ringmaster, as Luofu's safety took priority for him now. If they couldn't capture the fugitives soon, Hoolay would surely wreak havoc.

C: 呼雷展示杀戮与吞食，认为这是生命常理，声称仙舟人用所谓的道德与正义来禁锢、役使飞霄。这是飞霄内心的「怀疑」。
E: Hoolay showed Feixiao visions of predators hunting prey, claiming this was the natural law of life and asserting that the Xianzhou people used so-called morality and justice to restrain and exploit Feixiao. This was Feixiao's "doubt."

C: 你们隐瞒身份取得了两位医助的信任。他们说在抓捕龙女时见到了两个白露，并为你们指出了他们最后见到龙女的地方。
E: You hid your true identities and won the trust of the two medical assistants. They told you they had seen two Bailus during the Dragon Lady's arrest and showed you where they had last spotted her.

C: 你们见到了彦卿的飞剑，这似乎在提示你们此行的凶险。无论如何，你们还是跟上了它。
E: You encountered Yanqing's Flying Sword, its presence suggesting impending dangers. Regardless, you decided to pursue it.

C: 你找到「梗小鬼」娃娃，它本是罗浮绥园里的一只岁阳，为研究亚文化而来到匹诺康尼。「梗小鬼」祝你尽快找到真正的炸弹。
E: You found the "Memey the Imp" Doll, originally a heliobus from the Luofu's Fyxestroll Garden, who came to Penacony to study subcultures. Memey the Imp wished you luck in finding the real bomb.

E: The photograph requirement has not been met, please try to find the target again

E: "Shift the firing line five meters to the left!"

C: 战斗就是生存本身！畏惧战斗的人，没有资格活着！
E: Battle is survival itself! Those who fear fighting don't deserve to live!

C: 对布洛妮娅来说，这里的许多东西都前所未见。她却能在新奇之余快速了解它们，再去推销给其他人。\n带领一颗星球走出寒潮的，不只是勇气与决心。
E: Everything here is new to Bronya, but she catches on quick. Once the novelty wears off, she's already figuring out how to sell it to others.\nIt takes more than just courage and determination to lead a planet out of Eternal Freeze.

C: ……学会关于药师是善神还是恶神的争论很多，在我看来完全是吃饱了撑的。拿我们狭隘的善恶观去套星神这种还没弄明白的存在，稍微对宇宙有点儿敬畏的人都干不出这事。个人而言，我对药师的态度非常开放：尽管我会帮助仙舟联盟处理丰饶孽物，却也不妨碍我发自真心地崇敬药师：这孤独而浪漫的存在。祂漫行在宇宙间，身后有「巡猎」与联盟不断追逐，发誓要把祂彻底消灭……尽管如此，祂仍然孜孜不倦地点化一个又一个世界。据我所知，「丰饶」从来没有夺走过哪怕一条性命，虽然多数时候，与祂接触过的生命会陷入生不如死的窘境……
E: ...There is a lot of debate in the Guild about whether Yaoshi is good or evil, and I think that's just people having too much time on their hands. Anyone with the slightest respect for the universe wouldn't apply our narrow definitions of good and evil to incomprehensible existences such as Aeons. Personally, I have an open mind when it comes to Yaoshi — I will help the Xianzhou Alliance to sort out the Abominations of Abundance, but it won't stop me from genuinely admiring Yaoshi as a lonely and romantic existence. THEY travel between the universes with The Hunt and the Alliance in hot pursuit, both of which have sworn to destroy THEM... And yet THEY continue to bring enlightenment to world after world. I understand that the Abundance had never taken a single life, even though those THEY come into contact with often end up with a fate worse than death...
