C: 学士们在「权杖」的推演中发现，当局部区域内的不稳定因子超过一定限度，预测的准确性反而会提高。利用这一性质，有选择地增加不稳定因子的数量，或能实现初始条件的「脱敏治疗」。 心理历史学派成功预言了白锡世界九颗星辰的覆灭，他们在未来模型推演上的成就至今无人超越。继承其衣钵的量子历史学派，却仅是宇宙的笑柄。没人能理解，他们在未来学大会上包庇众多底层学士的动机何在，从事后的角度分析，这一行为招致了学会的报复，让他们分配到最少的算力。但同时，众学士的支持却又让他们成功在四道寰宇难题中占得一席。 未来是确定的还是混沌的？如果卜算出完美的宇宙模型，或许连未来也能被约束进知识的圆圈。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: During the Scepters' extrapolation, scholars discovered to their surprise that when unstable factors in the localized areas exceeded a certain threshold, the predictions' accuracy increased. Utilizing this property, by selectively increasing the unstable factor count, the initial conditions for "desensitization treatment" may be realized. The School of Psychohistory successfully foretold the annihilation of the nine-star cluster of the White Tin world — their exploits in future model extrapolations are unsurpassed. Yet, the Quantum History School that inherited the mantle became nothing more than the laughingstock of the universe. No one could understand their motive for shielding so many lowly scholars in the Futurological Congress. Subsequent analysis of the matter proffered that this act earned the vengeful ire of the Guild, resulting in their allocation of the least amount of computational power. But concurrently, support from the scholarly masses allowed them to secure a seat in the Four Cosmic Conundrums. Is the future certain, or is it chaotic? If a perfect universal model is divined, mayhaps even the future can be confined within the circle of knowledge. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 这一天机械时凌晨一点，「心如死灰」密码机又一次进行了自我重启。它将组成自己躯体的密码进行多次编篡、打碎、再重组，但无论如何都逃脱不了「心如死灰」的结局。重复叁仟陆百次后，它终于发现：自己的程序密码含义即是「心如死灰」本身。
E: Following the machine era calendar, on this day at one at night, the "Ashheart" Ciphertech rebooted itself once more. It rebuilt the code comprising its body over and over, breaking them, assembling them, but never escaping the final results of utter despondency, as hopeless as ashes and cinders. After trying over and over for three thousand and six hundred times, it finally realized the meaning of its own sequenced code was "Ashheart" itself.

C: 风靡群星的英雄故事里，永远少不了「幸运」的存在，突然闪现的记忆，掉落的救命道具，程序错误的机器，主人翁总在危险时刻靠它们化险为夷，最后成为史书上的一行字。但据最新研究表明，部分「幸运」是客观存在的——无形的忆者藏身在英雄的左右，跟随他们的脚步，记录下当世的史诗。作为交换，忆者会偷偷留下等价的馈赠，并耐心地等待它们发挥作用，成为不朽记忆的一环。
E: No hero story that resounds throughout the stars would be celebrated without the existence of a little "luck," like the memory that comes back to them at just the right moment, the life-saving loot drop, or the machine that suffers with faulty programming. The hero always relies on them to dissipate dangers and leave their names in the history books. However, recent research has shown that a portion of this "luck" objectively exists — Invisible Memokeepers follow the footsteps of heroes and record the epic stories of this world as they walk alongside adventurers. In return, the Memokeepers secretly leave gifts of equivalent value and patiently wait for them to fulfill their purpose, becoming another part of the unchanging memories.

C: 天才俱乐部#55余清涂的音乐品味不俗，她与阮•梅私交甚好，曾在自己最爱的古琥珀纪乐曲中选取亮眼的名字制成饮品送给阮•梅；余清涂所调制的特饮粉红冲撞被证明无毒，但一位调酒师曾夜以继日研究它的配方，试图证明其中有数种虫类尸体：虫类孢子、甲壳以及磷粉——他判断该酒可能有致幻效果。
E: Yu Qingtu, Genius Society's #55, has good taste in music. On account of her fantastic friendship with Ruan Mei, she once made a drink — to which she gave an eye-catching name taken from the title of her favorite ancient Amber Era music — as a gift to the other woman. The drink Yu Qingtu concocted, named the Pinkest Collision, was proven to be non-toxic, but a mixologist once spent days trying to recreate its formula, seeking to prove that the beverage was made from various insect carcasses, insect spores, carapaces, and phosphorous — he concluded that this drink may possess hallucinogenic qualities.

C: 嘎吱，嘎吱，你用唾液清洗利爪，复眼锁定住目标的成像，他们数量繁多，且味道香甜。穿过陨石的伪装，你跃至铁块的跟前，趁着食物尚未察觉，撕开蒙皮，呼唤嗷嗷待哺的子嗣。\n\n腺体不受控制地开始颤抖，分泌的激素令你亢奋，也变得矫健。你咬住袭来的铁臂，捕捉足在顷刻间撕裂他的血肉，任凭如雨的光点打破你的翅膀。你嘶吼着向前，单纯地消除每一个出现的热源。于种群而言，死亡是不存在的概念，神经节内传来祂的呼声，命你抛却一切，将猎物最锋利的尖刺都摧残。
E: Clang, clang — as you clean your sharp claws with your saliva, your compound eyes lock on to your targets. There are many of them, and they smell sweet. You leap through the meteorite camouflage and arrive before the iron block. Before your food senses your presence, you tear through its flesh and call out for the children that wait to be fed.\n\nYour glands begin to shake uncontrollably, secreting hormones that send excitement coursing through your body and strengthening your limbs. You bite at the iron arm flying toward you, lacerating through its flesh in an instant and letting the light drops that fall like rain shatter your wings. You let out a roar, simply eliminating all sources of heat ahead of you. For species, death is a concept that has never existed. THEIR voice comes forth from your neuron ganglia, ordering you to abandon everything and destroy even the sharpest spike of your prey.

C:
愚蠢的学徒，停下你们那错误的思考，
瑟希斯在凡人的心田间播撒智慧，
而你们却妄图在大脑里收获果实。
可怜的学徒，放下你们手里的实验器材，
诸神已经赐予我们五感，
又何必借助外物来辨别真相？
其他学派的理论和方法只会教你们发现知识，
而赤陶学派会告诉你，所有知识早已存在于你的记忆海洋，
你要做的仅仅只是拾取它。
放下所有的观察、推演、逻辑，
尝试用心灵去感受、倾听、想象。
让世界剥离它名为物质的虚伪外衣，
令万物回归最真实的模样。
E:
Foolish apprentices, stop your faulty reflections.
Cerces sows wisdom in the hearts of mortals,
Yet you attempt to harvest its fruits in your minds.
Poor apprentices, put down your experimental tools.
The gods have bestowed upon us the five senses.
Why resort to external devices to discern the truth?
Other schools' theories and means will only teach you how to discover knowledge,
But Erythrokeramism will tell you that all knowledge already dwells within the depths of your memory,
Merely awaiting your touch to pick them up.
Discard all observation, extrapolation, and logic,
And instead sense, hear, and imagine with your heart.
Peel away the deceptive mask named materiality that shrouds the world,
And let all things return to their truest form.

C: 出手时机
E: Moment of Opportunity

C: 阮•梅
E: Ruan Mei

C: 在黑塔的奇物清单里，这张羊皮卷的危害等级被标注为极高。流落到黑塔空间站之前，它曾属于一位虚构史学家。羊皮卷以人类的历史为食，贪婪的舌头搅动着文明的集体潜意识，使之支离破碎。黑塔伪造了虚假的世界记忆供它吞噬，以此满足其无止境的饕餮欲望，不过总有一天，这张羊皮卷会识破天才的诡计。
E: In Herta's Curio list, the hazard level of this parchment is marked as extremely high. It once belonged to a History Fictionologist before ending up at the space station. The parchment feeds on the history of humanity, its greedy tongue churning the collective subconscious of civilization to pieces. Herta forged false memories of the world for it to devour to satisfy its endless gluttony. But one day, this parchment will see through the genius' tricks.

C: 在第Ⅸ机关的秘密暗网，一件天价商品引来了无数竞拍者的关注。这件长袍据称曾属于天才俱乐部#64「原始博士」，拥有不可思议的力量。将它挂上暗网的是一位匿名用户，人们相信他是巡海游侠的一员，纷纷向之发问，但遗憾的是，直到长袍被拍下，这位神秘主人都没有作出任何回应。
E: An incredibly expensive item surfaced on Device IX's dark web one day and grabbed the attention of countless bidders. This robe was reportedly once owned by member #64 of the Genius Society, Dr. Primitive, and supposedly had incredible powers. The seller on the dark web was anonymous. People believed them to be a member of the Galaxy Rangers and kept sending them questions. Regrettably, this mysterious owner did not make any responses even after the item was sold.

C: 为对抗「智识」的确定性，谜语人曾在不确定领域做出诸多努力。他们将思想之雾和感官之雨塞入一枚棱镜，雨与雾结合的色彩变幻莫测，形成一种能够扰动感官的「磁场」。谜语人大为惊喜，渴望将此项研究继续进行——但它最终被叫停，因为越是研究，人们就越是不确定是否要继续研究。
E: To combat the determinacy of Erudition, the Riddlers performed a great deal of labor in aspects of knowledge that has yet to be set in stone. They inserted the Fog of Thought and the Rain of Sensation into a single prismatic lens, and their combined colors shifted endlessly to form a "magnetic field" that can disturb the senses. Revelrous in their success, the Riddlers sought to push this line of research onward but were made to stop, for the more they committed to this study, the more they grew uncertain of the necessity of its continuation.

C: 网络空间的交锋总是比想象中更复杂，骇客们在数据空间穿行跳跃、你来我往，任何一方稍见颓势便会溜之大吉，将战况拉得无限漫长。在以太编辑的发源地朋克洛德，传奇骇客「石剑」同劲敌争斗了十四个夏天，从未真正分出过胜负。最后，他编译出一串具有单向锁定功能的以太密钥，将自身传输到对方现实中所在的位置，面对面结束了这场持续十数年的较量。
E: Conflicts in cyberspace are always more complicated than imagined. Hackers skip and leap across each other's paths in digital space and any perceived disadvantages by one side would result in them scurrying from the scene, thus drawing out all combat to infinite durations. In Punklorde, where aether editing was created, the legendary hacker Stoneblade fought his nemesis for fourteen summers, never truly achieving victory or suffering defeat. In the end, he concocted an aether encryption key with a uni-directional locking function, teleporting himself to his opponent's physical position, and ended this rivalry that spanned more than a decade, face-to-face.

C: 在天才俱乐部#77迷图还不是天才的时候，曾找到过跃迁以外的另一种超距传输方式。这种近似于魔法的空间引擎，可以使任何物体瞬间传送至目的地。美中不足的是，凭空出现的物体，会让周围的物质以接近正无穷的速度向外膨胀，形成剧烈的爆炸，无法装配到任何飞船上。可即便如此，公司仍用高价买下了她的专利——作为划时代的武器。在目睹爆炸的瞬间，这位坚定的和平主义者，成为了天才。
E: Back when Genius Society #77, Puzzle, was not yet a genius, she had previously discovered an alternative form of hyper-distant delivery to the warp jump. This almost magic-like space engine was able to teleport any physical object to their destinations in the blink of an eye. The downside was that these objects that appeared from nowhere would cause surrounding materials to expand at an almost infinite rate and cause violent explosions, making them unfit for use in any spaceship. Even so, the IPC still paid an enormous price to purchase the patent from her — to use as an era-defining weapon. The moment this staunch pacifist witnessed these explosions, she became a Genius.

C: 小时候，希儿只去过一次上层区。那是在她遇见奥列格之后——彼时的奥列格还是负责下层区治安的银鬃铁卫兵长。为了让希儿看一眼她憧憬已久的城市，奥列格将她藏在自己的补给袋里，通过缆车道回到了上层。 希儿跟着奥列格走遍了贝洛伯格的名胜，吃到了她从未品尝过的美味食物，穿上了超出她想象的漂亮衣服。她用粗野的矿民俚语吓跑了一群孩子，引得奥列格捧腹大笑。短短两天时光，他们每分每秒都沉浸在欢声笑语中。 离开前的傍晚，两人坐在行政广场的长凳上，希儿目不转睛地盯着对面的餐馆。 「上层区好玩吗，希儿？还想再来吗？」 「大叔，我有个问题。」 「…怎么了？问吧。」 「那几个上层区人，他们只吃了一半就把饭菜扔掉了。」 「……」 「他们知道地底有些人吃不上饭吗？」 「……」 奥列格捕捉到了希儿的神情，一丝阴郁掠过她稚嫩的脸庞。 「我们回去吧，大叔。我不想再来了。」
E: As a child, Seele only ever went up to the Overworld once. That was after she'd met Oleg — who at the time was still captain of the Underworld's Silvermane Guards. Oleg hid Seele in his supply bag one day and took her up to the Overworld by cable car to give her a peek at the city she yearned for. Seele followed Oleg around the sights of Belobog, eating delicious foods and dressing up in splendid clothes beyond her wildest imagination. She scared off a group of kids with her uncouth miner slang, which caused Oleg to burst out into laughter. Those two short days were full of joy and laughter. Before leaving that evening, they sat on a bench in the Administrative District Plaza as Seele stared at the restaurant opposite them. "Was the Overworld fun, Seele? Wanna come back again later?" "Can I ask you something?" "...What's up? Ask away." "Those Overworlders are only eating half their meal, and threw the rest away." "..." "Do they know that people down below haven't got enough food to eat?" "..." Oleg saw how a look of gloom passed over her tender face. "Let's go back, Oleg. I don't want to come back here again."

C: 作为横跨六大仙舟的建制，云骑军自火劫大战的尾声中脱胎，立誓卫蔽仙舟，奉行帝弓的「巡猎」诰谕，传承至今。尽管长生种的寿命漫长到不可思议，但在血火厮杀的战争中，却鲜有云骑将军能在履任后撑过百年的大关。与其说这是一种宿命，不如说这是一种传统。作为镇护仙舟、讨伐孽物的武装力量，将军除去绸缪调遣的职责，更需要身先士卒，叩关斩阵。在无数残酷短暂的年限记录之中，负责节制罗浮云骑军的「神策将军」景元却脱颖而出，已安然治军数百年。在他折冲运筹之下，罗浮云骑一度蜚声联盟，立下过众多惊人的战绩。虽然有人腹诽他本人畏战怯阵，鲜少动武。但也不得不承认，其人的智谋不逊于最锋锐的利剑，尽解难结。
E: Of an alliance spanning six mighty Xianzhou ships, the Cloud Knights emerged out of the ashes of the Flaming Catastrophe. They swore an oath to defend the Xianzhou ships and follow Reignbow's decree of The Hunt, a tradition carried out to this day. Despite the incredible longevity of long-life species, few generals have been able to pass the century mark after taking up the mantle due to the bloody nature of warfare. This is not so much fate as it is tradition. As the armed defenders of Xianzhou against crusading abominations, generals not only must take the lead for planning and dispatching, but also take the lead into battle. Amidst countless names erased too quickly and too cruelly in the annals of history, the Divine Foresight Jing Yuan, leader of the Cloud Knights of the Xianzhou Luofu, stands out from the rest with his centuries-old reign. Under his wise strategy, the Luofu's Cloud Knights have made a name for themselves among the Alliance, achieving an exemplary record. While there are those who complained that he feared combat so much so that he seldom resorted to arms, it remains true that his intellect is no less resourceful than the tip of the sharpest sword in solving thorny problems.

C:
作为仙舟历史上著名的传奇，来自诸仙舟云骑军中的五位英雄聚首同战，合称「云上五骁」。以此五人为首，成就的功勋史不绝书：驱走攻入塔拉萨的步离人舰队；破坏丰饶联军中慧骃族与造翼者的同盟；乃至解围玉阙仙舟，并击溃了活体星球「计都蜃楼」，保全了联盟凝视星海的眼睛……

然而累累功业，最终却敌不过时间的轻轻一弹指。「云上五骁」在短暂相聚不逾百年的时光后分崩离析。随着战事渐少，联盟各大仙舟各循其位，罗浮开始巡航于银河间的商路，为联盟寻求补给与盟助。

故交旧友风流云散，不复存焉；宿敌旧雠或死或擒，徒留回忆。倒下的将军不必承受此等折磨，而活下来的将军必须面对一切：无论曾梦想过何等伟大的远景，无论曾战胜过多少个神明一样的强敌，时间总是逐一拔去你的爪牙却又不杀死你，让你苟延在角落中憎恨自己的无力。

而唯有真正的智者，才能在时光这位不败的对手前兀自傲立。
E:
As the most famous legend in Xianzhou history, the five heroes of the High-Cloud Quintet gathered to fight together. Their feats were almost endless: Driving out the borisin invading Thalassa. Destroying the alliance between the Houyhnhnms and the wingweavers in the Abundance Axis. Even rescuing the Xianzhou Yuque and defeating the living planet Ketu Mirage, preserving the eyes of the Alliance that gaze out to the stars...

However, all their achievements were no match for the cruelty of time. The High-Cloud Quintet fell apart after less than a hundred short years. As wars waned, the major ships went their separate ways as the Luofu began patrolling cosmic trade routes, seeking out supplies and support for the Alliance.

Old friendships became scattered to the winds, and enemies were either captured or dead. Only memories remain. Fallen generals don't have to endure such torment, but those who survive have to go through it all, no matter how great a vision one has dreamed of and no matter how many overwhelming enemies one has defeated, time will always reduce one's strength little by little yet cruelly spares one's life, leaving one cowering in a corner and hating one's own powerlessness.

Only the truly wise can stand proud in front of the undefeated enemy called time.

C: 他们说，那是「逐火」的旅途。他们也说，那是「失却」的旅途。 她隐约察觉到某种珍贵的东西在自己身上流逝，但她无暇旁顾，只因走在她前面的人正历经着比她更为痛苦的失去。 「这儿就交给你了，阿格莱雅。」 「一定好好干啊。」 「下次见！」 她不明白，为何告别的时候，他们都这么说。 留给她的，只有深海中隐约传来的乐声，大地上随风而逝的足迹，与一盘无解的棋局。 「孱弱的丝线，如何承担命运的重压？」 陪伴她的唯有「衣匠」，但那曾经华美的衣橱如今空空荡荡。 高贵的小姐进入政治的角斗场，引得元老院议论纷纷，在旁人的连连嗤笑中，她开始自己的筹谋。 指尖的金丝在奥赫玛织造一种网，若虫憩息在城中角落，一呼一吸都无法逃脱她的耳目。 连金丝也变得锋利，第一次染上血的气味。
E: They say it is the Flame-Chase Journey. They also say it is a journey of loss. She can faintly feel something precious slipping away from her, but she has no time to dwell on it — for the person walking ahead of her is bearing a loss far greater than her own. "I'll leave this place in your hands, Aglaea." "Make sure you do your best." "See you next time!" She never understands why their goodbyes always sound like that. All that remains are the faint melodies echoing from the depths of the sea, footprints swept away by the wind across the land, and an unsolvable chessboard left behind. "How can delicate threads bear the heavy weight of fate?" Her only companion is the Garmentmaker, yet her once grand wardrobe is now eerily empty. The noble lady enters the political fray, sparking lively debates among the Council of Elders. Amid the continual sneers of bystanders, she begins to devise her plans. The golden threads at her fingertips weave a net across Okhema. The nymphs rest in the corners of the city, ensnaring every whisper and breath. Even the golden threads turn lethal, tainted with the scent of blood for the first time.

C: 流星划过夜空，生命的长河荡起涟漪，闪烁十三种光彩。\n哀丽秘榭的女儿，哺育「██」的黄金裔，栽下记忆的种子，让往昔的花朵在明日绽放——\n「然后，一起写下不同以往的诗篇吧♪」
E: A meteor streaks across the night sky, sending ripples through the river of life, gleaming in thirteen hues.\nDaughter of Aedes Elysiae, Chrysos Heir who nourishes "██," sow the Seed of Memory, so that flowers of the past may bloom in tomorrow.\n"Now, let's write a different kind of poem together ♪"

C:
谐乐引你跌入美梦，糖浆与汽水充盈你的喉间。
节日盛大，人群喧哗，那些未曾谋面的人们披上伪装于梦中相聚。
你们饱览光怪陆离的风景，在晨曦微露之时分别——
此刻，至暗的午夜才刚刚开始。

时针嘀嗒转动，死亡如影随形。
你被当作筹码押上台面，却为自己赢得了揭晓秘密的权利。
你带上已死之人的梦，继续着他们未竟的路，面对他们不曾战胜的对手——

伪神汇聚众人的渴望而升起，万千人的齐唱淹没了你的存在。
行于不同道路的人拉起彼此的双手，
你们的旋律互相交织，虽微茫却如同长夜的灯火生生不息。
一个又一个人于梦中惊醒，而那微小的歌声最终汇成震耳欲聋的呐喊，冲破梦的帷幕。

永恒的美梦消散于一瞬，而你终于明白人们为何而沉睡
——为了从梦中醒来的明天。
E:
The harmonious music guides you to stumble into the sweet dream, as syrup and soda fill your throat.
The festival is grand, the crowd boisterous, and strangers cast on disguises to meet up in the dream.
You view to your hearts' desires the wondrous and otherworldly views, and part ways when dewdrops shimmer with the break of dawn —
When the pitch-black midnight has just begun.

The clock hands go tick-tock, and death follows closely like a shadow.
You are placed onto the table as a bargaining chip, but manage to win for yourself the right to uncover the secret.
You bring with you the dreams of the dead and continue on the road that they did not walk, facing the enemies they could not defeat—

The false god rises in the conglomeration of the multitude's wishes, and the unanimous song of the gazillions drowns out your existence.
Those walking on different roads take up each other's hands,
your melodies interweave with each other, faint but imperishable like the lights in a long night.
One after one, people startle awake from their dream. That tiny song finally merges into a deafening roar in the end, tearing free of the dream's curtains.

The eternal sweet dream scatters in a fleeting instant, and you finally understand why people slumber
— They do so towards a dawn freed from dreams.

C: 卡芙卡受到的伤害降低。弱点击破后，行动额外延后，受到的伤害额外提高。
E: Kafka takes less DMG. After Weakness is broken, additionally delays action and additionally increases DMG taken.

C: 可可利亚及杰帕德受到的伤害降低。弱点击破后，行动额外延后，弱点击破状态下受到的伤害额外提高。
E: Cocolia and Gepard take less DMG. After Weakness is broken, additionally delays action and additionally increases DMG taken in Weakness Break state.

C: 普通模式「驻守冰原的旧忆」
E: Normal Mode Old Memories of the Icy Post

C: 在入侵现场优雅踱步的女人如同一道谜题，她嘲弄着受害者的同时又残酷地将加害者消灭殆尽。\n通讯里神秘的协助者透露出两人似乎怀抱着某种目的。\n她们的入局是混乱升级的预兆抑或是一段故事的开始？
E: The woman sauntering elegantly across the invasion site is a mystery. She mocks the victims, while also ruthlessly eliminating their oppressors.\n Over their comms, the mysterious helper revealed that the two seem to have some sort of agenda.\nIs their presence a sign of more chaos to come? Or is it the start of a new story?

C:
现在，你的脑海里又回响起了这句话：「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
你还未下决心，又或是你心中已经有了决定，只是你还不确定，这么想的是不是只有自己……
没关系，你还可以把它藏在心中，听听别人的想法……
说不定，你们想的完全一样呢？
E:
These words resurface in your mind once more. "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."
You haven't made up your mind yet, or could it be that you have. However, you're just not sure if anyone else shares your point of view...
It's alright. You can hide it deep in your heart and listen to what others think...
Is it possible that you all think the same?

C: 你们发现一个瑟瑟发抖的男人把自己埋在雪堆里。如果他不是想在这冰天雪地里美美睡一觉，那他大概是在躲避着什么东西…但至少这个满脸堆笑的男人不是在躲着你们。\n在了解过各位的状况后，他主动提出要带领你们前往星球表面唯一的人类聚居地——「贝洛伯格」。想必你们会在那里找到星核的线索。
E: You discover a shivering man who buried himself in the snow drift. If he wasn't looking to take a good nap in the blistering cold then this smiling man is probably trying to hide from something... something other than the few of you.\nAfter knowing more about each of you, he offers to bring you to Belobog — the only human settlement on the surface of this planet. You will most definitely find clues regarding the Stellaron there.

C: 矿区的危机基本解除，绝大部分「地火」成员已经护送矿民先行撤离现场。\n不过，希儿尚未将布洛妮娅押送至首领面前，而你们也没有见到这位大人物——而这正是你们此行的根本原因。\n所幸你们阴差阳错之下捡到了被遗留在矿洞里的星际和平公司寻物产品「查宝」，或许它可以带你们找到修复矿车所需的部件……
E: The crisis in the mines is no more, and most of the Wildfire members have left the spot, escorting miners to safety along with them.\nHowever, Seele has not yet brought her captive, Bronya, to the chief, and you haven't had the chance to meet this important figure, a meeting with whom is the biggest motive behind this journey.\nLuckily, you happen to have picked up a Findie, a product from the Interastral Peace Corporation with the purpose of searching for things. Someone must have left behind in the mines. Maybe it can lead you to the parts required to fix the mine cart...

C: 打开第二道大门的权限只掌握在克拉拉手里，而克拉拉此时又回到了铆钉镇搜集材料。\n不久前刚从那里回来的你很清楚：铆钉镇究竟是个怎样凶险的地方。在这里，你已经发现克拉拉的护卫机器人受损严重，并得知克拉拉被独自困在了「淬火工坊」…\n克拉拉现在正处于危险之中——尽快赶到工坊，保护克拉拉！
E: Only Clara, who has returned to Rivet Town to collect materials, has the authorization to open the second gate.\nBeing there not long ago, you are well aware of how vicious of a place Rivet Town is. Here, you already discovered Clara's robot guardian to be heavily damaged and learned that Clara is trapped in the Tempering Workshop all by herself...\nClara is in danger — hurry over to the workshop and protect Clara!

C: 能源中枢在希露瓦的操作下成功上线，连接栈桥控制终端的管线不出意外已经全部打通。\n趁着还没被银鬃铁卫彻底团团包围，迅速前往操作栈桥控制终端，通过栈桥吧！
E: The energy hub is now online thanks to Serval. The lines connecting to the gear bridge terminals should all be opened.\nQuickly, use the gear bridge terminal and cross the gear bridge before the Silvermane Guards manage to surround you!

C: 根据幸存者所言，太卜已经率军与药王秘传的叛徒先行交锋。当务之急，你们应当先前往云骑驻扎之处，与他们汇合。
E: According to the survivors, the master diviner had led the army to attack the rebel forces made up of Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Your most urgent task right now is to head to the Knights' encampment and meet up with them.

C: 你在爱德华医生的指导下体验了匹诺康尼最负盛名的特色视听盛宴——梦泡，美梦版的虚拟现实装置，但比纯粹的科技产品更拟真。你扮演了疑似阿基维利的某位星神（或某人）与帕姆展开激辩，最终荣获「世界上第二糟糕的无名客」称号。\n类似的有趣体验在匹诺康尼应该不少，或许你可以到处转转。
E: Under the guidance of Dr. Edward, you were able to experience the most famous audiovisual feast Penacony had to offer — a dream bubble — A virtual-reality device created for the dream world that was more realistic than a purely technological product. You played the role of someone you suspected to be an Aeon named Akivili (or someone), who ended up in a dispute with Pom-Pom, finally earning the title of "Second-most terrible Nameless in the World."\nIt seems that there are many enjoyable experiences like these awaiting you in Penacony. Perhaps you should explore around for yourself.

C: 你们来到了一座雕像丛生的玄关大厅，发现这里根本没有前进的道路…换句话说，连门都没有。看来你们现在得想办法变出一扇门了——\n好在那位博学的教授总是有主意…他不会是读过剧本吧？
E: You two reach a foyer full of statues and realize there is no way to proceed further... In other words, there is not even a door in sight. Looks like you have to find a way to conjure up a door...\nFortunately, the learned professor always knows what to do... Could he have studied the script before?

C: 你已抵达自己的结局。\n最后的时光，同████好好道别吧。尽量让自己……\n…死而无憾。
E: You have reached your final end.\nBid your farewells to █████████ in your final moments. Try your best to...\n...Die without regrets.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 尘埃落定，阿斯德纳和整个宇宙最终免于成为「秩序」傀儡的命运。距离击败「齐响诗班」似乎已经过去了一段时间…这期间都发生了些什么？\n在「白日梦」酒店里走走看看，与同伴会合，整理一下现状吧。
E: As the dust settles, Asdana and the entire universe have escaped the fate of becoming puppets to the Order. It seems some time has passed since the Harmonious Choir were defeated... What has happened during this time?\nTake a look around The Reverie, regroup with your companions, and find out what's been going on.

C: 谐乐大典开幕式不出意外地出意外了：那位爱笑的女孩费心布局，四处分发按钮，显然就是为了这一刻。\n<unbreak>999</unbreak>枚虚数中子弹…说真的，她到底是从哪儿搞来这么多大规模杀伤性武器的？但无论如何，身为无名客的你必须挺身而出，守护美梦——按图索骥，火速解决危机吧。
E: As expected, something unexpected happened during the opening of the Charmony Festival: That laughter-worshiping girl had painstakingly laid out buttons everywhere obviously for precisely this moment.\n<unbreak>999</unbreak> imaginary neutron bombs... seriously, how on earth did she get her hands on so many weapons of mass destruction? But in any case, as one of the Nameless, you are duty-bound to stand up and protect the Dreamjoy: Follow the clues and overcome the crisis as soon as possible.

C: 终于，匹诺康尼的「开拓」之旅还是迎来了美好的结局。是时候迎接新的冒险了——但在那之前，列车组还想和一些人做个正式的道别。\n为逝者的故事画上圆满的句号，就是最好的告慰。去吧，他们都在流梦礁…就在这里。
E: Finally, the trailblazing expedition on Penacony has come to a preferable conclusion. It's time for a new adventure — but before that, the Crew would like to wish say a formal farewell to certain people.\nDrawing a firm line under the stories of those who passed is the best form of comfort. Go on, then — they're all at the Dreamflux Reef... right here.

C: 筑梦艺术课开始了，所幸你的第一个任务不是跟混凝土打交道。课上的一切都很新奇，无论是想象力作画，还是你的忍者同学与猴子老师——看来这次学院之旅是离不开这两个词了。\n动手…不，动脑画出你的大作吧！
E: The Dreamweaving class has started, and thankfully, your first task doesn't involve dealing with concrete. Everything in this class feels fresh, from creative artwork to your ninja classmate and monkey mentor. It seems like these two elements are intertwined in your academic journey.\nUse your hands... or your brain to craft your own masterpiece!

C: 只有坠落于地，才能习得如何飞翔，而一个人若想谢幕，就必须再一次站上台前。\n前往匹诺康尼大剧院，完成这场告别的最后一步。
E: Only when one has fallen to the ground can they learn how to fly. If one wants to take a curtain call, they must stand on the stage once more.\nGo to Penacony Grand Theater and complete the final step of this farewell.

C: 只有坠落于地，才能习得如何飞翔，而一个人若想谢幕，就必须再一次站上台前。\n完成对于自身的调律。
E: Only when one has fallen to the ground can they learn how to fly. If one wants to take a curtain call, they must stand on the stage once more.\nComplete your own tuning.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 在黄金裔浴场中，阿格莱雅以自己的方式确认了我们的善意，似乎奥赫玛愿意将我们奉为贵宾。希望此次开拓之行真能这般顺利吧。
E: In the Chrysos Heirs bath, Aglaea affirmed our good intentions in her way, and it seems Okhema is willing to welcome us as honored guests. Let's hope this trailblazing expedition continues to unfold as smoothly.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: {NICKNAME}与白厄、万敌来到了悬锋城。曾经兵戈作响的尚战之邦，如今已成了一座阴森的荒墟。疯溃的尼卡多利就身在这座移动堡垒的深处。
E: {NICKNAME}, Phainon, and Mydei arrive at Castrum Kremnos. What was once a fierce city filled with the clamor of armaments has become a haunting ruin. Deep within this mobile fortress lies the maddened and fallen Nikador.

C: 距离白厄进入创世涡心挑战「纷争」试炼已过去很长时间，众黄金裔对此都不禁心生不安。
E: It's been a long while since Phainon entered the Vortex of Genesis for the Strife trial, leaving all Chrysos Heirs deeply concerned.

C: 白厄的火种试炼突生变故，情急之下，我们决定与遐蝶、万敌一同介入试炼，将可能遭遇危险的白厄救出。
E: When crisis struck during Phainon's Coreflame trial as we waited anxiously, we made the snap decision to join Castorice and Mydei in rescuing Phainon from possible peril.

C: 对于我们伸出援手击败尼卡多利一事，阿格莱雅表现出真挚的谢意，诚备厚礼、邀我与{NICKNAME}前往英雄浴池一叙。
E: Aglaea shows sincere gratitude for our help in defeating Nikador, preparing generous gifts and inviting {NICKNAME} and I to the Hero's Bath for a discussion.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n未流淌着黄金血的异乡旅者也接受了泰坦的试炼，希望{NICKNAME}和迷迷一切顺利。\n「那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。」我想起了初次见到阿格莱雅时听到的这句话。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nEven as an outland traveler, whose veins carry no golden blood, has accepted the Titan's trial. Wishing {NICKNAME} and Mem the best of luck.\n"I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance." I remembered hearing this the first time I met Aglaea.

C: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n你的身体在云崖圣道上攀登，灵魂却在冥河滩涂上缓行…那些亡魂与登山道重合在一起，究竟想要讲述什么……
E: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's mystic body in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nYour body climbs the Sacred Path of Dawncloud, but your soul lingers at the shores of River of Souls... The souls along the mountain path — what do they want to tell?

C: 「戏剧」实为某人年少时的记忆，舞台是昔日的哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}带着一肚子的问题， 扮演着其人「最重要的伙伴」，陪伴他与昔涟一同找寻着某物…
E: The "theater" is actually someone's childhood memories, staged in the Aedes Elysiae of old. {NICKNAME}, with many questions in mind, assumes the role of this person's "most important companion," joining him and Cyrene on their search for something important...

C: 我不是烂片导演！我是匹诺康尼史上最伟大艺术家！听懂了吗？艺术家！
E: I'm not some third-grade director! I'm the greatest artist in Penacony's cinematic history! Got it? Artist!

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 按照黑塔制定的作战计划，列车组众人将深入翁法罗斯内部，与银河联军里应外合，共同击败「铁墓」。
E: According to Herta's battle plan, the Express Crew will infiltrate deep into Amphoreus and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance in a pincer attack to defeat Irontomb together.

C: 突破屏障之后，螺丝咕姆发现一处有趣的信号——「神话之外」。去会会现实中的智械哥，从他脑袋里找出德谬歌的线索吧。
E: After breaking through the barrier, Screwllum detects an intriguing signal: Exomyth. It's time to meet the old Intellitron in reality and find clues about the Demiurge from his head.

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 西风吹拂之地，有无垠的麦浪和蔺草的芬芳。这里就是少女的故乡，旅途开启的地方。如果觉得累了，就在这里好好睡一觉吧——一切珍贵的回忆，都会如温暖的毛绒，包裹着你进入梦乡。
E: Where the west wind blows, unending waves of wheat fields and the fragrance of rush grass stretch far and wide. This is the girl's homeland, where the journey began. If you feel fatigued, feel free to take a respite here. All your precious memories will wrap around you like warm fleece as you drift into dreamland.

C: 昔日存放种种奇物的收容舱段已成立应急安全区。冰冷不瞑的亡影尚未消退，怪物仍在银光闪烁的舱室内巡回，一段提振人心的「复兴宣言」将在此处上演。\n拾柴者啊，请勿踟躇，复兴之火正在等待。
E: The Storage Zone that once held a variety of Curios has been turned into an emergency safe zone. The chilling shadows of death still linger, and the monsters continue to roam free in the silvery cabin. An exhilarating declaration of revival will be taking place here.\nThere's no time to waste! Your efforts are the firewood that will fuel the flames of revival!

C: 关于如何处置拉明娜与「异星水魈」，你已做出了无悔的抉择。将水魈共谋案原委告知艾丝妲后，意外发现站长早已知晓一切，甚至可称幕后导演。\n通过招募你这名合格演员，成功劝诫麾下的迷途科员。
E: You've decided on what to do with Lamina and the Xenohydro. After telling Asta about their conspiracy, you find that the lead researcher already knows everything. More precisely, she seemingly orchestrated it all.\nBy casting you as an actor in her little play, she managed to make the lost researcher see the error of her ways.

C: 卡波特教授似乎知道一些关于「修行」的秘密。\n谨慎地从他那里套出有效的线索吧。
E: Professor Capote seems to know something about the trials.\nCarefully fish out some useful information from him.

C: 空间站最近热闹不断。模拟宇宙再次更新、天才俱乐部的大人物都齐聚于此，每个人都心思各异——你总觉得会有些意想不到的事情发生。\n阮•梅的态度令你感到奇怪，她似乎有些话要对你说……
E: The space station has been bustling with activity lately. With the latest update to the Simulated Universe and the gathering of prominent figures from the Genius Society, everyone seems to have their own agenda. You can't help but feel that there might be some unexpected events on the horizon. \nRuan Mei's demeanor strikes you as peculiar, and she appears to have something to tell you...

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n丹恒不去，太犟。去问问姬子。估计没戏。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nDan Heng's not going, too stubborn. Asking Himeko, but probably unlikely.

C: 你在裂界中发现了一个神态异常的小女孩，希莉儿。\n你帮助她解开了两次谜题，但她依然不愿随你离开裂界。\n无奈之下，你只能去请求一位「大师」的帮助了……
E: You find a strange little girl, Cyrille, in the Fragmentum.\nYou helped her to solve two puzzles, but somehow she still doesn't want to leave the Fragmentum with you.\nIn desperation, you resort to asking a master for help...

C: 经过一番折腾，你似乎终于摸到了矿车工助教的门道。\n根据老师傅的说法，他还为自己的徒弟准备了一系列测试题。而向学徒演示如何正确调度矿车，这一重任自然落在了你这位「金牌助教」的肩上。\n你又一次顺利通过测试，老师傅也自然为你准备了对应的奖励。看看这次的奖励都有什么吧。
E: After a series of challenges, you seem to have finally gotten the knack for being a mine cart operator's assistant.\nThe senior miner says that he's also prepared a series of questions to test his apprentice. Naturally, the burden of demonstrating to his apprentice the correct way to operate mine carts falls on your shoulders as the "Ace Assistant."\nYou passed another one of the senior miner's tests, and he has naturally prepared a fitting reward for you. Go see what the reward is this time.

C: 参加竞价的买家越多，「菌菌」的价格才会越高。不知道买家各自心中的计划，多找一些买家准没错。\n万一还有人不知道宇宙无敌可爱的「菌菌」正在拍卖，那不就是亏了吗？
E: The more buyers who participate in the auction, the higher the bidding price of "Junjun." You don't know the plans of the buyers present, but the more, the merrier.\nEverybody here will know that the cute toy bear "Junjun" will be auctioned today!

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n你和佩拉来到了没落的商业街，追查嫌疑人诺尔伯特公子的下落。\n刚一来到这里，你们就看到了嫌疑人的身影——上去听听他们在聊什么吧。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nYou and Pela arrive at the desolate shopping street to chase down Norbert, the suspect.\nYou see your suspect as soon as you arrive. Go and listen to what they're saying.

C: 为了获取药王秘传的信任，你不得不帮他们截获一份寄往神策府的重要情报。希望那位带着情报逃离药王秘传的「背叛者」一切平安。
E: In order to obtain the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus' trust, you have to intercept an important missive to be delivered to the Seat of Divine Foresight. Let's hope nothing bad happens to the missive-bearing traitor escaping the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 博识学会的学者陶德•雷奥登的研究似乎遇到了难题，他对你青睐有加并拜托你帮忙寻找医书。做研究的事嘛，可不能说是「跑腿」，这可是「学术」。
E: Scholar Todd Riordan of the Intelligentsia Guild seems to have encountered a problem with his research. He holds you in high regard and has asked you to help find medical books. This isn't merely "running errands" - it's "academic."

C: 梅姐已经被丹鼎司医馆的救助人员带走，而得到消息的芦慧才从工作地点赶到星槎海。芦慧为了向你表达谢意，还是想和你见上一面。
E: Mei's been carted off by the Alchemy Commission apothecary paramedics and Luhui, who only just got the news, rushed over from work to Starskiff Haven. Luhui wants to meet with you again to express her thanks.

C: 黛青小姐突然悔过，通过自己的另一个账号联系上你，希望能够将钱还给你。看来她是想在事情变得覆水难收之前私下了结，这也正合你的意愿。问问艾丝妲的建议吧，这毕竟是她的钱。
E: Ms. Daiqing suddenly regretted it and contacted you through another one of her accounts, hoping to return the money to you. It looks like she wants to settle things privately before things get out of hand, which is exactly what you want. Ask Asta what to do next since it's her money after all.

C: 必须承认，这回是我看走眼了。尽管我勉力追赶，但连她的影子也没摸到…只见到一地的孽物残骸。这般身手，她究竟是什么人？为什么要来为难我这样的小孩子？
E: I have to say, I underestimated her. Even at my full speed, I couldn't even see her silhouette... Only bodies of abominations piling up. Who is she? Why does she want to make life difficult for a child like me?

C: 事情的发展越来越出乎预料。还是去找那几位大善人看看情况吧。
E: Things are getting more and more out of hand. Go find those Benevolent Ones to check out the situation.

C: 看起来大善人们都倒大霉了，这下乐子可大了…啊不，我是说…这下可惨了。赶紧看看发生了什么吧。
E: Looks like the Benevolent Ones are all in serious trouble. That's gonna be a lot of fun... Oops, I meant... it's going to be bad. Go see what's going on.

C: 浮烟自称对恚炎的秉性了如指掌，它提出了一条破局之道。不过这鬼祟之物是真心想帮助人类取胜？抑或是它的提议包藏着别样的祸心？若不任由它将底牌掀开，一切尚未可知。尽管不安，但你们必须撑到这底牌掀开的一刻。
E: Cirrus claims to know Furynox like the back of its hand, and proposes a game changer of a counter. But does this shifty creature really want to help humanity win? Or could it be that it secretly harbors ulterior motives? We'll never know what's up its sleeve unless we let it play its trump card. You're nervous, but you have to hold on until that trump card gets played.

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 为了应对呼雷垂死一击，天击将军不得不全力应对那轮高悬于天的「赤月」，她仿佛堕入旧日的战场，展开永无尽头的厮杀。欲解除疯狂，唯一的良方仅有「拖延」二字。
E: In response to Hoolay's dying blow, the Merlin's Claw has no choice but to use everything in her power to confront the Crimson Moon hanging in the sky. As though she had returned to the battlefields of yore, she initiates a bloody massacre that has no end in sight. There is only one way to bring her out of madness: Stall for time.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 你通过钟表把戏进入了查德威克的心绪空间。\n跟随旧日的影子，见证这位天才的一段段过去吧。
E: You have entered Chadwick's Emoscape through your Clockwork.\nFollow the shadows of his past and witness fragments of this genius' past.

C: 忙碌如大堂经理也需要一些时间调整状态，缓和心情。\n等你准备好了就继续工作吧，客人不知道什么时候就会找上门来。
E: Even a busy lobby manager needs occasional breaks to relax and unwind.\nReturn to your work when you feel ready, as guests may arrive at any moment.

C: 等到夜梦已不再喧嚣，等到我们在梦乡重逢。
E: Until the day our dreams fall quiet once more, until we meet again in the land of our dreams.

C: 对于小机器人的故障情况，维修工程师有些新想法。他拜托你去重启故障的小机器人，然后回来验证下他的猜想是否正确吧。
E: The maintenance engineer has a new idea about the meal-delivery robot malfunction. He asks you to reboot the malfunctioning robot to verify if his guess is accurate.

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n你帮华劳斯拍了一张照片——真不错。拿去给他看看吧。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nYou helped Wallace take a photo — It looks good. Show it to him.

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n你帮华劳斯拍了一张照片——真不错。拿去给他看看吧。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nYou helped Wallace take a photo — It looks good. Show it to him.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 完成曜青棋手为你准备的「寻径指津」谜题，领取属于你的奖励。
E: Complete the "Pathfinder" puzzle prepared by the Yaoqing player for you and claim the reward that belongs to you.

C: 造物们对「管家」言听计从，但这似乎只是表象，说不定会有造物对它心存不满。或许我们能从中打探到什么……
E: While all the other creations appear to be obedient to the butler, there could be dissatisfied individuals among them. Perhaps you can learn something from them...

C: 果然，「管家」撒谎骗过了你们和所有造物。现在收集到了所有证据，是时候戳穿这一切了——想来在铁证面前，它不会再嘴硬了吧？
E: As you suspected, the butler has lied to you and all the other creations. Now that you have gathered all the evidence, it is time to expose its lies. Undeniable evidence will make it speak the truth, right?

C: 司祭似乎有所领悟，希望这一次，心酿能够迎来新生。
E: The priest seems to have an epiphany. Hopefully, the soul brew can be rejuvenated this time.

C: 天舶司发来消息，说迴星港发生了星槎坠毁的事故，希望你能帮忙救助遇难者。瓦尔特似乎也在附近，抓紧时间和他汇合，搜救遇难者吧。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission sent a message saying that there was a starskiff crash in Stargazer Navalia, and hopes you can help rescue the victim. Welt seems to be nearby. Hurry up and join him in searching for the victim.

C: 「选择」真的存在吗？在卡芙卡看来，一切选择都是虚假的，只是命中注定的可能性之一；自由意志根本不存在，你身在此处这一点就是明证。她的想法多少有些悲观和虚无了，而你可以接受，也可以否认。
E: Does "choice" really exist? From Kafka's perspective, all choices are illusions and merely represent predetermined possibilities. Free will does not exist, and your presence here is clear proof of that. Her ideas are somewhat pessimistic and nihilistic, and you can either accept or reject them.

C: 「选择」真的存在吗？在卡芙卡看来，一切选择都是虚假的，只是命中注定的可能性之一；自由意志根本不存在，你身在此处这一点就是明证。她的想法多少有些悲观和虚无了，而你可以接受，也可以否认。
E: Does "choice" really exist? From Kafka's perspective, all choices are illusions and merely represent predetermined possibilities. Free will does not exist, and your presence here is clear proof of that. Her ideas are somewhat pessimistic and nihilistic, and you can either accept or reject them.

C: 真心话游戏来到了第二轮，卡芙卡想通过这个游戏得到什么呢？也许只是解闷而已。但你确实可以从一真一假的回答中，得到自己好奇已久的答案。至于孰真孰假……
E: The game of truth and lies has entered its second round. What does Kafka hope to gain from this game? Perhaps just some entertainment. But from the truthful and false answers, you can finally find answers to things you've been curious about for a long time. As for which answers are true or false...

C: 你收到了一条奇怪的广告短信，其中有个不认识的名字引起了你的注意，去空间站调查一下发生了什么吧。
E: A strange message arrives in your inbox, containing an unfamiliar name that rouses your suspicions. Go to the space station and investigate.

C: 温世玲将本次实验需要的材料整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给她吧！
E: Wen Shiling compiled a list of required materials for her current experiment. Collect them and hand them over to her!

C: 雷金的感应仪又有了新动静！去歌德宾馆瞧瞧具体情况吧！
E: Regin's sensor found something again! Head to the Goethe Hotel to learn about the details!

C: 金人巷不少商铺与码头建立了合作，码头上的运单也比之前更加复杂。小秘书似乎是有事相求的样子。\n到码头看看，也许有你能帮上忙的部分。
E: Plenty of shops and stores in Aurum Alley have established a collaborative relationship with the docks, and the logistics orders coming in also more complex than before. Mingxi's expression seems to imply a need for assistance.\nHead to the docks and see if you can help with anything.

C: 看起来，桂乃芬还有些话想跟你说。\n你编辑过很多@小桂子Guinevere 的帖子，这次也不例外，去和桂乃芬聊聊吧。
E: It seems Guinaifen still has something to say to you.\nYou've edited plenty of LilGuiGuinevere posts and this will be no exception. Go and chat with Guinaifen.

C: 「罗浮杂俎」，原本只是个灵异爱好者们聚集的网站，却最终成了罗浮上平民茶余饭后交换流言蜚语的大型网络社区。\n努力拓展你的影响力吧，它不仅会将情报汇聚你手中，更能让你以「捉鬼小队」的名义正大光明地行动。
E: Ghostly Grove, once a modest gathering website for supernatural enthusiasts, has now become a thriving community where denizens of the Luofu Xianzhou exchange tales and rumors.\nTry to expand your sphere of influence, as this not only helps you get the information you need, but also allows you to operate openly in the name of the respected ghost-hunting squad.

C: 进入了黑桃的心绪空间，现在要做的事就是帮它改掉这个爱捉弄人的坏毛病！\n不过，首先得抓住它……
E: You've entered Spade's Emoscape. Now, you need to help it change its bad habit of pranking others!\nBut first, you'll need to catch it...

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n影片的剪辑工作正在继续，帮助克劳克影业完成更多影片吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and have begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nEditing is still going on. Help Clock Studios complete more films!

C: 在迎接挑战之前，先补充些能量吧。
E: Fill up on some energy before facing the challenge

C: 终极挑战就在眼前，但周围似乎发生了一些奇怪的事情。
E: The final showdown is just ahead. But strange things are happening around you.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 没想到冤家路窄，你们再次撞上斯科特胡作非为，三月七与斯科特立下了十五日后剑斗之约。\n你们帮助不夜侯小老板娘梦茗解了围，就像是真正的大侠一样，好事做到底，去安抚一下她吧。
E: Alas, adversaries are wont to cross paths! The both of you encounter Skott, who is up to no good yet again. March 7th and Skott end up making a pact to cross swords in fifteen days.\nThe way you went to Mengming's aid was exactly what swordmasters would do. Don't stop now, go over and comfort the young innkeeper of the Sleepless Earl.

C: 见习医师伦道夫已经准备好了今日的离散忆质收容计划，去帮伦道夫拍摄目标所在的位置吧。
E: Trainee Healer Randolph has prepared the retrieval plan for the scattered memoria today. Help him film the location of the target.

E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 家族与公司联合举办的球笼赛车比赛要准备开始了，等等…你明明记得自己没报过名，怎么突然就有参赛资格了？不管了，过去看看究竟是个什么情况。
E: The Spheroid Racing Competition hosted jointly by The Family and the IPC is about to begin. Wait... You're sure you didn't sign up for it, why are you suddenly eligible for participation? Never mind, head over and find out what's going on.

C: 虽说有点突然，但波提欧这人还怪好的，居然把他的赛车就这么托付给了你。来都来了，干脆就用他的赛车试训看看吧，说不定你有赛车的天赋呢？
E: It's rather abrupt, but Boothill is a pretty nice guy. He entrusted his own race car to you. Since we're already here, we might as well use his race car for training. Who knows, you might have a talent for racing!

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 第三次迷其林美食评审就要开始啦，和餐馆的伙伴一起去参加吧！\n万敌和白厄的主厨角斗正在火热进行中，究竟谁会获得最终胜利呢？几位评审员或许能给出答案。
E: The third Memchelin Food Review is about to begin! Gather your restaurant crew and join!\nThe Chef Showdown between Mydei and Phainon is heating up! Who will claim the ultimate victory? The judges might just have the answer.

C: 你调制了名为「人格」的配方，黑塔人偶喝下后，展现出了令人意外的一面。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为黑塔再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You mixed a recipe called "Persona," and after the Herta puppet drank it, she showed an unexpected side.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Herta.

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！

The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

C: 遇到危险的时候，我会下意识地造出冰来托住自己。
E: When I'm in danger, I instinctively create ice to protect myself.

C: 猜到了。你没来之前，三月要去哪里，姬子都会让我和瓦尔特先生跟着。
E: ...As I expected. Before you came, whenever March wanted to go anywhere, Himeko would make Mr. Yang and me go with her.

C: 下一颗星球是怎样的？
E: What's the next planet like?

C: 那些仅仅从命途中汲取力量的派系，没法与之相比。
E: Its power is much greater than those factions that simply draw their strength from the Paths themselves.

C: …如果你们要去的话，我不能和你们同行。
E: ...So if you're planning on going, I can't go with you.

C: 放心吧。
E: ...Don't worry.

C: 大地是文明生存与发展不可或缺的摇篮。不过，也有文明能脱离童年，驾驭星舰巡游在虚空中……仙舟联盟就是如此。
E: Terrestrial environments are cradles that allow civilizations to survive and then develop. Some of those civilizations progress further — constructing space-faring vessels which allow them to voyage into the unknown... The Xianzhou Alliance is one such civilization.

C: 咦？是有工作人员出现了吗？
E: Huh? Is this still automated?

C: 看不出来啊。
E: So Welt's got skills?

C: 经历了雅利洛-Ⅵ上冰冷、疲惫的旅程，难道不期待下一站是个怎样的星球吗！
E: After all that cold and exhaustion on Jarilo-VI, you must be looking forward to the next planet!

C: 太空电梯，它对你已经没用了。
E: Space elevator? You've no use for that.

C: 这就是「星核」——你们星核猎手在宇宙中四处猎捕的东西。不过，它只是个幌子。艾利欧知道，刃知道，你也知道。星核猎手还有更重要的目标。
E: This is Stellaron — what Stellaron Hunters throughout the universe all hunt for. But in truth, it's all just a front. Elio knows it, Blade knows it, and you know it, too. Stellaron Hunters have another true goal.

C: 你看见空间站的标志，好像一只橡胶手臂握着吵闹的喇叭。
E: You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like a rubber arm holding a noisy horn.

C: 反物质军团？
E: The Antimatter Legion?

C: 什么「各位」啊？你不一起来吗？
E: Huh? You're not coming with us?

C: 他们再怎么念叨「天文学只是观测的学问，并不能创造经济价值」，见到黑塔女士还不是大气不敢出？
E: No matter how much they drone on about "Astronomy is just about looking at things, it doesn't bring any real value," they all fall silent in front of Madam Herta.

C: 想了解阿兰。
E: I'd like to learn about Arlan.

C: 佩佩是我们的家人，毛茸茸的小狗，就像个白色小雪球。
E: Oh, Peppy's a fluffy little puppy, like a white snowball. He's family.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着瓦尔特：「5分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Welt: "5 points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着阿格莱雅：「<unbreak>99.11</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Aglaea: "<unbreak>99.11</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 「奇物编号<unbreak>1381</unbreak>：心之全蚀。」
E: "Curio No. <unbreak>1381</unbreak>: Total Eclipse of the Heart."

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着长夜月：「<unbreak>37</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Evernight: "<unbreak>37</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 喂喂喂，感觉…它是不是在憋什么大招？
E: Hey! Is it trying to pull a charged attack?

C: 你回来啦，黑塔。
E: Welcome back, Herta.

C: {NICKNAME}…你知道你还有另一个选择，月台上停着一辆星穹列车。如果你愿意，可以跟我们一起走。
E: {NICKNAME}... You also have another option — the Astral Express. If you want, you can leave with us.

C: 这倒不错，还多少能保持点新鲜感。用不着这小鬼的时候，我也不用操这个心。
E: Hm, works for me, keeps this subject fresh, too. And that way I won't need to keep worrying about this little twerp all the time. Perfect!

C: 为什么我能容纳「星核」？
E: Why am I able to host the Stellaron?

C: 哎，我也想知道这个问题的答案。
E: Ahh, I'd like to know the answer to that as well.

C: 列车长给乘客的一点点小小的福利，你就当作是对你未来成长的投资帕。
E: Just a little gift from the conductor to the passenger. Think of it as an investment in your future growth.

C: 「开拓」是我们的使命，也是列车在银河间往来的力量之来源。
E: "Trailblaze" is our mission and the source of strength that powers the Express to travel across the galaxy.

C: 筑城者？
E: The Architects?

C: 还有，要入住歌德宾馆的话，请务必记得绕开它旁边那条铁卫驻扎的巷子。那里近期受到了裂界侵蚀的影响，已经被封锁了。
E: Oh, and if you're staying at Goethe Hotel, please avoid the alley that runs next to it — the one with Silvermane Guards stationed there. It started to be affected by corrosion recently, so it's been sealed off.

C: 你注意到什么了！？
E: Soooo, did you notice anything?

C: 工作时候怎么欢快得起来呢？
E: You can't always be friendly on the job, you know.

C: 小朋友们，不要到处乱跑啦。到这边集合……
E: Alright children, no running around, okay? Let's gather over here...

C: 哈哈，毕竟我也想亲眼看看「星核」啊——那可是我研究了十多年的课题，人这一辈子才有几个十年呀？
E: Haha, I wanna see the Stellaron too, y'know — it was my research topic for over a decade. You don't get that many decades in life.

C: 你听，希露瓦小姐。如果轻轻摇动这个盒子的话，还能听见咣当咣当的水声——
E: Listen, Miss Serval. If you shake the box lightly, you can still hear the clanging sound of water —

C: 你只是在履行应尽的职责。
E: You were just doing your job.

C: 嗯，由我来转述吧。
E: Mm, allow me to explain.

C: 呵…照片拍完了，街也逛累了，接下来……
E: *yawn* ... That's enough sightseeing and photo-taking to last me a while...

C: 喔…喔…！好大的冰块呀！但是这里明明很温暖…上层区人就不怕冰块化掉嘛？
E: Whoaaaa! So much ice! But it's warm here... aren't you Overworlders worried it'll melt?

C: 我感同身受。
E: I know the feeling.

C: 我们马上要离开贝洛伯格了。
E: We're about to leave Belobog.

C: 我就在想，你们会不会禁止——呃…我这种「外星人」——上车？
E: I'm wondering though, are there any restrictions against, uh... "aliens" like me from boarding the train?

C: 布洛妮娅大人继任之后，立刻就想到了姐姐的才能。大守护者希望召回她，让她重新拾起技术研究工作，为振兴贝洛伯格的事业发光发热。
E: Immediately after her succession, Lady Bronya set her sights on Serval's talents. The supreme guardian wants her to resume her technological research and be a shining light for the revitalization of Belobog.

C: …哎，这个话题再聊下去那可就长了，咱回机械屋再接着聊。顺便…你们俩来陪我收拾行李吧？
E: ...*sigh*, I told you it'd take a while to tell the story — let's get back to the workshop first. By the way... wanna help me pack my bags?

C: 希露瓦，这个植物标本是什么？
E: Serval, what kind of plant is this?

C: 这下应该都搞定了……
E: That should be everything...

C: 神秘的植物标本
E: Mysterious plant specimens

C: 你猜得对，我们确实刚到。
E: You're not wrong, it's only been a few minutes.

C: 拿走右边的信封。
E: Take the envelope on the right.

C: 你发现人们总是在爱情剧的宣传画下成双入对，贝洛伯格这么大，你却只感觉到拥挤。
E: You notice that people always arrive in pairs under the advertisement poster of romantic dramas. Despite Belobog's vastness, you can only feel a sense of claustrophobia.

C: 你看见一种细细长长的植物，杆茎呈柱形，内有孔洞。
E: You see a tall but thin plant with columnar-shaped stems, the inside full of holes.

C: 你耸耸肩，离它而去。世界上每时每刻都有人出生，患病，死去，宇宙中未被妥投的邮件数以亿计，这一只又特殊在哪里？
E: You shrug and leave. Every passing moment, people are being born into this world, getting sick in this world, dying in this world. There are countless letters that don't make it to their recipients. What's so special about this one?

C: 桑博去收拾自己惹的烂摊子了，我先替他照料你。不过看你这样子，脑袋和身体应该都没什么情况，很健康。
E: Sampo's gone to clear up a mess of his own making, so I'm looking after you in the meantime. Based on your current state, I don't think there's any cause for alarm — you seem perfectly healthy.

C: 不得了，听说俱乐部来了个新人，把上届拳王打得满地找牙。
E: Did you hear!? There's a new fighter at the club! He knocked the last champ's teeth out!

C: 「观众」…就不能给我俩也想个绰号嘛。
E: Admirers... How come we don't get cool nicknames!

C: 噢，这是「地髓」，一种能供暖的矿石。地上地下不是全面封锁了嘛？现在就只有地髓的运输线还在运行了，地底往上送矿石，地上往下送物资。
E: Ah, this is Geomarrow, an exothermic ore. The underground and the surface are sealed off from one another, right? Well only the Geomarrow transport line is still running. The underground sends ore to the surface, and the surface sends goods to the underground. At least in theory.

C: 是这样的，这几位是头儿迫切需要的人才，我正要带他们去拜见奥列格……
E: Well it's like this: The chief's in the market for specific talent — an urgent request. So, I'm taking them to see him...

C: …听上去咱们好功利啊！
E: Of course we wanna help... we care about other people too y'know.

C: 开玩笑！跟机器人拼命，老子图个啥？你们也别装干净，挖出这么大一片地髓还遮着掩着，独食好吃吗？
E: Pff! We ain't stupid! Why would we risk our lives against the robots? And get off the high road — you can't just find a huge chunk of Geomarrow and hog it all to yourselves!

C: 呃，不是咱想玩捉迷藏啊，你听我解释……
E: Uh... th—this isn't just hide-and-seek, okay? Let me explain...

C: 还不清楚具体内容…但我知道你背后有鬼。
E: I'm not certain yet... but there's more to our "friend" here than meets the eye.

C: 那说明问题不对。提问就像做买卖，需求够清楚，才能买到正确的东西嘛。
E: Well, that just means there's something wrong with your question! Questions are like transactions — if your request isn't clear, you might end up buying the wrong thing.

C: 「地火」是我的大客户，虽然尽是些麻烦的差事…不过合作还是很愉快的！哈哈，钱到位就是好甲方，别的不能奢求。
E: Wildfire are one of my major clients, though the work is mostly odds and ends... Still! It's always a pleasure. Haha, who am I to complain if the money's right, huh?

C: 我也不知道。
E: You're not the only one...

C: …那很好。
E: ...That's good.

C: 是史瓦罗先动的手。
E: Svarog attacked first.

C: 往好了想，现在的结果也很不错啊？所有人都知道「星核」是罪魁祸首了，大家都愿意助我们一臂之力。
E: Look on the bright side — things turned out alright, didn't they? Now everyone knows that the real problem here is the Stellaron, and they're willing to help us out.

C: 呵，她可了不起，著名的朗道家族叛逆女，本来前途一片光明，结果得罪了领导，工作丢了，跑去开了间机械屋玩地下音乐。
E: Oh, she's quite extraordinary. The renowned rebellious Landau girl. She once had a bright future, but after getting on her leader's bad side, she lost her job. She ended up opening a workshop and playing underground music.

C: 只要你能打败他们，我就给你一笔奖金，算是添个彩头。
E: I'll give you a nice little reward if you can beat them, just in case you needed any extra incentive.

C: 嗯，报告是出来了，但这情况…实在是有点糟糕。
E: Well, the report is out, but the situation... is really not good.

C: 没想到这么快！看精神状态，各位带来的应该是好消息吧？
E: You kids move fast! By the look on your faces, I assume you come bearing good news?

C: 傻孩子，才不会呢——咱们一上去，妈妈就带你去买最好看的新衣服。
E: Don't be silly, that won't happen — mommy's gonna buy you some pretty new clothes as soon as we're on the surface.

C: 瞧这群人，不一般哪……
E: Look, these are not regular people...

C: 原来二位是姐弟关系…真是年轻有为。
E: ...So she's your sister. The Landau family is full of talented young people I see.

C: 三月七、丹恒和我。
E: March 7th, Dan Heng and me.

C: 那你一定要去看一看，书里全是有趣的大冒险！
E: Then you have to read it. It's full of interesting adventures!

C: 然后，作者什么时候再出下一本呢？作者是不是挖坑不填坑啊，作者不会是跑路了吧？
E: Well then, when's the author putting out the next book? Don't tell me they won't tie up all the loose ends? No way!

C: 期间，公司「战略投资部」与家族代表进行了富有成效的磋商，双方将重启双边贸易，共同应对银河邪恶势力的威胁。
E: During this period, the Strategic Investment Department of the IPC held fruitful discussions with Family representatives. Both parties agreed to resume bilateral trade in order to collectively address the challenge posed by nefarious powers throughout the cosmos.

C: 车到山前必有路。你们不必为难，到时候由我来应答就行。
E: Don't worry. We'll find a way through. Let me do the talking.

C: 很抱歉，列车团的各位。「罗浮」上确实有一颗星核，但我必须拒绝你们的好意：这是仙舟的问题，只能由我们自己解决。
E: I am sorry, guests of the Astral Express. It is true that there is a Stellaron on the Luofu, but I'm afraid I cannot accept your kind offer to help resolve the issue. This is a Xianzhou matter, and it is our responsibility to handle it.

C: 这可说不准。原本太卜司能调取每个洞天间的出入文牍来进行追踪……
E: Impossible to say. It used to be that the Divination Commission could track the access history of all the delves...

C: 上至仙舟运行航路，庙堂治策，下到行军折冲，民生问题，都由太卜司推演占算，趋吉避凶。
E: From navigation to governance, military issues to civil affairs, every decision on the Xianzhou must be reviewed by the Divination Commission to ensure that it can be executed without a hiccup.

C: 洞天被关闭了
E: The delve is closed off

C: …抱歉，多此一问。
E: ...Apologies, forgive my curiosity.

C: 我觉得「曜青」和「罗浮」各有各的特色，虽说现在我是罗浮云骑了，但还是觉得曜青好点…就拿领导来说吧，我觉得景元将军就没有我们曜青的女将军靠谱……
E: I think the Yaoqing and the Luofu have different characteristics. I might be a Luofu Cloud Knight now, but I still think the Yaoqing is better... For example, when it comes to leadership, I don't think General Jing Yuan is as reliable as our madam general back on the Yaoqing...

C: 那里应该会有专门的疏散部队接应，然后你跟他们走就好啦。
E: There should be a dedicated evacuation team waiting for us. You can go with them.

C: 你们几位找她是有何贵干？该不会……
E: May I ask why you're looking for her? Surely she...

C: （展示停云的照片）
E: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

C: 吉时已到，得动身了。各位，请吧。
E: The time has arrived. We must depart. Please, proceed.

C: 「云阶月地，关锁千重。纵浮槎来，浮槎去，不相逢。」
E: "Downy cloud and opalescent moon are set in twain by the seals multitudinous. Neither road nor skiff shall cross the gulf and carry me to thee."

C: 幸好将军没让咱们跟着云骑…打仗和冒险真的不一样啊，这满地的人…我、我见不得这种大场面。
E: Thank goodness the general didn't make us go with the Knights... Fighting is totally different from adventuring. All these people... I—It's tough to bear.

C: 唉，头一回见你们家驭空大人，她有句话说的可好：「这是仙舟内务，不劳各位挂怀」。
E: *sigh* The first time we met Madam Yukong she said something like: "This is a Xianzhou affair and there's no need for the Express to get involved..."

C: 也好，将星核邪祟引入仙舟，重生建木，诱人堕入魔阴身…这些大罪，十王司会一条一条同你清算。
E: ...and now, your charges are many. Drawing Stellaron spirits into the Xianzhou, resurrecting the Ambrosial Arbor, striking down our people with mara... The Ten-Lords Commission will address these transgressions during your reckoning.

C: 是么？我不借机关便可御水，体会又有何用？
E: Huh? But I don't need any sort of device to help me command water, what more is there to learn?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：冷静一点。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: Calm down.

C: 探索、了解、建立、连结…列车团奉行的开拓信条，不外乎八个字。旅途艰险，要贯彻它们却难于登天。
E: Explore, understand, establish, and connect... As the crew of the Express, that's the trailblaze creed we follow. Still, when the journey gets tough, those words can feel far-off.

C: 为什么要记流放者的名字？
E: Why would the names of the banished be recorded?

C: 真想不到，除去星核猎手，竟还有一名重犯混入仙舟……
E: First it was the Stellaron Hunters, now an exiled criminal has infiltrated the Xianzhou...

C: 是那个女人教你的？
E: Did she teach you?

C: 这是停云小姐留下的东西…
E: Miss Tingyun left this behind...

C: 谢谢你们将停云的东西带回了司辰宫。这次星核灾变中，我们失去了许多同袍、兄弟、姐妹、子女……
E: *sigh* Thank you for bringing Tingyun's belongings back to the Palace of Astrum. The Stellaron crisis has cost us too many comrades, brothers, sisters... children.

C: 我也以为自己厌倦了飞行，丧失了开弓射敌的勇气。于是我埋头躲进天舶司的事务案牍里，不想再看天空一眼。
E: I felt tired of voyaging — like I'd lost the courage to pull on a bowstring ever again. I hid away in the Sky-Faring Commission and buried myself in work, never wanting to see the sky again.

C: 这枚玉兆也是如此，记录着罗浮云骑对列车团的承诺，同时它也是一枚信标——握紧它，就会向我手中成对的玉兆送出消息。
E: The same is true of this jade abacus — it is a record of the Luofu Cloud Knights' promise to the crew of the Astral Express. It is also a beacon — grip it tightly, and it will send a message to the jade abacus here in my hand.

C: 好耶！
E: Nice!

C: 我也敲打了丹恒，让他多多少少讲了讲自己的经历。不过你懂，唉，原本可以大谈特谈的事情，他用三言两语就草草说完了。
E: I pestered Dan Heng to tell me about his experiences, but alas, what could've been a magnificent saga was reduced to a few words and a grunt.

C: 我记得。
E: I remember.

C: 跃迁开始前，本列车长会广播通知的帕！
E: I'll broadcast an announcement before we jump!

C: 我说了，不用急着答复，因为无论如何…结果都不会变。
E: I already said there's no rush to give me an answer. Because no matter what happens... the outcome will remain the same.

C: （出示结盟玉兆…）
E: (Show Jade Abacus of Allying Oath...)

C: 关于「家族」…
E: About The Family...

C: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
E: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

C: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
E: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

C: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
E: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

C: 是啊，我也觉得他很可爱！
E: I know, right? Isn't he adorable?

C: 你知道吗？苏萨水最初的配方中，有一种被称作梦见草的原料彻底灭绝了。所以现在只有在匹诺康尼的梦里才能尝到「元年苏乐达」的味道。
E: Did you know? One of the ingredients in the original recipe for Sousa Juice, known as Dreamleaf, has gone extinct. That means the only place you can get a taste of Epochal SoulGlad is in Penacony's Dreamscape.

C: 考虑到你是第一次来，不如就从最简单的开始吧，美梦排排乐和幸运转盘都很容易上手哦。
E: Since this is your first time here, I say we start with the easiest games. The Dreamy Slots and Lucky Wheel are pretty straightforward.

C: 看来流萤小姐已经跃跃欲试了。别急，别急，作为示范，这次就先用我的梦感受一下吧。
E: Miss Firefly, I admire your eagerness, but please be patient. Allow me to use my dream as a demonstration.

C: 我看到一个…有手有脚的钟表。
E: I can see a... clock with limbs.

C: 米沙遇到危险啦！他就在那里，我来带你去！
E: Misha's in trouble! He's over there. Let me bring you to him!

C: 看，很漂亮的地方，对吧？
E: Look! This place is breathtaking, isn't it?

C: 他可真是…太有原则了。
E: He really is a man of principle.

C: （还是不要离流萤太远吧…）
E: (I'd better stay close to Firefly...)

C: 米哈伊尔，你去哪儿了？
E: Mikhail, where are you?

C: 你还会回来吗？
E: Will you come back?

C: 米哈伊尔
E: Mikhail

C: 呵呵，你很关心那个小姑娘啊。也是，即便在「死亡」面前，她也竭尽所能想要保护你的安全…连我都有些心动了呢。
E: Heheh, you're quite concerned about that young lady. That's fair — she was hell-bent on assuring your safety even at the brink of death... Started to tug a little at my heartstrings, even.

C: …你说得没错，你不是我期待中的救主，因此你没有背叛我的期待。我应该感谢你才对。走吧，我不会取你的性命，也仅止于此了。
E: You're right. You are not the savior that I expected. And because you haven't betrayed my expectations... I should thank you instead. Go. I won't take your life, but that's the limit of my mercy.

C: 你看见了意料之外的东西，一只真蛰虫…它就这样躺在垃圾桶里，与你对视。
E: You see something unexpected — a True Sting, lying inside the trashcan, looking back at you.

C: 不错，年轻的桶，你证明了自己的智慧和耐心。你配得上这份「信任的证明」，我会将它转赠给你。
E: Not bad, young can. You've proven yourself by your wisdom and patience... You deserve this Proof of Trust. I'll gift it to you.

C: 三月？是我，{NICKNAME}…
E: March? It's me, {NICKNAME}...

C: 说实话，我不太信任忆者。
E: To be honest, I don't really trust Memokeepers.

C: 总算安静了。两位为什么会出现在这里？
E: Finally, some peace and quiet. What are the two of you doing here?

C: 我的意思是，不行。
E: I mean, no can do.

C: ——是之前和你在一起的小姑娘？
E: ...The girl who was with you?

C: 但你也要当心，尤其在与他们订立契约时，要多加留意。在契约之外，他们不会考虑你的权利…为了最大化自己的利益，他们可以无所不用其极。
E: But, always be on guard, particularly when making agreements with him. Scrutinize the details. Beyond the confines of the contract, your rights are off his radar... He'll go to extreme lengths to ensure his advantage.

C: （进入房间。）
E: (Enter the room.)

C: 啊…是她？这怎么可能？
E: Ah... Her? How is this possible?

C: 尚不是时候。
E: It's not yet time.

C: 为了寻找那份「遗产」，入住匹诺康尼后我便走访各个梦境，进行了许多调查，期间也和不少来客产生过接触。这一过程中，我逐渐意识到……
E: I've run around many different Penacony dreamscapes just to try and find that "Legacy," and during this period I came into contact with quite a few guests. In the process, I gradually came to realize...

C: 嘿，教授——这话说的，你到底站在哪边？
E: Hey, Doc — Whose side are you on anyway?

C: 览——乐意为您效劳。
E: Model. Happy to be of service.

C: 存放「基石」的匣子。
E: The box in which the Cornerstone is stored.

C: 你可以把话说的更明白些。
E: You'll have to speak more clearly than that.

C: 你、你们是什么人？
E: Wh—Who are you guys?

C: 布拉沃工作小组已抵达指定位置，准备执行武装疏散作业——小的们，都给我动起来！
E: The Bravo team has arrived at their designated position. Ready to execute armed evacuation operation — boys, get moving!

C: 有话快说，没事就别来妨碍我们！
E: Well? Spit it out! Stop bothering us if you've nothing important!

C: 我警告你啊，你再这样不依不饶，我可要展现真正的实力了！
E: I'm warning you, if you keep insisting, I'm gonna have to show you my true power!

C: 那你们一定见识过为实现梦想、或已然实现梦想的人们在那里挥金如土、孤注一掷。一切皆可标价，一切皆可买卖——哪怕是梦想本身。
E: Then you all must have seen those who are attempting to realize their dreams, or have realized them, scattering money as if it were dust, and betting it on all or nothing. Everything has a price, and everything can be bought or sold — even dreams themselves.

C: 但我认为你很幸运，就把你买下了。从今往后，你和你的运气都是我的资产，明白了么？
E: But I figured you must have had good luck, so I bought you. From now on, you and your good luck are MY assets. Are we clear?

C: 嚯，想知道这个？可以。六十枚{RUBY_B#赤铜币}塔安巴{RUBY_E#}，不多不少。
E: Huh, you really want to know? Well, it was sixty {RUBY_B#Red Copper Coins}Tanba{RUBY_E#}. No more, no less.

C: …说的是啊。不打扰您了，祝您度过愉快的一天。
E: ...What a joke. Well, I'll leave you be, then. I hope you have a wonderful day!

C: 我就直截了当地说了，这姑娘的情况…别说你们，猎犬家系都是头一回见。
E: Let me be frank... This case, actually... is unlike anything the Bloodhound Family has dealt with before.

C: 找个安静的角落继续吧。
E: Let's find a quiet spot and continue our conversation.

C: 一路上都很顺利…顺利过头了，很难想象这是防守严密的家族驻地。
E: It's been a smooth ride... almost too smooth for a heavily guarded mansion.

C: 记得「黄金的时刻」是不允许未成年人进入的…喂，你怎么一个人在这？
E: I thought minors weren't allowed in Golden Hour... Hey kid, are you okay? Are you lost—

C: 这么做的下场你再清楚不过，亵渎{RUBY_B#基石}克里珀圣体{RUBY_E#}之人，你觉得公司会放过你？
E: You're absolutely clear about the consequences of doing this? Blasphemy against {RUBY_B#Cornerstone}Qlipoth's body{RUBY_E#}. You think the IPC will let you get off scot-free?

C: 和你没关系。
E: It's got nothing to do with you.

C: 「令你的血脉永远鼓动……」
E: "Keep your blood eternally pulsing..."

C: 「叛乱分子来自当地一支名为『卡提卡』的氏族，该氏族长期对公司心怀不满，对市场开拓部在当地的工作产生了严重的负面影响——」
E: "The insurgents are from a local clan known as Katica, which has a long history of disdain towards the IPC. This has caused a serious negative impact to the work of the IPC's Marketing Development Department..."

C: 我们不是来选秀的。
E: We're not here for any pageantry.

C: …但并不多。
E: ...But not much.

C: 可「虚无」的确笼罩着你我…还有每一个人。
E: But the Nihility envelops you and I... and everyone.

C: 我也这么觉得，也许只有你能帮我个忙了……
E: I seem that way because I am nervous. You know what? Maybe you can help...

C: 我本想更早出现在你面前，向你道出一些事实。
E: I originally planned on showing up earlier to reveal some truths to you.

C: 如果我真是凶手，你又何必这么遮遮掩掩？哈，我忘了，你也有个{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼的「梦主」}不好伺候的主子{RUBY_E#}呢——他们叫你别管什么狗屁凶杀案，专心搞那「谐乐大典」……
E: If I were really the murderer, why would you need to be so secretive? Ha, I forgot, you also have {RUBY_B#Penacony's Dreammaster}a difficult master{RUBY_E#} to serve — telling you to ignore the murder case and focus solely on that Charmony Festival...

C: 最后一次，表明你的身份和来意。
E: For the last time, state your identity and purpose.

C: 盛会之星容不下你，虚无的偃偶。活在阴影中的人，不应走上光亮的台前。
E: The Planet of Festivities has no place for you, a puppet of Nihility. Those who live in the shadows do not bear the right to tread the illuminated stage.

C: 不仅如此，每一位都是。
E: We are one.

C: 我凭什么配合你？
E: And why would I play along?

C: 可如您所见，先生，本次事故中没有任何无辜群众受到影响。
E: But as you can see, sir, no innocent bystanders were affected in this incident.

C: {NICKNAME}，很高兴看见你平安无事。
E: {NICKNAME}, glad to see you're safe and sound.

C: 小姐去格莉莎太太那里看望小孩子们了，一时半会儿不会离开，时间上应该来得及。
E: She's gone to Mrs. Grace's to visit the children. She won't be leaving anytime soon, so there should be enough time.

C: …也许吧。
E: ...Perhaps.

C: 这位客人，这里不是死后的世界，是流梦礁。
E: Dear guest, this is not the afterlife. This is Dreamflux Reef.

C: 别、别再问了！会把怪物引来的，死去的人全部都在这里，全部…！
E: S—Stop asking! You'll alert the monsters! All the dead are right here, all of them...!

C: 每次告别时，孩子们都对这片流梦之地依依不舍。可我走遍了流梦礁的每一处角落，探访了每一个人，他们都告诉我这场破碎的梦…不值得留恋。
E: Whenever it's time to say goodbye to these kids, they're reluctant to leave. But, I've explored every corner of Dreamflux Reef, talked to everyone I met, and they all told me the same thing... This shattered dream is not worth clinging to.

C: 梦话说得不错，小鸟，该醒了。
E: Talking in your sleep, birdie? Time to wake up.

C: 要这个做什么？
E: What do you need it for?

C: 「既成了人，就把孩子的事丢弃了。」
E: "As I grew into adulthood, I left behind my childlike side."

C: 没什么，先生。你看，格拉克斯大道上车流湍急，容易发生危险。艾迪恩公园就在附近，我让猎犬家系成员带您到那边继续享用美梦，如何？
E: Oh, it's nothing, sir. You see, the traffic on Glaux Avenue can be dangerous. How about I ask a Bloodhound Family member to escort you to Aideen Park over there so you can continue enjoying your sweet dream?

C: 呵呵，是啊…我上过战场，从苏克乌的母舰里爬出来的时候，顺便在脑袋里塞了点带辐射的铁疙瘩。
E: Hehe, yeah... I was part of a war, and while escaping from the Sukhousian mothership, I got exposed to some radioactive materials.

C: 那位老人的故事…太令人悲伤了，好在这座美梦确实为他的余生留下了幸福的念想。
E: That old man's story... it's so tragic. Fortunately, this sweet dream gives him joyful memories to hold onto for the rest of his life.

C: 他宝贝的，少给我整这些官僚主义死循环啊！小姑娘，我不是针对你，这事你能办就帮我们办，办不了就找个能办的人过来，好吗？
E: Fudge! Look, nothin' personal, but if you can't handle this, go find someone else who can, okay?

C: 你什么都没听说吗？
E: Wait, you haven't heard?

C: 未必要老老实实，但先待着吧。家族就算有阴谋，也不可能料到咱俩会登门拜访。对他们而言，我们才是「不确定因素」。
E: I wouldn't say "do nothing," but let's stay put for now. Even if The Family has ulterior motives, they couldn't have anticipated us showing up here. We're the surprise factor for them.

C: 实际上并非随行，而是跟踪。过程也绝对谈不上「悄无声息」…但算了，就依你吧。
E: To be honest, it was more like stalking than helping, and the process was far from "unnoticed"... But we did escape.

C: 会有人在我的坟前，也献上一束花。
E: Someone will stand at my grave and place a bouquet of flowers.

C: 现在——{NICKNAME}，什么样的台词才能表达你对匹诺康尼的「失望」？
E: Now... {NICKNAME}, what line would you deliver to express your disappointment in Penacony?

C: 多年之后，他们在繁华的匹诺康尼再次相见，却迟迟不敢相认，因为——
E: Many years later, their paths cross once more in the thriving Penacony, yet they refuse to acknowledge each other because...

C: 在即将放弃的时候，一场大雨令二位嗅到了商机，你们开始进军雨伞行业，可生意刚有起色，就遇到了竞争对手——打败对方，为自己赢得商战！
E: Just as you're about to give up, a downpour sparks a business idea — you enter the umbrella business! But just as things are looking up, you encounter a competitor. Defeat them and emerge victorious from this trade war!

C: 恭喜你们，用战斗为我们重现了《逐梦往事》中精彩的动作表演！
E: Well done! You brought to life the thrilling action scenes from Once Upon a Time in Dreams with your fighting skills!

C: 「『筑梦拼图』很紧张刺激吗？」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "Is Dream Jigsaw really that intense and thrilling?" You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 我不知道，问这个干嘛？
E: I don't know. Why're you asking me?

C: 有趣。既然你心意已决，就让我来揭晓这一选择会为那只雏鸟带来何种命运吧。
E: Interesting. Since you've made up your mind, allow me to reveal what fate this choice will bring to the fledgling.

C: 尽管无法伤及人类，但这些生物在小小的一方庭院里仍是上位掠夺者。在这种地方，等待那只小谐乐鸽的命运只有一种——痛苦的死亡。
E: Even if they shy away from humans, these animals are still near-apex predators in a fenced location like a yard. In such a location, only one fate awaits that little Charmony Dove: A painful death.

C: 这并非放弃，而是超越。血肉苦弱。如果物质是精神苦难的根源，那我们理应战胜它。
E: It is not forsaking, but transcending. Flesh, blood, sorrow, weakness. If the physical is the root of spiritual suffering, it is only logical that we defeat it.

C: 姬子姐…我还是很疑惑，为什么你就断定<color=#dbc291ff>米沙和这枚梦泡有关</color>呢？
E: Himeko... I still don't get it. Why were you so sure that <color=#dbc291ff>Misha had a connection with this dream bubble</color>?

C: 看来，你已经全部想起来了。
E: Looks like you've remembered everything now.

C: 既然这样，就是全票通过了。
E: In that case, it's unanimous.

C: 以后，你跟着我一起干。列车长那边我来搞定，你不是一直都想鼓捣列车吗？从今天起，你就是车上的机修工了。
E: I see, you'll work with me from now on. Haven't you always wanted to tinker with this train? You're its mechanic now. As for the conductor, I'll do the talking.

C: 如果我没能全身而退，那就由你来当下一任「钟表匠」吧。
E: If I don't come back in one piece, then you'll become the next Watchmaker.

C: 刚耍完帅，只能硬着头皮上了…
E: I flexed too hard with my swag. Guess I now have to pay my dues, huh...

C: 这个房间的氛围，好不一样啊。
E: The atmosphere in this room feels totally different.

C: 真的？你可能不知道，这种果实倒也算得上多汁，唯一的问题只是放在口中咀嚼时……
E: Seriously? In case you didn't know, this fruit is pretty juicy. The only downside is that when you chew it...

C: 这地方的氛围…和星期日的内心世界很像。也许这所谓的「幕前剧」也是相似的能力。
E: The atmosphere here... looks similar to Sunday's inner world. Perhaps this so-called "stage play" is created with his abilities.

C: 「外来的宾客呀，你要往何处去？」
E: "Where are you headed, dear outsider?"

C: 黄泉拔刀展露「虚无」的力量…
E: Acheron unsheathed her sword and revealed the power of the Nihility...

C: 会有无数流星划破天际，那是巡海游侠集结的火光。他们从银河四方赶来，不问缘由，不计代价，只因我们遵守一条共同的底线——
E: Countless meteors will streak across the sky. Those "meteors" are Galaxy Rangers coming from all corners of the Cosmos, driven by a shared purpose, without questioning the cause or counting the cost. Because we abide by a bottom line...

C: 无论如何，我已经做好准备。
E: Whatever we're facing, I'm prepared.

C: 告诉我…{RUBY_B#「市场开拓部」主管}奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德{RUBY_E#}在哪里？
E: Tell me... Where is {RUBY_B#Head of Marketing Development Department}Oswaldo Schneider{RUBY_E#}?

C: 而且这次和以往不一样，照片上的不是「萨姆」，而是「流萤」——对你而言，这应该算是相当新奇的体验吧？
E: And this time, it's Firefly in the picture, not Sam. That's gotta be a whole new experience for you, right?

C: 哼唧！哼唧、哼唧！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 犯人还没抓到吗？
E: Haven't the hounds caught the culprit yet?

C: 砂金所做的一切，最终成功让公司获得了上桌的权利。一位职级更高的使节也因此来到匹诺康尼，与家族展开交锋。
E: Aventurine's efforts finally earned the IPC a seat at the table. As a result, a more senior representative arrived in Penacony and initiated negotiations with The Family.

C: 匹诺康尼的「秩序」是个例吗…
E: Is the Order incident in Penacony a unique case...?

C: 我突然有些好奇，托帕：在你看来，匹诺康尼算是优质资产吗？
E: Now I'm a bit curious, Topaz. Do you think Penacony is a quality asset?

C: 经过列车组全体成员表决同意，星穹列车会协助匹诺康尼的重建事业。除此之外，在今后的旅途中，我们也会致力于将盛会之星的美梦带去更多世界。
E: The entire Crew has agreed to assist in the reconstruction of Penacony. Beyond that, in our future travels, we are committed to bringing the beautiful dreams of the Planet of Festivities to more worlds.

C: 我和家族已经谈好了。引渡相关的工作就交给你们了。
E: I've made a deal with The Family. I'll leave the extradition-related paperwork to you.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>行于「终末」的命途，却奋力向命运的反方向前进？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Traveling on the Path of Finality but struggling against your destiny, attempting to move in the opposite direction?</color>

C: 我的任务只是给公司入局撕开一道口子。别的不谈，就这件事而言，我自觉应该完成的还算不错。
E: My job was just to give the IPC an opening. Other things aside, I think I did a pretty good job at achieving this.

C: 我想也是！听说你们整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
E: Hah, that's what I thought! I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.

C: 也向你致意，我的挚友。
E: Sincere regards to you too, dear friend.

C: 那我什么时候解锁新命途？
E: When will I be able to unlock a new Path then?

C: 你好，活泼的{M#先生}{F#小姐}。欢迎来到「慈玉典押」。
E: Hey there, lively {M#guy}{F#lady}! Welcome to the Bonajade Exchange.

C: 都说了别在这种场合回收伏笔！
E: Like I said earlier — now's not the time for the plot payoff!

C: …如果还有机会再见，说话别那么谜语人啦。
E: ...If we ever meet again, please don't talk in riddles.

C: 就像时钟的指针转过一圈又一圈，但每一天的开始和结束，永远落在「前进」的十二点。
E: Just like a clock's hands that turn round and round, the start and end of each day will always land on twelve o'clock — the advent of time moving forward.

C: 我们还会再见面吗？
E: Will we meet again?

C: 怎么可能！别说风凉话了，你也来安慰安慰帕姆呀！
E: How could you say that! Don't be so mean. And while you're here, why don't you help me comfort Pom-Pom!
