C: 噫，我可不想又变回在太空中漂泊的*美少女冰块*啊！
E: But I don't even wanna become an adorable ice cube floating around in space again!

C: 古怪的声音在耳边萦绕，但睡意胜过了噪音的干扰，你的眼皮不为所动……
E: The strange sounds lingered by your ears, but your drowsiness overcame the noise, and your eyelids remained unmoved...

C: （真是莫名其妙的梦…这里总该是折纸大学了吧？）
E: (What a baffling dream... I should now be at Paperfold University, right?)

C: 你真是个冲浪高手。
E: You're really up to date.

C: 放心，*蕉师*们装载了资深教师的记忆，*蕉学*水平绝对可靠——但现在还不急着学习，大家先在彩梦校庆上玩个痛快蕉！
E: Don't you worry. The BananAdvisors come loaded with the memories of the senior professors. Our banacademic standards remain top-notch. There's no need to worry about studies right now though. Please enjoy the Dreamlight Anniversary first, bana!

C: 那么，最后一个问题了——
E: Now, the final question...

C: 你跑遍不同的片场，观赏了不同的故事。现在，你是否找到了属于自己的主题——或是说「梦想」呢？
E: You ran across many different sets and witnessed many different stories. Did you find a theme or perhaps a dream that belongs solely to you?

C: 而现在，属于你的情节即将开演——作为主角，别让我和观众失望啊。
E: This is where your story begins. Don't disappoint me or the audience now, my dear leading character.

C: 蕉蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bananana! Bananana!

C: 大家很上镜呢，但没拍到小猴可不行，再来一次吧。
E: Everyone looks so photogenic, but Slumbernana Monkey is missing from the shot. Try again.

C: 嗯？还有什么事吗？
E: Huh? Do you need something else?

C: 是啊，怎么，你有意见？
E: That's me, pardner. Got a problem?

C: 没有进行任何反抗，男人开始在身上摸索起来。
E: Without any resistance, the man began to search through his belongings.

C: 先等等——商量出什么了？
E: Alright there, hold your horses! What do y'all have so far?

C: 大家，跟我来吧，他…或许言之有理呢！
E: Come with me, everyone! I think he might just be making some sense!

C: …没错，我并不是在劝说，或是高高在上地给出建议。
E: ...That's right. I'm not trying to persuade anyone, or offering a suggestion while standing on high ground.

C: 这种胶卷盘的放映机已经在宇宙中淘汰了，但还是总能看到这种胶卷以高价出现在市场中——它们的结局大都是沦为在柜子里彰显主人品味的收藏品。
E: Projectors that can play such reels have long been phased out in the universe, but you often see these reels appearing on the market selling for a pretty penny. They mostly end up as collectibles, showcased in their masters' cabinets to demonstrate the owner's artistic taste.

C: 若结束了，就把目光重新投向这里吧。
E: If so, please cast your attention this way.

C: 听说筑梦设计课有些骚乱，我特地前来看看。原来是这些美梦剧团失去了控制啊，再次向大家致歉。
E: I came over after hearing of a ruckus in the Dreamweaving class, but it seems like it was these Sweet Dreams Troupe who went out of control. My apologies once again.

C: 但睡蕉小猴展示了一种全新的生活态度！它们每天都在睡觉和吃香蕉，别的什么也不想什么也不做，体会着最纯粹的幸福蕉！
E: But Slumbernana Monkey epitomizes a wholly different lifestyle! Sleeping and snacking on bananas without a care in the world... This is what pure happiness should be!

C: 看着地上多出来的一只猴子，你意识到，富贵已经在酣战之际变成睡蕉小猴了。
E: Seeing an additional monkey on the ground, you realize that Richie has already transformed into a Slumbernana Monkey during the fierce battle.

C: 我看起来很像魔王吗？
E: Why? Do I look like a devil?

C: 堂堂一介忍侠，只得念诵旁白吗…也罢。
E: A lofty Ninja Hero, relegated to the likes of a narrator...? So be it.

C: 蕉…蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉……
E: Bana, bana bana, bana...

C: 怎么跑了，我也想逗逗。
E: Why did it run off? Aww, I wanted to play with it too!

C: 可是，这位先生，杀人可是犯法的，更何况是对着这么一位美丽的女士？
E: But sir, killin' folks is against the law, especially when it's a lovely lady like her.

C: 我来？
E: Me?

C: （这也…太过分了吧……）
E: (This is... too much...!)

C: 押忍！经此苦行三千夜，在下将如忍侠一般…神通广大。
E: Osu! Having persevered through unending nights of tribulations, I now boast... the vast senses of a Ninja Hero.

C: 为了拯救正在迈向腐烂的诸界，人类必须后退！后退！再后退！将无穷尽的可能性重新赋予文明，令「智识」再度绽放七彩的光芒！
E: In order to save the worlds marching towards rot and decay, humanity must regress! Regress! And regress further! Only then will civilization be imbued with endless possibilities yet again, allowing Erudition to shine with kaleidoscopic rays once more!

C: ——所以，你要自己决定。
E: So, the decision is yours to make.

C: 叆叇馆主…在说什么？
E: What is... Umbra Headmistress talking about?

C: 众忍进击，狩猎开始！
E: Charge with me, ninjas! Let the hunt begin!

C: 当你跨入此门，梦境的空间开始扭曲，你又来到了芮克先生的片场……
E: When you enter this door, the Dreamscape's space begins to twist, and you once again return to Mr. Reca's set.

C: 我有种预感……
E: I have a feeling...

C: 这里也有人…不要打草惊蛇。
E: There are guards here, too. Don't alert them.

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 现在 你的私人浴宫内
E: Now, in your private bath chamber

C: 我没什么想问的了，出发！
E: I don't have any more questions. Let's go!

C: 吓我一跳！
E: Whoa, that scared me!

C: 大家，提高警惕…无论树庭发生了什么，能在这里见到黑潮造物的遗骸，绝不是个好兆头。
E: Everybody, stay alert. Regardless of what has happened to the Grove, the fact that we're seeing the remains of a black tide creation here definitely doesn't bode well.

C: 晚些吧…她连日进行手术，已经疲惫不堪。我不想她被这突如其来的噩耗压垮。
E: Not for now... She must be exhausted after performing surgeries non-stop for so many days. I don't want to overwhelm her with this bad news.

C: 迷…迷迷……
E: Mem... Memem...

C: （复述记忆中的见闻）
E: (Recount what you saw in the memory)

C: 喔…不过，往好处想，那听起来倒像是个易守难攻的地方。
E: Oh... But on the bright side, it sounds like a place that's easy to defend and difficult to attack.

C: 常言道：「百闻不如一见」。两位随吾来，一道去那王座上瞧瞧便是。
E: As the saying goes, "Seeing is believing." Why don't you follow me to the throne and take a look for yourself.

C: 呵呵，可汝这神情，却依旧像条挨了鞭笞的犬崽呢。即便这确是吾欲擒故纵的把戏，眼下汝等也只得束手就困，不是么？
E: Haha, you look like a sad lost puppy. Even if this is indeed a scheme to get you to lower your guard, you don't have any other choice but to play along, do you?

C: 缇安觉得不是。因为缇安捡到的时候，什么也没看到…而且从金线看，那个气息像是在跑来跑去！
E: Trianne doesn't think so. Because when Trianne picked it up, we didn't see anything at all... And judging by the golden thread, the aura seems to be all around!

C: 取下一瓣「金枝誓言」
E: Take petal from Golden Bough of Vows

C: 「{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}呵！以『引纬』封证誓约，我向你求愿——愿你的金丝与爱缠绕我身！」
E: "O {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}! With the Weft as my vow, I beseech you: Entwine my body with your golden thread and affection!"

C: 为了翁法罗斯…给我陪葬吧，泰坦。
E: For the sake of Amphoreus... Die with me, Titan.

C: 你做不到，欧利庞！你只是个懦夫，一个只敢将屠刀挥向自己骨肉的卑鄙小人，弑亲禽兽……
E: Your failure is inevitable, Eurypon! You are just a coward who can only raise his blade against his own child! A beast that murders his own kin!

C: 众军沉默不语。
E: The armies remained in silence.

C: 「身为悬锋人，却只能在床榻上了却一生…说出去要教人笑话啊。」
E: "A Kremnoan dying on a sickbed... I would be a laughingstock to everyone."

C: 呼…真是险之又险的逃生。但幸好，终究是安全抵达奥赫玛了。
E: Phew... That was a close call. Thank goodness that we returned to Okhema unharmed.

C: 我很抱歉。
E: I'm really sorry.

C: 我是驻留树庭的黄金裔，没能保护好她们，费贝尔先生，如果您有怒火……
E: As the Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, I failed to protect them. Mr. Fabio, if you're upset...

C: 就算所谓的「创世」真的存在，那新世界里会有悬锋族人的一席之地吗？
E: Even if this so-called "genesis" really exists, will there be a place for the Kremnoans in that new world?

C: 你的发言结束了吗？
E: Are you done talking?

C: （好想再见你一面…妈妈。）
E: (Oh, how I wish to see you again... Mama.)

C: 好啦，缇里西庇俄丝，让大家坐在这只小八音盒上，为我们的歌谣谱写旋律吧。
E: Now, Tribios, set them on this music box and let them compose a melody for our song.

C: 没关系，好孩子。让妈妈就着旋律唱出歌谣，你就全部想起来啦。
E: It's alright, my child. I'll sing along to the tune, and it will help jog your memories.

C: 这是…怎么了？
E: Wh—What's going on?

C: 「人世为何█ 一如你迷宫般面貌█ 人生为何█ 一同你悲鸣，无声亦无回音█ █」
E: "What is this world█ It mirrors your maze-like fa█e. What is this world? A █ilent lament, without a tra██."
The black tide ██ █ has █ ██ █ arrived █ ██ ███ █ ██!

C: 想聊聊那场梦么？若长久郁结心中，容易落成病根。
E: Do you want to talk about the dream? Keeping it bottled up is not good for your health.

C: 我想，此事还有回旋的余地。
E: I believe there's still another way.

C: 用不了多久，我可能就品尝不出悲伤的滋味了。
E: It won't be long before I forget what sorrow tastes like.

C: 哦，是你啊。
E: Oh, it's you.

C: 这便是致胜的关键——我们要重施故技，用{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的力量打开往日之门，诱敌深入……
E: That will be the key to our victory — We will use {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s power to once again open a passage to the past and lure our enemy inside...

C: 太好啦！人家还怕你生迷迷的气呢。
E: Hooray! I was so worried that you'd be mad at me.

C: 所以，仔细听好了——如果有一天，我们又在战场上相见，而我站在了逐火的对立面……
E: So, listen well: If there comes a day when we meet again on the battlefield, and I stand opposed to the flame-chase...

C: 我祈求你…！
E: I beg you...!

C: 那现在呢，迈德漠斯？
E: And what is next, Mydeimos...?

C: 看来你已做好准备。
E: It seems that you are prepared.

C: …呵，果然是不知所谓的末日预告。
E: ...Heh, just as cryptic as all the other prophecies.

C: 树庭的事，我听说了。请你节哀。
E: I've heard about what happened at the Grove. I am deeply sorry for your loss.
Hmph...

C: 但…来世若有机会，来我的图书馆多看看吧。
E: But... if there's a chance in the next life, you should come visit my library.

C: 真是如此吗，母亲？
E: Is that really the way it is, Mother?

C: 处置{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，想必不需要我在场。先告辞了，我还有些私事要处理。
E: I'm sure you don't need my help handling {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame, so I'll be off. I have some personal matters to attend to.

C: 失去神力的空壳，我没兴趣……
E: She's lost her divinity. I have no interest in an empty shell.

C: 那时的*我们*记性还很好，十年足够把这些全部记在心里。
E: Back then, our memories were still sharp. Ten years was enough for us to memorize all these.

C: 我明白了——我会乘着月亮，扬起星星做的船帆去找妈妈！那我们约好了哦？
E: Oh, I know! I'll turn the moon into a ship and the stars into sails to go find Mama! Pinky promise?

C: *我们*忘不了那熟悉的味道，也是直到这时，才知道它来自哪里。
E: We've always remembered the familiar taste, and only now do we learn where it came from.

C: 倾覆诸神吧—— / 归还火种吧——
E: Overthrow the gods — / Return the Coreflames —

C: 想过好日子的兄弟们，跟上我…干掉这个叛徒，用她的脑袋领赏…！
E: If any of you want to get rich, then come with me! Take this traitor's head and wealth will be ours!

C: …不，还没有。
E: ...Not yet.

C: 她，或者说你们，此刻在犹豫什么呢？
E: What was making her, or you, hesitate at this moment?

C: 正因此，汝痴痴立于此处，才是徒劳。
E: That's why it's futile for you to wait here.

C: 如果我说「不」呢？
E: What if I refuse?

C: 我和丹宝也在附近搜索了一番…只是没能找到缇安大人的踪迹。
E: Dannie and I looked around, but we couldn't find any traces of Lady Trianne...

C: 你们要绝后了，异邦人！
E: This will be the end of you outlanders!

C: 我今天来是受人所托，为你带来一件礼物。
E: I'm here today on someone's behalf, to bring you a gift.

C: 本来我还担心你会抽中什么了不得的幸运签，唤来哪个可怕的从者——没想到啊没想到，你是个神憎鬼厌的家伙。
E: I was actually worried you'd luck out and summon some terrifying Servant... but turns out, you're just plain cursed!

C: 你该不会以为没有成功召唤从者，你就能偷袭打败我？
E: You think you can take a cheap shot and beat me just because my summoning failed?

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，让我教教你规则的重要性。这可是「圣杯战争」！拥有从者的优势和没有从者相比，就像穿着动力甲和赤膊上战场的区别！
E: Listen up, {M#lad}{F#girlie}, let me teach you why rules matter. This is the Holy Grail War! Having a Servant versus fighting alone? That's the difference between wearing power armor and charging in shirtless!

C: 不过这也意味着，我们不得不在劣势状态下，与受到本土力量强化的英灵们战斗。
E: But that also means we're at a huge disadvantage. We're fighting against Heroic Spirits who get buffed by this world's power.

C: 这么快找你兴师问罪来了？
E: What, already hitting you up for revenge?

C: 我曾有过更多的名字。但自出道以来就再也没拥有过自己的名字。
E: I've had even more names. But ever since I first stepped into the limelight, I've never had my own.

C: 所以，我希望结成一个参战者的同盟，人数尽可能多。在明确这场圣杯战争的真正意图，以及圣杯的力量本质前，不要轻易许愿。
E: So, I want to form an alliance with as many participants as possible. Until we clearly understand the true nature of this Holy Grail War and the power of the Grail, we shouldn't make any wishes too hastily.

C: 那时候的你，就像一簇盛开的鸢尾花。不过，比起你正当盛年时的舞台风姿，我更喜欢如今这般模样…卸去了所有外在装饰，如此平凡的你。
E: You were like a blooming iris, but I prefer how you are now compared to your heydays on the stage... stripped of all the external pretenses, so simple, so ordinary.

C: 他总是喜欢板着一副严厉的面孔，但却又比谁都容易被逗乐…他总是对我念叨着希望我成为这片土地「理想的王」。
E: He always wore a stern expression but laughed at the smallest things... He always told me that he hoped I'd become the "ideal king" for this land.

C: 在少女所注视的地方，一个小小的骑士玩偶倚靠在树下，仿佛正做着一场无限延续的美梦。
E: There, beneath a tree, a tiny knight doll rested, as if lost in a dream that would never end.

C: 御主你呢？你的童年是怎么度过的？我还从没有听你讲起过你自己的经历呢。
E: What about you, Master? How did you spend your childhood? You've never talked about your past.

C: 但…御主，如果你仍然保有勇气…如果你愿意成为星星，所有目视你的观众也都将登上舞台，成为英雄。
E: But Master... if you still have courage... if you're still willing to become that star, then all the spectators who have seen you will also step onto the stage, becoming heroes themselves.

C: █星核██研讨。
E: █Stellaron██ Symposium.

C: 上次告别之后，我们又去了很多地方，贝洛伯格，仙舟罗浮，匹诺康尼…一路上，也算是有好有坏吧。
E: We traveled to many places after we parted ways: Belobog, the Xianzhou Luofu, Penacony... There were both good and bad moments along the way.

C: 这里没有反物质军团，没有丰饶孽物，这里是宇宙最安稳的乐土。
E: There's no Antimatter Legion, no Abominations of Abundance... This place is the most peaceful paradise in the universe.

C: 我相信你的选择。
E: I trust your choice.

C: Archer，你应该清楚自己被召唤来这里的原因。
E: Archer, you should know why you were summoned here.

C: 不过，由芮克先生和爱德华医生协助制作的梦泡电影，不仅在艾普瑟隆大卖特卖，甚至再度在群星间掀起了逐梦热潮。奥帝先生和匹诺康尼的公司分部借着这趟热潮大赚了一笔。
E: But the dream bubble movie co-produced by Mr. Reca and Dr. Edward became a huge hit. Not only did it fill up movie theaters in Epsilon, it even created a new dream-chasing trend throughout the stars. Mr. Oti and the IPC's Penacony branch made quite the fortune from it.

C: 老奥帝先生说，他原本打算单独付给你一笔赔偿金，但即使是他，也觉得这太庸俗了。
E: Now, Old Oti did say he planned to give you some money, but even he thought that was too crude.

C: 「我希望世上人人都幸福、快乐、自由，得偿所愿。」
E: "I wish for everyone in the world to be happy, joyful, free, and have their every desire fulfilled."

C: 演出，ACTION！
E: Ready... ACTION!

C: 葛瑞迪，这就是你说的，「给我更强大的力量」？
E: Grady... is this what you meant by "giving me more power"?

C: 事情为什么会变成这样…这里是托儿所还是动物园？
E: How did it come to this... is this a nursery or a zoo?

C: 也该聊聊正事了。
E: Alright, let's get down to business.

C: 斯科特替你挡住了致命一击。
E: Skott took the fatal hit meant for you.

C: 替我转告拉克什米，和她分手的那天晚上，我对她说谎了，其实……
E: Tell Rakshmi... the night we broke up... I lied to her... There's...

C: 如果你看到这句话，说明你选错了对手。
E: If you're reading this, it means you chose the wrong opponent.

C: 我的老朋友好不容易才找到了实现愿望的道路，我可不容许有人成为她道路上的阻碍。想摆脱我的宝具？那我再就给你们加点料！
E: My old friend has finally found her path to fulfilling her wish, and I won't let anyone block her way. You wanna escape my Noble Phantasm? Then I'll just have to add some more excitement!

C: 非常抱歉，播映发生故障
E: Apologies. The broadcast is having technical difficulties

C: 这可难为我了，刚才不是说了吗？混乱也是一种维稳的手段。
E: Those are some difficult questions... Didn't I just say that creating chaos is also a means to maintaining social stability?

C: 对，谐乐大典意外中断，他一个人背了大半锅。在那之后就没露过面。
E: Bingo! Most of the blame was pinned on him when the Charmony Festival was abruptly canceled. Since then, not a single soul's seen him.

C: …啊，万维克先生？我真是累迷糊了，竟然没认出您。
E: ...Mr. Wonweek? Please excuse me. I should've recognized you earlier. I must be more tired than I realized.

C: 说回公园，总而言之，附近出现了一些「绝对不能触犯的事」。
E: Coming back to the topic of the park... Let's just say that it has been recently observed that certain behaviors are not tolerated around here.

C: 只是回望。
E: Just looking back.

C: 我们到了。他们应该就在附近。
E: We're here. They should be somewhere nearby.

C: 先不提这个，身为梦境的东道主，你有什么办法吗？
E: A story for another time. As host of the Dreamscape, do you have any suggestions for fixing this problem?

C: 你们还在尝试？根本没有成功的先例，被绝灭大君「毁灭」的人真的还有救吗？
E: You're still trying? There's no precedent for saving someone who was destroyed by a Lord Ravager. Will it even work?

C: 方才的，也未能消灭吗？
E: The ones from before weren't defeated either?

C: 《美梦往事》胶卷。
E: Dreamjoy Memoir Film Reel.

C: 我有必要提醒一下——过多的要求不能帮您筛选作品，只会提前破坏您的心情。
E: Just a friendly reminder: Being too picky won't help you find the best dreams. It'll just dampen your spirits ahead of time.

C: 因此，即便没有驾驶星槎的天分，性格也不好争斗，小女子仍选择随商团四处奔走。
E: Even though I lacked the talent to pilot the starskiff and wasn't much of a warrior, I still chose to travel around with the merchant guild.

C: 我也在试着改变。
E: I'm trying to change, too.

C: …还是再找找吧。
E: ...We should keep looking.

C: 于诞生之时，于归去之刻，人类两度振翅，行于旅途始末。为了能够再次振翅飞翔……
E: Humanity flaps their wings twice as they complete their journey: Once when they are born, and once when they die. In order to flap my own wings and soar again...

C: 说来有些尴尬，是那「不要笑挑战」。
E: It was that try-not-to-laugh challenge. Quite embarrassing, to be honest.

C: 失败总是最好的老师。要拯救更多的人，你必须先理解他们是为何而生，为何而死，最好的方法就是亲身践行。
E: Failure is always the best teacher. To save more lives, you must first understand what they live for and what they die for. The best way to achieve this is through personal experience.

C: 可能是星际网络出了点问题，我刚才联络了几次空间站，都没有回应。
E: I tried contacting the space station several times, but I never got any response. Maybe there's a problem with the Interastral Network.

C: 为什么只有她受到了影响？
E: Why is she the only one affected?

C: 可以给我派对车厢吗？
E: Can I have the Party Car instead?

C: 将「智识」的命途能量集中于一处，然后向星神发射一条「纽带」——等于从背后拍了拍某人的肩膀，他的反应肯定是回头看你一眼。
E: Aggregating the Path Energy of the Erudition, then firing a "bond" at the Aeon. This is as good as tapping someone on the shoulder, who's sure to turn back to look at you.

C: 嗯？神殿里似乎有些争吵？进去看看吧，记得表现得友善些。
E: Is someone arguing in the temple? Let's take a look, and remember... keep it friendly.

C: 「我呼唤你，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，揭开记忆的帷幕——」
E: "We summon thee, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, to lift thy curtain of memory..."

C: 但*我们*以万径之门，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的名义向你起誓，只要黄金裔一日尚存，奥赫玛就会保护每一位泰坦的子民，*我们*不分彼此。
E: But we swear to you in the name of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus,{RUBY_E#} the Gate of Infinity that so long as the Chrysos Heirs live, Okhema will protect all followers of the Titans. We are one and the same.

C: 两位朋友！千万别离*我们*太远哦。
E: My two friends, don't stray too far away from us!

C: 我就知道…那家伙杀心一起就不顾一切。三位老师，安置市民的工作拜托你们了。
E: I knew it... He gets reckless once he gets the urge to kill. I'm relying on you three to handle the task of getting the citizens to safety.

C: 放心吧，虽然有些孩童心性，但缇宝老师在黄金裔中也称得上资历深厚，更是奥赫玛的支柱之一。她们值得信赖。
E: Don't worry. Although they are a little childish, the trio are experienced Chrysos Heirs and one of the pillars of Okhema. Therefore, they can definitely be trusted.

C: 解决掉主干道的敌人，剩下的交给圣城卫士，他们都是训练有素的精英。
E: Eliminate the enemies on the main road and leave the rest to the holy city's guards. They are all trained and experienced elites.

C: 这样翁法罗斯也有「界域定锚」了——「开拓」的又一大步。
E: With this Space Anchor on Amphoreus, we've taken yet another giant step on the Path of Trailblaze.

C: 看来我们习以为常的所有，在你眼中皆是混沌。想要捋顺世界的丝线，也许还得我亲自解答。
E: I suppose the things that are common knowledge to us are just a garbled mess to you. If we want to straighten out the threads of this world, perhaps I should explain things to you myself.

C: 呜嗡嗡…嗡嗡嗡！
E: Grumphhh... Grumphhh!

C: 我们是异邦来的战士，此前参与了奥赫玛保卫战。
E: We're warriors from a foreign land who assisted in the defense of Okhema.
...Hey.

C: 你的努力毫无意义！
E: Your efforts are meaningless!

C: 我买了（<unbreak>25000</unbreak>信用点）。
E: I'll get it (<unbreak>25,000</unbreak> credits).

C: 接受欧洛尼斯的邀请
E: Accept Oronyx's invitation

C: 回头看看吧，从这里望去，可以看见整座奥赫玛。
E: Turn around and look. We can see the entire city of Okhema from here.

C: 不许瞎说！
E: Stop that nonsense!

C: 但在天舟启航的瞬间，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的神罚降临了。一整座城邦，连同所有的臣民，于刹那间灰飞烟灭。
E: However, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} divine punishment fell the instant the fleet of skyships took flight. An entire city-state, along with all of its subjects, was reduced to ash in that moment.

C: 白厄，你会尽到东道主的义务，照看好我们的客人吗？
E: Phainon, will you fulfill your duty as host and look after our distinguished guests?

C: 太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
E: That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.

C: 黄金裔的旅程…果然很孤独啊。
E: The journey of the Chrysos Heirs... truly is a lonely one.

C: 毕竟「开拓」没有标准答案，除了全身心投入到这个世界的循环当中，一步一步脚踏实地，似乎也没有别的办法。
E: There's no "right" answer to the Trailblaze, after all. All we can do is dive into this world and take things one step at a time.

C: 你一直说不相信人类的无私，可你自己快要变成活生生的反例了。
E: You keep saying that you don't believe in humanity's altruism, but your actions are a counterexample.

C: 缇宝 缇宁 缇安  ？？  ？？  ？？……
E: Tribbie, Trinnon, Trianne  ??  ??  ??...

C: 这么一对比，我老家的民风可太淳朴了。
E: Compared to that, the customs of my home feel very unsophisticated.

C: 是那种能留声的小玩意，现在的人都不怎么喜欢了。
E: It's a gadget that records your voice. People don't like this sort of thing nowadays.

C: 愿赌服输，最后一击给你了。
E: Well, I'm a man of my word. You can deliver the final blow.

C: 给我。
E: Hand it to me.

C: 看，天上！那就是……
E: Look, in the sky! That's...

C: 「残忍的一击！球棒侠没有给{M#他}{F#她}的敌人留下生路！听到了吗？排山倒海的喝彩声——」
E: "What a savage hit! The Baseballer shows no mercy to {M#his}{F#her} enemies. Can you hear that? The crowd's roaring in approval!"

C: …只有一位泰坦能帮助我们寻得真相。
E: ...We can only hope to learn the truth from one Titan.

C: 记忆，存在…一直。
E: Memories, remain... Always.

C: 再见了，不存在的记忆。
E: Farewell, nonexistent memory.

C: 异乡人，致歉。帮助，我难以给予。
E: Outlander, forgive me. Help, I cannot.

C: 这就是当穿越者的感觉吗？
E: Ooh, so this is what it feels like to be a time traveler?

C: 不…我对无聊的运动并无兴趣。
E: No... I have no interest in meaningless sports.

C: 呃，呃呃，那个…三位勇士，我可以解释！你们看啊，我这……
E: Uh... ahem, well... I can explain myself! You see, I—

C: …说吧。
E: ...Speak.

C: 亡魂…告诉我们……
E: Lost souls... Tell us...

C: 这下只能灭口了！
E: Looks like we'll have to silence him for good!

C: 在和黑潮的抗争中，它的神志开始消逝…鼎盛时的泰坦只一剑便能令群岛灰飞烟灭，却无法斩除腐蚀的根源。
E: During the battle against the black tide, their sanity began to slip away... In their prime, the Titan could obliterate an entire archipelago with a single slash, yet they could not sever the root of this corruption.

C: 我们相识不久，但我已从你身上学到很多。那么，让我在临走前也教你一课吧——
E: While we haven't known each other for long, I have learned much from you. In return, I'll teach you a lesson of mine before I go...

C: 勇者…勇者。上前来，上前来啊……
E: Brave one... Step forth...

C: 它来自这城池的深处。很接近了…现在，它几乎就在我耳边低语。
E: Comes from the depths of this city. We're close... so close, in fact, that I can hear the whispers in my ears.

C: 这里安静得令人窒息…失去了坐镇的泰坦，这城池竟变得如此陌生。
E: The silence here is stifling... This city feels so unfamiliar now that its Titan is gone.

C: 学习下观察他人的肢体动作和微表情吧，很有用。
E: You should start observing people's body language and their microexpressions. You can learn a lot from them.

C: 我们也有很多要考虑的事。
E: We have a lot to think about too.

C: 你在说什么呢！再怎么说，人家也是个…是个可爱的小动物呀！
E: Says who! I'm still a... a cute and tiny animal, alright!

C: 恐怕他并非你认识的人，遐蝶——<color=#dbc291ff>那是神谕的化身，泰坦神性的回响。</color>它是来检视接替神权的黄金裔的。
E: I'm afraid he is not the person you know, Castorice. <color=#dbc291ff>That is a manifestation of the prophecy, an echo of the Titan's divinity.</color> It is here to examine the Titan's successor.

C: 你心有疑虑吗，蝶？金线颤动了，当下的气氛不像是漫无意义的闲谈。
E: Is something weighing on you, Cas? The golden thread is quivering. I sense there's more to this exchange than idle chatter.

C: 能说说书里的内容吗？
E: Can you tell me more about the book?

C: 都不是省油的灯。
E: None of those things seem like they are going to be easy to deal with.

C: 不必再独自承受这些啦，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。从今以后，会有人替你支撑起「岁月」，我们正是为此而来。
E: There's no need for you to bear this any longer, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. From today onwards, someone else will bear Time on your behalf. This is why we have come.

C: 我会设法让她返回奥赫玛，但也请做好希望落空的准备。请你理解，在翁法罗斯的历史上，没有人能逃离「死亡」的掌心。于时光的尽头，塞纳托斯静候着每一个人。
E: I'll try and get her to return to Okhema but do be prepared for a less-than-ideal outcome. Please understand that throughout the history of Amphoreus, no one has ever managed to escape the clutches of Death. At the end of time, Thanatos silently awaits all.

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}在上，我为彰显元老院之公义而来。
E: By {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} above, I have come as a testament to the justice of the Council of Elders.

C: 因为，您有一点说得十分在理：倘若泰坦已至终结，它便绝无可能作出回应——
E: Because I completely concur with you on this aspect: If the Titan has indeed met their end, any response from them would be impossible...
Tsk...

C: 我由衷为你感到欣慰，孩子。接下来，你想研究怎样的课题？
E: I am sincerely glad for you, child. Now then, what topic would you like to study?

C: 呵，能听到这家伙说话还真是方便……
E: Hmph, how convenient it is to be able to hear what they say...

C: 是啊，我们的所作所为与绑架无异。
E: Indeed. We essentially abducted you.

C: 哪怕早在树庭，我们就有过无心的接触。那时明明什么都没有发生……
E: Even when we brushed against each other unintentionally in the Grove... and it was obvious that nothing had happened...

C: 我都快死了，要钱有什么用？
E: I'm almost dead. What use do I have for money?

C: 去吧，为她带去光荣的死亡。
E: Go. Grant her glorious death.

C: （我的神血蜜露…？！）
E: (Where did my Dew of Divine Blood go...!?)

C: …就是因为有像你这样恶劣的生者，我们才会被大家误会！
E: ...It's because of vile living creatures like you that we're being misunderstood by all of them!

C: 还是说…他是被自己惊人的威力给吓坏了？
E: Or... is he actually scared of his own extraordinary power?

C: 喔…看来你们有所不知。
E: Oh...? Looks like you don't know the whole picture.

C: 所以…果然如此吗？
E: So... It's just as I feared...

C: 但我从未维修过…断裂的锁链。
E: But I've never repaired... broken chains.
Heh...

C: 这是，缇宝大人说过的……
E: This is what Lady Tribbie once mentioned...

C: 您先前没能完成的…为我准备的礼物……
E: The gift for me... that you didn't manage to finish...

C: 你我，皆为亡魂…无法在人间留影。
E: Being departed souls, our images cannot be captured in the world of the living.

C: …我想也是。
E: ...I thought so, too.

C: 无妨…无愧本心地选择吧。就算要再等上千年……
E: No matter... Make the choice your heart desires. Even if it takes a thousand years of waiting...

C: 所谓的黄金世，便是一个既无美德也无罪恶的时代。人们并非活着…而仅仅是存在于世上，倦惰地行走、等待。
E: The so-called Era Chrysea was an age devoid of both virtue and sin. People did not truly live — they simply existed, going through the motions without passion or purpose, then waiting for something to happen.

C: 但…我无法接受这一切。为了一个她无法见证的未来，我们不得不自相残杀…这实在太不公平。
E: But I couldn't accept that. Why did we have to kill each other for a future she'd never see herself? That's not fair.

C: 告诉我早已写就的答案…为漫长的命运画上句号。
E: Tell me the answer that's already been written... and let us draw this seemingly endless fate to a close.

C: 哦？这反应真叫人意外，汝竟不反驳吾么？
E: Oh? I did not expect to hear that from you. Are you not going to refute me?

C: 走，我们去给那帮可怜虫们上最后一课。
E: Come, let us go and teach those pathetic worms one final lesson.

C: 那女人还是一如既往，善于煽动人心。
E: As always, that woman knows how to stir up a crowd.

C: 哈哈…坦率地讲，我感觉不像要上演讲台，反而像上刑场。
E: Haha... To tell the truth, I feel like I'm on my way to an execution chamber instead of a podium.

C: 那刻夏…这是在做什么？你疯了。
E: Anaxa! What have you done!? Have you lost your mind!?

C: 哼，还是这么爱演。
E: Hmph, always the performer.

C: 你这般反应，甚至让我想收回前言了。
E: When you put it that way, it makes me want to take back what I said.

C: 听我说：向前。
E: Listen: just keep moving.

C: 三月七，<color=#dbc291ff>她的记忆或许被人劫持了。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Perhaps March 7th's memories have been hijacked.</color>

C: 很可惜，「短时记忆」和「无法记忆」是完全不同的概念。或许你难以想象……
E: Unfortunately, short-term memory is an entirely different concept from the inability to remember. Perhaps it is difficult for you to imagine...

C: 言归正传，我借着第四面镜，在那窃忆者的脑子里翻了个底朝天，收获颇丰。
E: Let's get back to the topic. By using the Fourth Mirror, I rummaged through the brain of this Memosnatcher and learned a good deal.

C: 我试着在她的意识库里检索，然后找到了这些词：「永恒之地」、「拒绝之地」、「忆庭的私藏」……
E: I searched through her consciousness and found the following terms: "The Eternal Land," "The Rejected Land," and "the Private Collection of the Garden of Recollection"...

C: 原来如此。您的气质确实更加…「室内派」。
E: I see. You do seem like the more... "indoor" type.

C: 第二面镜，准备「思维折射」——送我进去吧！
E: Second Mirror, prepare for Thought Refraction — it's time to send me in!

C: 好——请、请您仔细阅读安全协议……
E: Alright, p—please read the safety protocols carefully...

C: 很好，既然万事俱备……
E: Alright, now that everything is ready...

C: 历史上还发生过不少令人哭笑不得的事。据说「赤陶学派」曾向某位作家借取原稿，最后归还的却是副本，而真迹则被悄悄藏在这里。
E: We've had more than our fair share of hilarious episodes over the years. For instance, it's said that the Erythrokeramists once borrowed a manuscript from a certain author but ended up returning a copy instead of the original! What's more, the original manuscript was supposedly then hidden here.

C: 这是阿那克萨戈拉斯申请调取的资料。数份不同领域的资料被收纳于一处，其中包括「泰坦造物」、「灵魂的普遍性」、「炼金学说」…不一而足。
E: These are the materials requested by Anaxagoras. Documents from various fields have been compiled in one place, including "Titan Creations," "The Universality of the Soul," "Alchemy Doctrine," and so on.

C: 但{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}征用了他的身躯，令那刻夏「死而复生」，才造成了如今的局面。
E: But {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} took over his body and "resurrected" him, which led to the situation we're in now.

C: 动动脑子吧，想一想：既然这一切全部发生在死者的领域，那么，他们一定都是过去某人灵魂的样貌。
E: Use your head, Cerces. Since all of this took place in the realm of the dead, it stands to reason their likenesses are of souls from the past.

C: 光天化日打雷，想不听到都难。
E: It would be hard not to notice thunderclaps in broad daylight.

C: 但在那之前，我们得先见证格奈乌斯阁下的结果……
E: But before that, we first need to witness what ultimately happened to Lord Gnaeus...

C: 我是个学者，不想也不能给出模棱两可的结论。等她找到证据，我们再聊这事。
E: As a scholar, I do not wish to offer up ambiguous conclusions. Let's discuss this topic again when she manages to find the evidence.

C: …刻法勒以自身为模捏塑出的造物，却唯独没能继承它的博爱和包容。
E: ...The creations shaped by Kephale in their image failed to inherit their compassion and acceptance.

C: 但「阳雷骑士」和她的异兽太过强大，没人能从正面战胜他们。因此，我们会教给各位一切能够活用的「计谋」……
E: The Daythunder Knight and her fantastic creatures are far too strong. No one can hope to defeat them in a direct fight. But we'll show you every trick, every strategy you can use to turn the tide...

C: 我是…那位无名黄金裔的后裔？
E: Am I... the descendant of that nameless Chrysos Heir?

C: 她的判断也许没错，凡人确实身负诸多缺陷。但即便如此，人的尊严也不容践踏。
E: Her judgment may be true — mortals do have their flaws. But even so, human dignity must not be trampled.

C: 索拉比斯、露奈比斯阁下——
E: Lord Solabis, Lady Lunabis —

C: 偏偏在这种时候出此难题……
E: Why does this have to happen now...?

C: ——快跑！
E: — Run!

C: 将火种交予我们吧……
E: Give us the Coreflame...

C: 还有一个世界等着被拯救……
E: There is another world waiting to be saved...

C: 不，是时候了。请为我开启通向涡心的道路吧，我还能为地上的人们做最后一件事……
E: No, the time has come. Open the path to the Vortex for me. There's still one last thing I can do for the people down there...

C: 请你们…一定要成为救世的英雄呀。至于史诗最后的「空白页」，那些平凡人的生命和故事……
E: Please, become the heroes this world needs. And as for the final "blank page" of this epic, the lives and stories of ordinary mortals...

C: 我还是实现了自己的理想呀。
E: I still achieved my dream.

C: 那你又为何会出现在这里？
E: And what are you doing here?

C: 如果等在前方的是一团混沌，那就由我将它撕裂……
E: If what lies ahead is a mass of chaos, I will tear it apart...

C: 它们象征着翁法罗斯的十二位神灵：这个世界的命运、支柱、生灵和灾祸。
E: They embody the twelve Amphorean deities: Fate, Foundation, Creations, and Calamity of this world.

C: 你必须承认，在这难熬且挣扎的低谷期，依然有人过得快活。赛飞儿，她对财富的渴望滔滔不绝、倒海翻江，仿佛比鳞渊境的海水更加澎湃。
E: You must admit that some people still manage to live joyfully at this arduous low point in life. Cipher's endless desires for wealth seem more turbulent than the waters of Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 现在不是感伤的时候，来，和人家一起——睁大眼睛，打起精神！
E: Now's not the time to feel down. We gotta pull ourselves together!

C: 哈哈哈哈…对不住了，看见你俩毫无防备地站在那儿，我就忍不住想吓唬吓唬哪！
E: Ahahahahaha... Sorry. I couldn't pass on the chance to give you two a good scare!
Tsk —

C: 可中途被发现了，难免会害羞的嘛。少女柔弱的心弦，可比艾格勒阴晴不定多啦……
E: But getting caught halfway through, it's only natural I'd feel shy. A girl's heart is more delicate than Aquila's ever-changing moods...

C: 嚯…嚯嚯，大丰收啊~了不得，真难想象这斯缇科西亚人以前过的是什么神仙日子！
E: Wow, wow, a massive haul! Unbelievable, it's hard to imagine the kind of luxurious life the people of Styxia once led!

C: 要是让这么丑的家伙弄伤了我的脸蛋，恐怕铁面无私的塔兰顿看了都会忍不住流泪吧？
E: If that ugly brute messes up my face, even the stoic Talanton might end up shedding a tear.

C: 哪怕不是为了我这条不值钱的小命，我也甘心为赛飞儿大姐头赴汤蹈火呀！
E: Even if it weren't for saving my worthless little life, I'd still walk through fire for Cipher without hesitation!

C: 老实说，我在想……
E: Honestly, I've been thinking...

C: 赛法利娅，你的脸上……
E: Cifera, your face...

C: …别说了，赛法利娅。
E: ...Stop it, Cifera.

C: 但只凭他们，怎么可能……
E: But how could they possibly...

C: 那孩童，不必羡慕…你的人性，已走过属于它的，伟大一生。
E: Envy that child, there's no need to... Already lived a grand life, your humanity has.

C: 我能帮到什么，尽管提吧。
E: Whatever I can help with, just say the word.

C: 「自命不凡的英雄，与桀恶仅有一线之隔」，对么？
E: "The difference between a presumptuous hero and a tyrant is a fine line." Right?

C: 我？
E: Me?

C: …别在意，有太多事我现在也无法理解。
E: ...Don't worry about it. There's a lot that I still don't understand.

C: 既然丹宝都这么建议了…那我就来验收下你的学习成果吧？
E: Since you're offering... then let me put your skills to the test, Dannie.

C: 嘟…嘟嘟！
E: Doot... Doot-Doot!

C: 哈…我喜欢你，孩子。我多希望这场对话能再多延续一阵。
E: Hah... I like you, child. I wish this conversation could go on a little longer.

C: 等等，你，难道是……
E: Wait... You... could you be...

C: 雅辛忒丝…我一度以为你是个怯懦的孩子。
E: Hyacinthia... There was a time when I thought you were a timid child.

C: 别担心啦。丹恒和我们说过，那位来古士议员能帮上{NICKNAME}的忙。
E: Don't worry. Dan Heng mentioned that Councillor Lygus can help {NICKNAME} with that.

C: 我想以彩虹桥连接人们的心灵…为世间所有灵魂传递希望。
E: And I want to use the rainbow bridge to link everyone's hearts... and give hope to every soul on earth.

C: 完全不知道该怎么启动，如果有前人的智慧帮忙就好了……
E: I have no idea how to turn it on. If only we had help from the wisdom of those who came before us...

C: 记得雨之民提到过，它讨厌阴天。能否利用这点，改变画壁上的天气，影响「化身印记」的行为？
E: I remember the Rainfolk mentioned the Titan dislikes overcast days. We might be able to use this to our advantage and change how the mark is behaving by changing the weather on the mural?

C: 你是为了帮助同伴解脱，才把我们引领到这里的吗？
E: Did you lead us here so we can free your companion?

C: 还有它的…粉色爱心！
E: And their... pink love!

C: 继续追击，跟着它找到泰坦。即便已经坠入疯狂，艾格勒仍是天空的泰坦…决不能轻敌。
E: Don't stop. Follow it to the Titan. Even if plunged into madness, Aquila is still the Sky Titan... We mustn't let our guard down.

C: 难道……
E: Could it be...

C: …理应如此。
E: ...As it should be.

C: 但…*我们*也知道，有一些伤疤是会陪伴人渡过一辈子的。它永远不会消褪，而且总会在特定的时候隐隐作痛。
E: But... we also know that some scars stay with you for life. They never fully fade, and they always hurt when you least expect it.

C: 艾格勒…它仿佛已经知晓自己的命运。
E: Aquila... already seems aware of their fate.

C: 天空…在燃烧。
E: The sky is burning.

C: 各位，你们安全了…暂时。
E: Everyone, you're all safe... for now.

C: 谢…谢谢你，白厄阁下！
E: Th—Thank you, Lord Phainon!

C: 看来她成功了。
E: Looks like she did it.

C: 但是……
E: But...

C: 是谁？！退下，我命令你，保持十步距离！
E: Who are you!? Stand down! I order you to maintain a distance of ten paces!

C: 没想到列车组找了天才当外援…
E: Never thought the Express Crew would bring in a genius for backup...

C: 「负世」之试炼——「再创世」仪式。
E: The Trial of Worldbearing — The ritual of Era Nova.

C: 这是哪里…？
E: What is this place...?

C: （向老师举报。）
E: (Snitch on Phainon)

C: 哈，真不知道我现在还能不能钻过去……
E: Haha, I wonder if I can still squeeze through there...

C: 孩子们，请躲在迷路迷境里，不要踏出此地半步。否则，你们二人一定也会被那恐怖的灾厄吞噬哪。
E: My children, take shelter in the Membrance Maze. One step outside and this horror will consume you both.

C: 「灾厄」…难道是传闻中的「灾厄」三泰坦么？
E: Are we facing the Three Titans of Calamity?

C: 「救世主」。
E: "Deliverer."

C: 这才是黄金裔应有的态度。去吧，白厄，你的旅程才刚刚开始。
E: Spoken like a Chrysos Heir. Now go, Phainon, your journey has only just begun.

C: 精彩的回答。
E: A brilliant explanation.

C: 黑潮已临奥赫玛城下，翁法罗斯的时间所剩无几……
E: The black tide has reached Okhema. Amphoreus does not have much time left...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>他就是方才无数记忆的主人，此时此刻踏入涡心的另一位贵客，已将自我燃成焦炭的——盗火行者！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The master of the countless memories we saw, the other important actor now stepping into the Vortex, they who have already burnt their own self to cinder — the Flame Reaver!</color>

C: 天气真不错，玩得开心！
E: The weather's great today, have fun!

C: 想死你们啦！
E: We missed you so much!

C: 现在，一轮太阳将走向陨落，它顷刻便能将这荒诞的时空焚烧殆尽——
E: Now, a sun is about to fall, ready to incinerate this absurd space-time dimension in an instant—

C: 是我的解释不够清晰么？黄金裔和泰坦，都只是实验的附属。你们一路走来，早已知晓这世界演进的过程，见证黑潮是如何诞生、成长，最终席卷万物，摧毁一切——
E: Haven't I made myself clear? The Chrysos Heirs and Titans were merely byproducts of the experiment. You've seen this world's evolution, witnessed the birth and growth of the black tide, and how it devoured everything—

C: …也并无不同。
E: Remained the same as ever.

C: 直到另一轮太阳在遥远的地平升起，为翁法罗斯带来真正的黎明。
E: Until another sun rises on the distant horizon, bringing the true dawn to Amphoreus.

C: 千万次轮回，我在这里与一个个你道别，却无力改变任何事。
E: In millions of cycles, I've said goodbye to each and every one of you, yet nothing ever changes.

C: 就用「纷争」…一决胜负。
E: Let "Strife" decide the outcome.

C: 嘿…你们两个，在这里干嘛呢？
E: Hey guys... what are you doing in a place like this?

C: 那些甜言蜜语，真的很动听……
E: Those words sound so sweet...

C: 不能放任银河被「毁灭」摧残！
E: I will not allow the Destruction to tear through the cosmos!

C: 恕我僭越，您…知道{F#她}{M#他}的身份？
E: If I may... how do you know {M#his}{F#her} identity?

C: 全体起立！以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名，奥赫玛同盟向诸神宣誓——
E: All rise! In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the Okhema Alliance swears upon the gods...

C: 还有哪位盟友有异议吗？
E: Are there any other objections?

C: 正是。诚如神谕所示，{NICKNAME}是来自天外的救世主。不仅如此，{F#她}{M#他}还有可靠的盟友。
E: Exactly. Just as the prophecy foretold, {NICKNAME} is your Deliverer from beyond the sky. And {F#s}he also has reliable allies.

C: 换做从前，若有人胆敢觊觎凯撒神权，多半只会落得碎尸万段的下场。但如今，我们的视线已能越过这片苟延残喘的大地……
E: In the past, anyone who dared to covet the Imperator's divine authority would have met a gruesome end. But now, we can see beyond this dying world...

C: 合作？恕我直言，我从来不和任何人*合作*……
E: Cooperate? Forgive me, but I never "cooperate" with anyone...

C: 呵呵，您再次证实了凯撒的英明并非空谈。
E: Heh, you've once again confirmed that your wisdom is no empty boast.
Hah...

C: 要不是凯撒大人，你们早该跟着那帮元老蛀虫一起沉进湖里吃泥了，还能有命在这儿乱嚼舌根？
E: If it weren't for the Great Imperator, you'd have sunk into the lake with those corrupt Elders already, and you wouldn't even be alive to speak like this!

C: 嘻…人家都没开口试探呢。五大三粗的「断锋爵」，还真是什么都瞒不住。
E: Hee-hee... I didn't even need to try. Big and strong "Dux Fragoris" really can't hide anything.

C: 这两位是……
E: These two are...

C: 我们这也有些进展，但谈不上什么好消息。时间有限，长话短说……
E: We've made some progress here too, but nothing to get too excited about. Our time is short, so let me summarize...

C: 要说的就是这些，世界内部就靠你们继续推进了。定期联系，记得别掉以轻心。
E: That's all I have to say. We'll depend on you to continue pushing things forward within this world. Keep in touch regularly, and remember, don't let your guard down.

C: 果然，我们心有灵犀呢！将计就计，把识刻锚交给他「保管」吧？
E: Nice. You read my mind! Let's go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after."

C: 请看……
E: See here...

C: 答案显而易见，我会将翁法罗斯与群星相连……
E: The answer is simple. I will connect Amphoreus with the stars...

C: 倒是你，吕枯耳戈斯，明明拥有这般伟力，却要装作凡人，卑躬屈膝……
E: I can toss your words right back at you, Lycurgus. Why would someone as powerful as you pretend to be a mortal and kneel before me?

C: 若您遵守盟约，将「律法」移交于我，并按部就班地完成「再创世」，翁法罗斯本不会偏离命运的正轨……
E: Had you fulfilled your promise of giving the "Law" to me and completing the "Era Nova," then Amphoreus would not have deviated from destiny's course...

C: 找到了，找到了……
E: I found you. I finally found you...

C: 等仗打完，我们就结婚吧！
E: Let's get married after the war's over!

C: 剑旗爵仍在吟唱迷人的歌声，若无她递来的佳酿，你们也会如周遭的宴客一样，沉在歌喉与舌华的浪里。
E: Dux Gladiorum still sings her bewitching tune. Without the fine wine she offered, you might have drowned in the tide of her honeyed voice, just like the rest of the guests.

C: 那个吕枯耳戈斯，他现在就在奥赫玛门前。
E: That Lycurgus... he's right outside Okhema.

C: 这可是剧目的最高潮，怎能轻易泄底？
E: Now that would spoil the climax, wouldn't it?

C: 这一切…都是记忆吗？
E: Is this... all a memory?

C: 我没有忘记，每一晚，它都会出现在我们的梦中……
E: I haven't forgotten. It visits me in dreams every night...

C: 尊贵的王！我已遵您指令，将征程上的污秽清洗。
E: Noble monarch! I've cleansed the foulness from the road, as you commanded.

C: 我的锋刃，你已助我加冕登基，大可尽情讨要馈遗。
E: My blade, you've helped me ascend and take the crown. Ask, and you shall have your reward.

C: 高贵的骑士，你的力量无穷无尽，一定要带我们征服天际，让我与你碰杯为誓！
E: Noble knight, your strength is boundless! Lead us to conquer the universe, and let us toast to that vow!

C: （要想碰到灵水盆，得用上时象仪的力量……）
E: (To reach the spirit basin, I'll need to call upon the power of the Chrono Vessel...)

C: 寻常智械？别再故作姿态了，前辈……
E: An ordinary Intellitron? Cut the pretence, Senior Society Member.

C: 是一场大破大立的变革，和万物皆焚后的新生。
E: It is revolution through complete annihilation... and the grand rebirth after all has been reduced to ash.

C: 昔涟，好久不见。
E: Long time no see, Cyrene.

C: 也就是现在，他在世界内部的化身被破坏，两条时间线产生交集的这一瞬间。
E: Which is now, the moment when his manifestation in this world is destroyed and his twin timelines are intersecting.

C: 不过，人家对「记忆」的理解也浅尝辄止，没办法完整地复现过去。但我会尽力用讲述代替那些缺失的部分。
E: But I only know so much about the Remembrance, so I can't completely replicate the past... But I'll do my best to talk about the missing parts.

C: 听起来，这座理想之邦已经成为了过去式。
E: It sounds like this ideal kingdom is no more.

C: 什么…您这是打算投降？
E: Wha— Are you planning to surrender?

C: 就让它亲自料理大地的同胞吧！我们要急行军，率先战胜残敌……
E: Let them deal with their earthly brethren! We will advance and take the lead in defeating what remains of our enemy.

C: 逻辑不是武器，而是囚具——就让我为诸位将其粉碎。
E: Logic is not a weapon, but a pair of shackles. Allow me to shatter them for you.

C: 但祂也绝不会是「毁灭」的盟友。
E: But THEY are certainly not an ally of the Destruction either.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>从刚才起，我们是否都遗忘了什么？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>In the past few moments, we've all forgotten something, haven't we?</color>

C: 你想问的，是「三月七」的事吧？
E: You mean, what's going on with "March 7th."

C: 这里没有别人，你帮我，我就帮你。
E: There's no one here except us. If you help me, then I'll help you.

C: 丹、丹恒乘客！你，你终于找到回家的路了帕！
E: Passenger Dan Heng! Y—You finally found your way back home!

C: 没错。好奇我是如何发现的？
E: That's right. Curious about how I discovered this place?

C: （取出《如我所书》…）
E: (Take out As I've Written...)

C: 昔涟与星神的目光邂逅，将之视作延续世界的希望。所以，一次又一次，她不惜化作白纸，也要为祂献上「记忆」。
E: Cyrene encountered the Aeon's gaze and regarded THEM as the hope to continue her world. That's why she offered THEM "memories" over and over, even if she had to turn herself into nothingness every time.

C: 「虽然你从来不说话。但我知道，你在听。我讲述的每一个故事……」
E: "You never say anything, but I know you're listening. Every story I've told is..."

C: 我对{NICKNAME}承诺过，要重新编纂世界的因果，创造出一个无瑕的翁法罗斯。
E: I promised {NICKNAME} that I would re-create the cause and effect of this world, and form a flawless Amphoreus.

C: 真聪明，你果然没有让我失望。
E: Smart girl. You haven't disappointed me.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>杀死「记忆」命途的愿望。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>My wish to kill the Path of Remembrance.</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>PoleMos<unbreak>600</unbreak>，已下载。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> PoleMos<unbreak>600</unbreak>, downloaded.</color>

C: 不讲武德，干得好啊！
E: No holds barred. Awesome move!

C: 「开拓」的意义是「探索、了解、建立、连结」，是与无数世界同行，而不是高高在上的「拯救银河」。
E: That the meaning of Trailblaze is to "explore, understand, establish, and connect." It's not about standing above the cosmos as some kind of savior. It's about walking alongside every world within it.

C: 一如过去的你，在完成种种壮举的同时，从未忘记过追逐自由。
E: As in the past, even while achieving so much, you never let go of your pursuit of freedom.

C: 是…也不是。
E: Yes... and no.

C: 我已说服龙师们，这一战将有持明云吟士亲赴前线，与我军并肩作战。
E: I've convinced the Preceptors: Vidyadhara cloudhymn magi will join the battle on the frontlines, and our armies will fight side-by-side.

C: 没想到那些龙师真会松口。此役之后，定然……
E: I never thought those Preceptors would ever relent. After all of this, countless Vidyadhara...

C: 丹恒阁下，该做好最坏的准备了：眼前这位山之民，绝不可小觑……
E: Be prepared for the worst, Lord Dan Heng. This Mountain Dweller must not be underestimated...
Hah...

C: 忆潮汹涌而来。坚持住，别被掠走心神。
E: The memoria tide surges violently. Hold on, and don't let your focus be swept away.

C: 我明白。她的力量…不容小觑。
E: I understand. Her power... shouldn't be underestimated.

C: {RUBY_B#「毁灭」}炙热又危险{RUBY_E#}的气息，这是…和白厄同源的力量。
E: {RUBY_B#the Destruction}A scorching and dangerous aura{RUBY_E#}... This power... shares the same origin as Phainon.

C: 天空在燃烧，城中空无一人……
E: The sky is burning, and the streets are empty...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>她入侵并感染了「岁月」泰坦</color>，将翁法罗斯沉积的数据转化为忆域的傀儡。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>She hacked and infected the Time Titan</color>, converting the built-up data of Amphoreus into puppets of the Memory Zone.

C: 对你而言，已经过去多久了呢？
E: How long has it been for you?

C: 歌颂「灰黯之手，遐蝶」，您温柔地引渡死亡，令它不再是「均衡」的终点，而是安宁的归乡。
E: Praise be to "Castorice, Hand of Shadow," for you gently ferry the crossing of death, so that it is no longer an end in Equilibrium, but a peaceful journey home.

C: 环境参数严重不符。结论：这是「内核层」在现实中的样子。
E: The environmental readings are all wrong. Conclusion: this must be what the "kernel" actually looks like in the real world.

C: 原因不明。在现实矩阵中，祂没有留下任何痕迹。
E: Cause: unknown. THEY left no discernible trace within the real matrix.

C: 他知道我们会来。得知「大墓」存在后，他也在寻找德谬歌。
E: He was expecting us. And once he learned of the Great Tomb's existence, he initiated his own search for the Demiurge.

C: 在<color=#dbc291ff>「她」</color>登场前，需要一处空旷的平台。
E: We'll need a wide, open platform before <color=#dbc291ff>"her"</color> entrance.

C: 十四行代数式屏障。用于「隔离」，而非防御。
E: Quatorzain algebraic expressions. It's built for "isolation," not defense.

C: 很有趣：我发现了「神话之外」的信号。
E: Interesting. I just picked up a signal from the Exomyth.

C: 「若你所言非虚，我们自有办法…在后世再会。」
E: "If your words hold true, then we have our own ways... to meet again in the world to come."

C: 这铁皮人，真是阴得没边了。
E: That tin man is one sneaky jerk.

C: 所以，要用「百界门」把它们丢到看不见的角落。
E: So, we'll use the Century Gate to toss them somewhere no one can see.

C: 永别了，「金织」女士。
E: Farewell, Lady Goldweaver.

C: 「不要睡下，否则灾难就会降临。」那声音很虚弱，也很严厉……
E: "You mustn't sleep, or disaster will come." It sounds really weak, but also kinda strict...

C: 「咱们同行的桥段可不多见。」
E: "It's not everyday we get to walk the same road."

C: 「好大一颗球啊。轮到谁表演了？」
E: "That's a big one. So, who's up for a show?"

C: 写下。结局吧。
E: Let us. Write. Its ending.

C: 但这一世……
E: But this cycle...

C: 切勿，犹疑。救世主。
E: Do not. Hesitate. Deliverer.

C: 要相信他，我们一定会重逢。
E: Trust in him, we'll meet again for sure.

C: 还走得动吗，{NICKNAME}？我们…该去完成真正的「创世」啦。
E: Can you still move, {NICKNAME}? It's time... for us to complete the real "genesis."

C: 要用净世金血烧尽毁灭，对吗？
E: Exterminate the Destruction with the world-cleansing golden blood, right?

C: 自由月，我「毁灭」这命运的枷锁！
E: In the Month of Freedom, I impart Destruction onto the shackles of destiny!

C: 来了啊，搭档。
E: You're here, partner.

C: 你是在邀请我加入旅行吗？
E: Are you inviting me to join your journey?

C: 而铁墓的殒落，也象征着权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>的衰亡。<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯——我们为之付出一切的家园——如今只存在于银河的记忆中了。</color>
E: The fall of Irontomb also symbolizes the demise of Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>. <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus — the home we sacrificed everything for — now exists only in the memories of the cosmos.</color>

C: 「而星辰，会传颂凯撒的征途。」
E: "The stars shall sing of the Imperator's great journey."

C: 还是那么深奥呀，教授。时间还多，如果您不说明清楚，后世的读者恐怕看不懂您的真意喔？
E: Oh you. Still as profound as ever, professor. We've got time, you know. If you don't explain it clearly, future readers might not grasp your true meaning.

C: 其实，在大家不知道的角落，还发生了一段鲜有人知的「插曲」。
E: In a corner unknown to everyone, there was actually an untold "interlude" that took place.

C: 记得么？如果要贯彻「铭记」宇宙的信念，祂只会在时间的尽头飞升成神。
E: Remember? To carry out the mission of "remembering" the universe, THEY must ascend to divinity only at the very end of time.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而飞升的那一刻，祂的「记忆」贯穿过去，成为了人们眼中的「浮黎」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And at that moment of ascension, THEIR "memory" stretches through the past, becoming what people now call "Fuli."</color>

C: 一定会替「往昔的涟漪」见证……
E: Will witness on behalf of the Ripples of Past Reverie...

C: 可恶，这些怪物…到底是什么来头？！
E: Darn it. What are these things!?

C: 带着这份愿望走下去吧…成为开启「救世」的英雄……
E: Take this wish with you... Be the hero who begins the mission of Deliverance...

C: 听上去很沉重，对吗？但在这一天，欢笑却远比哭声更响亮。
E: It may sound heavy, right? But on this day, laughter always rises louder than tears.

C: 天空，在逐渐变暗……
E: The sky is getting darker...

C: 一如既往，我会把这本书念给你听。
E: As always, I'll read this book to you.

C: 从前，有一朵「无瑕」的水晶花，闪闪发光。像桃子的每一篇故事。
E: Once upon a time, there was a "flawless" crystal flower that sparkled with light, like Peach's every story.

C: 不哦。你已经为这个故事写下最浪漫的结局了呀。
E: That's not true. You've already written the most romantic ending possible for this story.

C: 「水晶花掉在地上，碎掉了。」
E: "The crystal flower fell to the ground and shattered."

C: 「『记忆』：以自我为核心的，具备情感投射能力的共情机制。」
E: "The Remembrance: an empathy mechanism focused on the self and equipped with emotional projection capacities."

C: 而它会落下，漾开最初的涟漪。
E: And that tear would fall... and create the first ripples.

C: 螺丝，我们走。解开铁墓的封印去。
E: Let's go, Screwy. We're gonna break Irontomb's seal.

C: 「！」——在编程语言中，人们将其添加于算式前，以表示对目标值的取否。也许它的意思是：对未至的一切永怀质疑。
E: "!"... In programming languages, this symbol is prefixed to expressions to denote negation. Perhaps it signifies an enduring skepticism toward all that has yet to arrive.

C: 他说你失踪了。
E: He said you were missing.

C: 咳，打断一下。
E: Ahem, excuse me.

C: 还记得刚刚我提到的恶棍吗？他的真名叫做<color=#dbc291ff>何塞•拉萨罗</color>。
E: Remember the scoundrel I was just talking about? His real name is <color=#dbc291ff>Hosea Lazaro</color>.

C: 我得再去整两口<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>了，配上咔滋闪光的焊枪，就是阿基维利来了我也不换！
E: I have to go take a couple of sips of <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color> and tinker around with my blazing welding gun. I wouldn't give up on that even if Akivili were to come pay me a visit!

C: 一码归一码，密钥的事容后再议。
E: That's a separate issue. We'll talk about the encryption key later.

C: 正在同步监控信息…解析中…请稍后——
E: Currently synchronizing to surveillance data... Analyzing... Please wait—

C: 提取到的监控录像极为模糊，只能依稀看见几只<color=#dbc291ff>呜呜伯</color>在落地窗外漂浮向下的画面，这似乎是某个<color=#dbc291ff>高处的舱室</color>。
E: The surveillance video you could access is extremely blurry. You can only see some <color=#dbc291ff>Wubbaboos</color> floating downward outside a wall-sized window. This seems to be an <color=#dbc291ff>elevated room somewhere</color>.

C: 这头在哪儿做的？
E: Where did you get your hair done?

C: …看来你把机器修好了。
E: ...It looks like you've fixed the machine.

C: 显而易见，曲线总是长于直线。所以她所在星域的时光曲线，当折算至我们的时间直线时，会覆盖若干倍的长度。
E: Clearly, a curve is always longer than a straight line. Therefore, the time curve of her segmentum is going to cover several times the length when converted to our timeline.

C: …我也曾是个小伙子。
E: ...I used to be a young man once.

C: 哦。那我拿去读取了，谢啦哥们儿！
E: Okay. I'll read it now. Thank you, bro!

C: 黑暗在远方列队。用近乎残忍的方式
E: Darkness is gathering in the distance, using cruel methods...

C: 这些诗写得怪好笑的，是吧？
E: They are ridiculous, aren't they?

C: 我眼睛怎么，好像进了点滑石粉…这东西也能弄进眼睛，真滑稽，简直就和我的诗一样滑稽。
E: What the heck? Why is there talcum powder in my eyes... Ridiculous, just like my poems.

C: 小崽子，别用那种「你不嫌是酸诗吗」的怀疑目光看我。我虽然主张把研究精力用在正途上，但也不会漠视洛奇的心血。
E: Hey, what's that look on your face? I admit I did say they are "cringy," but I'd never ignore Rocky's efforts despite thinking think he should focus on his research.

C: 别看这几步路，要我鼓起毕生的勇气，也走不到……
E: It may look like a few steps, but I can't do it, even if I muster all my courage...

C: 好，做得很好，亚伯拉罕。
E: Okay, well done, Abraham.

C: 无论你曾孤独地取得过多少耀眼的成绩，过往那种闭门造车的生活已经行不通了。
E: No matter how many dazzling achievements you have made on your own, we can no longer afford to live like hermits.

C: 每位科员早晚都要担起责任。空间站如今百废待兴，我相信，每个人都会有他的用武之处。
E: Every staff member must take responsibility sooner or later. The space station is now in dire need of restoration. I believe we can use everyone's help.

C: 简单的听声辩位而已，不值一提。
E: It's just sonar positioning. Nothing to brag about.

C: 「黑塔」科员本领各异，多接触一些，你就见怪不怪了。
E: The staff of Herta Space Station possess many different abilities. After meeting a few of us, you won't be surprised anymore.

C: 复兴宣言？
E: Declaration of Revival?

C: 不过，我得提醒你，这些录像带的制作者，为了防范他人窥探隐秘，在录像带中植入了防卫机制。
E: However, I have to remind you that the producers of these videotapes have implanted some defense mechanisms to help protect their secrets.

C: 与其说是陷阱，不如说是科员们切磋技艺的日常，通过技术把无能之辈挡在信息的大门外。
E: Not so much of a trap. It's just a result of the constant arms race between researchers vying to be the best at what they do. They simply used a certain kind of technology to turn away those deemed unworthy from accessing information.

C: 而我已经告诉你了有关录像带的一切——在你真正得知其中的秘闻之前，你不会轻易将危险遗忘。
E: And now I've told you everything about the videotapes — you won't easily forget about the danger until you find out the secrets.

C: 那是在一个昏暗的舱室里，伫立着<color=#dbc291ff>成排的监视屏</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Rows of security monitors</color> loom within a dark room.

C: 你们现在一唱一和，可别忘了，你们可都是病人。一个自述有短期失忆现象，一个陷入了短暂的意识紊乱。
E: Hey, don't forget, you are both patients. One has potential short-term amnesia, and the other had a temporary disturbance of consciousness.

C: 希拉的记忆没有出错。这里的陈设，和她口述的记忆图景一模一样。
E: Sheila's memory is correct. This place is exactly how she described it.

C: 你这是在治疗？
E: This is a treatment?

C: 最好如实交代，不要添油加醋。
E: You better tell the truth. Don't embellish it.

C: 所以希拉才患上了短期失忆症。
E: That's why Sheila had short-term amnesia.

C: 在得知了「另一个我」曾有过那样丰富的人生，我多么希望，我也有属于自己的生日，属于自己的朋友，以及属于自己的梦想。
E: After learning that the "other me" had such a rich life, I wish I had my own birthday, my own friends and my own dreams.

C: 可惜她始终不是真正的「人」
E: It's a shame. No matter what, she's not a real "person."

C: 防卫科员是摆设吗？
E: Is the Security Department here just for show?

C: 放心吧，各种意义上你都称得上是拯救了空间站的英雄，没人会对你起疑心的。
E: Don't worry, you are a hero who has saved the space station. No one will suspect you.

C: 而且这事做起来也很简单的，无非是到他们旁边，听听看他们的表现是否有异常之处。
E: And it is not rocket science. You just need to walk up to them and listen, then see if there are any unusual behaviors.

C: 所以你是还有哪里需要我再讲解一下吗？
E: Is there anything else I need to clarify?

C: 前面有多个敌方反应。假设密钥落在它们手上的话，或许可以找出并针对性地打倒密钥持有者以回避多余的战斗风险。
E: There are multiple enemies ahead. Assuming the key is in their hands, it may be possible to identify and target the key holder in order to avoid fighting more enemies than necessary.

C: 使用相机识别程序，找出身上藏有房间钥匙的敌人。
E: Using the camera's scanning function, find the enemy with the key hidden on their body.

C: 我在你的相机上搭载了一道临时识别程序，空间站的终端能远程为你解析镜头内的信标数据。
E: Your camera is equipped with a temporary scanning program, through which the space station's terminals can remotely analyze the data in any visible beacons.

C: 阿兰队长？这个人嘛…我当然是认识的，毕竟我的职责就是照亮空间站每一个人的心灵。但是至于他现在人在哪儿……
E: Arlan? Uh, yes... I know him. After all, my calling is to light up the heart of every person on the space station. As to his current location...

C: 先看看这些物料吧。
E: Let's look at these materials first.

C: 大哥他跑起来如骏马，战斗的时候如巨熊，我觉得很贴切！
E: Brother Arlan runs like a horse and fights like a bear. I think that's a great metaphor!

C: 别急，先看看线索。
E: Calm down. Let's look at the clues first.

C: 你看，他甚至把佩佩的照片打印下来，随时随地给自己上紧发条！
E: Maybe he printed out Peppy's picture as a way of forcing himself to remember his responsibility...

C: 那就是裂界侵蚀的痕迹越弱，附近的情况就会越安全！
E: The less Fragmentum corrosion there is, the safer it gets!

C: 如果阿兰大哥是来打听「呜呜」的，恕世玲无可奉告！
E: If big brother Arlan is here to ask about Wubbie, Shiling has nothing to tell you. Sorry!

C: 不论是你们口中的诡影，还是世玲方才所说「呜呜」，都是我们界种科的奇物「呜呜伯」。
E: Shiling's "Wubbie" is indeed one of the specters you mentioned. They are the Curio Wubbaboo from the Department of Ecology.

C: 呜。
E: Woo.

C: 现在空间站正在进行灾后重建，我的职责就是协助修复各种设备，恢复空间站的网络安全。
E: Now that the station is being rebuilt, my job is to repair equipment and restore the space station's cybersecurity.

C: 怎么可能？为什么是…一滴汗？
E: Really? Why is there... a drop of sweat?

C: 你在说什么啊！这怎么看都是…一滴汗？
E: What are you talking about!? This looks like... a drop of sweat?

C: 来试试吧。
E: Let me try.

C: 有声音了。
E: There's a voice.

C: 想都别想。
E: That's not gonna happen.

C: 我更担心科员们的精神状态。
E: I'm more worried about the mental state of the researchers.

C: 这想必是黑塔心血来潮的决定，因为没有通知其他人，致使它被列入了下落不明的清单中。
E: Herta was probably impulsive and added the cartridge into the simulation without telling anyone, resulting in the item being listed as lost.

C: 我理解你的顾虑。倘若对方曾尝试骇入黑塔的办公室，那么模拟宇宙自然会成为她的下一个目标。
E: I understand your concern. If the individual in question did indeed try to hack into Herta's office, then the Simulated Universe is undoubtedly her next target.

C: 等一下，这不会是我的错吧？要是我当初能阻止敌人入侵，螺丝咕姆先生是不是就不会这么悲观了？
E: Wait... This isn't my fault, is it? If I'd been able to stop the enemy's invasion, would Mr. Screwllum be less pessimistic?

C: 空间站还会受到入侵吗？
E: Will the space station be invaded again?

C: 当然不会。
E: Certainly not.

C: 哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
E: Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.

C: 偶像派。
E: An idol.

C: 啊啊啊啊啊！
E: Ahhhh!

C: 毕竟哪怕你不需要，也不能便宜了别的家伙。
E: All things considered, even if you have no use for it, you can't let it benefit another party.

C: 我来到列车是为助众人解决危机，当使命完成，我将回归银河。但…银河这么大，我们说不定还会再见。
E: I came to the Express to help you find a solution to this crisis. When my mission is complete, I shall venture back into the cosmos... but the cosmos is boundless — we may yet have another encounter.

C: 现在看来，要与时间比赛了。
E: This is a race against the clock.

C: （如果有一些提示的话，或许……）
E: (If only there were some hints, then maybe...)

C: …质疑的声音在军团事件后从未平息过。物理的损坏总能修复，但治愈人们心中的伤却要很久很久。
E: ...After the Legion's invasion, the space station has been under constant scrutiny. Physical damage can be easily repaired, but it takes a long time to heal the wounds in people's hearts.

C: （阿德勒当时和阿兰在一起，他们被卷入了什么事件……）
E: (Adler was with Arlan. They were involved in some sort of incident...)

C: （阿德勒似乎受到了启发，不过在那之前…我是从谁那里听说了什么？）
E: (Adler seems to have gotten a lead, but... what was the information I forgot? And from whom?)

C: （关于阿兰和阿德勒的记忆有点模糊，我得再回忆下艾丝妲提起的另一个人。）
E: (My memories of Arlan and Adler are hazy. I need to remember the other person Asta mentioned.)

C: 我想起来了，当时…当时……
E: I remember now. Back then... back then...

C: 我是在向{F#她}{M#他}提问，艾丝妲小姐。
E: I'm asking {F#HER}{M#HIM}, Lady Asta.

C: 一份失踪科员的名单，和他们的详细信息。
E: A list of the missing researchers and their details.

C: 他、他也消失了……
E: H—He disappeared too...

C: （的确。记得当时启发阿德勒的关键词是「能量生命」，冥火大公也是一种元素生命，只是巧合么？）
E: (True... the keywords that got Adler thinking were "Energy Lifeforms." Duke Inferno is also an energy lifeform. Coincidence?)

C: 阿德勒怎么你了？
E: What did Adler do to you?

C: 这是…？
E: This is...

C: 道路被火焰吞没了！它刚刚完成了一次转移。
E: The way is awash with flames! It must have just teleported!

C: 我不常出入空间站，今天才发现这里，视野开阔，令人安神。适合配上一点荷叶、梅花、糯米，还有糖霜的清香。
E: I don't usually go in and out of the space station, and only discovered today that it was blessed with such calm, open views. It is a wonderful fit for the sweet fragrance of lotus leaves, plum blossom, sticky rice, and frosting sugar.

C: （…汪汪汪…）
E: (...Woof! Woof! Woof!)

C: 来，我送送你吧。
E: Alright, let me walk you out.

C: 生命五光十色，我坚信如此。它的绚丽如乱花迷眼，而我要从中采撷永不枯萎的那一枝。
E: Life is countless and varied in form. I firmly believe in that. Its beauty is like a myriad of flowers, and I want to pluck the one that never wilts.

C: 人流散去后，这里就会变得十分宁静呢，就像我曾经去过的「无人之地」。
E: As the masses depart, there's an enveloping calm here, just like in the "No Man's Land" I've ventured to in the past.

C: （阮•梅造物们手拉手，大家围成一圈。）
E: (In a circle, Ruan Mei's creations join hands with each other.)

C: 没错，没有比华劳斯更懂我的人了。
E: That's right, no one knows me better than Wallace.

C: 还是我亲自帮忙的呢！
E: I personally helped with that, too!

C: （向尤利安询问）
E: (Ask Julian what is going on)

C: 小机器人向你解释了你的无名客伙伴们是如何在岸边捡漂流瓶的。
E: The little robot explains to you how your Nameless partners collected Drift Bottles on the shore.

C: 勿以善小而不为。
E: No good deed is too trivial.

C: 但这些小事又有谁记得呢？
E: But who will remember the small things that we do?

C: 通讯调试完成，已更新通讯人列表。
E: Communication system adjustment complete. Contacts catalog updated.

C: 所以，你为什么要躲着「银鬃铁卫」呀？
E: So why were you hiding from the Silvermane Guards?

C: 或者，咱们也可以再去别处逛逛，玩玩…全看你心情！
E: Or... we could go check out some other fun stuff elsewhere. Your call!

C: 这也太离谱了吧？！早不来晚不来，怎么非挑这个时候？要是咱们没铲除掉星核，这笔账还不是就这么算了？这不明摆着是欺负人嘛！
E: That's ridiculous! And what's with the timing? What took them so long to get here? If it wasn't for us eliminating the Stellaron, they'd have nothing to collect! It's obvious they're just trying to take advantage.

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ——啊，你熟悉这个说法吗？总之就是你我脚下这颗星球——它很快就要变成属于「公司」的资产了。
E: Jarilo-VI — are robots familiar with that term? Anyway, it refers to the planet we're currently standing on. It's about to become the property of the IPC.

C: 我想向你提出一个问题，托帕。
E: I would like to ask you a question, Topaz.

C: 关于这个星球的未来，我持有与你不同的意见。但我的意见并无重要性，因为我是工具，而非决策者。
E: While my opinion on the future of this planet may differ from yours, it ultimately holds no weight. I am merely a tool, not a decision-maker.

C: 请别误会，我们无意与公司和董事会作对。只是恰巧，雅利洛-Ⅵ这颗星球上有我们珍视的朋友，以及朋友的朋友。
E: Please don't misunderstand us, Miss Topaz. We have no intention of opposing the IPC or its board of directors... but we have very dear friends on Jarilo-VI.

C: 虽然有点突然…但既然两位专程登门造访，想必事态相当紧急。请说吧，我会仔细听的。
E: Seems a little out of the blue, but since you came all this way, it must be urgent. Go ahead.

C: 行啊，正好我也对那些家伙的背景好奇着呢。跟我说说吧，看看能不能帮上什么忙。
E: Well, ask away! It just so happens I'm curious about them myself. Maybe I can be of some help.

C: 要是她问起来，你们就拿我的原话回复。她肯定能明白的。
E: If she asks you, just let her know my reasoning. She'll understand.

C: 应该没什么事吧？
E: They'll be okay, right?

C: 列队，稍息！
E: Formation, at ease!

C: 那种制式的机器人，我以前见过。是公司执行外勤的「小组长」。
E: I've seen standard-issue robots like these before. It's an IPC field Team Leader.

C: 那姑娘一直劝我按时吃药，我知道她是一片好心……
E: That girl's always trying to get me to take my medicine on time. *sigh* I know her heart's in the right place...

C: 哈，怎么，你也对「特效药」起兴趣了？
E: Hah, what, now you're interested in the wonder medicine?

C: …我说，你是不是在试探我啊？没钱就快滚开，别耽误我卖药。
E: ...Say, what are you trying to pull here? If you can't afford it, then get outta my sight. I've got medicine to sell.

C: 你是这么认为的吗？也难怪……
E: I see... I can understand that.

C: 请您冷静一下…
E: Try and stay calm...

C: 那之后她就一直是这种状态。多亏娜塔莎医生主动帮她调养，否则的话…哎，真不敢想。
E: From that moment on, oh she became as you see her now. If Dr. Natasha hadn't taken her under her wing... *sigh* Well it doesn't bear thinking about.

C: 各位的病情需要合理、科学的治疗，胡乱用药只会加剧你们的症状……
E: Your ailments need rational, scientific treatment. Relying on pseudo-medicines will only worsen your condition...

C: 当时正值封锁令颁布前夕，下层的银鬃铁卫已经近乎不见踪影，我们想了很久都找不到处置瓦赫的办法。
E: This was shortly before the Underworld was sealed off — there were hardly any Silvermane Guards remaining. We spent ages trying to find a way to handle Vache.

C: 最后，请记住我们的口号——
E: And finally, remember our motto...

C: 为什么冒充我？
E: Why impersonate me?

C: ——直到水魈冒充了我，它以捉弄卡波特为乐，处处斗智斗勇。
E: Until the Xenohydro impersonated me to prank Capote and make a mockery of him.

C: 运气好罢了。
E: We got lucky.

C: 嗯…没关系，别在意。他说过…对任何人都要时刻保持礼貌。
E: Oh... that's okay. Don't worry. He said... gotta be polite, to everyone, at all times.

C: 呃…行，知道了，不说了！咱们走着。
E: Um... Okay, I got it! Enough chitchat. Let's go.

C: 只是，似乎有个看起来很凶悍的怪物正盘踞在那附近…我一个人没办法对付它，所以也只能在原地等你过来了。
E: Also, there seems to be a scary monster nearby... I wouldn't be able to deal with it alone, so I have to wait for your help.

C: …是三年前，娜塔。不用难过…他走的时候没有痛苦。
E: ...It was three years ago, Nat. No need to be sad... he passed away very peacefully.

C: 虽然我从没这么说过，但这次…希望那些筑城者信奉的神祇能分给我们些运气。
E: This may not sound like me, but... I hope that deity the Architects worship can grant us some luck.

C: 等一下！那边有个巨大的家伙。
E: Hold on! That's a big guy over there.

C: 但如果换成是你的话…我觉得咱们单靠四处打听就能收集到不少有用的信息。
E: But if you were to go there yourself and ask around... I think we could gather a lot of useful intel.

C: 好普通的一块石头。
E: Looks like an ordinary rock.

C: 再设计一个新的呢？
E: Maybe we could make a new one?

C: 这两个人类幼崽找到了一批可疑的零件，想把它们交付给我，以换取「赞赏」。但这些零件来源不明，且不具备实用价值。仅凭计算难以断定……
E: These two young humans found a suspicious batch of components. They wished to deliver them to me and earn my "appreciation." However, the origin of these components is unknown and they have no practical utility. It is difficult to ascertain their value...

C: 杰姬，你听见了吗？史瓦罗大佬表扬你了！
E: Did you hear that, Jackie? Mr. Svarog said nice things about you!

C: 和佩拉一起努力拼凑好了「齿轮与智慧」……
E: You and Pela work strenuously to reassemble Gears and Wisdom...

C: 哪里哪里，我才应该感谢你呢，铁卫小女士。那么，我就先行告辞了。
E: No, no, I should be thanking you, young lady of the Guards. Well then, if that's all, I shall take my leave.

C: 而且，只凭那家伙的知识面和阅历，根本不可能想出把「齿轮与智慧」拆成零碎的部件、再藏在机器人身体里这种点子。
E: There's no way someone like him could've come up with the idea of disassembling a sculpture and hiding the pieces inside robots.

C: 房门内没有任何动静，也许你应该再试一次。
E: (There is no reaction from behind the door, perhaps you should try again.)

C: <unbreak>5000</unbreak>信用点…
E: <unbreak>5000</unbreak> credits...

C: 「致我最最最亲爱的大客户{NICKNAME}——恭喜你！铭记今天吧，因为今天你差点就抓住了伟大的寒腿叔叔！」
E: "To my dearest and most valued client, {NICKNAME} — congratulations! Remember this day as the day you almost caught the great Mr. Cold Feet!"

C: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是机械屋「永动」的主人<color=#dbc291ff>希露瓦</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
E: Could help us contact the owner of the Neverwinter Workshop, <color=#dbc291ff>Serval</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

C: …我很抱歉，佩拉小姐。那时我们已经想尽了一切办法，但实在是回天乏术……
E: ...I'm sorry, Miss Pela. We tried everything we could, but there really was nothing we could do...

C: 所以就是聊天咯？好哦！
E: So that's just chatting, right? That's great!

C: 你怎么还谢谢她啊？
E: Why did you thank her?

C: 哈哈，那这流程看起来倒也没那么麻烦了。
E: Well then, the application doesn't sound like too much trouble now.

C: 简历写作指导是另外的价格…
E: I charge extra for resume writing tips...

C: 不过，既然你说要放飞自我——那我可也就不客气了！
E: But give it another thought... since you want me to be myself, I'll do it!

C: 好啊，你说了算。还有其他地方需要调整吗？
E: Sure, it's your decision. Anything else?

C: {NICKNAME}，不愧是你…敢作敢当！
E: {NICKNAME}, that's so you... very bold indeed!

C: 也许你真的不适合这个工作…
E: Maybe this job isn't for you after all...

C: …那最好是惊喜，而不是什么惊吓。
E: ...I hope this surprise is gonna be a pleasant one.

C: 没有的事。大守护者本不该是那种高高在上的存在，再加上她是博物馆振兴计划的总负责人，我不觉得听她调遣有任何问题。
E: It's not like that. A Supreme Guardian should never be put on a pedestal. Since Pela is in charge of the museum revitalization plan, I have no problem following her instructions.

C: {NICKNAME}，你准备好了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

C: 是你招惹了那些流浪者吗？
E: Did you bring those vagrants into the mine?

C: 你再坦率一点吧。
E: You can say what you mean.

C: 先回镇上休息吧。
E: You'd best get some rest back in town.

C: 帮大忙了，查宝！
E: You were a big help, Findie!

C: 她去矿区干嘛？
E: Why would she go to the mines?

C: 矿区里有很多坏人，小孩子不能随便进去！你快替我们去看看！
E: There's lots of bad guys in the mines. Miss Natasha said kids ain't allowed to go in! Go check on her for us now!

C: 嘁，又来一个倒霉蛋？多你一个不多，都来尝尝本大爷的厉害！
E: Tsk, another punching bag? Fine by me! I'll kick all your butts!

C: 大家消消气，给我个面子…
E: Take it easy, everyone...

C: 这么干是有点儿不地道。
E: Can't say what you did was very ethical.

C: 老爹，我们很缺钱嘛？为什么要这么做？
E: Daddy, are we short on money? Why did you do that?

C: 算了，既然矿队的钱已经拿到了，我也没什么可抱怨的。
E: Forget about it. Since I've got the money from the mining team, I have nothing to complain about now.

C: （虎克好像在用眼神说：「到诊所外面去，虎克有话要说。」）
E: {M#Hook seems to be giving me a look like: "I wanna talk to you outside the clinic, now!"}{F#Hook seems to be giving me a look that says: "Hook wants to talk to you outside the clinic, now!"}

C: 矿脉探测器是个什么玩意？
E: What is a vein detector?

C: 看着我的拳头，再好好想想。
E: Think carefully and give your answer to my fists.

C: 啊，那家伙肯定是心虚了！会跑到哪里去呢……
E: Argh! That guy has to be guilty! Where is he running off to...

C: 要是这么想就太天真了。
E: ...Heh, that would be a naive thing to believe.

C: 那家伙是小偷，他想销赃！
E: That guy is a thief, he's trying to sell something he stole!

C: 居然有人敢挑衅我们…
E: You got some guts taunting us yourself...

C: 嘿，这时候就要轮到桑博登场了啊！
E: Hey, now this is Sampo's time to shine!

C: 会…会哭？
E: It can... cry?

C: 桑什么…根本不认识，少来碰瓷！而且你搞清楚，这是我的地盘，劝你别多管闲事！
E: Sam... who? I don't even know who that is. Don't try to blackmail me! And this is my turf, so stay out of it!

C: 啊，我明白了…你是故意找茬是吧？我看你是皮痒了！
E: Ah... I get it! You're here to pick a fight with me, aren't you?

C: 急死我了…那三件矿具…你怎么还不动身啊！
E: I'm so anxious...Those three mining tools... Why don't you do something!

C: 怪物、怪物来了！
E: Monsters!

C: …怪物似乎变得难对付了。同类的怪物以往绝对没有这么难缠……
E: ...The monsters have gotten stronger somehow. I don't remember them being this difficult...
█ ███Why█ █do you█ ██al█ways...

C: 有、有不少哩！他们在那个旧矿坑附近搭了个临时阵地……
E: Th—There are quite a few of them! They're there at the old mine shaft with a temporary camp...

C: 一定要在这种地方聊吗？
E: Why all the hush-hush?

C: 欸，好——那让我来试试吧！露营手册上相关的部分，我已经全都背下来了！
E: Sure! I can help out with the tent — I memorized that section in the camping guide.

C: …我知道啊。反正也要出来收集食材嘛，顺便的事而已。
E: ...I know. But since we were looking for food, I figured we might as well try to fix the stove.

C: 总之，危机解除——我们可以好好准备露营餐了……
E: Anyway, crisis resolved! We can now make some food...

C: 啊！我是不是给你添麻烦了？对不起……
E: Ah! Sorry, I hope this trip didn't surprise you...

C: 这个名字听起来很熟悉。
E: That name sounds familiar.
...Yes.

C: …那应该就是佩妮娅女士留下的遗物了。
E: ...it was something Madam Penya left behind.

C: 她说，等到佩拉成年，自然就能够读懂其中的内容了。
E: She said that once Pela was older, she'd be able to understand the contents.

C: 奥列格大叔捡到我以后，就把我送到了那里。我童年的一大半时间都是在孤儿院里过的。
E: After Oleg found me, he sent me there. I spent over half my childhood in that place.

C: 看上去不太好对付…
E: It looks tough...

C: 嗯…史瓦罗先生很执着。
E: Yes... Mr. Svarog is very stubborn.

C: 娜塔莎经常教我们做手工，这应该就是某个孩子的杰作了。
E: Natasha would often teach us how to make different handicrafts. This must be some kid's masterpiece.

C: 现在怎么办？
E: What should we do now?

C: 我现在就想回去了…
E: I want to go back now...

C: 要是一两句话就能说清楚，那还算什么藏宝图嘛！
E: What kind of lame treasure map would it be if it only had one or two steps!?

C: 而且，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}你看——这座餐厅虽然到处是灰尘…但设施似乎都没有老化的迹象呢。
E: Also, there's dust all over the place, but none of the equipment appears to be deteriorating.
*yawn*

C: 奥列格居然信任你…
E: Oleg put his trust in you...?

C: 在史瓦罗的眼皮底下扎营，不觉得危险吗？
E: Isn't it dangerous for them to make camp right under Svarog's metal nose?

C: 这么简单都答不上来，垃圾。多上几年学再来吧！
E: Simple question, terrible answer. It's back to school for you!

C: 桑博，这是怎么回事？
E: Sampo, what is this?

C: 我知道这座镇上有一家工坊，所以就想来找找看。需要的元件都找到了，但是却不小心撞上了怪物……
E: I knew there was a workshop in this town, so I wanted to try my luck here. I found all the components I need, but then I ran into a monster...

C: 我们不是要刻意讨好你。
E: We're not trying to win you over.

C: 多亏了他的勤勉，我才能挤出时间来打理下层区的民生，尽可能地让大家不在街头挨饿…另一方面，我也一直在筹备反抗史瓦罗的计划。
E: Thanks to him, I'm able to make time for the people. I do my best to make sure that they have everything they need... At the same time, I was formulating a plan to deal with Svarog.

C: 不用意外，说是首领，实际上不过是帮大家拿拿主意。
E: Don't be surprised. My job is just to help everyone make the right calls.

C: 嗯？这么着急？那你先说吧！
E: Huh? What's so urgent? Spit it out!

C: 和虎克一起待久了，你也变得幼稚了呢。
E: ...You've been spending too much time with Hook.

C: 去忙你们的吧，祝你们一切顺利。
E: Off you go then, and good luck.

C: 当然要参与，我再签一次！{NICKNAME}，你快打听一下探针的事！
E: Of course we'd like to bid! I'll sign again! {NICKNAME}, ask about the probe!

C: 等待拍卖会开始。
E: Let's wait for the auction to begin.

C: 真是太感谢你了，我就这么一个乖孙子，心疼都来不及。
E: Thank you both so much. He's my only grandson — and I don't know what I would've done.

C: 他过来的时候说是想买那个什么「地髓矿脉探针」，但后来不知为什么又改了主意，一个人跑回磐岩镇了。
E: He came here saying he wanted to buy the Geomarrow Probe, but then he changed his mind for some reason and ran back to Boulder Town alone.

C: 四百二十！
E: <unbreak>420</unbreak>!

C: 虎克懂了，这就是成熟的大人。但是虎克还是要好好感谢你。
E: Hook knows this is what grownups should be like, But Hook still wants to thank you.

C: 哎？老爹你给我准备了什么呀？
E: Huh? What did you get for me, daddy?

C: 这些玩偶…就是老爹卖掉了「矿脉探测器」以后才给你买的。
E: I... bought your gift with the money I got from selling the vein detector.

C: 看来小偷并不是「人」。
E: The thief doesn't appear to be a human.

C: …难道是在说：「人类，请不要伤害我」吗？
E: ...Is it trying to say: "Please don't hurt me, humans"?

C: 不过…克拉拉还想再进一步观察一下它的适应状态。做兼容性相关的测试应该需要几天…希望到时候它可以恢复正常。
E: But... I'd like to keep a closer eye on it for a while. Compatibility tests should take a few days. Hopefully, it will be all back to normal by then.

C: 机械专家希露瓦可以来帮忙！
E: I can get Serval to help us! She's an expert mechanic.

C: …这背后究竟藏着什么阴谋？！
E: Who's behind this plot!?

C: 不，克拉拉，你不必出手。让我来处理这件事即可——我会派遣机器人追捕该个体……
E: No, Clara, just leave it to me. I'll order the robots to pursue this one...

C: 不。与大多数人类的认知相反，容易被忽略的小概率事件，往往最有可能引致灾害。
E: Actually, I do. Contrary to popular belief, improbable events that are easily disregarded frequently result in catastrophes.

C: 是的，这就是克拉拉说的…基地网络的怪事。
E: Yes, that's what I was talking about... Something strange has happened.

C: 这样做的话，即使前线溃败…裂界的怪物也无法通过栈桥渗透后方。
E: That way, even if the front line were to collapse... the Fragmentum monsters wouldn't be able to make it to the other side.

C: 推测而已，不过…八九不离十吧。老弟说过，为了抵御裂界的怪物，他们不得不动用了一些极端手段。
E: Just my conjecture, but I doubt it's far from the truth. My brother mentioned that they've had to use extreme measures to repel the Fragmentum monsters.

C: 那边的卫兵说，需要「密钥」才能打开闸门。能帮个忙吗？
E: The guard over there said that I needed an "encryption key" to open the gate. Can you help me out?

C: 该说的都说了，老弟，该怎么做你自己决定吧。
E: There's nothing more to say, Gepard. The decision is yours.

C: 好啊，我还没打够呢！
E: Fine! I've still got fight in me.

C: 好小子，被你玩明白了。
E: Nice interpretation of the rules, dude.

C: 如果你们真的能阻止不断膨胀的灾难，那贝洛伯格的所有人都欠你们一份感激。
E: If you are truly able to prevent our endlessly unfolding misfortunes, then the people of Belobog are indebted to you.

C: 必须得承认，我之前对银鬃铁卫的误解太深。他们每天也在为了生存而战，跟「地火」一样。
E: I gotta admit, I had a lot of... misunderstandings... about the Silvermane Guards. They're fighting for survival here every day, just like Wildfire.

C: 它们要攻过来了！
E: Here they come!

C: 放心，你和那位茉莉小姐都不会有事的。只是以后再遇到这种事，别兜圈子——还记得我说过的吗？不要浪费时间，这对你我都有好处。
E: Don't worry, you and Molly will be fine. Just don't play silly games with me when it happens again in the future. Remember what I said? Don't waste my time!

C: 茉莉啊茉莉…我警告过你很多次了，禁区里的事，你只要睁一只眼闭一只眼就行了——只要你不蹚浑水，说不定我们还能分你一杯羹……
E: Come on, Molly! I have warned you many times to keep your mouth shut about the things in the restricted zone. You know how it goes, you scratch our backs and we will scratch yours...

C: 你有想象过自己该如何独自对抗那些恶棍吗？退一步说，就算你真打倒了那群喽啰…你有对抗他们幕后黑手的手段吗？
E: Have you really given much thought to how you could win the fight against those thugs all on your own? Let's be charitable here and assume you could beat them. What then? Are you really equipped to take on the criminal mastermind behind the scenes?

C: 希露瓦说过，星核很可能被藏在贝洛伯格北部的雪原中。想抵达那里，恐怕得先找到这座裂界迷宫的出口。
E: Serval said that the Stellaron was very likely hidden in the Snow Plains north of Belobog. If we want to get there, I'm afraid we'll have to find the exit to this Fragmentum maze first.

C: 看，前面的地上…好像有什么东西？
E: Look, up ahead on the ground... What is that?

C: 这不可能……
E: No... It can't be...

C: 我赞同，就这么说吧。
E: Agreed — let's use this version.

C: 嗐，那不是很正常吗？这地方本来就冷得离谱…嘁……
E: Isn't that normal? This place is freezing... *sneeze* Ugh...

C: 我生而愚笨…也因愚笨而死。我辜负了所有对我寄予厚望的人…我辜负了大守护者的职责和名誉。
E: I was born a fool... and died from my foolishness. I failed everyone who ever put their faith in me... I failed to uphold the duty and prestige of a Supreme Guardian.

C: 做得好，{NICKNAME}。这样一来，智库中关于寒潮前后的部分就可以填上了。
E: Good work, {NICKNAME}. And with that, we can finally have records on the time before and after the Eternal Freeze in our data bank.

C: 不需要先培训一下吗？
E: Don't I need any training?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>星槎海的航道里会经过不同颜色、不同型号的星槎。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Starskiffs of different colors and models will pass through the lanes in Starskiff Haven.</color>

C: 测速员体验…
E: Speed tester experience...

C: 星槎都有些什么型号？
E: What models are there?

C: 稍等，我还没准备好。
E: Wait, I'm not ready.

C: 没事儿，等你准备好，我们再开始。
E: No worries. We can start once you're ready.

C: …你说是就是吧。
E: ...Whatever you say.

C: 笔记上有联系方式吗？
E: Do you have any contacts on your notes?

C: 我明白了，我们先抓紧问问事故线索，再安排人手亲自把她带回医馆吧。
E: Got it. We should hurry up and ask for clues about the incident, then arrange for someone to send her back to the apothecary.

C: 谢谢你，就是这个，可不能随便丢了。对了，芦慧姑娘你见到了吗，哎…俺又给芦慧姑娘添麻烦了。
E: Thank you, there they are. I can't lose them. Oh, right, did you happen to see Ms. Luhui? *sigh* I made trouble for Ms. Luhui again.

C: 小兄弟，你就听{F#她}{M#他}的吧，我没事儿，嘿嘿嘿，不需要赔偿。
E: Little buddy, listen to {F#her}{M#him}. I'm doing fine, hehe. I don't need any compensation.

C: 这可能是那艘星槎涉及非法改装，有些人喜欢把军用级别星槎引擎改到民用星槎上，声音非常大…总之，这句证言挺有参考价值。
E: This may be because that starskiff has been illegally modified. Some people like to install military-grade starskiff engines onto civilian starskiffs, resulting in a loud sound when driving... In essence, this testimony is of great value.

C: 从左数第二艘。
E: The second one from the left.

C: 哎哟，芦慧姑娘，这一页俺就自己留下吧。
E: Ahh. Ms. Luhui, I want to keep this page to myself.

C: 两百年，对化外民来说一定很漫长吧，对我来说这也应该很漫长的，为什么我把这漫长的一切都理所当然了呢？
E: Two hundred years must be a long time for Outworlders, and it's also quite a long time for me. Why did I take everything for granted?

C: 我想拜托你去丹鼎司里取些研究资料。不会耽误你很久的，看在大家都是化外民的面子上，帮个忙吧，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}！
E: I want to ask you to go to the Alchemy Commission to pick up some research materials. It won't take too long. Please help a fellow outworlder, {F#young lady}{M#young man}!

C: 我明白了，那是丹枢大人在位时批准的请求…唉，我又忘了，现在不该称她为大人了。
E: I see. It was something Lady Dan Shu approved when she still held the post... Oh, I'm sorry. I shouldn't call her "Lady" anymore.

C: 你正在触犯仙舟的禁忌。
E: You are touching upon the Xianzhou's forbidden secrets.

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: …这能算是你自己写出来的吗？
E: ...Does this really count as having written it yourself?

C: 你好主动啊，一定是我对爱的执着打动了你是吧？呃，也有可能是报酬……
E: That's so proactive. Was it my perseverance for love that moved you to action? Hmm, I guess it could be the promise of reward, too...

C: 爸爸，你回去吧。
E: Dad, go home.

C: 「蘑菇」，接下来我要把这些玉兆里的符箓篆刻进你的脑瓜里，这样你就会写出「最美的情诗」！
E: "Mushroom," I'll engrave the talismans in these Inspo Jade Abaci into your brain so that you can write the "most beautiful love poem"!

C: 不过呢，失望而归是常态…你可能也不会顺利。
E: Still, most suitors end up being disappointed. I think you will be no exception.

C: 证据就在你的身上。
E: You already have it.

C: 现在就出发！
E: Let's go!

C: 我、我和她约在星槎海见面，她好像也有话要对我说。这一次表白我一定要成功。
E: I—I've asked her to meet me at the Starskiff Haven. She seems to have something to tell me too. I must succeed this time.

C: 今后，你无论来找我多少次，我只会不断地拒绝你。
E: No matter how many times you confess in the future, I'll just keep on rejecting you.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。就让我悲伤一会儿吧，我总会恢复过来的。
E: Thanks, {NICKNAME}. Just leave me alone here. I'll feel better after some time.

C: 你要是能帮人把东西找回来，这不就是好人好事一桩嘛。
E: It'll be a kind deed if you can find the lost item for the owner.

C: 呃，没有拿到《流云集》吗？
E: Um, haven't you found the Drifting Clouds?

C: 但也只是爱上而已，没有想过要和短生种要一生相伴。因为没等反应过来，他们就都匆匆老去了。
E: However, they were merely infatuations. Not once have I thought about their lifelong companionship. Before we could realize it, they all turned old, stolen by time.

C: 你们短生种的一生至多几十年对吧？和长生种动辄近千年的人生截然不同。
E: You only have a few decades' worth of life as a short-life individual, don't you? Your life is entirely different from us long-life individuals with lifespans regularly approaching a millennium.

C: （再这样没头脑地问下去，我在仙舟的风评要降到冰点了……）
E: (If I continue to probe, my reputation at Xianzhou would swan-dive beyond saving...)

C: 哇。
E: Wow.

C: 我还是神策府的将军呢，谁吓唬谁呀。
E: Well, I'm a general from the Seat of Divine Foresight. You can't deceive me.

C: 我就直说了，因为一些牌桌胜负的原因，我也被迫在调查「美丽狐仙聊天」…但我实在是提不起劲，要是能拒绝的话，我早就不干了。
E: I will be frank. Due to some feats on the gaming table, I was forced to investigate the Foxian Beauty Chat service... But I really can't find the motivation to start the investigation. If I could've refused it, I would've.

C: 能简单解决的问题，我绝不会让它变复杂。
E: If a problem can be solved easily, I will not complicate it no matter what.

C: 云骑军有问题？不会吧。
E: The Cloud Knights, suspicious? It can't be.

C: 你真是一个怪人，其他人可就不一定这样想了。
E: You're weird, not everyone will think like you.

C: 啊，她又来联系你了。
E: Oh, so she's contacting you.

C: 行吧，我答应了。
E: Fine, I'll help you.

C: 总之，你要是见着这些东西，请务必拍张照带给我瞧瞧。我打算把这些佐证资料加入论述报告中。当然，你也会以联名作者的名义在报告上署名。
E: Anyway, if you see any of those things, please take a picture and show it to me. I'll attach these supporting documents to my report. Of course, I'll make you the co-author.

C: 你很熟悉仙舟历史嘛。对于非专业人士来说，这也许只是一张无意义的图样罢了。但内行的人自然了解它想表达的意义。
E: You're pretty well-versed in Xianzhou history. This might be an image without any special meaning for a layperson, but a professional can surely understand its meaning.

C: 你说的…很对，{NICKNAME}。
E: You are... right, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你和陶德返回了星槎海，一路上，你们再也没有交谈。
E: Todd and you return to Starskiff Haven. None of you have spoken during the journey.

C: 是啊，不过据我了解，他们的「蜕生」是有极限的。
E: Yes. But so far as I know, their "rebirths" have a limit.

C: 你的眼神…你在怜悯我？
E: That look in your eyes... Are you pitying me?

C: 丹鼎司和药王秘传有什么关系？
