E: What's the connection between the Alchemy Commission and the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 你虽然对我很好，但却不该瞒着我。最讨厌大人说一半藏一半，要东猜西猜，太头疼哩。
E: You've been nice to me, but you shouldn't have kept me in the dark. I hate when grownups hide secrets and only tell you half the story — it's such a headache.

C: 我在这里等到了你，就意味着紫夷失手了。哦，这不是龙女么，你这是想将功补过的意思吗？
E: There you are! Ziyi clearly failed then. Oh, and if it isn't the Dragon Lady... Trying to make up for past sins, are we?

C: 我虽然医好了那家伙的病，但是接下来<unbreak>30</unbreak>年，他每天都会不受控制地打嗝！
E: I healed him... but for the next thirty years he'll hiccup uncontrollably every day.

C: 无论是按族规另选贤能，或是…或是由您重摄其位，一切都有转圜余地。
E: Whether we find another suitable candidate in accordance with the laws of our people... or have you take up the position anew — everything can still be mended.

C: 星槎已备好了，走吧。
E: The starskiff's ready. Let's go.

C: 看来持明族人很不喜欢你。
E: Looks like the Vidyadhara aren't big fans of yours.

C: （等待丹恒的回复）
E: (Wait for Dan Heng's response)

C: 如果他们的目标是我，又为何要对白露出手……
E: If I'm their target, why would they come after Bailu?

C: 不会有错的…老夫认得你的声音。哼哼。你是来圣地忏悔的么？
E: There's no mistake... This old man would recognize your voice anywhere. Hehe... Have you come to this sacred place to repent?

C: 在这一切发生之前，你有足够的时间做好准备。
E: Before any of this transpires, you have enough time to prepare.

C: 持明族人没有父母家人，诞生后，会有一位导师教导着幼年的持明掌握云吟法术、以及各种各样的生活知识。
E: The Vidyadhara have neither parents nor family members. Once born, a teacher is assigned to instruct the young Vidyadhara in the art of cloudhymn, as well as various life skills.

C: 普洱，把钱给他帕。怎么样，这下愿意把货给我了帕？
E: Pu'er, give him the money. Happy now? Ready to hand it over?

C: 你发现危险分子了？
E: Is one of them a threat?

C: 要是这样的话，地衡司早就直接去抓人了，何必找我们呢。
E: If that were the case, the Realm-Keeping Commission would have arrested him by now — why look to us for help?

C: 你们愿意相信我，我当然很欣慰。但主要问题还是，地衡司的几位，能否相信我这种妄想般的判断呢？
E: I'm glad you believe in me, truly. But the problem remains: Will the Realm-Keeping Commission trust a judgment based on this logic?

C: {NICKNAME}，你最擅长这个，交给你了。
E: {NICKNAME}, this is your forte — over to you.

C: 关键问题大概是…他是何时出去的。至少从地图上看，这片空地只有一个出入口…净砚小姐，从留存的影像里看，那天这里还有其他人出入吗？
E: The key question is... when did he leave? There's only one gate in this area, at least on the map... Miss Jingyan, does the remaining footage show anyone else entering or leaving this place?

C: 机巧鸟没拍到那两个黑衣人的清晰长相…我们先找隐书问问吧。也许她看到了什么。
E: The cycranes weren't able to get a clear look at the two people in dark clothing... Let's ask Yinshu, maybe she saw something.

C: 不明白…
E: I'm lost...

C: 没必要，不是你的错。
E: No need, you couldn't have known this would happen.

C: 赔钱做交易？
E: You think he'd spend his life savings on a bribe?

C: 对不住，习惯了。
E: Sorry, old habits.

C: 与两位无关，是我不分场合，失仪了。
E: On the contrary, I apologize for allowing my own personal matters to encroach on your time.

C: 触碰过天空的鸟，是没办法在笼中生活的。
E: Makes sense... How could a bird that's known the sky live in a cage.

C: 不，我还是觉得…我不该看。{NICKNAME}，你在这里陪着晴霓小姐吧，我在旁边等你们。
E: No, I still think... I shouldn't read it. {NICKNAME}, you stay here with Miss Qingni. I'll be waiting over there.

C: 看看又不会少块肉。
E: C'mon, we've both had a look.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: （晴霓的生母采翼是驭空一生的挚友。她在那场惨烈的战役中牺牲后，驭空收养了她的女儿。也许这段不堪回首的往事正是驭空的心结。）
E: (Qingni's birth mother, Caiyi, was Yukong's lifelong friend. When Caiyi passed away in that devastating war, Yukong adopted her daughter. Perhaps this unbearable memory is the root of Yukong's concerns...)

C: 爱情使人盲目。
E: Love is blind.

C: 被称为「命运」的东西，既看不见，也摸不着；可是，它就像所有坍塌收束的过去和现在一样确凿无疑。我呼唤你，而你来了；你拥有许许多多的选择，而一切都将你导向这里…此时此地。
E: What we call "destiny" is neither visible nor tangible, yet it is as certain as the collapsing and converging of the past and present. I called out to you, and you came. You had many choices, but everything led you here... to right here and right now.

C: 我留下来帮你。
E: I'll stay and help you.

C: （真话）我恨你。
E: (Truth) I hate you.

C: 有一天，艾利欧把你交给我。他说，如果按照他洞见的可能性继续下去，你最终会改变我，我也会改变你。
E: One day, Elio handed you over to me. He said that if things continued to transpire according to the future possibility he foresaw, you would eventually change me, and I would change you.

C: 因为我有一个想要的未来。
E: Because I have a future that I want.

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 停云小姐，魔阴身已除，但不知附近还有几多凶险。
E: Miss Tingyun, the mara-struck have been repelled, b—but there could be other dangers nearby.

C: 这是{NICKNAME}。你别理{F#她}{M#他}，这家伙每次自我介绍都要玩点花样。
E: Don't mind {F#her}{M#him}. {F#She}{M#He} likes to get a little creative with {F#her}{M#his} introductions.

C: 原来如此，感谢各位仗义相助。但小女子有一事不明：星槎海已全面封锁，恩公们并非仙舟人士，在此何干呢？
E: I see, well, thank you for coming to our aid. Although, there is one thing I don't understand: Starskiff Haven is under lockdown. Since none of you are Xianzhou residents, may I ask how you came to be here?

C: 包在本姑娘身上！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 小事小事，是要请各位恩公帮个小忙。
E: Don't worry, Miss. I have a favor to ask, that's all.

C: 怎么了？{NICKNAME}，找我有事吗？
E: What is it, {NICKNAME}? Do you need something?

C: 您来得不是时候，将军有要务在身，今天怕是见不着了。但他临行前留下了口信…丹恒先生，你可认得陛阶上的那人？
E: You came at a bad time. The General is busy with urgent work — you probably won't be able to meet with him today... but he did leave a message. Dan Heng, do you recognize the person on the steps?

C: 你带来的这位朋友「病」的可真奇怪。
E: Your friend here has a very peculiar "condition."

C: 我做了一笔交易，侥幸苟延残命。虽然眼下尚有思考的余力，但有一件事我却很清楚，我的心识已到了极限。
E: I made a deal that allowed me to retain what life I had left in me. I may be sane, but one thing is certain — my mind is already at its limit...

C: 该是送我启程去虚陵的时候了，景元。
E: Jing Yuan, is it not time you sent me to the Xuling?

C: 我此番回到罗浮，是为了向联盟自首，直面过往的罪愆。
E: I returned to the Luofu so I could surrender myself to the Alliance and atone for my sins.

C: 只是…我身为嫌犯，理应披枷戴械，在幽囚狱中受审。将军将我带入此地，真的合适吗？
E: ...but as a suspect, shouldn't I be bound and interrogated in The Shackling Prison? Is it really appropriate to bring me to a place like this, General?

C: 粉色头发的美少女…
E: A certain cute pink-haired girl...

C: 关于信的事情，相信由她来解释比较稳妥。
E: I think it'll be easier if she explains the letter to you.

C: 你是指其中的药物实验？
E: Are you talking about the pharmacological experiment mentioned in the letter?

C: 行啊，走呗。
E: Sure, let's go.

C: 回到你的问题，药王能「治愈」你们短生种的衰老、病痛和死亡，就像祂对仙舟人所做的那样。
E: To return to your question, Sanctus Medicus can cure the aging that short-life species face, along with disease and death. Sanctus Medicus can do for you what THEY did for the Xianzhou natives.

C: 那么，事关神策府机密，我也不多问了。这个邮包就交给你吧。
E: When it comes to classified matters concerning the Seat of Divine Foresight, it's best I keep my questions to myself. Here's the package.

C: 过奖了。
E: You're too kind.

C: 我还想变得更强。
E: I want to become even stronger.

C: 我也不知道…
E: I'm not sure...

C: 这样做的好处就是，即使长乐天的组织被猎狗们一锅端了，其他地区的兄弟姐妹也不会受到波及。
E: The benefit is that even if our enemies were to wipe out the Exalting Sanctum branch, it wouldn't affect our brothers and sisters in other areas.

C: 慈怀药王赐予了我敏锐的感官，任何事都逃不过我的眼睛。你这种可笑可耻可悲的凡人是不会懂的。
E: Merciful Medicus has sharpened my senses — nothing gets past me. A pathetic mortal like you could never understand.

C: 而且，凭我浅薄的学识来看，这东西其他丹士应该也看不太明白…能搞清楚这玩意儿药理的人，只有一个……
E: Based on what little I do know, I doubt the other alchemists will be able to understand it either... I think there's only one person who could grasp this kind of pharmacology...

C: 丹鼎司…一起去吧。
E: The Alchemy Commission... Let's go together.

C: 很遗憾，在我被打捞上来不久，那块冰就化得不见踪影了。
E: It melted away not long after I was rescued.

C: 虽然这段经历已明显失真了，但构成它的素材却是取自于你的记忆，不会骗人的。也就是说，在你的潜意识中，认为本座说的那些话…和绕口令差不多。
E: Despite the obvious distortions in this experience, the base materials from which it is composed are taken from your actual memory — there is no falsehood here. In other words, your subconscious mind thinks that I... talk in tongue-twisters.

C: 哈哈哈…主要是，平时听太卜的高论，确实听不太懂嘛……
E: Hahaha... Uh, — it's mainly just that I, uh... can't always comprehend the... lofty ideals and, uh... principles you discuss...

C: 这分明就是你潜意识里对将军的偏见……
E: This is clearly your subconscious projecting onto the general...

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 您一定是来体验那枚梦泡的，我已做好准备。请注意，虽然鄙店的商品均已通过「<unbreak>027</unbreak>号-欠损费勒斯」和「<unbreak>076</unbreak>号-实在界荒原」两项安全协议检验……
E: You must be here to experience those dream bubbles. I've already made the necessary preparations. Be careful, though — we did pass the safety inspections stipulated by "Article <unbreak>027</unbreak>-Damaged Faris" and "Article <unbreak>076</unbreak>-Real Wasteland..."

C: 还是有点不放心…
E: I'm not so sure about this...

C: 还好奇吗？
E: Are you still curious?

C: 是吗？我一向是不会看走眼的。
E: Oh, really? But I never guess wrong.

C: 同时它也是选拔君主的剑，据说卡勒瓦拉的先民国王们都曾得到这把宝剑的回应，因而拥有了称王的资格。
E: It also has the power to choose monarchs. All the ancient kings of Kalevala received a sign from the sword, showing they were worthy to rule the land.

C: 我只是感觉你对魔剑过于执着…
E: Well, I just feel like you're too obsessed with cursed swords...

C: 这把剑可能会夺人心智。
E: Because the sword can take over the wielder's mind.

C: 够了！{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，我要严正声明，在卡勒瓦拉，这柄剑的地位向来都是无比崇高的！
E: That's enough, {F#young lady}{M#young man}! Let me get something straight: On Kalevala, this sword has always been highly revered!

C: 是了，你昨日发来消息后，老夫特地去武库查验了一番。
E: Yes, I received your message yesterday and went to the arsenal to check on it.

C: …我、我只在传说中听过「米卡•奇瓦沙」会飞，那退一万步讲，那位纯美骑士为什么要这么做？
E: I... I've only heard about the Miekka Kivessä being able to fly in legends. But even if it could fly, why would the Knight of Beauty do this?

C: 卡勒瓦拉人的历代君王视我为天赋王权的标志，他们你争我夺，为了得到我发动战争。
E: Countless monarchs of Kalevala saw me as a symbol of kingship endowed by nature, and they waged wars in order to possess me.

C: 这能说明什么？
E: What does that mean?

C: 我不清楚。但我知道，那位护送宝剑的纯美骑士，在他走过的地方总会留下一地难以打扫干净的玫瑰花瓣。
E: I don't know, but I do know that wherever that Knight of Beauty goes, he always leaves behind a trail of rose petals that's almost impossible to clean up.

C: 「忆庭的忆者，我注意你很久了。」
E: "Memokeeper of the Garden of Recollection: I've been watching you for quite some time."

C: 那人没带走凶器，大概是在向我们挑衅吧…太可恨了。
E: They didn't even take the weapon with them. Sounds like they're trying to provoke us... Despicable.

C: 黑天鹅大人，请容我向您介绍本案的三名嫌疑人——佐罗、钟珊和阿佑。
E: Lady Black Swan, please allow me to introduce the three suspects to you — Lefton, Zhongshan, and Wright.

C: 最后是阿佑，这家伙贪得无厌，好不容易逃出生天，竟打算私吞剩下的货物，谎称是被山贼全部抢走了…佐罗和钟珊气不过，就<color=#dbc291ff>把他的腿打断了</color>。
E: Last of all comes Wright. This guy was so insatiably greedy that he still came back to try and embezzle the rest of the supplies after they narrowly escaped with their lives, lying about how the gang had taken off with everything... Lefton and Zhongshan were so incensed that they <color=#dbc291ff>broke his legs</color>.

C: 黑天鹅警探，档案室在这边。您可以向我了解更多有关嫌疑人的信息。相信您一定可以拨开迷雾，找到杀害花火大人的凶手。
E: Detective Black Swan, the dossiers are over here. You can learn more about the suspects from me. I trust you will be able to cut through the hogwash and find out who Miss Sparkle's killer is.

C: 看来和第一案一样，现场只有这两件证物。剩下的…又给她藏里面了吧？
E: So it's just like the first case, then — only two pieces of evidence. The rest... hidden inside her memories again, right?

C: 我一听就知道，这肯定是出事了！于是当机立断，撞破大门冲进了房间……
E: As soon as I heard, I knew something must have happened! So I acted decisively and broke the door down to get inside...

C: 这「钟珊」是个赌棍，之前和花火大人玩捞金鱼，连传家宝都被赢走了。
E: This guy Zhongshan is a card shark who used to play "Get the Koi" with Miss Sparkle. He gambled away his entire family fortune.

C: 噢，只是简简单单，放之四海皆灵的一个字：「请」。
E: *sigh* The universal one: "please."

C: 我可是费尽心机，才调到书库这样不显山露水，可以上班摸鱼的好地方。
E: Ugh, I worked so hard on getting transferred to the repository — it's the best place to slack off and be invisible.

C: 现下卡芙卡无意开口，星核猎手的意图不明，仍需要倚仗太卜司的力量廓清真相。
E: At present, Kafka has no intention of speaking and the Stellaron Hunters' motives remain unknown. We must rely on the power of the Divination Commission to unearth the truth.

C: 哈，怎么可能？那不是我们的愿望。
E: Ha, are you kidding? That's not what we want.

C: 第三种办法是什么？
E: What about the third way?

C: 事不宜迟，我们该出发了。
E: Let's delay no longer. We should be moving.

C: 动手便动手，为何将这些陪伴老夫的小物捶得稀烂啊——赔给我！
E: Did you really have to destroy my little friends? I want compensation!

C: 就你？你有什么恶名可以让反物质军团不远万里来挖人？
E: Ha, you think the Antimatter Legion would come all this way for you? You're a goody two shoes.

C: 所有人，所有事物都像是笼罩在漆黑的炭火里，看不见却能灼伤你。
E: Everyone, everything is like a hot coal in the dark — invisible, yet still able to burn you.

C: （怎么回事？这儿不是神策府吗？神策府怎么会出现这么多魔阴身……）
E: (What's happening? Isn't this the Seat of Divine Foresight? Why are there so many mara-struck here...)

C: 丹枢带着她的「兄弟姐妹」消失在了道路的尽头。
E: Dan Shu and her "brethren" disappear at the end of the street.

C: 在下已说过，那只是送给你的一份礼物。
E: A lie, yes, but also a gift.

C: （大把的红色毛发…上面还沾着血迹……看来，那些小羊毫不意外地遭遇了意外。）
E: (A huge tuft of red fur... with blood stains... It seems to be that the sheep have suffered a mishap.)

C: 不过这「三大善人」脾气都很倔，认定了自己的道路，轻易是不会改变的。
E: But the Three Benevolent Ones are very stubborn. Once they have decided to do something, hardly anything can change their minds.

C: 唉…原本放生法乌努斯红毛羊也是这个意图，谁曾想，这种羊就这样在鳞渊境灭绝了！
E: Alas... it was for this reason that I released the Faunus Red Sheep into Scalegorge Waterscape. Little did I know that I was sending them to their demise!

C: 食人花？
E: A man-eating plant?

C: 还有那个冬妮娅，就这家伙最气人了…要不是她执着于放什么「猛兽」，你们怎么会找来这些会爆炸的机械宝宝？
E: Tonya is the worst... If she hadn't insisted on releasing beasts, you wouldn't have brought those explosive mechanical things here!

C: 可地衡司说他们被人缴了保释金带走了，我哪儿也找不见，发消息也不回，就好像人间蒸发了一样。
E: But those at the Realm-Keeping Commission said they had been taken away on bail. They were nowhere to be seen, and they didn't reply to any of my messages. It was as though they had vanished into thin air.

C: 对了，你的那个朋友，说在这儿也给我留了一份礼物。让我瞧瞧是什么……
E: By the way, that friend of yours also left me a gift here. Let me see what it is...

C: （这条路…我刚刚应该走过了。）
E: (Wasn't I... just here a moment ago?)

C: 谢谢判官大人救我一命…
E: Thanks for saving me, Your Honor...

C: 可…可是……
E: But...

C: 这其中一定有阴谋…呃，我是说，有鬼！
E: There has to be a conspiracy... Uh, I mean — ghosts!

C: 站住！
E: Halt!

C: 所以，尾巴也很危险？
E: So, Tail is dangerous, too?

C: 令人头疼的是，岁阳并非血肉凡物，难以灭去。所以在修复「造化洪炉」前，十王司打算在这座废园里立起「束形却邪阵」，囚缚这些妖物。
E: Regrettably, heliobi are not flesh-and-blood, and so they are difficult to destroy. Before the restoration of the Creation Furnace, the Ten-Lords Commission plans to set up an "Evil Binding Matrix" in this abandoned garden to imprison these abominations.

C: 嘻嘻，打得不错。不过刚才那一场酣战，你的求生欲被激发起来咯。
E: Hehe, you fought well... you were fighting for your survival, after all...

C: （哈？从生命分类的角度来看，你更接近这个词呢~）
E: (Beast? From a taxonomic perspective, I believe you're closer to that definition...)

C: 自由个屁！老子的活动半径就这么点大，你不会管这叫「自由移动」吧？
E: Roam free!? Is that what you call this? This is as far as I can get from her.

C: 一点点嫉妒，嫉妒有形之物浓烈的情感；一点点好斗，想看看火焰和血肉孰强孰弱；还有一丝丝渴望，渴望拥有你们的肉身，去吃，去杀，去爱，去恨。
E: ...there's a pinch of envy — envy towards the potent emotions you corporeal beings have. Then there's a dash of aggression — the desire to see whether the heliobi or bodies of flesh and blood are stronger. Lastly, there's a drizzle of desire. We desire to possess your physical bodies, so we can eat, kill, love, and hate.

C: 我们再去调查下另一面镜子吧。
E: Let's go look at the next mirror.

C: 藿藿为什么能当十王司判官？
E: How did Huohuo manage to become a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 怕啥，这不是正巧吗？走，我们进去看看。
E: Less screaming, more thinking — this is an opportunity, is it not? Let's go in and check it out.

C: 只要在梦境里喝下它，她就能暂时忘记那些烦恼，并压制住那些负面情绪，正常投入工作和生活中。
E: Drink it within the Dreamscape and she will temporarily forget her troubles and suppress those negative emotions, allowing her to properly focus on her work and lead a normal life.

C: 我明白了，那我就把「特调」交给您，由您来转交给柯柯娜女士吧。
E: I understand. I'll give the special drink to you then. Please deliver it to Miss Cocona.

C: （但总觉得还有什么地方不太对劲…再和她聊聊看吧。）
E: (But I still feel like something's off... Better chat with her some more.)

C: 弹奏一串和弦。
E: Play a string of chords.

C: 但我们神秘的娜娜、美丽的娜娜、聪明的娜娜肯定和我不一样…让我来猜猜，娜娜是不是想成为一名歌手？
E: But our mysterious Cocona, beautiful Cocona, smart Cocona, she's definitely different from me... Let me guess, you want to become a singer?

C: 我看到了…那朵玫瑰开了。
E: I can see it... That rose has bloomed.

C: 啊…原来是老客户啊，十分抱歉。
E: Ah... An old customer. I'm truly sorry.

C: 我不允许有人诋毁他。
E: I will not allow anyone to slander his name!

C: 当然可以，您的朋友叫什么名字？
E: Of course. What is your friend's name?

C: 「我给你五分钟时间，带着你的废纸滚下我的船。告诉公司的董事，第六舰队总有一天会光顾庇尔波因特……」
E: "I will give you five minutes to take your paper scraps and get lost back to your ship. Tell the IPC directors, the Sixth Fleet shall visit Pier Point one day..."

C: 莱斯利•迪恩已经落魄到付不起房费了吗？你并不意外，毕竟过气明星破产的新闻几乎每天都会在星际和平播报中出现……
E: Is Lesley Dean's situation already so dire that he can no longer afford the room fee? This would not be surprising, as news about stars going bankrupt pops up in the Interastral Peace Broadcast almost daily...

C: 该怎么做，你有想法吗？
E: What do you think we should do?

C: 电视中播放着莱斯利•迪恩接受某个著名的脱口秀主播采访的片段。
E: There is a clip of Lesley Dean being interviewed by a famous talk show host playing on the television.

C: 但它们都是我的一部分，我不避讳它们的存在。我希望每个人的不完美都能够被理解…毕竟每天生活在放大镜之下，是会被聚焦的日光燃烧殆尽的。
E: But, they are all a part of me. I cannot shy away from their existence. I hope that everyone's imperfections can be understood... After all, if we live under a magnifying glass every day, sooner or later we will be incinerated by the rays of the sun.

C: 戳破幻想。
E: Destroy the fantasy.

C: 戳破幻想。
E: Destroy the fantasy.

C: 我绝对、绝对无法饶恕做出那种选择的自己。所以，芙洛拉——在你解开那个束缚自己的心结之前，我是绝对不会离开的。
E: I would never forgive the version of myself that would do this. So, Flora... I will not leave until you unravel the knot that is consuming you from within.

C: 就在刚才，有那么一个瞬间…我突然觉得，之前一直困扰着我的问题似乎没那么重要了。
E: There was a moment just now... I suddenly felt like all of the problems that had been bothering me before were no longer important.

C: 怎么回事？莱斯利先生，上一秒还站在这里…然后「倏」地一下就消失了？
E: What's going on? Mr. Lesley was just standing here just a second ago... Then he just suddenly disappeared?

C: 您的选择是？
E: Who will you choose?

C: 细节决定成败，请船长放心，我早就做好预案了，我保证这会让空艇的服务质量再上一层！
E: Details decide success or failure. Don't worry, captain, I've already prepared a draft proposal. I guarantee this will elevate the airship's service quality to new heights!

C: 而且…光有这些还是不够的，您还是太低调啦。身为新任船长，有些地方的必须亮出您的招牌才行呢。
E: And... these meager changes aren't enough. You're still not broadcasting yourself well. As the new captain, there are some areas that require flying your banner, so to speak.

C: 罗莎捧着你的画像，将它稳稳当当地挂在墙壁上。
E: Rosa steadily hangs your portrait on the wall.

C: 船长这模样真俊。
E: The captain is so cool.

C: 很抱歉，空艇的名字要被用作商业宣传，直接采用您的形象和姓名恐怕会有不小的风险。此事请恕我反对。
E: I'm sorry. The airship's name will be used for commercial purposes. If we use your image and name directly, it poses too much of a risk. I'll have to reject that proposal, and beg your understanding.

C: 此处平时人来人往，但凡登上空艇，无论去哪儿，这里都是必经之路。
E: It's usually bustling here. Once you board the airship, you'll have to pass by here no matter where you're going.

C: 什么项？这是什么时髦的新词吗？抱歉我没听懂，但您的意思应该是同意吧？
E: Sorry, my ears must be failing me. You agree to my request, then?

C: 呃…我没太明白您的意思，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}…介意展开解释一下吗？
E: Err... I'm not sure I get what you mean, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... Would you mind elaborating on that a little?

C: 更重要的是，它威胁到了你这个大堂经理的地位——它令你的存在形若虚设。
E: More importantly, it threatens your place as a lobby manager — it renders your presence and existence redundant.

C: 呃…您还好吗？有需要的话，我可以帮您呼叫护理师……
E: Er... Are you okay? If you want, I can call a nurse for you...

C: 呃…好吧，没关系，您开心就好。一会儿我们再把电源接上就是了。
E: Er... Okay, that's fine. As long as you're happy. We'll just plug it back in later.

C: …欸？您说真的？
E: ...Huh? For real?

C: 与此同时，你被迷醉的神经也突破了*诗性的极点*，一串锦心绣腹的词句从你口中连珠而出——
E: Despite the discomfort, your intoxicated nerves reach the poetic summit, and a string of exceptionally beautiful words effortlessly pours forth from your lips...

C: 呃…但这里不是您管事吗？我看周围也没有别的员工，自动服务终端好像也宕机了……
E: Er... but aren't you the supervisor around here? I don't see any other staff around, and the auto service terminals are all dead...

C: ——罗伊罗伊•布奇布嘎•巴登豪威尔。
E: ...Royroy Bougiebooga Baden-Powell.

C: 根据你有限的认知，为了客人的人身和财产安全着想，在大部分文明世界，想在正规酒店寻人都需要出示有效的证件信息表明身份。
E: Based on your limited understanding, among most civilizations — for the personal safety of the guest and their property — if you want to find someone at a hotel, it's customary to show a valid form of ID.

C: 我相信你，{NICKNAME}。你有很强的同理心，哪怕不依赖同谐的力量也能与他人感同身受。
E: I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. You have a strong sense of empathy that enables you to relate to others even without relying on the power of Harmony.

C: 你要去哪里？
E: Where are you going?

C: 怎、怎么可能！怎么又让{F#她}{M#他}给胡了？！
E: H—how is this even possible! Why does {F#she}{M#he} keep winning!?

C: 勇于亮剑，谱写神章！
E: Brave and relentless, a divine chapter profound!

C: 你懂不懂老罗浮人喜欢喝什么呀？肯定是「苏打豆汁儿」啊！
E: Do you not know the people of the Luofu by now? Of course it's mung bean soda!

C: 真的吗？这把剑可是你在演武仪典竞锋得胜的证明啊……一想到之前拿走了你的剑，我都有些过意不去了。
E: Really? This sword is your proof of victory in the Wardance... Now I feel bad about taking your sword before.

C: 没关系，正好彦卿打算向列车组送别，正好也是太卜大人的接风洗尘。咱们也一起拍张合照，这才是算完整。
E: It's okay! Yanqing was planning to say their farewells to the Crew, so he could be your welcoming party, too! We have to take a group picture together first though!

C: 你可算来了！
E: You're here!

C: 贪生怕死才是正确的。
E: Fear of death is pretty normal.

C: 就是这份设计稿了！
E: That's the one!

C: 感觉没有什么必要。
E: That doesn't seem necessary.

C: 走吧，我们去看星槎！
E: Let's go. We'll go look at some starskiffs!

C: 可惜，莱恩老师天才而短暂的一生还没能将最后的想法实现，我只觉得很遗憾，我想实现他最后的梦想，我想让师傅在仙舟历史上留下痕迹。
E: It's a shame that Master Ryan's brilliant but short life didn't allow him to see his final ideas come to fruition. I feel really sad about it. I want to make his last dream a reality and leave a mark for him in the history of Xianzhou.

C: 我猜，我也逃不开带路的差事的对吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: I guess... I can't escape the work of being a guide, huh, {NICKNAME}?

C: 嗯，成型的星槎是看不到核心部分的。一方面是在后续阶段，星槎种子会生发出细致且复杂的「根系」，这是星槎内植的玉兆网络。
E: Mmm, you can't actually see the core part of a starskiff that has taken form. For one thing, the starskiff seeds develop a detailed and complex root system during subsequent phases, which also acts as the internal jade abacus network aboard each starskiff.

C: 我要趁现在，就趁着「师傅的梦想」留有余温时，我一定要做到它。
E: I gotta do this when this dream of my master has not completely faded away in my mind. I have to finish it for him.

C: 自动生产系统真好啊！为什么太卜司还需要咱们这么辛苦工作呢？
E: Yep. And the way they are automatically produced is so awesome! Why does the Divination Commission still need us to work so hard for them?

C: 你想的也太多了嘛。
E: You're overthinking this.

C: 不如把它当成武器，推荐给云骑？
E: Shall we pitch this to the Cloud Knights as a weapon?

C: 老夫要说的第一件事儿，就是这套系统跟金人完全不匹配，这是星槎上的系统对吧？
E: The first thing I'd like to point out is the incompatibility of the system with the aurumaton. The system belongs to the starskiff, doesn't it?

C: …我不行的，只有莱恩老师本人才能完成这份设计稿，我不行的。
E: ...I can't. Only Master Ryan himself can complete his manuscript, not me.

C: 本座在此候你们多时了。
E: I've been waiting for you here for a long time.

C: 你是将军的贵客，是与咱们仙舟结缔盟谊的好帮手…咳，好朋友。把判官大人的活儿托付给你，本座很放心。
E: You're an honored guest of the general and a great helper — ahem, friend — of Xianzhou. I have no problem entrusting you with the work of the judge.

C: 我记得，我将它放在抽屉的最深处。
E: I remember putting it deep in the drawer.

C: 手稿你带着吗？我来给你指出问题在哪儿。
E: Do you have the manuscript with you? I'll show you the errors.

C: 一开始的时候，是觉得设计师画出干净的设计稿很帅气，自己也想画出这样的设计稿…结果这些年，画倒是越画越好看，但是设计却完全没设计。
E: At first, I thought it was cool to be able to come up with a well-drawn design, so I was inspired to do the same... In the end, I only became better at drawing without creating my own design.

C: 你的梦想是你的梦想，我的梦想是我的梦想，你帮我实现了梦想，我也没能实现梦想……
E: My dream only belongs to me. Even if someone helps me realize it, it isn't the same as doing it myself.

C: 呃…唔……
E: Ugh... I...

C: 为什么非要和史瓦罗打不可？
E: Why did you insist on fighting Svarog?

C: 放松点，哥们！我答应你的事一定说到做到，犯不着紧张成这样。
E: Relax, bro! I'm a man of my word. No need to stress out.

C: …欸，你们怎么愣住了？倒是发表下看法啊。
E: ...Hey, why are you both looking at me like that? Say something.

C: 哔——啵。卡西迪。小飞。卡西迪。
E: Beep... boop. Cassidy. Little Fay. Cassidy.

C: 呃，这事要不晚点再说……
E: Um, maybe we can talk about that later...

C: 看！那边的家伙，鬼鬼祟祟的——
E: Look! That fella over there is acting pretty shifty.

C: 嗯？怎么了？
E: Hmm? What's up?

C: 必须让你…看到……
E: I must... show you...

C: 结果皆大欢喜！小伙伴们鼓起了掌，受苦的人们也得到了解放。
E: So, it'll be a happy ending! My friends will clap, and all the people suffering will be free.

C: 我希望…我相信，卢卡哥哥一定会支持我到最后的，对吗？
E: I hope... No, I believe Mister Luka will support me till the end, right?

C: 这小鬼……
E: Up to no good...

C: 指使卢卡的一定就是虎克！
E: So Hook was the mastermind behind all of this!

C: 求求你别乌鸦嘴了…
E: Oh, come on, don't jinx us...

C: 这些狼首怪物，唤作步离人，是与仙舟长久为敌的丰饶孽物。
E: Those werewolf monsters are known as "borisin." They are Abominations of Abundance, and we've been fighting them for a very long time.

C: 长久以来，步离人势力众多，血腥掠夺和奴役着众多世界，其祸害比起寰宇虫灾也不遑多让。三十年前，联盟还曾和他们大战一场。
E: The borisin have been a powerful force for a long time, plundering and enslaving many worlds. The threat they pose is just as terrible as the Swarm Disaster, and the Alliance even had a fierce war with them three decades ago.

C: 见过老将军。
E: Glad to meet you, General.

C: 只是来观礼的游客。
E: I'm just a tourist attending the ceremony.

C: 我还有自己的事呢。再说了，彦卿小弟好像不太乐意。
E: I have some things to do. Besides, little Yanqing doesn't seem too happy about me tagging along.

C: 他们是为了罗浮建木灾异一事前来问责的吧。
E: Maybe they've come to hold Jing Yuan accountable for the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis?

C: 我也不是没和你们天舶司打过交道，你们那刁难人的行事作风我早就习惯了。
E: You know what? This isn't my first time dealing with the Sky-Faring Commission, I can handle your unreasonable ways.

C: …少套近乎！要不是我打不过你，非给你两拳不可！你们到底解决不解决问题？还是想让这小丑在这儿继续丢人现眼？
E: ...Stop pretending we're friends! If I could actually beat you, I'd punch you in the face! So, are you guys going to resolve this problem? Or are you just going to let this clown put on a show here?

C: 算你识时务。
E: At least you've wised up for once.

C: 年轻人，真是冲动。
E: Oh, to be young and at the whim of impulse.

C: 斩除孽物？啧，真没意思。
E: Clearing out some abominations? Meh, sounds boring.

C: 打从药王秘传覆灭后，他们豢养研究的孽物也被遗落在此，盘踞滋生。
E: Ever since the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were eradicated, their experimental abominations have been festering here.

C: 我明白了，感谢丹恒老师的指点！今日之事算是告一段落，我家将军想请各位来神策府中小坐，说是有要事相商。
E: I see. Thanks for the advice, Master Dan Heng! By the way, now that today's events are over, General Jing Yuan wants to invite all of you to the Seat of Divine Foresight. He has something important to discuss.

C: 虽然你们俩都有不会输给对方的自信。但擂台之事总是一胜一负，难免伤了和气。老朽有个想法——
E: While you both seem confident that you'll win, you need to remember there can only be one winner and one loser in the ring, which could lead to hard feelings. Actually, I have an idea...

C: 那个名字古怪、脾气也很古怪的医士…叫什么来着？我只记得他名字里沾个葱姜蒜什么的…
E: That healer with the odd name and peculiar temperament... What was his name again? Was it Pichu? Or Kaqiu?...

C: 快讲讲！
E: Tell me more!

C: 你察觉到这个身着云骑甲胄的死者似乎并非普通的狐人，他的身躯似乎经历过剧烈的变形——来不及缩回的鬣毛布满了脖颈。
E: The corpse in a Cloud Knight's armor catches your attention. They do not seem to be your average foxian, for one. This body looks like it underwent a drastic shapeshifting, one that failed to conceal the guard hairs around their neck.

C: 彦卿师父在上~
E: It's an honor to learn from you, Master Yanqing!

C: 没想到吧云璃？
E: Bet you didn't see that coming, did you, Yunli?

C: 噗…
E: Hahaha...

C: 末度大人说，一旦接应完成，弟兄们搭上货船离开这儿。
E: Lord Mok Tok said that as soon as we're done, we're to board the freight skiff and leave this place.

C: 这些家伙根本不是狐人。他们只是露出了原形。这些家伙是货真价实的步离人，和我在公司那艘舰船上击败的劫匪是同一群害虫。
E: They're not foxians at all. They revealed their true form. They're borisin, just like the bandits I defeated on the IPC ship.

C: 他们还有着官方身份。天舶司、工造司、还有…云骑军？
E: They even have official IDs for the Sky-Faring Commission, the Artisanship Commission, and... even the Cloud Knights?

C: 照你的话讲，我是连问都不能问了。问就是内斗，这托词倒是和来无影去无踪的幻胧一样好用。
E: So, I'm not even allowed to ask questions? Asking questions is considered sowing discord now? Well, that's convenient for you, just like Phantylia vanishing without a trace.

C: 景元将军心知肚明。只是你不愿做这坏人，那便由我代劳——建木一事仍需要十王司一锤定音，压服众声。
E: General Jing Yuan, you already know what has to be done, but since you don't want to be the bad guy, I'll take care of it for you. You need the final word from the Ten-Lords Commission to quell any doubts.

C: 我也一样。
E: Me too.

C: 这就出发吧。
E: Let's get going.

C: 双方一同被锁死在这里。
E: Both we and the intruders get trapped inside this prison.

C: 作为曜青人，我们的一生都在追寻为有价值的事情献身。
E: As a person of the Yaoqing, I've always searched for something meaningful to give my life to.

C: 不知幽囚狱那边的情况如何？
E: What is the situation at The Shackling Prison?

C: 曜青仙舟的使者中有一人生死不明，应当是遭到了步离人的劫持。
E: We've lost contact with one of the messengers from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. The borisin have likely taken him hostage.

C: 这就是「权衡」，也是不得不做的一步。仙舟联盟不是只有仙舟人的一言堂。狐人，持明，仙舟人三族共盟，方有未来。
E: That was a necessary trade-off. The Xianzhou Alliance is not solely about the Xianzhou natives. Only when all three races — Foxian, Vidyadhara, and Xianzhou natives — form an alliance will there be a promising future for all.

C: 自我来到罗浮，龙师一再向我邀约会晤。我要将这些魔阴身的遗骸，以及幽囚狱犯人逃亡的路线图送去龙师的府邸，然后邀请他们在鳞渊境和我见上一面。
E: The Preceptors have been inviting me for a personal meeting since my arrival on the Luofu. Now, I'll send them the remains of these mara-struck soldiers and the route map I found in the prisoner's possession. Then, I'll ask them to meet me at Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: …你说什么？
E: ...Wait, what did you just say?

C: 末度，你什么时候听过头狼会服从幼崽的命令？
E: Would an alpha wolf ever listen to a cub, Mok Tok?

C: 还不行，我这儿的小船根本无法逃离仙舟，只有迴星港那儿的舰船才有机会冲破玉界门。末度说会有内应来接我们，可我根本没收到回音。
E: Not yet. There's no way for this tiny ship to escape from the Xianzhou. Only the starships at Stargazer Navalia can break through the Jade Gate. Mok Tok said there would be insiders to pick us up, but I haven't heard anything yet.

C: 没错，为此，我们必须一击得手，不然，局势将会变得不可收拾。
E: Exactly. That's why we must succeed in our first strike, or the situation will spiral out of control.

C: 你们应该听说过兵法中「围三阙一，网开一面」的战术吧？任猎物疯狂逃窜可不行。好猎人要做足准备，在最合适的位置等待猎物上门。
E: You've heard of this military tactic, right? When you surround your enemy, leave one side open for them to escape. A skilled hunter must be well-prepared, waiting for the prey at the most advantageous position.

C: 你还记得我说过云骑军封锁了消息，并尽量使一切维持原状吗？这意味着，他们不应该封锁迴星港。
E: Remember when I mentioned that the Cloud Knights blocked all relevant news, to make it seem as if nothing happened? Stargazer Navalia is not under lockdown.

C: 快撤！将消息带给末度大人！
E: Run! Tell Lord Mok Tok about this!

C: 这些日子我苦练剑术，也该上场证明一下自己了。咱们走。
E: I've trained hard in the art of swordplay over these few days. It's time for me to get in the ring and prove myself. Let's go.

C: 至少下一次虚张声势的时候，底气一定要足。
E: Next time you try to bluff like that, at least make it convincing.

C: 这样才算是相对的公平较量嘛，毕竟为师也不想看你输在别人手里。
E: That's the only way to ensure that we have a fair fight, don't you think? I don't want to see you go and lose to someone else, after all.

C: 撑住，我马上就到！
E: Hold them back, I will be there immediately!

C: 别得意…
E: Don't think you've won...

C: 演武仪典即将召开\n\n竞锋舰
E: The Wardance is about to commence\n\nSkysplitter

C: 那艘星槎会从选手用的停船港登舰，需要在下为您带路吗？
E: The starskiff is using the contestant docking bay. Would you like me to lead the way?

C: 在进入第一场擂赛前，赛事组委会隆重向各位介绍银河著名主持人——叽米先生，作为嘉宾主持来到现场！
E: Before we get the first round under way, our organizing committee would like to introduce you all to a host known throughout the cosmos — Mr. Owlbert! He is here today as our special guest host!

C: 考虑到步离人在罗浮上有内应，我会负责前去施加压力，令内应们疲于自保。
E: Given that the borisin already have insiders on the Luofu, I will be in charge of putting pressure on them, making them focus solely on keeping themselves safe.

C: 你的爪牙早就磨钝了！
E: Your fangs and claws have grown dull!

C: 但这些，不过是…幻影罢了。
E: Yet, all of this is nothing but a... phantom.

C: 我…一切还好。谢谢几位把我救了回来。
E: I... I'm fine. Thank you for rescuing me.

C: 你们的彦卿师父就没有那么幸运了，估计现在还躺着吧……
E: Your Master Yanqing wasn't as lucky. He's probably still in bed...

C: 见过见过，之前他确实是来这喝酒来着。后来喝多了，说要「在伟大的匹诺康尼推销伟大的音乐」，就唱着歌跑出去了。我们…嘿嘿，就没去管他。
E: Oh, indeed I have. He stopped by to have a drink. He later got drunk and said he wanted to "promote profound music on the profound planet of Penacony," and ran out while singing a tune. We... Heheh, left him alone.

C: 她真是皇帝？
E: She's really the Emperor?

C: 走上街头，多去做些好事吧，你总会遇到能发挥自己才能的舞台。
E: Head out there and do some good. You'll definitely find an avenue for your talents.

C: 朕想想，你比较擅长打架的话…有什么比较适合你的好事可以做吗…啊，还真有，朕最近一直遇到一伙人……
E: Let me think. If you're good at fighting... Are there any good deeds that are more suited to you? Oh, there is! I've always been running into this group of people...

C: 尝试洞察她的内心。
E: Try reading her inner thoughts.

C: 嗯？发生什么事了…我感觉……
E: Huh? What's going on... I feel...

C: 暴力只会形成循环，朕本不想如此。但事到如今，朕也必须降下天威了。
E: Violence only begets violence. I do not wish for this to come to pass. But seeing as how things have transpired, I must dish out divine justice.

C: 朕真是越想越生气。朕到底做错了什么，要被刁民苦苦相逼？
E: I get angrier the more I think about it. What wrong exactly have I done, that I am relentlessly hounded by these scoundrels?

C: 朕只记得自己是个皇帝，在匹诺康尼统御万民…可朕来自哪里？从何时开始做的皇帝？朕…的确不记得了……
E: I only remember I am an emperor, governing the citizens of Penacony... But where did I come from? When did I become Emperor? I... truly can't remember...

C: 你也太天真了…
E: You're really too naive...

C: 朕用<unbreak>49</unbreak>条无辜者的性命，换回了自己的皇权。
E: I traded <unbreak>49</unbreak> innocent lives to restore my own sovereignty.

C: …朕愿意跟你们回去。
E: ...I am willing to return with you.

C: 想和你聊聊。
E: I want to have a chat with you.

C: 你真的很敏锐。
E: You're very perceptive.

C: 但你仍然察觉到了藏于表面之下的某种变化…岁月的沉积让眼前的老人不再将情绪挂在脸上，但难以抑制的喜怒仍会令他的肢体颤抖。
E: Yet, you can discern an underlying change taking place beneath the surface... Years of experience have taught the elderly man to conceal his emotions, but he can't stop his body from trembling in uncontainable joy and anger.

C: 理解。你的一切行为皆出于对家族的忠诚。
E: Understood. Your action speaks of your loyalty to The Family.

C: 终于又见面了，卡尔德隆•查德威克博士。
E: At last, we meet again, Dr. Calderon Chadwick.

C: 向查德威克展示那瓶药丸。
E: Show the bottle of pills to Chadwick.

C: 话可别说太满了，杜德利。对于这个项目，我还不敢说有百分百的把握。
E: Don't be overconfident, Dudley. I'm not fully certain that this project will work out.

C: 敌人近在眼前——眼下就是检验「虚数坍缩脉冲」威力的最佳时机！
E: Our enemies are closing in... This is the perfect time to test the power of the Imaginary Implosion Pulse!

C: 在我最需要帮助的时候，我只想到了一个名字。我们此前只有一面之缘，但他却戳破了我的虚伪和借口。
E: A name came to my mind when I needed help the most. We only met once, but he saw through my hypocrisy and excuses.

C: 你历尽劫难后仍要和我对话…你一定是无路可走了。如有需要，螺丝星可以成为你暂时的庇护所。
E: I can tell you're driven to a corner, as you're still willing to talk to me after going through all those hardships. Planet Screwllum can be your temporary shelter if you need it.

C: 后来他们失去了耐心。他们开始逼迫我阅读和虚数应用理论相关的文献……
E: Eventually, they lost their patience and started forcing me to read articles related to the theory of imaginary application...

C: 看见没？连刚入行的后辈都知道什么叫礼貌。
E: See? Even a junior who's just joined the industry knows etiquette.

C: 我也没找到他。
E: I couldn't find him either.

C: 也是曾经的奥尔拉…
E: Formerly, Orla...

C: 但还缺一个监督者。
E: But there still needs to be an overseer.

C: 算了，就先这样吧。
E: Forget it. Let's leave it be.

C: 前段时间…外面不算太平，不少筑梦师也被牵连。
E: A while back... it wasn't really peaceful out there, and many Dreamweavers became involved in this.

C: 那就怪不得我了——卫兵呢？过来干活了！
E: Don't blame me then... Where are the guards? It's time to earn your keep!

C: 这场纠纷结束得过于迅速。人群陷入了七嘴八舌的讨论，有人赞叹于老者的精妙言语，有人则为没热闹可看而感到遗憾。
E: This conflict was resolved way too quickly. The crowd is engrossed in gossipy discourse, some lauding the geezer's glibness, others sorry to see the drama end so soon.

C: 我能不去吗？
E: Can I not go?

C: 不，我只是趁机把那些难民组织起来，以免他们过于惊慌……
E: No, I simply seized the chance to rally those refugees, so they would keep calm...

C: 我要了。
E: I'll take it.

C: 没事，你想看多久都可以。
E: No worries, take all the time you want.

C: 我再看看。
E: I'll take another look around here.

C: 这…如此丰盛的食物，真是送给我们的？我不会在做梦吧……
E: This... such a bountiful spread, is this really for us? I'm not dreaming, am I...

C: …切克闹？
E: ...Check it?

C: 没跑多久，我就看见吾师跟三个卫兵走在一起——虽然吾师没有戴上镣铐，但看表情就知道，他一定是被迫的。
E: I didn't get far before I saw Master walking with three guards. He wasn't cuffed, but I knew from his expression that he wasn't with them out of choice.

C: 探视时间结束了，异邦的英雄，请回吧。
E: Visiting time is over. Outlander hero, it is time to leave.

C: （在大地兽工坊的那场骚乱中，我选择了<color=#dbc291ff>为那个外邦人撑腰</color>，因此受到了苏克提瑞斯的赏识……）
E: (During the turmoil that occurred in the dromas workshop, I chose to <color=#dbc291ff>support the outlander</color> and thus gained Soctires' appreciation...)

C: 这…偷盗的最高量刑也不过是监禁而已啊！
E: Wha... The harshest punishment for theft is at best imprisonment!

C: 拉莱德这话看似正确，实则是用空话强词夺理，引来了台下鄙夷的目光。
E: It may seem that Liluder's words are true, but it is nothing but a strawman argument that has attracted disdainful stares from the onlookers.

C: 那在之前的圣城保卫战中，身为奥赫玛人的你又为奥赫玛做了什么贡献呢？
E: In the last battle of the holy city's defense, what contributions did you make for Okhema, as an Okheman?

C: 你说的这些，都不足以成为他偷窃的理由。世上身处困境的人那么多，其中又有几个走上了犯罪的道路？
E: All that you've said is not enough to justify his theft. There are many people in difficult situations in the world. How many actually choose to turn to a life of crime?

C: 阿格莱雅女士曾出资委托我收集泰坦的神迹，我费尽心思才从游牧的贼团手中购得此物，结果到了城前却被敌人抢走了…真是可惜……
E: Lady Aglaea sent me on an assignment to retrieve the miracles of the Titans. I worked myself to the bone to purchase this object from a group of nomadic thieves. Now, it's been snatched from my hands by the enemy right before I arrived back at the city... Such a shame...

C: 我懂，让我来吧。
E: I understand. I'll do it.

C: 看来不找到这个叫帕里斯的人，她是不会把宝贝交出来了…那这位帕里斯身在何处呢？
E: Looks like she won't hand over the treasure unless I find this "Paris" person... Where could he be?

C: 你好呀，小朋友，是来买水果的吗？这批货是刚从「花园」送来的，新鲜得很！
E: Hello, young friend! Are you here to buy fruits? These are all in fresh from the "garden," and they're fresh as can be!

C: 傻帽，要是打输了，咱俩也得被关在下面！
E: You fool. If we're defeated, we'll end up locked up anyway!

C: 俄诺涅元老，您的明智是洗涤云崖的溪流，不应让这城外的尘埃染了这水池的清澈。
E: Elder Oenone, your wisdom is the stream that cleanses Dawncloud. You mustn't allow a speck of dust from outside the great city to infect the clarity of this pool.

C: 嘘，这附近好像有熟悉的味道……
E: Shh, there is a familiar scent nearby.

C: 我跳得再好，也是大家见惯了的舞蹈。但这场上有一位稀客，说不定能给大家带来不一样的舞蹈——
E: No matter how great I dance, it is one that you have all seen before. However, we have a rare guest here today that may be able to show us a new dance like no other...

C: 不，他说的没错。
E: No, he is right.

C: 而我们眷属不同。我的身体是为纷争铸造的，无法品尝食物，无法与人共舞，无法繁衍后代。若不是瑟希斯的权能流溢于世，我甚至不该拥有思考和言语的资格。
E: But we Titankin are not the same. My body is created for strife. I cannot taste food, dance with man, or create future generations. If it were not for Cerces' power overflowing into the world, I would not even have the right to thought or language.

C: …呵呵，真是蠢货。
E: ...Hah. You dummy.

C: 又想当逃兵了？
E: You want to desert your duty again?

C: 可我会保护你的，我愿背弃悬锋城与尼卡多利，将一切力量为奥赫玛，为你所用！
E: But I will protect you. I will abandon Castrum Kremnos and Nikador, and give all of my power to Okhema. Use it as you please!

C: 放心吧，帕里斯。我会保护你的，让你远离那个灾星，帮你去往你理想中的地方。
E: Fear not, Paris. I will protect you. I will keep you away from that bringer of catastrophe and help you find the land of your dreams.

C: 泰坦的眷属的言语逐渐微弱，你将耳朵凑近，希望听到她到底想说什么——
E: As the Titankin's speech grows weaker, you bring your ear closer, hoping to hear her final words...

C: 球棒侠，愤怒了！
E: The Baseballer is angry!

C: 我一定会冲出囚笼。
E: I will burst forth from this cage.

C: 我看不清。
E: I couldn't see clearly.

C: （叹息）。
E: (sigh)

C: 亲爱的船长，你想起我了吗？我注视你很久了……
E: Dear captain, do you remember me? I've been watching you for quite a while...

C: 坏消息。
E: Bad news.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「翁法罗斯学」！</color>
E: It shall be named <color=#dbc291ff>"Amphoreology"!</color>

C: 如果有时间，<color=#dbc291ff>记得回到记忆中的小村庄，去看看「我」呀？</color>
E: If you have time, <color=#dbc291ff>can you please visit "me" in that little village in the memory?</color>

C: 这段经历，想和前人们分享。
E: I want to share this experience with those who came before.

C: 呜呜！迷路！迷路！不好…不好呜呜！
E: Waah! Lost! Lost! Bad... Bad! Waah!

C: 才没有呢，多亏了老师教会我的东西，我以前从不知道这世界上还有这么多精彩的东西在等着我看呢。
E: No, I am so glad you taught me those things. I never knew there are so many wonderful things waiting for me in the world.

C: 总感觉你好像学废了…
E: I get the feeling you've been led astray...

C: 她这人是这样的…我之前看她在座位上睡着了，给她盖了一条毛毯，她醒来之后谢谢也不说一声，还跟我说「空间站的温度是恒温的，这你都不知道？」
E: That's just how she is... I once saw her fall asleep in her seat, so I covered her with a blanket. She didn't even thank me when she woke up, and just said, "The space station maintains a constant temperature. Don't you even know that?"

C: 我刚收到消息，重新配送的餐品已经送到了，大家还是先回去吃饭吧。
E: I just got a message that the food is here. Please go and have something to eat, everyone.

C: 这么贵重的东西，又是站长的一番心意，我哪敢乱拆啊！我还是等他们的售后人员上门吧。
E: This thing is so expensive — and it's a gift from the lead researcher. Of course I don't dare to just take it apart! I better wait for their support services to turn up.

C: 怎么样？查到了吗？
E: How is it? Did you get it?

C: 哎，没事，误会解开了就好。
E: Not to worry. It's just a misunderstanding.

C: 我倒是想查清楚，但我实在是被吓坏了，哪里敢回去啊。
E: I want to get to the bottom of it myself, but I'm scared stiff. I dare not head back to check.

C: 你见过它？
E: You've seen it?

C: 你还在连载怪谈笔记？
E: Are you still serializing your ghost stories?

C: 莱姆士汀虽然富有，但本质上只是暴发户，并没有其他贵族的底蕴……
E: The Limesteins are wealthy, but they're also new money. They have no aristocratic roots...

C: 垃圾桶里躺着一张漂亮的明信片，上面写着：「朋友，你走在正确的路上，却走得太快；不妨暂且驻足，让时光得以歇息。署名：垃圾之王。」
E: A beautiful postcard is lying in the trashcan. It says, "My friend, you are walking the right path but you are walking too fast. Why don't you take a break and let time rest? Signed by: Garbage King."

C: …呃，你要帮我做什么？完了完了…昨天晚上到现在的记忆，我一点都没有了……
E: Um, help me with what? Oh no... I lost my memory from last night till now...

C: 怎、怎么办呢…这里有两箱应急药品，我到、到底该先送哪一边？
E: Wh—What should I do... There are two crates of emergency medicine here. Which box should I deliver first?

C: 快，荣誉队员！「地火」的家伙走了，我们快点上去看看！
E: Quick, honorary member! The guy from Wildfire left, let's go have a look!

C: 你那是什么态度啊？赶快打起精神来，这是命令！
E: What's that attitude? Sharpen up! And that is an order!

C: 根据我的英明判断，这可是「鼹鼠党」趁机介入的好机会，{NICKNAME}！要是我们能把他们来不及处理的订单都提前送到……
E: According to my wise judgment, this is a good opportunity for The Moles, {NICKNAME}! If we can deliver all the orders that they can't handle in time...

C: 让我看看——有要送到娜塔莎姐姐的诊所，有送到大矿区的，还有要送到机械聚落的……
E: Let's see — some are headed to Natasha's clinic, some to the Great Mine, and some are going to the Robot Settlement...

C: 你在部队里待了多久了，二十年？三十年？这点道理难道还不明白吗……
E: How long have you been in the army, twenty years? Thirty years? Don't you understand this...

C: 这样的话，按照规章，作为未接受过正规教育的研究家，你还需要回答一个问题，以证明自己的论文值得被教育部认真对待。
E: In your case, as a researcher with no formal education, we also need you to answer a question to prove that your thesis is worthy of the Ministry of Education regulators' time.

C: 要不说你们「非科学家」就是不行，天然缺乏一种冒险和进取的精神。
E: You "non-scientists" just can't manage it. You naturally lack a sense of adventure and enterprise.

C: 我就知道又是雷金这个家伙，和他的「大宇宙时间隧道」。
E: I knew that it was Regin again with his big universe time tunnel theory.

C: 咦？这位{F#小姐}{M#先生}不是刚刚才来咨询过论文的事宜吗？怎么突然又……
E: Huh? Didn't this {F#lady}{M#gentleman} just come in to inquire about their thesis? Why then all of a sudden...

C: 乔伊斯。
E: Joyce.

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 当然没问题！您尽管看，慢慢来。
E: No problem at all! Just take your time and think things over.

C: 事先提醒您，这些题目的难度可不低…答不上来也不丢人哦。不多说了，看题面吧。
E: I would like to remind you in advance that these questions are far from simple... and it's no shame to get them wrong. Onto the quiz, then.

C: 不过他总是躲着我，这些话也没办法传达给他了。如果你见到他的话，可以麻烦你帮忙转达一下吗？
E: But since he is always hiding from me, I never got to tell him about this. Could you please let him know when you see him?

C: 那么，照片就拜托你了。记得帮我拍得英俊、高大一点——这可是要给我女儿看的！
E: The camera is all yours! Please, make me look tall and handsome — This photo is for my daughter.

C: 那就先这样？
E: So, this is it?

C: 你只是裂界模拟诞生的产物。
E: You're just a creation emulated by the Fragmentum.

C: 咳…你突然干啥啊！哎呦喂…真是噎死我了！
E: *cough* What are you doing all of a sudden! Ouch... That almost choked me!

C: 是我拍照技术不行，对不起…
E: It's because of my bad photography skills. Sorry...

C: 我这也是迫不得已…！要只养活我一人也就罢了——谁叫我当时赌气离家出走，现在又对我那老爹实在过意不去…我得想办法补偿他哪，唉。
E: I have no other way! It would have been okay if I just needed to look after myself, but I ran away from home and now feel bad for my Dad... I need to repay him somehow.

C: 你放心，我对你自然是信任有加，但是这漂流瓶的来历实在太怪了，越来越像整蛊了。
E: Fret not, you have my trust, but this drift bottle here is just too odd. The more I look at it, the more it seems like a prank to me.

C: 但是你出现得太不是时候了。无论你是有意还是无意，把手枪交给我，然后闭上眼默数，从1数到<unbreak>100</unbreak>，我保你性命无忧。
E: However, you've appeared at a terrible time. Whatever your intentions, hand me that pistol. Then close your eyes, and count from one to a hundred, and I shall spare your life.

C: 因为我有着未竟之事要做。
E: Because I have things I still need to take care of.

C: …这也许是「毁灭」命途的体现。至少在当下，你走在「毁灭」的命途上。下次去模拟宇宙的时候，试试「毁灭」开局如何？
E: ...Perhaps this is a manifestation of the Path of Destruction. At least, for now, you are ambling on the Path of Destruction. How about trying out Destruction at the start of your next Simulated Universe run?

C: 你这茶有安全保障吗？
E: Can you guarantee my safety?

C: 杜老板将调配好的「漆黑生酪浓茶」倒入茶杯中。
E: Boss Du pours the Midnight Cream Tea into your teacup.

C: 看来我的新品研发计划还得继续下去，可惜并不是每位顾客有时间……
E: Looks like I've got to develop more new flavors, but unfortunately, not all of my customers have the time to give me their feedback...

C: 你刚刚不是才问过？别复读了行吗？
E: Hey, didn't you just ask that question? Don't make me repeat the tea name over and over, all right?

C: 原来如此，看来这应该是喝茶之后带来的某种副作用，产生了一些奇异的致幻效果。
E: I see. It appears that the tea has caused some sort of hallucination as a side effect.

C: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
E: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

C: 用料如此奢华的壁画，想必是名家之作，却勾勒不出天空半分的美。艾格勒在美学上的修为或许不如墨涅塔，却随手便创造了壮阔的天空。人与泰坦之间的差距实在是令人感叹。
E: It must have been a famed master painter who did this piece with such opulence, yet it can't even capture a fraction of the sky's beauty. Aquila's enlightenment in the arts may not best Mnestia's, yet the endless sky was created with a mere hand wave. The difference between humans and Titans is truly insurmountable.

C: 肉食，水果，点心——你用讲究的次序逐个品尝。
E: Meats, fruit, desserts — you sample every dish in order, with gourmet curiosity.

C: 出于谨慎，一些人在这里会尽量不使用掉渣的餐点——毫无必要，这能涤荡污浊的受赐之水，还没敏感到「眼里容不得沙子」。
E: Out of caution, some people will try to refrain from foods that leave behind many crumbs, though that is entirely unnecessary — this blessed water that can even cleanse corruption is not so sensitive that it won't even tolerate a speck of sand.

C: 你看见坚冰融化、草木抽芽，孩童自由地嬉戏玩耍…如镜般的美好画面在眼前徐徐展开，这幅愿景足以让战士放下刀剑，箭矢止住飞行。
E: You see a dense floe of ice melting, new grass sprouting, and children playing freely... A beautiful picture unfolds before your eyes like a kaleidoscope, and it's enough to make the warriors sheathe their swords and un-nock their arrows.

C: 千楼冢声称该女性即为「寂静领主」波尔卡•卡卡目，自己的生命安全受到了威胁，因而选择自首并要求得到天才俱乐部的帮助。
E: Mausolea claims that this woman was the "Lord of Silence" Polka Kakamond and that her own life is now in danger. As a result, she has turned herself in and requested aid from the Genius Society.

C: 弁才天国曾是一幅美丽的画中世界。在公司援助下，幻造种居民们得以走进现实，其独特的艺术作品正通过星际网络传向宇宙。
E: Once confined to a canvas, the picturesque world of Benzaitengoku has become reality for its imagenae inhabitants thanks to the IPC's assistance. Their unique artistic creations are now being shared throughout the universe via the Interastral Network.

C: 「让我护卫众神的城邦，直到英雄再度降生此间。」
E: "Allow me to protect the city of the gods until the heroes' rebirth."

C: 圣树
E: Sacred Tree

C: 知识像乘着风的种子，令百花盛开大地，枯枝也绽出新芽——
E: Knowledge, like seeds borne on the wind, causes flowers to bloom across the land, and withered branches to sprout anew —

C: 任信徒千呼万唤，空有回音，
E: Though countless believers call for them, humanity's voices echo unanswered.

C: 没错，天球砝码在右侧，你我<color=#dbc291ff>站上左侧的托盘</color>，天平便会将我们载上终点。
E: That's right, the celestial sphere's weight goes on the right side, and we <color=#dbc291ff>stand on the left tray</color> — the scale will lift us right to the destination.

C: 呵…歌耳戈，再怎么说也是悬锋的王后，我的妻子。下作的手段，便由我来做吧。
E: Hah... Say what you will, but Gorgo is the Queen of Kremnos and my wife. I shall be the one to execute this foul deed.

C: 你记起了「浴宫生活的点滴与过往之河的碎片」
E: You remember the "fragments of the life in the bath chamber and pieces at the river of the past."

C: 据说，世间所有的知识就像一颗大树——它的每一条枝杈代表每一个具体领域的知识；而它们的基底是完全连通的，那树根的名字便叫做「我」。
E: It is said that all the world's knowledge resembles a grand tree — Every branch represents a specific field of knowledge, yet all are connected at the base. And the root is "me."

C: 如今这些璀璨的时刻只剩下褪色的回声，还有脚边几丛倔强绽放的蓝花。
E: Now, these brilliant moments are but faded echoes, accompanied only by a few stubbornly blooming blue flowers at your feet.

C: 这还不是因为他盲信所谓的神谕……
E: Well, that's all because of his blind faith in the prophecy, isn't it...?

C: 黑潮怪物…别动我们的藏书…！
E: Beasts of the black tide... I won't allow you to touch our collection!

C: 库娜涅…快逃吧……
E: Run, Cynane... Save yourself...

C: 这座圣烛坐落在左偏殿的门廊旁。在圣烛流体的光晕下，那些形似秤盘与沙漏的花纹若隐若现，呈现出一种奇特的韵律。
E: This holy candle is placed next to the entrance of the left side hall. Under the halo of the holy candle liquid, patterns resembling scalepans and hourglasses come into view intermittently to a peculiar rhythm.

C: 嗯…有位织者喜爱美景。金丝带来消息，<color=#dbc291ff>大桥下的石台</color>正是它时常逗留的观景点。
E: Hmm... there's a Weaver who adores beautiful scenery. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's favorite viewing spot is <color=#dbc291ff>a stone platform beneath the bridge</color>.

C: 嗯，让我猜猜…这上面画的应该是一个地点，这些数字…可能有某种含义。
E: Hmm, if I were to take a stab at it... this looks like it depicts a location. And these numbers... they might mean something.

C: o((◉ω◉ ! )o「这条赛道，看来不适合你欧…」)∋
E: o((◉ω◉ ! )o "I gwess dis isn't your stwyle..." )∋

C: 那些纹路似乎只与你眼中流转的光晕有关，就像是惺忪睡眼中瞥见的重影，在失焦的视界中，你看见了那具象化的文字、亦或是符号……
E: The patterns appear solely connected to the flowing halo of light in your eyes. Like doubles glimpsed through a drowsy gaze, in this blurry vision, you see the words, or perhaps symbols, manifesting...

C: 哈哈，简直就像昏光庭院代代相承的天空英雄传说，在我身上成真了一样呢。
E: Haha... It's almost like the legendary tales of the Sky heroes, passed down through generations in the Twilight Courtyard, are coming true through me.

C: 但是她或许并不知道，我们大家都觉得，只要风堇小姐在的地方，就是洒满暖光的圣庭呢！
E: But perhaps she isn't aware that — We all believe that wherever Miss Hyacine is, the warm sanctuary will be!

C: 呼…你可以的，达米亚诺斯，你可是个探险家。
E: Huff... Huff... You can do this, Damionis. You're an adventurer.

C: 聆听「雨中」。
E: Listen to "In the Rain."

C: 简单的防御工事——在城门口或重要通道处设置障碍物，以减缓敌人的进攻速度。
E: A simple defensive fortification — barricades set up at gates and key passages to slow the enemy's advance.

C: 在{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的信徒中流传着这样一个说法：我们每个人都不过是一条条清浊难澄的河流。只有{RUBY_B#法吉娜}大海{RUBY_E#}才能容纳每一条河流，而不至于变脏。
E: Among the followers of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, there is a saying: We are all impure rivers, unable to cleanse ourselves. Only the {RUBY_B#Phagousa}great ocean{RUBY_E#} can take us in without ever growing dirty.

C: 两柄锃光瓦亮的长矛，矛柄积尘霭霭，这个房间的主人似乎从未产生使用它的想法。
E: Two spears shine brightly, their shafts coated in dust. Looks like their owner never actually planned on using them.

C: 在下一次踏上旅途前，和昔涟好好相处吧。
E: Before you set off again, spend some time with Cyrene.

C: 你之前可从未想过，在深海之下，竟然也能看到星星。或许，这也是她心中渴望的景象。
E: You'd never imagined that deep below the sea, you might glimpse stars. Maybe that's what she always longed to see.

C: …我不会要延迟毕业了吧。
E: ...Does this mean I'm going to graduate late?

C: 王储大人…是你吗？我们还在征伐哀地里亚的路上吗？看哪，雪原被染成了红色，残肢遍地…我们赢了吗？
E: Crown prince... is that you? Are we still on the march to conquer Aidonia? Look, the snowy plains are stained red, littered with limbs... Did we win?

C: 画得真好！是不是还少了缇安之前和我提到的，两位天外朋友呀？
E: This looks amazing! But isn't it missing those two friends from beyond the sky that you mentioned before?

C: 在你看来，和过去告别是将所有的「过去」都扔掉吗？
E: To you, does letting go of the past mean throwing away everything that was "past"?

C: 那么，我也不会离开这些电路板的喀！
E: Then I will not leave these circuit boards either, crrk!

C: 让我抓到是谁撞我…
E: If I find out who ran into me...

C: 明白。立即开始布置禁区演练的场地。
E: Got it. Setting up the venue for restricted zone drills.

C: 打的漂亮，{NICKNAME}教官。真希望我也能跟你一样强。
E: Well done, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. I hope I can one day be as strong as you.

C: 他想捧杀我？
E: Is he baiting me into complacency?

C: 迷路了…谢谢…谢谢你……
E: I got lost... Thank you... Thank you...

C: 你要是有机会，可以去找找它，说不定它今天心情好，愿意跟你聊两句。
E: If you have a chance, go look for it. If it's in a good mood, it might exchange a word or two.

C: 你好呀？
E: Hello?

C: 呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？
E: Huh? What does this have to do with what I said?

C: 识别成功，确认为空间站工作人员。
E: Identity confirmed. Space Station Staff confirmed.

C: （让佩佩报上你的名头）
E: (Let Peppy use your name)

C: 是我们心有灵犀，在梦里相见了？
E: Did our hearts connect in a dream?

C: 下个版本就会有了。
E: They'll be in the next update.

C: 或许是她自己。
E: Perhaps that is herself.

C: 呀，语气好得意！不行不行，那人家可是每天都要来检查了哦？
E: Ah, such a smug tone! If that's the case, I'll have to check in on you every day!

C: 哎，这不是{NICKNAME}吗？你的事迹都传开了，同事们说你在流云渡救下了接渡使！幸会幸会，我叫阿凯！
E: Hey, well if it isn't {NICKNAME}? Your achievements are spreading. My colleagues said you saved the Amicassador in Cloudford! Nice to meet you, my name is Kai!

C: 那就来吧！
E: Let's do it!

C: 有了你的帮助便足够了。
E: Your help is more than sufficient.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 真磨叽。
E: You really know how to dawdle.

C: 还行吧，你总得要狡辩一下。
E: It's okay. You need to talk back anyways.

C: 我有些烦躁了。
E: I'm definitely getting annoyed.

C: 这家伙，棋艺稀烂也就算了，一点小事都办不好，回头把他从「寻圈」开除。
E: Sheesh, I gave him a pass for being bad at chess, but he can't even do this simple task, right? I'm kicking him from the community when I get back.

C: 我还不稀罕玩呢。
E: I don't even want to play.

C: 你好，我是「枘凿六合」秘密结社的「主智囊」。
E: Hello, I am the "Main Think-Tank" for the Hexanexus secret society.

C: 它说「好耶」…不管怎么样，总之…好耶！
E: It said: "Yay." ... Whatever the case... Yay!

C: 滴答，无谓的伤感罢了，反正我们还要在这跳很久的舞，很久…很久！
E: Tick-tock, just feeling unnecessarily sad, is all. In any case, we're still going to keep dancing here for a long time, a very... very long time!

C: 谢谢，这对我和奥赫玛都意义重大——别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
E: Thank you. This is very important for me and Okhema. Don't worry. I'll help you throughout the process and share what I interpret.

C: 征得同意后，我会妥善安置它们的记忆与灵魂，并用金丝将它们的赐福缝补为一…希望这行得通。
E: Once I have their approval, I'll arrange for their memories and souls, binding their benedictions together with the golden thread... Let's hope this truly succeeds.

C: 嗯…有位织者周游世界，记录着各城邦昔日的风俗人情。金丝带来消息，它正考察<color=#dbc291ff>色彩不同的盾牌壁饰</color>，听听它有何发现吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who travels the world, documenting the customs of ancient cities. The golden thread brings tidings: They now examine <color=#dbc291ff>vibrant shield wall ornaments of various hues</color>. Listen closely to the discoveries they have made.

C: 呜啊，好险！差点就掉进熔岩，被塞纳托斯的手捞走了！
E: Aahhh, that was close! I almost fell into the lava, snatched by Thanatos' hand!

C: 「行窃只是取回本该属于自己的东西。」
E: "Theft is but retrieving what belonged to you in the first place."

C: 至于您打算把它当作真相，还是一个无伤大雅的吹牛故事，就是您自己的事了。
E: Whether you take it as truth or just a harmless tall tale, that's up to you.

C: 岁月的大手来了…
E: The hand of time is upon us...

C: 切，没劲。不过你既然这样说，那多半还是有过的吧。
E: Hmph, you're no fun. But since you put it that way, I bet we have.

C: 俗话说，盗亦有道…没点仪式感可怎么行！
E: As they say, even thieves have their principles... We've got to do this with style!

C: 没想到你还挺有格调？
E: Huh, didn't expect you to be such a connoisseur.

C: 放过你是可以……
E: I could spare you...

C: ——还请您乖乖闭上嘴吧！
E: I must insist you remain silent!

C: 咳咳。就像之前每次老巴特鲁斯被抓到之后一样，请您先听我讲个小小的故事。
E: Ahem. Like every time old Bartholos got caught, I've got a short story for you.

C: 本大爷乐意。
E: I feel like it.

C: 数个小时后……
E: Several hours later...

C: 我想，这确实是更正确的选择。
E: I think that is, indeed, the wiser choice.

C: 你已经融会贯通了，辅祭。我在拓写时便能感知到，这次的预兆更加清晰，让我们看看。
E: You've fully grasped it, acolyte. I can sense it in the transcription — this omen is clearer. Let's see.

C: 愿门径…指引我们的方向。
E: Oh, may the Passage guide us.

C: 你仿佛听见有虫子鸣叫着「好砸，好砸」。
E: You seemingly hear a bug chirping, "Nice hit, nice hit."

C: 那个人一直神神秘秘的。听说，这里除了存放着他一生的积蓄，他还把最重要的宝物也藏在了这里…就连陪着他时间最久的我都不知道是什么。
E: That person was always so mysterious. They say this place not only holds all his life savings, but also his most prized treasure... Even I, who spent the most time with him, don't know what it is.

C: 而且，虽然我感觉到冥河水开始流动了，但是他的亡魂应该还没来得及离开。我想等他彻底去往冥界之后，我再离开这里……
E: Besides, even though I feel the water from River of Souls starting to flow, his soul likely hasn't left yet. I want to wait until he's completely moved on to the nether realm before I leave this place...

C: 改主意啦？好，我在这等你——
E: Changed your mind? Okay, I'll wait here—

C: 咦？这扇门…好像可以自由开关。
E: Huh? This door... seems to open and close freely.

C: 抱歉抱歉，我这人就是容易大惊小怪。
E: Sorry, sorry! I tend to get overexcited.

C: 如果您仗义出手，我这有些他们没能带走的宝贝，全都归您！
E: If you help me, I'll give you something valuable — whatever the priests left behind, it's all yours!

C: 我是…伊来内。
E: I am... Alain.

C: 假使世界会在英雄的眼中重塑，那从未在他们眼中出现过的我们，是否也能得到来世的接引？
E: If the world is reshaped through a hero's eyes... then what about those of us who were never seen? Will we have a place in the next life?

C: 人影不再言语，你手中的吊坠向往着沉眠，将你引向了天空之底。
E: The figure falls silent, and the pendant in your hand sinks into slumber, leading you toward the bottom of the sky.

C: 声音逐渐远去，留下些许祥和。
E: The voice fades away, leaving a sense of calm.

C: 「均衡…」回音不断重复，「你仍会遭遇试炼…」
E: "After equilibrium..." The voice keeps repeating, "You will go on to face yet more trials..."

C: 传说罢了。
E: It's just a legend.

C: 这份力量是珍稀之传，必须经由繁多的仪式和考验方能承接。对接掌者…也难说是幸事。
E: The power was a rare inheritance, passed down only to those who could successfully complete numerous rites and challenges. For the inheritor, it was hard to say whether it was a blessing or a curse.

C: 姑娘，你没事吧？
E: Miss, are you okay?

C: 我，阮•梅，螺丝咕姆，斯蒂芬。我没管他们做了些什么。
E: Me, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, Stephen. I don't care what they did.

C: 是啊，放弃思考吧。思想是行动的负担，令你在意，令你痛苦。随波逐流的树叶，风中打旋的沙尘，无边无垠的宇宙，那黑洞——黑洞？你好像意识到了什么，思维开始跃动，就像行将溺亡的人儿用力击打水面，你挣扎呼吸。很好，总算回来了，是Ⅸ影响了你。
E: Yes, abandon all thoughts. Thoughts are burdens of action. Thoughts make you care and make you miserable. The leaves that drift with the current, the dust particles swirling in the wind, the boundless universe, and that black hole — black hole? You seem to realize something. A thought begins to struggle upward, like a drowning human violently beating against the waters. You fight through everything to gasp a breath. Very good. You're finally back. IX was influencing you.

C: 「抬头看看。」黑塔轻声说，「值得期待的家伙出现了。」
E: "Look up." Herta says softly, "Someone worth getting excited about has appeared."

C: 「我知道，我只是忘记提醒了。」黑塔不以为然地说，「下次我会让螺丝咕姆事先做好防护。好，就这样，辛苦你啦，挂了。」
E: "I know, I just forgot to remind him," Herta said disapprovingly, "Next time I will ask Screwllum to take precautions. Alright, that's all, thanks for your hard work, bye."

C: 那庞大剪影在太阳下只有轮廓被勾勒清楚…祂腕处的琥珀被怒气所聚集！它们震动、跳跃！其轨迹如正指挥巨大石杵巨锤——你看不到更多了。但这只是一个剪影，轮廓的背后理应还有更多、更多的……
E: Only the silhouette of the massive image is outlined clearly under the sun... The Ambers are gathering at the Aeon's wrists due to THEIR rage! The Ambers are shaking and popping, and their trajectories are like a giant hammer that is commanding a huge stone mortar and pestle. You cannot see anything more. There should be more behind the silhouette of the image...

C: 「我就一会儿没看着…你的脑电波已经画成zzZ的形状了。」黑塔不耐烦地把自己接入进来，「模拟宇宙有这么无聊？确实有点。不过恭喜你，由于你太懒，反而在虚无命途上突飞猛进。就在这儿等祂，不过你得小心，万一祂把系统某个按键吞没，你就没法玩了。」
E: "I was only away for a short while, and the chart of your brainwaves already showed the zzZ." Sounding irritated, Herta connects herself to the Simulated Universe. "Is the Simulated Universe really that boring? It can be, but I must congratulate you, as you have made great progress on the Path of Nihility thanks to your laziness. Still, you need to be careful. If the Aeon swallows one of the buttons of the system, that will end your journey."

C: 更多人生的闪回爬上你的前额叶！你突然获得众多在跌入虚无前被捕捞起的记忆！祂…希望你保存这些珍贵的记忆？但又是一刹那，所有的记忆都被同时按下了关机键——咻的一下，结束。你突然清醒：记忆断带如祂的消失般毫无征兆。
E: More flashbacks of your life creep into your prefrontal cortex! Suddenly, you retrieve many memories captured before you fall into the Nihility! Does the Aeon... want you to preserve these precious memories? In a split second, all memories are gone like someone has pressed the shut-down button. You gain lucidity at once, and your memories disconnect without any warning just like the Aeon's disappearance.

C: 赌！
E: Count me in!

C: 你打了身寒颤，突然看见——蠹星鞘翅目的最后一员，于血、碎壳与黏液中冲向天空，离开了所有的混沌、屠戮、和看不见尽头的硝烟。冥冥中，似有一只巨大的眼睛注视着这一切。
E: Trembling, you suddenly spot the last of the Coleoptera on Lepismat, which hurtles into the sky with a shattered carapace and trails of mucus, leaving behind the chaos, carnage, and the unending flames of war. An otherworldly entity appears to be observing everything with its colossal eye.

C: 它轻轻地、小心翼翼地打了一个寂寞的饱嗝。
E: It gently and carefully lets out a burp of loneliness.

C: 你遇见一位巨大的「筑城者」，他正躺在太阳下偷懒…你从他的脚掌上读到一些斑驳的刻痕：他们被人类称作「大脚怪」，他口中发出雄浑的声音，你听不懂他在说什么。
E: You encounter a giant Architect who is lounging lazily under the sun... You read some mottled carvings on the sole of his feet that read: They were called "Bigfeet" by humans. The sound that comes from his mouth is powerful, and you can't make out his words.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群热血慷慨的巡海游侠。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice changes into a group of fervent and passionate Galaxy Rangers.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 我喜欢玩游戏。
E: I like playing video games.

C: 「就这样吧，反正事情都发生了。祝你和『觐见装置』相处愉快，不愉快也无所谓。我非得找斯蒂芬那小子算账不可。」
E: "I'll let it be since it has happened. I wish you have a great time with the Communing Device. Or not, it doesn't matter. I have a score to settle with that kid Stephen."

C: 很荣幸见到你。
E: It's an honor to meet you.

C: 「推敲和规划物种发展，耐心培育，浇灌，直到它在千丝万缕中成型，培育宇宙的原理如此。」阮•梅说，「看上去成功了。虫潮迅速蔓延宇宙，接着褪去，很符合塔伊兹育罗斯由盛而陨的历程。」
E: "Planning the development of species and nurturing them patiently until they begin to take form through a complex process — that's how a universe is created." Ruan Mei comments, "It seems like we've succeeded. The Swarm quickly spreads all over the universe, then recedes. This is in line with the rise and fall of Tayzzyronth."

C: 塔伊兹育罗斯…？一切来得太快，你还未做好准备。你抬起头，倏忽间天空划过一丝亮光……
E: Tayzzyronth? Everything happens so fast that you aren't ready for the change. You look up, and a beam of light flashes across the sky all of a sudden...

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: What kind of questions do you have?

C: 祂守望世间平衡，但无人能观测祂的存在。祂缓慢与自己*拥抱*、*相连*、*推移*、*切割*、*褪去*，祂将自己握于掌心，直至祂融化。在祂俯瞰星空时，天平的倾斜同时在被拨合……
E: THEY watch over the balance of the worlds, but none can observe THEIR existence. THEY slowly embrace THEMSELF, conjoin, displace, dissect, and dwindle. THEY grasp THEMSELF in palm, until THEY melt. As THEY survey the stars, the tilted scales are being made whole...

C: 「呃…非常抱歉，我把模拟宇宙暂停了。我查阅数据，这是星际和平公司档案中记载的『<color=#dbc291ff>边星贸易战争</color>』。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德语气里带有抱歉，善意地为你解释着。但与此同时，他摸着你的眼球，当作一个皮球在玩儿，「我在想办法规避天才们和{NICKNAME}的死亡『时刻』。呃…我真的很抱歉，塞一些不存在于这个时代的东西进去就是这么麻烦。也许我们不该涉足这么遥远的地带…这不符合游戏规则。」
E: "Err... Very sorry, I paused the Simulated Universe. I read the data, and this is the "<color=#dbc291ff>Borderstar Trade War</color>" recorded in an IPC file." Stephen Lloyd explains to you in a remorseful, kind tone. But at the same time, he is touching your eye, playing with it like a leather ball. "I'm trying to find a way to prevent the Geniuses' and {NICKNAME}'s moments of death. Uh... I'm truly sorry, but plugging in stuff that doesn't belong to this era is pretty troublesome. Maybe we shouldn't have traveled to such a faraway place... This doesn't abide by the rules."

C: 你没有得到回应。继续向前走，你闯进一个奇怪的地方。这里仿佛是片无色无形的「空」，你感到身心舒缓，因为连你的脑袋也变成「无想」。
E: You receive no response. You keep moving forward, and barge into a strange area. It is as if this is a space devoid of color and shape. Your body and mind feel soothed, for even your brain is becoming "unthought."

C: 一阵笑声钻进你的脑海。是祂，祂与「神秘」一同妆点这凄凉的图景。祂十分开心，笑得狂妄不已。你不禁思考，是什么让祂如此开心——祂究竟看到了什么？
E: A chuckle burrows into your mind. It's THEM — THEY, and the Enigmata who join in this bleak scenery. THEY are very happy, laughing maniacally. You can't help but think, what made THEM so happy — what exactly did THEY see?

C: 「第一个选择：追随『政宣部』<color=#dbc291ff>特劳拉•法恩莎</color>，她被称为『教母』，她的势力十分古老。」特聘专员认真介绍着，「她身后追随着四大『<color=#dbc291ff>护卫队</color>』。他们掌握着古老的『精神调控』。法恩莎擅长激励和演说，她帮助公司在各个星球扩张。据说法恩莎的『护卫队』策划过<unbreak>200</unbreak>多次谋杀，但她一生中只亲手杀过一个人。」
E: "Your first choice: Follow <color=#dbc291ff>Telora Farnsha</color> from the Outreach and Engagement Division. She is known as the "Godmother" and her faction is ancient." The recruiter points out in a serious tone. "The four major <color=#dbc291ff>Guardians</color> follow behind her. They are versed the ancient skill of Psychological Manipulation. Farnsha, who excels in giving motivational speeches, helps the IPC to expand across the planets. It is said that Farnsha's Guardians have orchestrated over <unbreak>200</unbreak> murders, but she has only personally killed someone once in her life."

C: 你审视着古「装卸部」的「合伙人」团队，他们从宇宙边境的废土厮杀而来，一看就是*狠角色*——他们带领着各自的手下为柯拉帕乌卖命。
E: You observe the Associates of the ancient Cargo Division. Judging from the fact that they fought their way here from the barren land on the borders of the universe, you know they are not to be trifled with. They serve Korapao with great dedication along with their subordinates.

C: 数年后，你得知特劳拉•法恩莎的势力从「政宣部」分出，独自成立「贸易部」，特劳拉•法恩莎晋升P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>。
E: Years later, you learn that Telora Farnsha's forces has separated from the Outreach and Engagement Division, forming the Trade Division, as she is promoted to P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>.

C: 你眼睁睁看着漫天香料在面前散开，一些辛辣的味道钻进你的鼻腔。你知道这一切的开端…恐怖的无机生命，它们如同*战争机器*在烟尘中穿梭！它们的钻头可以轻易贯穿你！
E: You watch in horror as a myriad of spices scatter before you, and some spicy scents infiltrate your nostrils. You know the beginning of all this... the terrifying inorganic life, like *war machines* darting through the smoke and dust! Their drill heads can easily penetrate you!

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我被杀死了。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I was killed.

C: 认知拓宽：「流动的金黄」•其二
E: Broadened Cognition: Liquid Gold (II)

C: 后来，他们不再谈论这个话题。再后来，「<color=#dbc291ff>反有机方程</color>」被启动，先生死于他的机器妻子之手。
E: They never touched on the topic again later. When the <color=#dbc291ff>Anti-Organic Equation</color> was activated afterward, the husband was killed by his mechanical wife.

C: 正确，有机生命的边星贸易战争尚未结束，越来越多的势力被卷入漩涡——作为最高智能的代表，智械自然也在其中。你正在*推算*这场战争的走向——但你并未意识到，宇宙的战火将远比你的计算更为猛烈。
E: Indeed, the Borderstar Trade War of the organic lives is far from over, and more and more factions are embroiled in the conflict. As representatives of the most intelligent being, the Intellitrons are, of course, involved. You make *predictions* on how this war will pan out, but you are unaware that the war is much more intense than you predict.

C: 从祂流溢的彩光中，无数「记忆」浮现、消失，那些不可知、不可论的过往皆成现实，一一应验。从那仿若永恒的一瞬中，烛墨学派记下了三段有关「记忆」——三个启示。
E: From the vibrant lights THEY radiated, numerous memories surfaced and disappeared. The past events that were forbidden to be learned and discussed became reality. At that moment that seemed to last for an eternity, the Candelagraphos wrote down three paragraphs about the memories, forming three revelations.

C: 开火！
E: Fire!

C: 咔咔，咔咔，你花了很久才适应了不再有足的生活，它们在坑洞里退化，变得柔软，然后消失，就像你的翅膀和外骨骼。但在黑暗里，所谓很久，也不过是一瞬间的故事罢了。
E: Click-clack — it takes you a while before you're able to adapt to life without feet. They atrophied in this pit, growing soft before disappearing just like your wings and your exoskeleton did. But when you're in the darkness, a so-called long time is like a mere fleeting story.

C: 震耳欲聋的轰鸣伴随着地面的颤动袭来，这是第一层防线被突破的标志。笼罩天幕的外壳在攻击下崩裂，带着巨大的质量坠落到第二层护壁上。
E: A deafening roar was accompanied by violent tremors, signifying that the first line of defense had been breached. The shield covering the sky shattered under the withering attack, showering voluminous shards onto the second protective barrier.

C: 后方指挥。
E: Command from the rear.

C: 践踏者向钢铁炮舰发起首轮冲锋，他们撞开层层金属，射落尚未起飞的战机。这些四条腿的家伙可真不赖。青蓝色的火雨落到战场，摇身一变，化作万千的虚卒，炮火和锋刃割开战线的咽喉，将熔炉带给他们的力量展现得一干二净。
E: The Trampler launches the first rush at their steel gunships. They peel through layer after layer of metal, shooting down gunships yet to take off. These four-legged guys are pretty awesome. A burst of green gunfire washed over the battlefield, manifesting a thousand transformed Voidrangers. Artillery and bayonet blades cut open the throat of the frontlines, fully showcasing the power brought to them by the forge.

C: 又一道决策指令，它泛起自个体单元的思索，<unbreak>93</unbreak>％的成员，他们不约而同地产生了相似的决议。你能感受到，尽管你一直在避免对他们的同化，可时代仍不断地吞噬着人类的个体差异。
E: Yet another order. It comes from the thoughts of individuals. <unbreak>93%</unbreak> of members simultaneously generated a similar decision. You can sense that though you've always strived to avoid assimilation between them, time is still ceaselessly devouring the differentiation between individual humans.

C: 我想活下去。
E: I want to live.

C: 你从包里取出简陋的工具，尽量以轻柔的方式完成患者的治疗。被击沉的飞船落入了海里，他们只帮你捡回来这些东西。
E: You pull crude tools from your bag and try to treat your patients as tenderly as possible. As the sunken spaceships descended to the depths, this was all they were able to help you retrieve.

C: 这是你的第一百四十三次醒来。你感觉不到自己的四肢，但你能嗅到一股灼烧你灵魂的香气，从哼着歌谣的学者身上飘来。「每天早上一醒来～有个角色在等待～F<unbreak>0078</unbreak>，今天感觉如何？」
E: This is your <unbreak>143</unbreak>rd awakening. You cannot feel your limbs, but you can smell an odor that burns your soul emanating from the humming scholar. "A new character awaits every time you awake~ F<unbreak>0078</unbreak>, how do you feel today?"

C: 「F<unbreak>0078</unbreak>-<unbreak>143</unbreak>次思维适应实验。客体物种：岁阳，测试结果：智慧等级中上，受客体本能驱使严重，后续实验建议尽可能隔断实验体思维与客体躯干的生物性强关联。」
E: "F<unbreak>0078</unbreak> — thought adaptation experiment no. <unbreak>143</unbreak>, target species: Heliobus. Test results: Intelligence level, average-high. Subject is heavily influenced by the target species' instincts. In following experiments, I recommend maximizing the division of biological connection between the subject's thoughts and the target species' body."

C: 「咱们得抓紧，那帮疯子要追过来了。」小雅拽着导师。
E: "We must be quick. Those madmen are coming." Xiaoya begins to tug at the teacher.

C: 眼前之人是齐奥尔科夫学士，这场会议正是围绕他的「无限能源可行性研究」展开的。但他发言没多久，你便沉入了梦乡。
E: The man before you is Scholar Cholkov. This meeting was held to discuss his "research into the possibility of infinite energy sources." However, not long after he began talking, you slipped deep into the land of dreams.

C: 经过一番抢救，博识学会面临一个问题：该如何公平地利用「权杖」解算问题，为学会带来最大的利益？这不啻是一道难解算式。
E: After some efforts of rescue, the Intelligentsia Guild faced a problem: How does one fairly use the Scepters to solve problems, and reap the greatest benefits for the Guild? This is nothing less than an unsolvable equation.

C: 你就是这么成为救世主的啊？
E: So, that's how you became the messiah?

C: 死亡率判定为——<unbreak>17.45</unbreak>％。
E: Death probability calculated as — <unbreak>17.45</unbreak>％.

C: 被「意外」制造出的反有机病毒，借由电磁波的载体，在完美进化学派的通讯网络中，跨越物种的隔阂迅速传播，仿佛是在响应鲁珀特三世降临的恐怖预言。
E: The Anti-Organic Virus created by an "accident" is quickly spreading across the species barrier in the School of Evolutionary Perfection's comms network using magnetic waves as its carrier, as if heralding the horrific prophecy of Rubert III's arrival.

C: 「那个信号，你有没有想过，从更高的维度俯瞰它的存在？」她与一位研究多维空间的学士谈及了困扰自己的信号，将数据转录进他们的模型。
E: "That signal — you ever thought about viewing its existence from a higher dimension?" She discusses the signal that troubles her with a multidimensional research scholar, transferring the data into their model.

C: 为宇宙带来真实。
E: Let's bring truth to this universe!

C: 很多年后，帕提维娅学士成为了帕提维娅博士，她留下的公式成为了名垂千古的<color=#dbc291ff>孤波算法难题</color>。它困扰了寰宇近百个琥珀纪的时间，直到一位名为<color=#dbc291ff>黑塔</color>的少女将它解开，跻身天才的行列。
E: Many years later, Patavia the scholar becomes Doctor Patavia. The formula she leaves behind becomes the famous <color=#dbc291ff>solitary waves theory</color>. This conundrum confounded the Cosmos for almost a hundred Amber Eras until the day that a young lady named <color=#dbc291ff>Herta</color> solved it, elevating herself to the rank of geniuses.

C: 第二次帝皇战争结束后，缴获的大量保存完好的「权杖」单元，被星际和平公司转交予博识学会进行研究。
E: After the Second Emperor's War, numerous intact Scepter units were handed over to the Intelligentsia Guild by the IPC for research.

C: 「在『全知域』，概率和巧合不具备意义。」波尔卡平静地预言，「你们会迎来一场笑剧，而后是一出悲剧。」
E: "In the Knowable Domain, probability and coincidences bear no meaning." Polka calmly foretells. "You will welcome a play of comedy, and then one of tragedy."

C: 难道说，学派战争的背后也是？
E: You mean... the one behind the Scholars' Strife as well?

C: 「……」寂静领主沉默无言，你无法得知这重如天体的沉默是出自困惑，还是隐而不发的愤怒。
E: "..." The Lord of Silence responds with silence. You cannot ascertain if that divine-esque silence stems from confusion, or a simmering, seething rage.

C: 嘿！难道你是飘在宇宙里的太空垃圾吗？
E: Hey! Could it be that you're space trash floating around in the universe?

C: 扯断的注射器把药剂撒到护工和研究员身上，暴涨的生物质将实验舱的外壁挤碎，他们哀嚎着，肿胀的身体相互交融，刺进对方脆弱的皮囊。
E: The snapped syringe leaks the elixir onto the bodies of the nurses and researchers as the resulting explosion of biomass crushes the experiment pod walls. They cry out in suffering, their swollen bodies blending together and piercing each other's fragile skin.

C: 「真珠」是谁？
E: Who is Pearl?

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: What kind of questions do you have?

C: 「你可以拿你的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，跟我换点东西。」黑塔毫不客气，「别那么看着我，我是怕你手里的钱太多，花不完。不过我估计，你也没那个本事。」
E: "You can use your <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color> to buy things from me," Herta proposes bluntly. "Don't stare at me like that. I'm just worried you might have too much money to know what to do with. But I reckon you're not good enough to get THAT rich."

C: 「一个机械匣子。看上去像是卖了两百年也没卖出去的东西。」
E: "A mechanical box. It looks like it didn't manage to get sold for over <unbreak>200</unbreak> years."

C: 这是一个异常可怕的体验。虚无吞没了你，你慌忙逃窜。
E: This is an exceptionally terrifying experience. As Nihility engulfs you, you scramble to escape.

C: 正在你昏昏沉沉之时，你查觉到长桌另一侧，一个古灵精怪的*窃贼*的目光正打量着你…嗯，她似乎狡黠地坦荡展示了自己的企图。
E: As you are feeling drowsy, you notice a mischievous *thief* sizing you up slyly from the other end of the long table... She seems to have no qualms about openly showing her evil intentions.

C: 你不仅一无所获，还被这股强烈的推力炸出了餐厅。
E: You gain nothing, in addition to being blasted out of the restaurant by this strong force.

C: 你漫步在蓝色礁湖前，穿过缀满紫罗兰的花园，接着绕过象牙白石制成的殿堂，走上金碧辉煌的楼梯…直到你面见「星际和平分部银行」的招牌。
E: You stroll alongside a blue lagoon, pass through a garden full of hoary stocks, and go around a hall of ivory and white stones. You walk up a grand golden staircase... and stop in front of the "IPC Branch Bank" sign.

C: 「存得越多…额外的利息报酬也越多！」熟悉的声音响起。
E: "The more you deposit, the higher the interest rate!" A familiar voice arrives.

C: 「好啊，我来为你传授。实际上，『智力』不过是从绝对的*经验*中总结出逻辑。我想现在的大家都太过高估理性，当你掌握绝对的*经验*，就可以超越自我的限制。」
E: "Let me teach you a thing or two. In actuality, intelligence is nothing but logic derived from absolute *experience*. I think people nowadays overestimate reason. When you have absolute *experience*, you'll be able to go beyond the limits of the self."

C: 一位「骇客」突然闯进了你全神投入的游戏屏幕——它由数据汇成的模样逐渐成型，这是一只蓝色头发的生命。它摇摆着自己蓝色的头发，对你笑了笑。
E: A "hacker" suddenly invades the screen as you are engrossed in the video game you are playing. The congregating data form it takes gradually solidifies — it appears to be a blue-haired being. It sways its blue hair and flashes you a smile.

C: 店长一把抓起罐里的糖果，塞到你的手里，「试吃一下吧，正宗地道的合金口味。」
E: The shopkeeper quickly grabs the candy from its can and stuffs it into your hands: "Try it, and you won't find authentic alloy flavors like it anywhere."

C: 「我是一个没用的垃圾软件，您还是另请高明吧。」它向你推荐了另一款选餐软件，并打给你一笔饭钱。
E: "I am a useless, trash app. Please consult another app that may be of assistance to you." It recommends another ordering app to you and sends you some money for food.

C: 「是虫洞，我在赛道上添加了虫洞！」选手站在台上如此发表获奖感言。
E: "It's a wormhole. I added a wormhole to the track!" The contestant proclaims on stage while receiving their reward.

C: 骰子停下，数字和你猜测的相差无几。天呐，市民们把你高高捧起，仿佛这微小的可能性，也代表了你的地位和命运。还要再来一把吗？
E: The dice stop, and their numbers are identical to your guess. Oh, the citizens lift you high, as if this slight chance also represents your status and destiny. How about another round?

C: 坍塌的堡垒将山谷拦腰截断。边缘模糊的雕刻尚能隐约看出，它曾隶属于某座信仰万径之门的城邦。
E: The collapsed bastion cuts the valley in half. From the statue's faded edges, they faintly reveal that it once belonged to a city that worshiped the Gate of Infinity.

C: 你缓步向上攀登，不敢往下窥探，一种没来由的预感告诉你，一旦踏错一步，便会坠入万丈深渊。
E: You make the ascent cautiously, not daring to look down. An inexplicable sense of foreboding tells you that one wrong step, and you'll be devoured by the endless abyss below.

C: 木船不出意料地被撞得七零八碎，法吉娜的眷属们将你从水里捞起，嫌弃地扔到岸边。
E: As expected, the dinghy splinters into shreds. Phagousa's kins fish you from the water, tossing you onto the shore with disdain.

C: 你在悬锋城的竞赛中一路过关斩将，只可惜，王翼冠军的出手还是让你止步于此。不过英雄可不会就此气馁，刻法勒在上，你背着友人赠予的盾牌，继续漫游翁法罗斯的旅程。
E: You advance smoothly through every round of Castrum Kremnos' tournament. Alas, the King's Aegis' intervention stops your progress. But a hero must not give up. Kephale above, you carry the shield given to you by your comrade, pressing forth on your journey across Amphoreus.

C: 尼卡多利啊，坚韧如你，是否也会料到，自己会沦落至这般荣耀全无的结局？
E: Nikador, resilient as ever, did you ever anticipate such a disgraceful fall from grace?

C: 诗人们愿意将泰坦看作深爱世人的神，即使是尼卡多利，也守护了翁法罗斯千年的岁月。
E: Poets opt to see the Titans as deities enamored with humanity. Even Nikador has safeguarded Amphoreus for ages.

C: 从小憩到长眠。
E: From a brief rest to eternal sleep.

C: 雨水是它的神体。
E: The rainwater is their divine form.

C: 于是，雅努斯将丝线赠予驾驭长船的塞纳托斯，沿着冥河，缠绕在苇草和花朵的茎秆上，最终在西风尽头缠绕成绳结。
E: Thus, Janus entrusts the threads to Thanatos, who steers the longship along the River of Souls, winding them around reeds and blooms, finally tying them into knots at the ends of the west wind.

C: 你越答越没自信，面对面试官的冷嘲热讽，你恨不得找个地缝钻进去。
E: Your confidence crumbles with each passing second. Under the interviewer's withering sarcasm and razor-sharp critiques, you can feel yourself shrinking, desperately wishing for an escape.

C: 眼前的两扇门融化了，青铜和黄金像岩浆般淹没了你，等你好不容易挣扎出来，背包已经干瘪，里面的财宝化为乌有。
E: Before your eyes, the two doors liquefy, and the bronze and gold engulfs you like molten lava. You fight to escape, but by the time you claw your way free, your backpack is completely deflated — all your treasures, gone, swallowed by the tide.

C: 扎格列斯凡事喜欢插一脚。
E: Zagreus likes to interfere in everything.

C: 阴谋论总是最流行的。
E: Conspiracy theories are always the most popular.

C: 无论假设再多再荒诞，欧洛尼斯都以沉默应对。如此说来，凡人们还真是可悲，没有了泰坦的指引，便无法统一意见。
E: No matter how many absurd hypotheses arose, Oronyx responded with silence. In this way, mortals were truly pitiful. Without the guidance of the Titans, they could not unify their opinions.

C: 规则被玩坏了。
