E: The rules have been broken.

C: 无人不唏嘘瑟希斯的冷漠。当墨涅塔为它献上热切的爱，它将其封藏进拒绝的琥珀。
E: All lamented Cerces's indifference. When Mnestia offered fervent love, they sealed that passion within the amber of rejection.

C: 而它的眼睛绽放出的神光，也太过于灼热，乃至大地被消融成岩浆，花草被炙烤而焦黑。
E: And the divine light emanating from their eyes was so scorching that the earth melted into magma, and plants were charred black from the heat.

C: 回答错误，成年人应当自立，自立！
E: Incorrect answer, adults should be self-sufficient, and self-sufficient.

C: 口腔的苦涩与胃部间歇性的抽搐让你倍感疲乏。你摇摇头，不想回答无关紧要的问题。
E: The bitterness in your mouth and intermittent stomach pains leave you feeling extremely weary. You shake your head, not wanting to answer extraneous questions like that.

C: 恍惚间，你竟发觉镜中之人的双眸在某一刹那与你的视线相接——你震栗，即刻从超然的体验中剥离。「这就是你们的神…」你喃喃自语。
E: Suddenly, your gaze meets the eyes of the being in the mirror. Stunned, you quickly withdraw yourself from the extraordinary experience. "So, this is your god..." you mumble.

C: 人人有份，都别着急。
E: Everyone will have their share, don't worry.

C: 我觉得这算不上什么，跟你们为贝洛伯格做的事比起来，实在不值一提！
E: I didn't think it was anything worth mentioning compared to what you people have done for Belobog!

C: 史考特？
E: Scott?

C: 「那『家族』…果真存在么？」你试探。他摆头，抬手示意侍应生上前。那位年轻的侍应手举托盘，将其上所呈之物向你二人展示。
E: "Does The Family... really exist?" You ask tentatively. Renoir shakes his head and beckons a waiter over. The young waiter presents an item on a tray to the two of you.

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：无法沟通。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Unable to communicate."

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 如此便可远离黑暗蒙昧，嗡~
E: So one avoids darkness and folly~

C: 嗡嗡——太好听了吧！仿佛在听我家太太歌唱一样嗡~
E: That sounds amazing! It's like I'm listening to my lady singing~

C: 很不错。
E: Fantastic.

C: 不要相信它们…您可千万要留个心眼，不要相信它们……
E: Don't trust them... you must watch out for yourself. Don't trust them...

C: 用*十分*适中的力气敲下去。
E: Strike with a VERY moderate amount of force.

C: 一块拳头大小的地髓结晶落在你的脚边。它的形状近似正十二面体，颜色橙红剔透，核芯周围甚至还反射出几抹靛蓝。
E: A Geomarrow crystal the size of your fist falls next to your feet. It has a shape similar to a dodecahedron with a clear, orange-red color. There are even some shocks of indigo that radiate from the core of the stone.

C: 你把目光投向旁边的女人。但她面无表情，你从那张脸上读不出任何提示。
E: You look toward the lady off to the side. Her face is expressionless. You can't get a single hint from her.

C: 管它的…先拿走再说。
E: Whatever... Grab it and see what happens.

C: 集中精神，{NICKNAME}！
E: Focus, {NICKNAME}!

C: 哟，今天忙完啦？我这儿正好做了锅蘑菇汤…你先歇会，晚点记得下来尝尝口味如何！
E: Yo, have you finished your work today? I just made a pot of mushroom soup... Take a break first and come try it later!

C: 已经快要到集合时间了……
E: It's almost time for everyone to meet up...

C: 咦？这不是荣誉队员{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}嘛！你怎么在这里？
E: Huh? You're the honorary member, aren't you, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}? What are you doing here?

C: 看来要开启「认真模式」了……
E: Looks like it's time to go into serious mode...

C: （继续不说话装高手）
E: (Remain silent and act like a professional.)

C: 眼前这位居民以迅雷不及掩耳之势，将为数不少的信用点转让给了你。随后，这人便很快离开了现场，不知所踪。但你其实根本不是这个意思……
E: The resident in front of you swiftly hands over a hefty amount of credits, then bolts from the scene without a trace. That isn't what you mean at all...

C: 当然了！粉丝的愿望，我一定会尽量满足的。
E: Of course! I do my best to make my fans happy!

C: 眼前的女性以极其夸张的姿态倒吸了一口冷气。
E: The girl in front of you takes a breath of air in an exaggerated pose.

C: （发个短信问问杰帕德吧……）
E: (I'd better send a message to ask Gepard...)

C: 你干嘛呀荣誉队员！吓死我了！
E: What are you doing, honorary member? You've scared me to death!

C: 就躲在这里！
E: I'll hide here!

C: 这下是我赢了！
E: I won!

C: 卷轴摆得太乱了，地毯歪歪扭扭，火盆里也堆积着许多灰烬……
E: The scrolls are arranged extremely messily, the carpet is crooked, and ash has piled up in the brazier...

C: 你根本没在藏…
E: You weren't even hiding...

C: 就像听懂了你的话般，亡语蝶们果然开始飞上天空……
E: As if understanding your words, the Eulogistic Butterflies begin to fly into the sky...

C: 不进。
E: I won't enter.

C: 它们都在里面…
E: They're all inside...

C: 嗡嗡，多少个日日夜夜我在这里虔诚祈祷，许愿黎明能够永远继续。现在看来，根本没有用！
E: I've prayed devoutly here for countless days and nights, wishing that dawn would last forever. And now... it turns out it was all for nothing!

C: 驾，飞天坛递！
E: Giddy-up, Flying Amphora!

C: …请你千万不要模仿，千万不要，我可不想对陌生人负责。
E: ...Please do not attempt to imitate me under any circumstances. Just don't do it. I do not want to bear the responsibility for a stranger's life.

C: 你看这页，这颗齿轮，这玩意在哪儿能搞到？我真想整几颗玩玩！当然，我会温柔的…嘿嘿，真想狠狠地把这颗齿轮扣在链条上！
E: Look at this page. This gear. How can I get some of it? I really want to get a couple of gears to have fun with! Of course, I would be gentle... Hehe. I really want to fasten that gear onto the chain so fiercely.

C: 说吧，是什么挑战。
E: Well then, what is your challenge?

C: …别说有的没的了！
E: ...Stop talking about irrelevant details!

C: <size=36>作战！</size>
E: <size=36>Combat!</size>

C: 我已经听傻了…
E: I'm completely clueless...

C: 没想到…本届大胃王比赛竟会如此草草收场…老板我内心实在是五味杂陈……
E: I didn't expect... This year's Competitive Eater Championship would finish so abruptly... As the boss here, I'm harboring some really complex emotions...

C: 呼哧呼哧，竟然还没等我爬到，这个悬台的发动机就已经被修好了！
E: Huff... huff... I was still climbing, and they already finished repairing the engine of this suspended platform!

C: 可这个世界如此扑朔迷离，你们怎么知道，生活在颠倒的世界中的不是自己喀？
E: But in a world where there's so much more than meets the eye, how do you know that you're not the one living in an inverted world?

C: 如果咱们三个心连心，要想让金人动起来可就更困难喽。
E: If the three of us connect at the same time, it would be even more difficult to make the aurumaton move.

C: 还以为是来做金人接入测试的呢…不好意思啊。
E: I thought you were here to help with the aurumaton integration test... Sorry about that.

C: 是这样的吗，我可以控制你吗？我倒是自己想怎么动就怎么动了……
E: Is that so? I can control you? I just thought of a movement, and it moved...

C: 谢谢你，也许我该换个课题。
E: Thank you. Maybe I should change my research topic.

C: 谢谢你…我们有缘再见。
E: Thank you, we shall meet again.

C: 仙舟时下最火热的那个争论啊——在讨论六大司部哪个最适合年轻人就职。
E: The hottest topic on Xianzhou, of course. The one about which of the six major commissions are most suitable for new workforce members.

C: 其实争论来争论去…要我看，这六大司部都不行，带出来的人也不行在，啧啧。
E: Actually, all this arguing back and forth... in my opinion, none of the six major commissions are any good, and the same applies for the people who work there. Tsk tsk.

C: 钟表小子和指引方向有什么关系呢？这个问题的答案或许就藏在此处。
E: What is the relationship between Clockie and the directions indicated? Perhaps the answer to this question is hidden nearby.

C: 「近期受匹诺康尼冲击影响，流梦礁街头迷因出现频率抬升，日常出行时请尽量远离边缘区域。」
E: "The appearance of memes across Dreamflux Reef has increased lately due to Penacony's impact. Please make sure to steer clear of the outskirts during your daily travels."

C: 看得出，广告牌的原主人已经很尽力地把它塞进来了，但冰箱里确实装不下大象。
E: Clearly the original owner of this billboard has tried their hardest to squeeze it in here, but you cannot fit an elephant in a fridge, can you?

C: 别想那么多，来一杯再说。
E: No need to overthink it. Have another drink.

C: 真的？想不到我们几个里最早熬出头的是你小子…果然梦终归都是要醒的。
E: Really? I never would have thought you'd be the first of us to make it, kid... I guess every dream has to end with waking up eventually.

C: 迷…迷路了…
E: L—Lost...

C: 今天有什么特价吗？
E: What's on special today?

C: 好像是什么「故事会」。
E: I think it's some storytelling show.

C: 来都来了，试试。
E: Since we're here, we might as well try.

C: 我是说别浪费粮食。
E: I meant to say don't waste food.

C: 省下的都应该交给祭司。
E: All the savings should be handed over to the priests.

C: 要在诗歌中永垂不朽…
E: To be immortalized in song...

C: 好嘞，麻烦你了。你看见星槎后面那个圆圈了吗？那东西是星槎的引擎，叫做「玦轮」。
E: Oh, thanks for that. See that circle behind the starskiff? That thing is its engine — a jade wheel.

C: 谛听，看着这位嫌疑人。我去追另一位。
E: Keep an eye on this perpetrator, Diting. I'm going after the other one.

C: 多危险啊！您命大才没出事，要万一硬币被卷进发动机再甩出来，速度可比旧式火铳的子弹都快。虽说比不上现代武器，但给您打个透心凉可是绰绰有余。
E: How dangerous! You're lucky that nothing happened to anyone. If a coin somehow got stuck in the engine and spit out, its velocity would be faster than a speeding bullet. Modern weapons are far scarier, of course, but its impact is still enough to shoot through flesh and bone.

C: 要记得哦，不能对说出去！
E: Remember, don't tell anyone!

C: 看样子你从悲伤中走出来了。
E: Seems like you're no longer depressed.

C: 但是！成本太高了！下次不许这么做了哦！呜呜…帕姆的杯子。
E: But! The cost was too high! Next time, please don't do this! Boohoo... That was my mug.

C: 「备忘：买牙膏」
E: "Reminders: Buy toothpaste"

C: 你站着打瞌睡，不麻才怪！
E: No wonder your legs were numb!

C: 有他们在，我们才能腾得出手，去处理其他事务。这样一来，下层区的居民，既能同时得到铁卫的保护，也能得到我们的帮助。
E: With them, we can be free to deal with other affairs. In this way, the Underworld people can not only get the protection of the Silvermane Guards, but also get our help.

C: 关于列车：列车设施
E: About the Express: Facilities

C: （轻轻松松。果然「智取」就是我的强项。）
E: (Piece of cake. Looks like Smarts are my strong suit after all.)

C: 那么，就由我来为你讲解这次禁区演练的目标吧！
E: Here, let me explain to you the goal of this restricted zone drill!

C: 出发吧，{NICKNAME}教官！就由你来给这群新兵蛋子好好上一课！
E: Get going, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! It's up to you to teach these rookie chumps a lesson!

C: {NICKNAME}教官，在你面前的有两个选择！
E: Drillmaster {NICKNAME}, you now have two choices!

C: 这些酬劳，你收下吧！铁卫禁区近期应该不会再组织演练了——希望你能在别处找到更多的乐子！
E: Take this reward! There shouldn't be any more Guard drills in the restricted zone for a while — I hope you can find fun elsewhere!

C: *电波滤音*异象中的隐形怪物非常敏锐，请小心回避，不要被怪物先发制人。接下来何时启动装置，就交由你自己判断了。
E: *electronic voice* The invisible monsters affected by the anomaly are extremely keen, so be careful and don't let them catch you off guard. As for when to activate the generator next, I'll leave that up to you.

C: …万一我真的想放过它呢？
E: ...What if I really want to let it go?

C: 你实在想不到这场对话还能如何延续下去，于是你选择了高举白旗投降。希望你不会消耗太多时间来遗忘这场简短又尴尬的谈话。
E: You have no idea what more to say, so you ended the call. Try not to dwell on this brief yet awkward conversation.

C: （看来，这搏击俱乐部里有个所谓的邀请函……）
E: (I guess you need an invitation from the Fight Club...)

C: 你看，我收到了邀请函。
E: See, I got the invitation.

C: 各位被选中的战士啊，我们的「黑暗拳斗大赛地下擂台」终于在今天迎来了新的挑战者……
E: Attention, chosen ones, the Underground Ring's Dark Fist Tournament finally has a new challenger...

C: 你试图敲打窗棂求取回应，却只得到一片死寂。
E: You try rapping on the window for a response, only to be greeted by a deathly silence.

C: 你去哪儿了…？
E: Where have you been...?

C: 她的身体虚弱，眼睛也看不见东西…要是一个人在外面出事了，我该如何是好？
E: She's always been frail, and her eyes can't see... whatever would I do, if something happened to her out there?

C: 这就对了——规矩不能坏嘛。消耗「崇高道德的赞许」后，你就可以心安理得地打开这可疑的箱子了。上吧！
E: That's it. Rules are made to be followed. You will have nothing to worry about when you use a "Praise of High Morals" to open this suspicious suitcase. So, go ahead!

C: 你好，米歇尔。
E: Hi, Michel.

C: 杰帕德与佩拉——你可以问问他们，这些通缉令为何个个千奇百怪。
E: Gepard and Pela — you can ask them why these Wanted posters are so strange.
Two.

C: 我、我的刀！
E: M—My blade!

C: 这又有什么稀奇的？心地上无风涛，肉身也能自在如意。明镜台上多浮尘，纵能有千种变化，亦不得入碧洞仙境。
E: What's so strange about this? If my mind is tranquil and serene, then my flesh would become truly liberated. A soul flooded with mundane concerns can never enter the world of celestials, no matter how much the individual can shapeshift.

C: 罐子应声而碎，仿佛什么都没有发生过。不…就是什么都没有发生过。
E: The vase shatters as if nothing had ever happened. No... nothing did happen.

C: 您可别打退堂鼓啊，我和鹤运物流现在可不能没有您。
E: Don't give up now. The Heron Express and I can't do it without you.

C: 希望下次别打怪了…
E: Hopefully there won't be any monsters next time...

C: 「鹤运物流安全系统」已自动接管远程控制重返安全区。
E: The Heron Express Safety System has automatically taken over the remote control to return to the safe zone.

C: 拜拜，我先走了。
E: Bye for now, I'm off.

C: 这些问题一直困扰着我们，但我好像问错人了。
E: These issues have been plaguing us forever, but I think I'm seeking answers from the wrong guy.

C: 哦对，也分你一些代币吧…光凭我自己的话，想要用光它们还是太难了。
E: Oh yes, here are some of those tokens for you... It'd be too hard for me to use them all by myself.

C: 唔…虽然很抱歉，但我可能暂时还没恢复过来……
E: Hmm... I'm really sorry about this, but I don't think I've recovered just yet...

C: 啊…您也看不到吗？那您可…真幸福。
E: Ah... You can't see these, either? Then you are... truly happy.

C: 可就是这样一个人，怎么如今变得如此固执己见、如此故步自封了呢？
E: But how could someone like that somehow become so stubborn now?

C: …呼…吓死我了——
E: ...Phew... That scared me half to death...

C: 但后来我却反倒因此幡然醒悟，明白了镜头能够传达的东西总归有限，有些东西需要亲自让人们体验才行。
E: But later on, I suddenly woke up one day and realized that the camera lens is always going to be limited in what it can depict, and some things have to be experienced by people for themselves.

C: 你们姐妹的关系……
E: About your relationship with your sister...

C: 肯定是平时工作被压榨得太狠，才和你聊了多大会儿啊，就好像一晚上没睡觉似的。
E: It must be because I'm getting ruthlessly put through the wringer at work, and that's why I've blabbed on so much. It's kinda like when you stay up all night.

C: 战斗过程暂且省略。最终，我成功制服了全部贼人，开着抢来的战舰一脚油门驶离了星系——这是最刺激的部分。
E: I won't go into details for now about the battle. In the end I managed to defeat all the bad guys, then put the pedal to the metal to pilot this stolen warship straight out of the star system — now THAT was the most thrilling part of the story.

C: 后来我仔细一看，才发现那家伙已经死去多时了。
E: Upon closer look, I realized that this guy was dead, and had been so for some time.

C: 毁于星核的文明并不少见。最初我也没把这事放在心上，打算上报完坐标就走——直到我发现了这些小行星表面的符号。
E: Civilizations destroyed by stellarons are not altogether uncommon. At first, I didn't really take it seriously, and was planning on warping out of there as soon as I'd reported the coordinates — that is, until I discovered those symbols on the surface of the asteroids.

C: 于是我对同伴说，我们应该把它当成智慧生物、当作有思想的人来对待。大家都觉得我不可理喻。
E: So I told my companions that we should view it as an intelligent species and a sentient person. Everyone thought that I was being unreasonable.

C: 为了幸福生活，人们可以任劳任怨地付出。可如果最好的结局也只是生存——环境恶劣、神经紧绷、看不见半点好转的希望，那苦难似乎就不是值得忍受的东西了。
E: Humans will labor ceaselessly with no complaints for the sole purpose of living in happiness. However, if survival is the best outcome they can possibly reach — with a harsh environment, intensive mental stress, and absolutely no hopes of the situation ever improving — then the idea of enduring present sufferings for a better future would suddenly seem a lot less appealing.

C: 可惜，即使这样差劲的生存，也不是那么容易就能得到……
E: Unfortunately, even such a terrible life is something that many people have to fight to achieve...

C: 为表歉意，这个送你当赔罪礼吧，拿好。
E: Here's a token of my apology. Please keep it.

C: 你还不知道吧，伙计？我和我的团队已经为匹诺康尼这个城建项目工作很久了。
E: You know what? My team and I have been working on this development project in Penacony for quite some time.

C: 怎么个「一般」法？
E: How so?

C: 没有对任何人不敬的意思，但这个工程整个就…缺乏想象力。
E: With all due respect, that entire project... lacks imagination.

C: 对「门」过于执着…？这算什么评价，在逗我吗？要不让说这话的人把他家里的门都拆了如何，看看他的小日子还能过吗？
E: We're obsessed with doors? What kind of a comment is that? Is it a joke? How about he remove all the doors in his house and see whether it makes his life better?

C: 哈——这可真是个好问题！有人叫我「空想家」，有人叫我「麻烦精」、还有人叫我「坏事的」…您觉得哪个比较好听？
E: Aha, that's a great question! Some call me delusional, some call me a troublemaker, and some call me a loose cannon... Which nickname do you think is the best?

C: …是啊，谁能拒绝气泡丰盈的美味糖浆呢。不过嘛，苏乐达真正吸引我的……
E: ...For sure I am. Who could resist this bubbly, delicious syrup? Actually, there's something else about SoulGlad that truly appeals to me...

C: 你是说有人背后搞你？
E: Do you mean someone sabotaged you?

C: 可恶！既然这样我也不能坐以待毙！得想出个对策才行…对策…对策…有了，这不是现成的嘛——
E: Drat! I can't sit around and do nothing! I need a plan... A plan... A plan... Wait a minute... Since you're here...

C: 实际上呢，大家对他有怨气是因为——那小子犯了事，我们所有人为了给他收拾烂摊子，连续加了一个礼拜的班。
E: The truth is, that dude made a mistake. We're mean to him because we had to work overtime for a week to clean up his mess.

C: 真是的，一个两个，整天盯着我使绊子是什么意思！嫉妒我能干、敢干是吧？
E: What's wrong with these people? Seems like they just can't wait to see me mess up! Are they jealous of my talent?

C: 可要我说，就算是「空想」，好歹也还能想、敢想；就算是「坏事」，好歹也还是做了事。
E: But then again, being "delusional" means I still have the ability and courage to dream. Even if I'm really a troublemaker, it's only because I'm trying to achieve something.

C: 你说话我可真不爱听。
E: I don't like the way you talk to me.

C: 简称「肠胃通」？
E: So, abbreviated as "I-POO"?

C: …怎么，嫌少？别拿那种眼神看我！能和匹诺康尼未来的首富搭上关系，你理应感恩戴德才对！
E: ...What, not enough? Don't give me that look! You should be grateful to be associated with the future richest man in Penacony!

C: 我的要求明明不高…我只希望能得到尊重！顶多，顶多还有赚点小钱……
E: I'm not asking for much... All I want is a bit of respect! And... and maybe some money, if possible...

C: 我能把你头上的灰毛都拔光吗？那样你就可以拥有一颗洁白无瑕、魅力四射的光头了——
E: Can I pull out all the gray hair on your head? That way, you'll have a pure and pristine bald head that exudes charm...

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 不要试图与这样的人交谈，除非你实在无处打发时间。
E: Don't bother talking to him unless you're desperate for something to do.

C: 我一定会让大家成为巨星的。
E: I'll make sure all of them become superstars.

C: 这可不能说，员工手册明令禁止对外透露薪资——
E: That's confidential. The employee handbook strictly prohibits the disclosure of our salary...

C: 在这场比赛上，出现了一群穿着简陋、行为粗野的星际流浪汉，他们来自某个被毁灭的原始星球，唱着难听无比的歌声，像是忆域迷因的鬼叫。
E: A group of shabbily dressed and boorish interstellar wanderers showed up from a destroyed primitive planet. Their singing voice was so terrible that it sounded like the haunting cries from the Memory Zone Meme.

C: 但星际和平娱乐当时的营销部长却突发奇想，给了他们做了一个包装——说他们是某个已逝星神的传人，唱的是失传的艺术瑰宝。
E: However, the marketing director of Interastral Peace Entertainment at the time had a whimsical idea. He packaged the wanderers as the descendants of a deceased Aeon and claimed that they were singing an artistic piece that was long lost.

C: 我想跟你聊聊。
E: Can we talk...?

C: …你的这副模样，让我很担心。我出现在这里、出现在你面前，就是为了对你说——
E: ...I'm worried about you, seeing you down in the dumps. I'm here because I have something to tell you...

C: 回到你自己的生活中吧，希望这是我们最后一次见面。
E: Please pull yourself together. Return to your life. Hopefully, this is the last time we meet each other.

C: 一个个都说要挣脱社会的束缚，好像公序良俗怎么碍着他们了一样。
E: They're all eager to break free of the societal constraints as though law and order are hampering their lives.

C: 你知道吗，我最大的优点就是敏锐的嗅觉——尤其是对于金钱与时尚。
E: You know what? My keen senses, especially for money and fashion, are my strong suit.

C: 在那之后，我又走过许多星球，结局不外如是。一种「情绪」开始在我的系统中萌芽——怀疑。
E: I visited many more planets after that, and they all wound up the same way. A "feeling" started germinating in my system: Skepticism.

C: 遗憾的是，人类永远不会满足于手头的武器。战争结束后，他们依旧会索求更大、更强的武器，直到玩火自焚，把视线所及的一切都烧成灰烬。
E: The thing is, humans are never satisfied with what they have. After a war ceases, they will continue their search for bigger and stronger weapons until their greed backfires and razes everything they have to the ground.

C: 你在这待着别动，我这就叫人送你出去。
E: You stay here and don't move. I'll get someone to escort you out.

C: 你好，开拓客。
E: Hello there, Trailblazer.

C: 放宽心，孩子。会实现的，总有一天，我打心里这样祈盼。到那时，基金会便没了存在的必要，我的心也能重拾真正的欢欣和喜悦。
E: Relax, kid. It will become true. One day it will — that I pray, from the bottom of my heart. And when that day comes, the foundation will lose its raison d'être — and I'll be free to pick up my true passion and joy once more.

C: 把我在<color=#dbc291ff>影视乐园寄存的一批玩具</color>取出来，带到<color=#dbc291ff>「黄金的时刻」的约定交易点</color>就行了。时刻保持你的善意，孩子。
E: Just grab the <color=#dbc291ff>batch of toys I stashed at the theme park</color> and take them over to the <color=#dbc291ff>meeting spot at Golden Hour</color>. And always be kind, kid.

C: 有这批「玩具」，应该能把最艰难的半年撑过去了。
E: With these "toys," we should be good to make it through the rest of this difficult year coming up.

C: 刚才那人是谁？
E: So who was that just then?

C: 那句话怎么说来着？「保持善意，孩子」。
E: What was that line she just pulled? "Keep on being kind, kid."

C: 你不是要消灭战争吗？
E: Didn't you say you want to eliminate war?

C: 多说无益，对付你这种作弊者，就应该给你点皮肉之苦，看招吧！
E: Words are pointless. Cheaters like you ought to be taught a lesson in pain! Get ready!

C: 眼前的男人神色恍惚，面上泛红、嘴角噙笑，似乎陷入了什么美妙的幻觉。
E: The man's eyes are dazed, his face flushed, and the corners of his lips curled in a smile, as if he had been enchanted by some splendid illusion.

C: 你之前跑哪去了？
E: Where were you before?

C: 冷静下来了？
E: Have you calmed down now?

C: 我都这个年纪了，如果要找工作，就只能从事音乐以外的行业…
E: At my age, if I really were to search for a job, I'd have to look for one that's not related to music...

C: 那只能靠你自己努力…别打岔！
E: Then you'd better work hard for it... Anyway, don't interrupt me!

C: 在财富学院，能赚到钱才是硬道理。当今这寰宇，有哪个大厂比得过星际和平公司？我都跟业界大拿喝咖啡了，还不够给母校争光？
E: A universal truth that we learned at Fortune Academy was to accumulate wealth by any means necessary. And when we look at the world today, is there any company that's bigger than the IPC? I'll be rubbing shoulders with industry leaders, but that's still not enough to bring glory to my alma mater?

C: 这些照片从各种角度拍摄了你对战时的英姿，其中甚至有许多面部特写。
E: These photos showcase you from various angles, and there are even a lot of close-ups of your face.

C: 倒立可以让血液流向大脑，增强思考能力，还能锻炼平衡感呢。
E: Going upside down can improve blood flow to the brain, boost mental capacities, and enhance sense of balance.

C: 纸钞哪里比得上本鸟，我会突然冒出来，还会啾啾叫。哼哼！
E: Banknotes? Hmph, I'm a far better find than paper money. I pop out for surprises, and I even tweet!

C: 谢谢你，好心人。
E: Thank you, good-hearted stranger.

C: 问得好——因为球外势力的威胁已经大到不能忽视了。
E: A good question! Because the extraterrestrial threats to our planet are already too great to be ignored.

C: 啾…我，我当然知道的啾！但是原曲的拍子太慢了，快一点更好啾。
E: Tweet... I... Of course I knew that! But the tempo of the original song is too slow. It'd be better if it's faster.

C: 好呀啾，你想听关于什么的故事呢？啾？
E: Alright, which story do you want to hear? Tweet?

C: 关于折纸小鸟…
E: Tell me about the origami birds...

C: 排排坐，分甜果…
E: Let's sit down and share the fruit...

C: 每处入口，每个拐角…可恶，甚至每条走廊上我都安排了小鸟去站岗啾！石头老板的手下！你！到底是怎么混进来的啾！
E: At every entrance, in every corner... Blasted, I've even dispatched birds to stand guard in every corridor! Boss Stone's lackey! You! How did you get in, tweet!

C: 别磨磨唧唧的了，是硬派鸟就直接答应下来啾！
E: Stop with the hemming and hawing. Real hardcore birds will say yes in a split second, tweet!

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，负责整理书房的小家伙是个特别勤劳的孩子，甚至有点太勤劳了，上次差点就把自己关在<color=#dbc291ff>柜子里</color>了啾…
E: Hi-yah! Let me think: The little one cleaning the study is a hardworking child, to the point of overworking. Previously, the little one almost locked itself in a <color=#dbc291ff>cupboard</color>...

C: 每根枝条的位置都恰到好处，再用金灿灿叶子和闪亮亮宝石做点缀啾~如此兼具美感与使用性，才是美梦小镇的金叶广场啾！
E: Every branch has been placed meticulously, and it's embellished with gold leaves and sparkling jewels, tweet! Combining both aesthetics and utility is none other than Dreamville's Goldleaf Plaza, tweet!

C: 所有人都喜欢金叶广场，但偏偏有个不懂得欣赏的蠢蛋，居然想把本公子的杰作占为己有啾！
E: Everyone loves the Goldleaf Plaza, but there's always an idiot who doesn't appreciate its beauty, and even wants to usurp my creation, tweet!

C: 你也沉迷于本公子的杰作吗？哼哼，请尽情欣赏吧~
E: Are you also mesmerized by my masterpiece? Hehe, admire it to your heart's content~

C: 哼哼…没错，有个喜欢粉色的孩子念叨着<color=#dbc291ff>要在广场中布满冰激淋车</color>，或许可以在餐车附近看到它啾？
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a child who likes the color pink, constantly harping on <color=#dbc291ff>installing ice cream carts all over the plaza</color>. Maybe you can see it near the food truck, tweet?

C: 哼哼…没错，有个怕冷的助手一到晚上就昏昏欲睡，总找些奇怪的地方取暖安眠…找找那些<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机底下</color>吧！说不定它就躲在那里啾！
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a helper who is afraid of the cold. It gets sleepy at night, and will find weird places for warmth and rest... Look <color=#dbc291ff>underneath the pinball machines</color>! Maybe it is hiding there, tweet!

C: 因为边上看到了羽毛。
E: Because I saw feathers on the side.

C: 你为什么要拖着声音说话？
E: Why do you drag out your sentences like that?

C: 小鸟慌乱地叫了几声，扑棱翅膀飞走了。不知为何，这让你感到一丝愧疚…
E: The little bird let out a few cries of panic, spread its wings, and flew away. For some reason, you feel a slight sense of guilt...

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个爱逞威风的孩子，羽毛刚刚长齐就想飞到高的地方——最近总是在找小屋里的最高点啾。或许能在<color=#dbc291ff>某个高高的地方</color>见到它呢？
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet... Oh yeah! There's one child that loves to show off, always trying to fly to the highest spots, even though their feathers have just come in... I keep finding them in the highest areas of the hut lately, tweet. Maybe you will be able to find them in <color=#dbc291ff>a high-up area</color>?

C: 哼哼…没错，有个怪怪的小帮手总说自己想当大坏蛋呢，最近一直在<color=#dbc291ff>「留影板」附近</color>做着反派修行…明明折纸小鸟团结起来的话也有很强大的力量啾！
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one oddball assistant that says they want to be a great villain. Recently they've been hanging around <color=#dbc291ff>near the photo board</color> doing their villain training... But origami birds would be so powerful if we all gathered together in solidarity, tweet!

C: 火、物理、虚数。
E: Fire, Physical, Imaginary.

C: 这可太糟糕了，希望人没事啾。
E: That's terrible, I hope everyone's all right, tweet.

C: 搞得我现在还晕乎乎的啾。
E: I'm so dizzy, tweet.

C: 啾！你干嘛，我看得正入迷呢。
E: Tweet! What are you doing! I was so engrossed.

C: 低音部的大家！
E: Now, the bass and contralto section!

C: 你们三只小鸟义结金兰…
E: The sworn brotherhood of you three birds...

C: 零分！
E: Zero points!

C: 这里是「星际决胜庆典」的场馆。别说打碎容器了，哪怕踢一脚广告牌都不行！
E: This is the venue for the Interastral Tournament Festival. I would not allow you to even kick a billboard, let alone smash a vessel!

C: 这么狂妄！看来今天必须得好好修理你一顿了——等着去蹲大牢吧！
E: You're a hooligan! Looks like I'll have to teach you a real good lesson today... I hope you're ready for prison!

C: 你为什么要打烂我家的门？
E: Why are you smashing in the door to my home?

C: 咱们动身吧！
E: Let's go!

C: 永仁仔细地将你护在身后，将你带到了一处隐秘的地方让你躲了起来。在确保自己足够安全后，你这才敢侧身观察永仁……
E: Yongren places himself in front of you to shield you from danger, then leads you to a hidden spot and tells you to hide there. Once you are sure of safety, only then you dare to turn to the side and observe Yongren closely...

C: 咪咪接下来打算做什么？
E: What are you doing to do next, Mimi?

C: 你在鉴爻轩门口干什么？
E: What are you doing here, at the entrance of the Looking Bronze?

C: 要不这样吧，你把那拳法招式给我演示一遍，我瞧瞧便知道是怎么回事了。
E: Why don't we do this? You gimme a demonstration of the move, and I'll take a look at what's going on.

C: 是吗？欺骗仙舟公职人员是罪加一等，你可要想清楚了！
E: Really? Deceiving a Xianzhou public official is a first-degree crime. Think carefully!

C: 朋友，你说话还是好吓人。
E: Friend, you are still a real scary talker.

C: 谈不上是我的专业范畴，不过我略知一二。有什么录音能让我听一下吗？
E: It's not my area of expertise, but I know a little. Have you got any recordings for me to listen to?

C: 唉哟！喊什么，吓我一跳…你没见过岁阳是怎么着？
E: Hey! What are you yelling for! You freaked me out... Haven't you ever seen a heliobus before?

C: 行，来吧。
E: Alright. Bring it.

C: 我能问问你吗，为什么你这么不喜欢我用这种方式登场呢？
E: May I ask: Why is it that you dislike my method of entrance?

C: 香炉就像是走在半道上不愿意再继续散步的大狗，使劲往外拉拽也无济于事。
E: The incense burner is like a large dog who refused to keep walking while splayed halfway down a path — pulling it out by force doesn't work in the slightest.

C: 他大概会什么都不做，在原地等我。但我实在也懒得动弹……
E: He would probably do nothing and just sit there. But I'm really too lazy to move...

C: 我只是随手打鼓…
E: I just wanted to bang the drum...

C: 这位{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你也是目击者吗？我们正在有偿征集一起车祸的现场信息。
E: Young {F#lady}{M#sir} over here, are you a witness? We're trying to solicit information about a car accident, and we can make it worth your while.

C: 管那么多干嘛？反正被撞的和拿钱的都不是我，我只是个看热闹的。
E: Why do you care? Anyway, I'm not the one who got hit or the one getting compensation. I'm just a guy here rubber-necking.

C: 这里是梦境，韦。人们在梦里总能做到些特别的事情，比如保驻青春。
E: This is the Dreamscape, Wes. People can do some amazing things inside a dream, such as maintaining their youth.

C: 暂时离开。
E: Leave for now.

C: 没意见的话，赢的这些钱我就带走了喔。哈，多谢！
E: Now, if you don't mind, I'll be taking my money. Hah, cheers!

C: 不过您都看到了最后，应该很满意对吧？行嘞，您喜欢就好！
E: But since you've stayed till the end, you should be satisfied, right? Well, as long as you like it!

C: 一只华美精致的水晶酒杯漂浮在半空中——围绕在它身边的是三个不同颜色的玻璃酒瓶。
E: A gorgeous and exquisite crystal glass hovers in midair, surrounded by three different bottles of liquor.

C: 行，我来帮你问问。
E: Sure. I'll help you.

C: 你将视线投向严肃的绿色酒瓶。
E: You shift your gaze toward the earnest green wine bottle.

C: 我明白了——我一定会认真考虑您的建议，然后再做选择的。
E: I've got it... I'll take your opinion into account before making my decision.

C: 勿要自责，阿绿，我早知道你的香醇天下无敌，纵使走遍匹诺康尼，也不可能有比你更高档的美酒。
E: You must not blame yourself, Green! I have always known that you are finer than any wine in the land. I could travel the entirety of Penacony and find no finer wine than you!

C: 若真是如此，那段磁带大概就是他的动机。
E: If that's the case, that cassette tape was likely also the motive.

C: 偶像这是市场需求，市场你懂吗？大家就好这口。
E: An idol is what the market demands. Do you understand what's the market? Everyone likes this.

C: 你是我教过最好的学生，最后一个动作了，加油！
E: You're the best student I've ever taught! Last one. Ya got this!

C: 劫富济贫！
E: Steal from the rich to give to the poor!

C: 老大，米凯先生说，如果我们缺什么东西，都可以找他商量。
E: Boss, Mr. Micah said that if we need anythin', we can go talk to him.

C: 咦？这是……
E: Huh? This is...

C: 我也好想…和你一起啊。
E: If only... I could...

C: 我不是我没有…
E: I'm not. I didn't...

C: 一曲结束，观众们如梦初醒，忙不迭地连声喝彩。
E: The song ends, and the audience rouses from a seeming dream, scrambling to pay tribute to her with applause.

C: 邀请匹诺康尼本地朋友！
E: Invite your Penaconian friends!

C: 还剩最后一盘，{NICKNAME}，你想好要放什么了吗？
E: It's their last one, {NICKNAME}. Have you thought about what you're gonna put inside?

C: 现在可以和自己合影吗？
E: Can I take a photo with myself?

C: 你说话真的很像一个人…
E: Your speech reminds me of someone...

C: 顺带一提，我不会解读前人留下的线索，就只有靠你了。
E: By the way, I haven't a clue about how to decrypt the hints they left behind. Can I leave that to you?

C: 我没有任何头绪……
E: I'm totally lost...

C: 你没有通过安检机器的考验。
E: You failed the security scanner's test.

C: 至此，你合格地扮演了一件行李，并成功完成了传输带冒险…就这样悄悄离开这里吧，别被认识的人发现了，祝你好运！
E: You've successfully played the part of luggage and completed the conveyor belt adventure. It's now time to slip away without drawing attention from anyone you know. Good luck!

C: 我看这{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}确实能处。
E: I reckon {F#miss}{M#mister} could actually handle it!

C: 没注意，怎么了？
E: I haven't, why?

C: 百闻不如一见，我现在就带你去见识见识，什么叫无敌的飞行表演。
E: Well, seeing is believing. I will take you to go and see a truly unbelievable flying performance for yourself.

C: 仁科引以为傲的飞行编队，它来啦！
E: Renke's pride and joy, the flight team, it's here!

C: 你们要找的人就在门后。
E: He's behind this door.

C: 莫要担心，我二人在「巡猎」的命途上钻研颇深，擅长对单作战，不会殃及无辜。
E: No need to fear. We have dedicated great study to the path of The Hunt. We excel at solo contest, and we will not harm the innocent.

C: 我虽然没什么武功，但有一个法宝紫金瓠。若我叫一句敌人的名字，只要他答应了，便会被吸入这紫金瓠中！
E: I may not have any martial arts skills, but I have a sacred vessel: my amethyst gold gourd! If I call my enemies' names, and they respond to me, they will be sucked inside the amethyst gold gourd!

C: 没错，我就想听这些！
E: That's right. I want to attend these lessons!

C: 原来不是行为艺术啊？
E: So it wasn't performance art?

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 不过刻法勒的光辉在奥赫玛留下过不少痕迹，你需要的话，我可以给你推荐——
E: But Kephale's light has left many markings upon Okhema. If you need, I can give you recommendations...

C: 宫廷风黑色连衣裙。
E: A royal-court-style black dress.

C: 开玩笑的…它看起来丝毫没有要从墙壁里冲出来的迹象，已经彻底不动了。
E: Just kidding...It doesn't look like it's going to lunge out of the wall at all. It is completely still.

C: 是的，有什么好怀疑的吗，这种级别的数学题，你已经快速心算好了。
E: That's right, what is there to suspect? You can practically do the mental calculation for such a juvenile math problem.

C: 我想看你被咬。
E: I just wanted to see you get bitten.

C: 试着自己想想。
E: Try thinking about it yourself.

C: 罪人是卫兵。
E: The culprit is the guard.

C: 呼呼。这里不是我的归宿，想搬到干燥的地方去。
E: *crackle* This is not my home. I want to go somewhere dry.

C: 呼呼…好讨厌潮湿。
E: *crackle* I hate getting wet.

C: 师傅请留心，这可是徒儿最强的招式——
E: Master, please be careful. This is my strongest technique—

C: 这里是「晖长石号」。
E: This is the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 你做出了最难以接受的选择，即使宽宏如塔塔洛夫，怕是都无法容忍你的暴行。
E: You've made the most unacceptable choice. Even someone as magnanimous as Tatalov will be unable to accept your savage act.

C: 深绿色的苔痕深深地渗入了顶板，这个专为小妖精设计的信箱是如此老旧，以至于风可以毫无障碍地从裂纹中穿堂而过，如同你的目光。
E: Deep green moss has crept into the top plate. This mailbox, made for tiny fairies, is so old that even the wind can slip effortlessly right through the cracks, just like your gaze does.

C: 怀着忐忑不安的心情，你在信箱附近等了一整天。直到某个时刻，你忽地听见了「哐当」的声响……
E: With a nervous heart, you waited by the mailbox all day. Until, at a certain hour, you heard a sharp "clang"...

C: 陈旧的信箱手足无措地站在这里，摇摇晃晃，好像一阵风就能吹倒。
E: The old mailbox stands there awkwardly, tottering as if a gentle wind might knock it over.

C: 写完了。也没什么难的嘛。
E: All done. Well, wasn't so hard after all.

C: 教它一些非同凡响的料理！
E: Introduce something a bit more exotic!

C: 这里怎么会有大地兽？
E: Why is there a dromas here, of all places!?

C: 被人打理过的空花盆，铺着厚厚的土。
E: An empty flowerpot, clearly tended to, its soil piled thick.

C: 原来如此。黑塔女士提到，她在翁法罗斯的世界里看到过两位无名客的残像，只是那看上去既像残留的忆质，又像数据的投影。
E: That explains it. Madam Herta mentioned observing traces of the two Nameless in the world of Amphoreus, which appeared to be both residual memoria and data materialization.

C: 即使在学派战争中，其余权杖的算力被榨干时，也无人敢动用那种不受控的智识杀器——它们要么被永久封存，要么被远弃星渊。
E: Even amid the Scholars' Strife, when other scepters were depleted of computing power, none dared employ such ungovernable Erudition weapons — they were either sealed forever or cast into distant stellar abysses.

C: 为了使演算不受外界干扰，帝皇权杖将己身隐没于凹陷空间，并主动扭曲了内部的时间流速。
E: To protect its extrapolations from external disruption, the Emperor's Scepter secluded itself in a concave space and deliberately warped its internal time flow.

C: 嘻，本来还想说，唯独这个不可以呢。不过……
E: Hehe, I was gonna say "everything but that one"! But...

C: 我会躲到你找不到的地方。
E: I'll hide somewhere you'll never find me.

C: 看哪，白色的鸟儿们，正向着我们感慨的美景飞翔呢。
E: Look, those white birds are soaring toward the mesmerizing scenery.

C: 如果把这些故事分享出来，她一定会很感兴趣吧。
E: If you share these stories with her, I'm sure she'll be pleased.

C: 唔…越说越奇怪了，要不，我们还是边走边想吧？
E: Hm... The more I think about it, the odder it gets. How about we ponder this matter over a walk?

C: 交代清楚！若有半分踟蹰，尼卡多利的长矛将贯穿你的胸膛！
E: Explain yourself! If I sense a hint of hesitation, the long spear of Nikador will pierce your chest!

C: （描述掌粮官的外观）
E: (Describe the appearance of the food provisions officer)

C: 我的疑惑得到了解答，就不打扰了。供品在神迹前，请您慢用。
E: My concerns have been answered. I will disturb you no longer. Your offerings are before your miraculous shrine, and I hope that you will enjoy them.

C: 尽管木马的嘴部没有活动，但你仿佛听到了一声怅然的叹息…从遥远的过去传来。
E: Though the wooden horse's mouth does not move, you feel as if you hear a mournful sigh... A sigh that echoes from the distant past.

C: 看来又被延后了，也罢，命运三相殿的行政速度实在配不上雅努斯的名号。
E: Delayed again, I see. The Temple of the Three Fates operates with a sluggishness unbefitting of Janus' name.

C: …去往「布利萨」的那个。
E: ...The one bound for Bulsa.

C: 无尽的旅途实在太过疲累，神驹究竟为何要传递神谕，又是从何处来、最终要归向何处？雅努斯从不解释，只是将一项又一项的使命交给我们。
E: The endless journey proves too exhausting — why must divine foals deliver prophecies, where do we come from, and where are we bound? Janus offers no answers, only endless missions.

C: 活火还在。
E: The Living Flame is still there.

C: 无处可去的人们循着火光而来……
E: Those with nowhere to go follow the glow of the flames...

C: 柴…火柴……
E: Matches... Fire matches...

C: 我们从半神议院撤离时，几只黑潮造物紧追不舍。我自知不过是凭借风堇阁下的祝福才苟存于世，所以自告奋勇留下，去对准雅努斯密径的符印。
E: As we retreated from the Demigod Council, several Black Tide Creatures pursued us relentlessly. Knowing that I had only survived thus far thanks to Lady Hyacine's blessing, I volunteered to stay behind, to align the sigil of Janus's Hidden Passage.

C: 跟这水盆聊聊。
E: Chat with this basin.

C: （还是不玩了）
E: (Don't play with it)

C: 珍稀物种的表达方式与思考逻辑，与成年人类是不相同的。
E: Their ways of expression and thinking are very different from human grown-ups.

C: 你来这里多久了？
E: How long have you been here?

C: 人老了，对于正义的探索已经比如年轻时那样热烈了。
E: I am old. My passion for justice is slowly fading away.

C: 里面的遣词造句都非常晦涩难懂，我没日没夜地研读，也只能窥见其中一隅的哲思。
E: It is written in a very obscure fashion. Even though I've spent countless days and nights studying it, I can only understand a fraction of its philosophy.

C: 黑塔•万有应物科？
E: Herta Department of Implement Arts?

C: 不会吧……我再审查一遍好了…要是这次又出错，我肯定完蛋了……
E: I can't be... let me check again... If I make another mistake, I'll be dead...

C: 离开这里，又有什么地方是绝对安全的呢？稍微想一想就能知道答案。
E: Where can I find absolute safety if I leave? It's a no-brainer.

C: 但好在偶尔会有几个同你一样的知音出现，让我有信心坚持在这一条正确的道路上。
E: But fortunately, once in a while I meet people like you who share the ambition. It gives me faith to stick to the right path.

C: 你这可算是问对人了。能够解答这个问题的，全空间站恐怕只有我世玲一人！
E: You're asking the right person. I've gotta be the only person in the space station who can answer this question!

C: 那些破石头是什么？
E: What are those rocks?

C: 我还是不欺负你了。
E: You know what? I'll stop making fun of you.

C: 我想问…
E: Well...

C: 看你好像很闲，不如过来配合我做个「小」实验吧？
E: You look like you need work. How about assisting me with a tiny little experiment?

C: 观光？拜托，别把我当成呜呜伯那种长不大的小家伙，我才不像它一样，成天没心没肺地傻乐。
E: As in to sightsee? Oh, please, don't treat me like one of those Wubbaboo. I'm nothing like it, I don't spend my days goofing around.

C: 你是什么口味的呀？
E: I wonder what you taste like?

C: 没事自己一边玩去！求你了！
E: I'm begging you to get out of my way if you need nothing else from me!

C: 断开连接再重连。
E: Disconnect and reconnect.

C: 研究还在继续，如有需要可以给我留言。
E: The research is still ongoing. Drop me a line if you need anything.

C: 已经能做论断了，关于此盾。
E: On this shield, conclusion can one make.

C: 实在是没救了…
E: There's truly no hope for you...

C: 还是不要破坏他人的财产。
E: Probably best not to damage other people's property.

C: 几道声音自你耳侧响起，像是从遥远的地方传来，话语有些模糊不清。
E: A number of voices begin to sound through your ears. Their words sound muffled, as if they have travelled a great distance.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 很好的论题。我得说，这个疑问困惑过我很长的时间。被黑潮摧毁后的阿卡索斯城看不见，摸不着，即使去到原先的地点，也只能找到一堆断壁残垣。
E: A very fine topic. I must say, this question has troubled me for a long time. Having been devoured by the black tide, one can no longer see nor touch Icatus. Even if you go to its location, all you will see is a pile of ruined remains.

C: 我与你恰好相反。「阿卡索斯」不会因为覆灭而消失，我们依旧可以谈论它、怀念它，就好像它仍是个真实存在的城邦似的。
E: I believe precisely the opposite. Icatus does not simply stop existing because it was destroyed. We can still discuss it and reminisce on it as if it were a city that still truly exists.

C: 合作愉快。出城前我还需要稍作准备，直接在营地集合吧。
E: It's a pleasure teaming up with you. I need to prepare a few things before we go, so let's meet up at the camp.

C: …啊…是…这样吗？
E: ...Er... Is... that so?

C: 最后的城邦，「奥赫玛」…末日之下，这里应该是庇护所有人的家园，也包括你们。
E: The last city, Okhema... It ought to be a sanctuary for all in the end times, including for people like you.

C: 阿芙罗小姐，发生什么了？
E: Miss Aphrea, what's going on?

C: 你？你是那个悬锋小子！
E: You? You're that Kremnos punk!

C: 有看见一个孩子跑过去吗？
E: Did you see a child running this way?

C: …你好？
E: ...Hello?

C: 放心，完全不带怕的。
E: No worries. I can handle anything.

C: 对了…我…我还有个不情之请。如果方便的话，可以拜托你顺带留意一下小提图斯的情况吗？我和他家老头子也算交情不浅，着实有些放心不下。
E: And... one more thing, if I may. Could you possibly check on young Titus too? His father's an old friend, and I'm concerned.

C: 哎，老哥，帮个忙吧！就借我一次，我核验完论文就还你。
E: Bro, c'mon — help me out here! Just loan it to me once, and I'll just check it against the paper and give it straight back to you.

C: 我们群里那么多人，都回复一个「收到」，关键信息不就被刷上去了？没能及时看群的人很容易错过消息。
E: There're so many people replying in the chat with "Received" that the key messages get overwritten. People who don't stay glued to the chat risk missing out.

C: 很…很感动。
E: It's... touching.

C: 不，你听错了，那是我的肚子在叫。
E: No, you misheard. That's actually MY tummy rumbling.

C: 哎，看来这个办法根本没奏效啊。
E: Well, looks it doesn't work at all.

C: 嗡嗡嗡……
E: Grumphhh...

C: 但确实是我们有错在先，若非是科可波阁下奔跑的速度过快，这位公民也不会受伤。
E: True, we were at fault first. If not for Kokopo's incredible speed, this citizen wouldn't have been injured.

C: 刻法勒？刻法勒从来没有给我残酷的命运。
E: Kephale? Kephale has never given me a cruel fate.

C: 所以，刚才，是在干什么？演戏？
E: So, just now — was that acting?

C: 我第一次当泰坦，没经验…
E: First time being a Titan here, kind of new to this...

C: 啊，和{F#女士}{M#先生}您报一报喜，我已经不会再小偷小摸啦，现在也不用缩在箱子里睡觉了。
E: Ah, {F#miss}{M#mister}, I wanted to share some good news — I'm not stealing petty things anymore, and I don't have to curl up in a box to sleep now.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你发现了吗：刚才那幅壁画里，许多人跪在地上表示臣服；而这幅壁画里，人们却自然地伸出手分享光明。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, did you notice? In the previous mural, lots of people knelt down in submission, but in this one, everyone naturally reaches out to share the light.

C: 孩子，不要害怕——
E: Child, do not fret.

C: 你倒是说完啊！
E: At least finish what you were saying!

C: 不过，还没轮到我们觐见祭司，天灾就降临了。大家慌不择路，大多跑进圣殿的后厅，我们跑上了二楼…那种事，实在不想再经历一次了。
E: However, before it was our turn to meet with the priest, the disaster struck. Everyone panicked and fled, most of them running into the back hall of the temple, while we made our way to the second floor... I really don't want to go through that kind of thing again.

C: 自己动手。
E: Handle it yourself.

C: 放心吧，我们会把它们送到你们的手上！
E: Rest assured, we'll deliver them to you!

C: 医师帮我们包扎了伤口，嘱咐我们好好休息。我的胳膊上挨了两剑，千万别留下病根啊，我还指望着用它搬货呢。
E: The healer helped to dress our wounds and instructed us to get plenty of rest. I was cut by a blade twice in the arm, and I really hope that doesn't leave any lasting side effects. I still need it to move goods.

C: 可是，这两个小鬼，竟然敢说…刻法勒的庇佑会失去效力，圣城里的大家只能白白等死。真是气死我了！
E: But these ankle-biters claim... Kephale's shield's failing. That we're sitting ducks here in the holy city. I cannot bear it anymore!

C: 是这么回事啊…我好像猜到了。
E: So that's how it was... I think I guessed it right.

C: 哈哈！小维吉妮娅一向藏不住心思，只是未曾将其挑明。
E: Haha! Little Verginia has always worn her heart on her sleeve, even if she never said it out loud.

C: 她是如风一般的诗人，能去到任何想去的地方，也能在任何地方逗留。至于我……
E: She's a poet like the wind, free to go wherever she wants and linger wherever she pleases. As for me...

C: 当初打算离开树庭的时候，似乎也是这样的心情呢。只是，这次的出走，我竟然犹豫了这么久啊。
E: I had the same feeling back when I first planned to leave the Grove. But this time... I can't believe I hesitated for so long about running away.

C: 我、我并没有自责，阿波罗尼也无需道歉。只是，我想在大家的见证下，再、再、再试一次……
E: I—I'm not blaming myself, and Apollonius doesn't need to apologize. It's just that, I want to t—t—try again... with everyone here as witness...

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 委托名「你在哪」，推演结果是「不告诉你，不告诉你」。
E: Request: "Where are you?" - Extrapolation Result: "Not telling you, not telling you."

C: 选择卷九
E: Select Volume 9

C: 蜜酿是吧，让我尝尝——
E: Honey brew, huh? Let me have a sip—

C: 感激不尽，阁下。我会准备好谢礼。
E: Many thanks! I'll have your payment ready when you return.

C: 找资料？
E: Do some research?

C: 好啊！千年未见的味道，这下又能喝着啦——
E: Fantastic! A taste lost for a thousand years, now ours to enjoy again—

C: 他恐怕还会心系自己的研究…
E: He'd probably still be thinking about his research...

C: …一饭之恩！对，就是这个！
E: The Moles always repay our debts!

C: 总之…你就收下吧，别和我客气啦！
E: Anyway, just take it! Enjoy your gift!

C: 总之…克拉拉会去找史瓦罗先生问问看的！
E: Anyway... I'll talk to Mr. Svarog first and see if he likes the idea!

C: 你俩肯定挺投缘的吧。
E: I knew you two would hit it off.

C: 而且…你竟然要把列车送进战场吗？我只能想到和后勤调度相关的用法……
E: So... you're thinking of turning the Express into a combat unit? Personally I'd only use it for logistics...

C: 人好像不怎么样，给他们留下了心理阴影。
E: He was seemingly up to no good and left a lasting psychological scar.

C: 她是天才俱乐部的人。那个俱乐部只有被博识尊认可的存在才能加入，是精英中的精英，亿亿无一的天才。
E: She's a member of the Genius Society. Only those approved by Nous may join — the smartest of the smart... her genius is one in a trillion.

C: 这我不能告诉你，会被卡芙卡念叨的。
E: I cannot comment on such matters, or I will be reprimanded by Kafka.

C: 难道不是吗？
E: That's called common courtesy.

C: 求你别吐在车上…
E: Try not to vomit on the Express. Please!

C: 有可爱的玩偶…
E: Those dolls are adorable...

C: 备好了应急药物，还得掌握药品的用途及使用方法，我也教给列车长啦～
E: Having stocks is one thing, but knowing a medicine's usage and application is another. I briefed the conductor on the instructions!

C: 应该会吧。
E: I think so.

C: 仙舟上有些「石头」药材呢，能研磨成粉，顺着水喝下去能够镇心安神、温肺定喘。
E: The Xianzhou has a type of medicinal stone that can be ground into a fine powder and mixed with water. Drinking it calms the nerves and warms the lungs.

C: 但是你却把自己的口袋打开了……
E: But you opened your pockets...

C: 你的动作好像被精心设计过…
E: The way you move seems to be deliberately designed...

C: 于是我们就联合了起来，定期开展座谈会，分享自己的生活和工作。现在大家都感觉状态好了很多呢。
E: So, we banded together and met up frequently to talk about our lives and work. Now everyone feels much better.

C: 这就是…阿尔乔姆见过的风景吗？
E: Is this... what Artem saw?

C: 诶？真的吗？没有啦，其实还好吧？
E: Oh? No no, you're really not.

C: 当然解散啦！大家逃都来不及呢。只不过听说还有少部分人还打算继续支持他，说什么「要陪伴波少洗心革面」。
E: Of course it did! We couldn't get away fast enough. But I hear some people plan to keep supporting him and want to "be there for him as he changes."

C: 你又在偷懒？
E: You are slacking off again?

C: 嗯嗯，你自便吧，我得休息了，一会儿还要继续看诊呢。
E: Sure, you go ahead. I need to get some rest before my next shift.

C: 看到了什么有趣的东西？
E: See anything interesting?

C: 像玲可一样成为极地探险家吧。
E: Then become an outdoor explorer like Lynx.

C: 完全看不到啊……
E: It's completely out of sight...

C: 啊，我想起来了——是星球仪——那上面有个和帕姆非常相似的图案！
E: Ah! I remember now! It's the armillary sphere. There's a shape on it that really looks like Pom-Pom!

C: 的确算不上大。
E: This one is definitely not on the large side.

C: 是吗？那我们可要找机会对弈一番了。
E: Really? Then we should have a match someday.

C: {NICKNAME}！快来快来，我有东西要给你~
E: {NICKNAME}, come here! Hurry! I have something for you!

C: 咖啡本就苦涩，就像人生…
E: Coffee is supposed to be bitter, like life...

C: {NICKNAME}，我也很期待你将来能写下你们的旅程游记，到时候，记得让我看看。
E: {NICKNAME}, I hope you too will be able to make a travelogue of your own and include your experiences. I would love to read it.

C: 他拥有了全新的人生，已不再是与我相熟的故友了。
E: He has a new life now. He is no longer the old friend I once knew.

C: 我不是收藏家，不知这些石头的成色你可满意？
E: I'm not much of a collector. I hope you find the quality of these stones satisfactory.

C: …当上十王司的判官，说不定也是我的必然。
E: ...Then perhaps being a Ten-Lords Commission judge is also my destiny.

C: 这就对喽。
E: Right answer.

C: 如果能和大家一起去往那些世界，亲眼看到音乐中描绘的景象，那就更好了……
E: If only I could journey to those worlds with everyone and see them for real...

C: 实、实在抱歉！之前只听说列车长样貌可爱，但没想到居然…希望它不会生气。
E: I—I'm so sorry! I heard that the conductor was extremely adorable, but I never expected... Hope they're not angry.

C: 统统买下，不做选择！
E: Get them all! No need to choose!

C: 你遇见过他们？
E: You've met them?

C: 后来…梦开始褪色、扭曲。再然后，我就醒了。
E: And then... the dream started to twirl and fade away. Then, I woke up.

C: 谁？三月吗？
E: Who? March?

C: 我最近有点衰…
E: I've been feeling a little down on my luck...

C: 好奇！可以现在打开吗？
E: I'm curious! Can I open it now?

C: 可以找杨叔，杨叔见多识广！
E: Look for Mr. Yang. Mr. Yang is very experienced and knowledgeable!

C: 我来之前照过镜子，明明那时还没有的……
E: I looked in the mirror before I came and didn't see any...

C: 别看这兵器还年轻，但心态已经十分老成了，平日里很喜欢关注各类热点新闻。
E: This weapon may be young, but he's already very mature. He likes to keep up with the all the latest news.

C: 其实我只是在自言自语…这个问题太难回答了。
E: Actually, I was just talking to myself... I don't think this question can be answered.

C: 小时候，他和我说如果世界上有人知道答案，那就只有「帝弓司命」了。
E: When I was little, he told me that if there was anyone in the world who knew the answer, it would be the Reignbow Arbiter.

C: 还以为你在品茶呢。
E: I thought you were drinking some tea.

C: 想来是它葱绿得太过美丽，才这么有人气。
E: I imagine its popularity lies in its vibrant liveliness and beauty.

C: 什么人会把「生命培育箱」放在这堆破烂上？
E: What kind of person would leave a Life Incubator on a pile of junk like this?

C: 唉，你知不知道华莱士和我是什么关系？上个月他和西蒙勋爵打赌输了，托我处理了两套宅子——这一笔买卖我赚了小半年的收入。
E: *sigh* Do you even know the kind of relationship I have with Wallace? Last month he lost a bet with Lord Simon, so he got me to sell two of his mansions. I earned nearly half my annual income just from those deals.

C: 呜哇！帕姆最喜欢{NICKNAME}了！
E: Aha! One of Pom-Pom's best buddies!

C: 车厢温度给你调好啦，欢迎回来哦！
E: Pom-Pom adjusted the cabin temperature for you~ Welcome back!

C: 语气这么勉强？说明你其实就是在说「不」。
E: You don't sound so convinced. I understand, you are saying "No."

C: 所以我决定做个成熟的商人，转嫁风险、预支利益。这可是个发大财的机会，你千万别错过了！
E: Therefore, I decided to be a smart businesswoman who knows how to spread risk and maintain cash flow. This is a great opportunity if you are looking to make a fortune. Don't miss out!

C: 那边的朋友，请留步！对对，就是您！不好意思…能耽误您几分钟吗？
E: Excuse me! Sorry—Yeah, sorry to bother you. Can I take a moment of your time?

C: 当然可以。
E: Of course.

C: 光作为粒子，它携带信息；那我接触光，本质就是在接触信息。根据我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论，宇宙是多个相互关联的平行实体。
E: Light as a particle carries information. Building on that, if I am exposed to light, I am exposed to information. My big universe time tunnel theory holds that the universe consists of multiple interconnected entities that are running in parallel.

C: 而这条理论就出自自学成才的伟大民间科学家，雷金！
E: And my name, Regin, will go down history as the greatest civilian scientist!

C: 但愿它能和布洛妮娅阁下一样，为贝洛伯格带来新鲜的风。
E: I hope that, like Her Excellency Bronya, it can bring something fresh to Belobog.

C: 一旦体型有变化，又或者唱久了嗓子变粗，就要告别舞台——说是什么回归家庭生活，实际上却是再也接不到戏了。
E: Once their physiques change or their voice becomes coarse, they have to bid the stage farewell. They'll call it "spending more time with the family," but everyone knows that's the end of their career.

C: 我希望靠自己的实力稳固地位，才不想用这种手段啦。
E: No, I want to keep my job fair and square. I have no interest in theater politics.

C: 你没有打扰到我。
E: I wasn't bothered at all.

C: 哎呀呀～话可不能这么说，塔米拉小姐的演技和观众缘都是一流的呀。
E: Shhh, don't say that. Tamila's performance skills are top-notch and the audience loves her.

C: 感觉…我现在已经有点麻木了，总觉得没必要再蹚军队里的浑水——反正他们再怎么胡作非为也不会影响到我的生活，我何必自找不痛快呢？
E: I just feel like... I've grown numb to it already. There's really no reason for me to put up with the military. Whatever nonsense they get up to has no bearing on my life. So why should I be making myself miserable?

C: 你的做法是正确的，坚持下去吧。
E: You are doing the right thing. Keep at it.

C: 那不是桑博吗？
E: Isn't that Sampo?

C: 你可千万不能同情他啊！不然轻则贪小失大，重则倾家荡产……
E: Don't ever sympathize with him! You'll either end up losing some money at the minimum, or even see your family fortune go down the drain...

C: 地底有什么推荐的活动吗？
E: Do you have any recommendations for activities in the underground?

C: 还有家大饭店，就是歌蒂开的那家，菜品挺不错——前提是歌蒂没有突发奇想，研究出一些难以下咽的诡异菜谱……
E: There is a restaurant, the one owned by Gertie. The food there is quite good... so long as Gertie doesn't come up with some weird recipes on a whim...

C: 还考虑什么？时机不等人。
E: What do you say? Time waits for no man.

C: 也没关系啦，直觉告诉我，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}一定是个很可爱的人…阿丽娜想要和可爱的人交朋友！
E: It's okay. Alina thinks you are sooo cute... I like being friends with cute people!

C: 种类还挺多的呢，嘿嘿～不过我最喜欢的就是毛绒玩具啦。
E: All kinds of things. Hehe... my favorite is the plush toys.

C: 才一天，不是很正常吗？没什么好大惊小怪的……
E: It's only been one day, which is pretty normal. It's really no big deal...

C: 你那套说辞全是糊弄人的。
E: Your story is all a sham.

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 哼，真是拗不过你。
E: Hmm... You win.

C: 这该上哪儿弄啊……
E: Where do we get that?

C: 你要是感兴趣，尽管问我就是了。
E: Just let me know if you are interested.

C: 鉴定？鉴定什么？
E: Appraisal? Of what?

C: 能有我遗憾吗？算了，不说了……
E: It's more of a pity for me. Forget it...

C: 那个，我们之前有见过吗？抱歉，我好像没什么印象了…
E: Er, have we met before? Sorry, I don't seem to remember...

C: …咦？你是什么时候来的？不好意思呀，我在抓洞螈呢，没注意到你。
E: ...Hey? When did you arrive? Sorry, I was catching olms and I didn't notice you were here.

C: 你当真这么觉得？不是单纯在顺着我的话往下说？
E: Do you really think so? You're not just trying to appease me?

C: 继续听…
E: Keep listening...

C: 咳，没什么，这事就让它过去吧。这就叫不打不相识，是吧？
E: Anyway, let bygones be bygones. That fight actually made us closer, right?

C: 哈哈，暂时没有。如果有的话，我会主动联系你的。
E: Haha, not right now. If I do, I'll get right in touch with you.

C: …你要报复我了？
E: ...Are you taking revenge on me?

C: 戍卫官好严格哦。
E: The Captain's so uptight.

C: 不过在那之前，克拉拉还想再试试其他办法……
E: But before that, I still have to think of some other ways...

C: 人可真不少。
E: You've got quite a few members.

C: 我还有事，先走啦。
E: I've got to do something else. I'll get moving first.

C: 哟。
E: Yo.

C: 糟糕，你今天的嗓子状态不算太好…是时候来一片润喉糖了！
E: Oh no! Your throat isn't feeling great today... Better take a lozenge!

C: 就这周末吧，老地方。
E: This weekend — same place.

C: 你品品这能量菌菇煎茶……
E: Have a taste of this Energetic Boiled Mushroom Tea...

C: 哎，你快出出主意。
E: Hey, hurry up and give me some ideas.

C: 这个月药品还有剩吗？
E: Do we have any medicines left this month?

C: 头疼，真头疼啊……
E: What a headache...

C: 其实，输赢并不重要…
E: You know what? It doesn't really matter if you win or lose...

C: 做方案要考虑实用性。
E: First, all plans must take practicality into consideration.

C: 你似乎看到他暗暗松了口气。
E: You swear you saw him sigh in relief.

C: 扯远了，都忘了这茬了！咱们持明的人口不会自然增长，所以天舶司那边的外派审查也相对宽松一些，咱经常有机会去其他世界进行狩猎。
E: Oh, I completely forgot your question! We Vidyadhara can't reproduce naturally, so the Sky-Faring Commission's travel reviewers are fairly lenient, which means I've had many opportunities to hunt on other worlds.

C: 那个人还挺喜欢引人瞩目的，你要是没见到过，我反倒是会奇怪。
E: He likes getting attention. I'd be truly surprised if you haven't seen him.

C: 怎么样？喜欢吗？…呃，看你表情是不太喜欢…算了，我再想想。
E: Huh? Do you like it? ...Uh, I can tell by your expression that you're not a fan... Forget it, I'll come up with another.

C: 你为什么在这里？
E: Why are you here?

C: 生活气息…别说了，我之前也有这样的考虑。
E: Make the place feel alive... Actually, I've thought about that.

C: 我和那位勤务斗智斗勇了两百年，却始终没能分出胜负…会产生惺惺相惜之情也是在所难免的。
E: I've been pitting my wits and courage against this orderly for over 2 centuries, but we've never been able to determine who the winner is... Growing to appreciate one another is nothing short of inevitable.

C: 我明白，他是个天生的捕食者、天生的斗士！这激发了我的好胜心——我对帝弓司命发了毒誓，自己一定要在这场猫鼠游戏中胜过他！
E: I get it: He's a natural predator, a natural fighter! All of this inspired me to grow competitive — I vowed to Reignbow Arbiter that I would definitely be the winner in this little cat-and-mouse game of his!

C: 对仙舟人而言好像还算年轻。
E: That's still pretty young for Xianzhou natives.

C: …哎，看着您，我就发愁。
E: ...Tsk, just seeing you makes my head ache.

C: 没有就不要吗，嗨，要的人多了去了。
E: If I don't, does that mean you don't want it? There're plenty of people queuing up for it.

C: 可惜，在仙舟本地薅了一轮羊毛后，那些个店主也就知道我底细如何。为了这项事业可持续发展，我便把「亓」改作「芳」……
E: Unfortunately, after running a few scams all the shopkeepers had me figured out. I ended up changing my name from "Jing Juan" to "Jing Fang" so I could keep on spinning this side-hustle...

C: 没事儿，我溜达。
E: Oh nothing, I'm just strolling about.

C: 弟弟有什么需求不答应？
E: What do you want that he rejected?

C: …长乐天哪有那么多空余的地方…哎？{NICKNAME}大人，您来了啊？
E: ...There's nowhere near enough free space in the Exalting Sanctum though... Eh? {NICKNAME}, what are you doing here?

C: 我管你是球棒侠还是扫帚侠，在幽囚狱是龙也得盘着，是虎也得卧着！
E: I don't care if you're a galactic baseballer or a galactic janitor! It doesn't matter how powerful you are, The Shackling Prison will have you on your knees!

C: 而且案牍库记录的可不止是身份信息——犯人们的生平经历、犯罪事实、口供证词、判决文书、服刑表现，事无巨细，统统都记录在案。
E: Plus, we log more than just personal information. Every minute detail is recorded from prisoners' life experiences, criminal records, oral testimonies, judgment documents, and even their performance in serving their sentence.

C: 这工作干这么久不枯燥么？
E: Do you not find it boring and monotonous, having worked here so long?

C: 那大人您请自便，有需要再喊我。
E: Then please feel free to look around, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. Call me if you need anything.

C: 静斋卜官啊？你为什么要打听这个？
E: Jingzhai, our Managing Diviner? Why do you ask?

C: 大毫执事官曾经在云骑军中的军事经历赋予了他独一无二的责任感。战场的直觉让他在处理地衡司的大事小情时能够有的放矢。
E: Official Dahao's military experience in the Cloud Knights gives him a unique sense of responsibility. His intuition on the battlefield grants him a definite sense of purpose when dealing with issues big and small at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 你为什么也在这里？
E: Why are you here too?

C: 难道说公职人员在上班时间应该跟您聊天开玩笑吗？
E: How would you feel if public officials crack jokes and chat with you during work hours?

C: 你听说过一句话吗？「能力越小，责任越小」，我就是那个「小」。
E: Have you heard of this saying before? "With little power comes little responsibility." The little refers to me.

C: 怎么是「据我观察」呀？
E: What do you mean based on your observation?

C: 后来我想通了，主要是因为灾难结束了以后，净砚和大毫两位大人腾得出手来收拾我了。
E: Later on, I found out the reason. It was because Jingyan and Dahao were free enough to deal with me after the disaster ended.

C: 这是囤积在流云渡逾期未取的邮包。一般来说，这种逾期未取的邮包我们是要拍卖掉的，但您毕竟是流云渡的英雄，这些邮包我可以直接低价卖给您。
E: This is an overdue parcel in the backlog at Cloudford. Usually we auction the abandoned ones off, but you're the hero of Cloudford after all, so why don't I cut you a deal and sell it to you directly for a low price?

C: 我们翔水商会是天舶司麾下七大商会之一，您要是有大宗商品想要出手，欢迎随时来找我。
E: Our Aquaglider Guild is one of the seven guilds under the umbrella of the Sky-Faring Commission. If you have any bulk goods that you wish to sell off, come see me any time.

C: 现如今虽然在您的帮助下解决了危机，可危机的余波却迟迟没有消退……
E: And now, despite your help with resolving the crisis, its aftermath continues to rage on...

C: 这位叫茂贞的小哥愿意帮我解决问题，我也相信他能帮我处理批文…我就待在这里，关键是那个麦尔彦…要是能识相点就好了。
E: There's a guy called Maozhen who's keen to help me solve things. I trust he can help me with document approval... So I'm staying here. The key is Maryam... If she could just be a little more sensible.

C: 听上去你等公文很有经验？
E: You sound really experienced when it comes to waiting for official documents.

C: 毕竟公文系统是联盟法政体系的重要组成部分，格式和措辞都大有讲究，有时候一字之差就会酿成重大行政事故，没受过专业训练的人写不来。
E: Official documentation is an extremely important part of the alliance's legal system. The style and terminology are extremely particular, and sometimes just a small difference in wording can lead to a massive administrative accident. Anyone without formal training wouldn't be able to compose them.

C: 当然，每个老板的实际情况都不一样，具体要做些什么，这就得视乎老板们的需求了。
E: But of course, every customer has their own custom order. The specifics of what I actually do are governed by the needs of the customer.

C: 但三百多年过去，我也长大了，观众也看腻了，我也就做不成摇钱树了，唉…后来我就和家里闹掰了。没办法，对他们而言，我已经没有价值了。
E: But three hundred years went by, and I grew up. The audience got bored, and I wasn't that valuable anymore... *sigh* Then, I got estranged from my family. There's nothing for it. To them, I'm worthless.

C: 你就别打听了，我是卜官，保密是我的职业道德。
E: Okay, enough questions. I'm a managing diviner and keeping trade secrets is a part of my professional ethics.

C: 真搞不懂，这太卜司上下怎么就没个说人话的，就想着从我这儿套话，哎……
E: I just don't get it. Why does nobody at the Divination Commission speak normally? Everyone's always trying to trick me into saying something, sheesh...

C: 有什么内幕消息吗？
E: Do you have the lowdown on the situation?

C: 我不便再打扰了。
E: I won't bother you any further.

C: 如有需要，您可以随时喊我。当然，想要随便看看也无妨，请自便。
E: If you need me, just holler at me any time. Or just take a look yourself if you like. Whatever you prefer.

C: 现在…我虽只是个普通药商，但我想做个好人。
E: But now... I'm just a normal medicine trader, but I'd still like to be a good person.

C: …唉，阁下真是求知若渴。您问吧，请尽量问一些在下能回答的。
E: ...Ah, your thirst for knowledge is unquenchable. Please ask away and I'll answer what I'm able to.

C: 说起来，仙舟「方壶」的护珠人与我们有些不尽相同。「方壶」龙尊统御万民，六司六御都是辅佐龙尊的存在。
E: Speaking of which, the Pearlkeepers aboard the Xianzhou Fanghu are different from us. The Fanghu's high elder governs over all the citizens, and the Six Charioteers of the Six Commissions all support the high elder.

C: 鳞渊境现在怎么样？
E: How is Scalegorge Waterscape these days?

C: 啊啊，我受不了了…这样的日子什么时候是个头啊……
E: Ahhh, I can't take it anymore! When will this end...

C: 开始勉强找到一点丹士长的感觉了…但还是不太行啊，我这人不适合当领导啊。
E: I'm more familiar with the job now, but I still don't think I can handle it. I'm just not cut out to be a leader.

C: 哎呀呀…又失败了，为什么会这样，这已经是第一千三百八十一次失败了。
E: Ow-ow-owww... I failed again? How? This is my <unbreak>1,381</unbreak>st failure...

C: 哦，是你啊…我手头有不少事务要处理，你若是有事，不妨直说。
E: Oh, it's you... I have a lot of things on my plate... Could you be more concise with your question, if you don't mind?

C: 那你的本体在哪里？
E: Then where is your real body?

C: 我怀疑第一次的结果。
E: Because they have doubts about the first result.

C: 呃？您是慕名而来的游客吗？这种地方到底有什么好逛的……
E: ...Huh? Another tourist lured in by those ads? What's so great about this rundown alley anyways...

C: 可别想糊弄我呀，{F#小老~妹}{M#小老~弟}。
E: Oh, don't try to muddle through, {F#lass~}{M#lad~}.

C: 听起来可能有些费解，但这是比较高深的放生理念。尽管日记本不是生命，但那上面记录了我们的生活点滴。
E: This may sound odd, but the action of releasing diary books sits at a much more profound level. Although a diary book is not a living creature, it is a record of our lives.

C: 我想买点吃的。
E: I'd like to buy some food.

C: 别糊弄我了，你这不就是酒？
E: Alright. Stop muddling. This is alcohol, isn't it?

C: 哈哈哈哈，来杜氏茶庄的客人口味不一，总有人想要品尝别处没尝过的口味。
E: Hahahaha, different customers have different preferences, and some of them always want to enjoy flavors they've never tried before.

C: 哼，我价格又没开多高…买进卖出，是生意人的本分，怎么老有人说我是「奸商」呢？我明明是无商不奸啊。
E: Heh, it's not like I'm squeezing my customers... Buying low and selling high is a merchant's bounden duty. They keep calling me a greedy merchant, but all merchants are greedy, aren't they?

C: 不过，希望老板用上我这改造的机巧鸟，和鹤运物流那些好鸟有些不一样……
E: I hope you can use these cycranes that I modified. They're different from the Heron Express cycranes...

C: 但是数据库不能代替思考，这道理不用我告诉你，你也明白吧。
E: But having a database doesn't mean you don't have to think. I'm sure you don't need me to tell you that.

C: 要是我的演奏能帮您抚平些许不安就好了。
E: If only my performance could calm you down, even if just a little...

C: 奇怪的是…等我收到信没多久，陶德老师就再也联系不上了。
E: Oddly enough... I lost contact with Master Todd shortly after I received his last letter.

C: 没想到老师他还是…虽然代价如此沉重，但无论如何，也让他摸到了那个「课题」的秘密，这大抵称得上是，半只脚踏入「智识」的门槛内了吧？
E: But I didn't expect Master to... In the end, he glimpsed the secrets of truth, even though it cost him dearly... Perhaps he eventually entered the threshold of "Erudition"?

C: 还有别的事，先不聊了。
E: I got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 我毕竟是个丹士，就算永陷幽囚深狱，也不可能就这样甘愿一辈子手搓日用化学品。
E: I'm an alchemist, after all. Even if I'm doomed to eternal confinement within the Shackling Prison, there's no way I'd be willing to resign myself to a lifetime of making household chemical products by hand.

C: 这星阵棋的话，算是擅长吧，很少有弈者让我为难。
E: If you're talking about starchess, I guess I'm quite good at it. Not many are a match for me.

C: 以少胜多，是情势所迫，不应自得。若胜不了，就应当尽早撤离，保全实力。这样也不失为一种胜利，你觉得呢？
E: Circumstantial victories should not lead to complacency. If unable to win, one should retreat early to preserve strength. That should also qualify as a type of victory, wouldn't you say?

C: 彦卿是持明族，耳朵被咬了。
E: Yanqing is a Vidyadhara boy who once got his ears bitten.

C: 我娘说「武艺小小…」、「勿以小小…」什么来着…咳咳，总之就是有需要的时候，本姑娘自会出来行侠仗义！
E: My mom said, "A Stick in Time Saves Mine...," or whatever the original saying is, I can't remember the whole thing... Ahem, anyway, it means that I'll show up whenever someone needs help from my "stick"!

C: 这罗浮上的外乡人可真多，听闻有个老喜欢翻街边的瓶瓶罐罐的，上次还遇见个背着大箱子的行商，什么人都有，真不愧是罗浮啊。
E: There are lots of Outworlders here on the Luofu. I've heard about one who likes to fumble around with the cans and bottles alike on the streets. And some time ago, I met a traveling merchant carrying a huge casket. Luofu sure is a welcoming place for visitors.

C: 开口问吧！
E: Please ask away!

C: 怎么才能像你一样有学问？
E: How can I become as knowledgeable as you?

C: 无妨，本座可以帮你简要梳理一下思路。
E: Go ahead. I might be of help in sorting out your thoughts.

C: 呵，你们还说狐人不会老呢。夜深人静时，翻着过去的相册，心里又是自豪又是担忧，终究不由得垂泪——还有什么比这更像个老人吗？
E: Ha, and you people say foxians don't age. In the quiet of the night, flipping through old photo albums, I feel both proud and worried, and I can't help but shed tears — what could be more reminiscent of an old person than this?

C: 唉，说起来，等着看诊的病号堆积如山，就算逃出去也要不了多时就得被人「请」回来。算了，算了……
E: *sigh* The backlog of patients is so long that even if I do escape, I'll be dragged back here in no time. Forget it...

C: 我看你也没有什么毛病…总之，你先去买个烟熏牛肉堡吧，吃过之后如果还有什么毛病，就再来找我吧。
E: You don't look sick to me... Anyway, I suggest you get yourself a smoked beef burger first. If you still feel unwell after that, just come back to me.

C: 那咱们聊会天吧。
E: Let's chat!

C: 下次再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 你的问候，我会帮你转达的。
E: I'll pass on your regards.

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: 想找你聊聊天。
E: I wanted to chat with you.

C: 噢，是这样子的，我们店的高定都是限量款，没有付款的话是不可以试的。
E: Oh, about that, our shop's haute couture has limited quantities. You have to pay in advance to try them out.

C: {NICKNAME}，请问有什么事吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, how can I help?

C: 客人有所不知，在仙舟上古玩的概念总是很模糊，古玩的价值则很含糊。换句话说吧，抛开文化的价值，客人以为仙舟人觉得古玩重要吗？
E: You may not know this, but antique collecting on Xianzhou has always been a vague market, as are the prices of antiques. Cultural value aside, do you think that Xianzhou natives consider antiques important?

C: 你现在在干什么？
E: What are you doing now?

C: 回到仙舟一般做些什么？
E: What do you normally do back on Xianzhou?

C: 你误会了，我已经记不得我有多少次在星槎海因为难吃而痛苦愤怒。这是因为我的标准太高了吗？不对，这是一种本源的、生理的排斥。
E: You are mistaken. I have long forgotten the number of times I've lost my temper from the terrible food at Starskiff Haven. Is it because my standards are high? Nay, it is a raw, visceral reaction to their food.

C: 不好意思，又自顾自说了这么多。千言万语不如你直接去我的店里尝尝，从现在开始预约，估计两年后就能吃到了。
E: I'm sorry. I'm tooting my own horn again. Instead of throwing words at you, why not pop over to my restaurant for a taste? If you make a reservation now, you'll get a table in about two years.

C: 那我就放心了，原来我们是不认识的人啊，真是不好意思打扰了。
E: Then we're strangers — and I'm relieved. I'm really sorry for bothering you.

C: 嗨，咱俩都是港口工人，得闲了才来这里练习练习，在别处也不方便。
E: Hi! We're both port workers, so we just come here to practice whenever we find the time. It's not really convenient elsewhere.

C: {F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，你这是…我明白了，你是来向我引以为傲的肌肉许愿的吧？
E: Hey there, {F#lass}{M#lad}. What can I... Oh, I know. You're here to wish upon my marvelous muscles, aren't you?

C: 俱缓陶醉在肌肉的魅力之中。
E: Juhuan has lost himself in the revelry of bodybuilding.

C: 还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 哈哈哈哈，这可不兴打听呀。
E: Haha, that's not something we can talk about.

C: 实不相瞒，公司给仙舟自傲的技术开出了合适的价码，但是实际上具体的洽谈不太顺利……
E: Well, to be honest, we offered a handsome price for some of Xianzhou's proud technological achievements, but negotiations didn't actually go so well...

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}别担心，咱听说「天上一天，人间一年」，时间紧迫，等咱找到神仙姐姐，讨到仙药之后，就得赶紧回去了。
E: Don't worry, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}. I heard that one day in heaven is a year on land. Time is running out. I'll go home once I find the celestial lady and get celestial medicine from her.

C: 好的呀！虽然咱年纪不大，可是知道很多神仙姐姐的故事哦。唔…给你讲一个咱爸爸小时候的故事吧！
E: Okay! I'm young, but I know lots of stories about her. Umm... I'll tell you the story from when my Dad was little!

C: 要是你没什么别的事儿，我就接着忙了。
E: If there's nothing else, I'm getting back to work.

C: 龙尊就是…就是…就是龙尊！你还是去找个大人问问吧。
E: High elders are... well... they're high, and they're elders! It's probably better to go and ask a grown-up.

C: 哈哈，你当真了吗？只是开个玩笑而已。
E: Haha, are you serious? I was just kidding.

C: 工作的具体内容就不要问了，我还不想给驭空大人以外的人汇报工作呢。
E: Stop asking about what I do in detail. I'm not going to report my work to someone other than Madam Yukong.

C: 我猜想，驭空大人也知道这希望相当渺茫，因而才不希望我和她一起深陷其中吧。
E: I guess it's because Madam Yukong doesn't want me to get as deeply involved in the matter as her, knowing how slim the chance of finding Tingyun is.

C: …我敢说那姑娘将来肯定能接下驭空大人的职务。
E: ...I dare say that girl is the next in line to succeed Madam Yukong.

C: 区区令使而已，叫星神过来。
E: Hah, an Emanator? Send me an Aeon, and we'll talk.

C: 我看你也不是仙舟人，给你提个醒——不要指望这帮仙舟老东西！这帮人眼里只有仙舟这一亩三分地，全然看不到整个银河正暴露在危险之中！
E: You don't look like a local, so let me tell you — you can't count on Xianzhou. Those old geezers can barely see what's in front of them, let alone that the whole cosmos is in trouble!

C: 谢谢你，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}。
E: Thanks, {F#sister}{M#brother}.

C: 有句话叫「想发财的人的钱最好赚」，不知道你有没有听说过「演武<unbreak>123</unbreak>彩票」？其实背后的庄家就是我。
E: There's a saying that goes, "the money of those who dream of striking it rich are the easiest to earn." I wonder if you've heard of the "Martial Arts <unbreak>123</unbreak> Lottery"? I'm actually the house behind that.

C: 是关于彦卿大人的么？我们来好好交流一番吧！
E: Is it concerning Master Yanqing? Then let's have a good chat about it!

C: 我从小的梦想就是成为一名天下无双的剑士，为仙舟斩除孽物，建立不世奇功。但我的资质平庸，剑术只练到入门水平，连云骑军的选拔考试都过不了……
E: Since young, I've dreamed of becoming an unparalleled swordmaster, eradicating abominations for the Xianzhou and accomplishing outstanding feats. However, due to my mediocre talent, my sword skills remained rudimentary, and I could not even pass the selection examination for the Cloud Knights...

C: 「开盖有奖」不是骗人的吗？
E: Are you sure the Uncap and Win event is not a scam?

C: 这是乙类驾照…
E: This is a Class-B license...

C: 唉，我重仓了公司的股票。
E: Drat, I stocked up on IPC's shares.

C: 唉，平心而论，我自己也无数次的考虑过是否换行。
E: *sigh* Honestly, I've toyed with the idea of a career change more times than I can count.

C: 谢谢你，亲爱的。
E: Thank you, darling.

C: 幸好它把名字改掉了呀。
E: Lucky they changed its name, then.

C: 转换话题也太硬了！
E: That's not even a segue, it's a non sequitur!

C: 你放心好了，你看不见的。
E: You don't have to worry one bit, you won't see a thing.

C: 我们又见面了，这里看上去也没什么好逛的，您若是对引擎感兴趣，可以直接问我。
E: We meet again. There's nothing else interesting to look at here. If you're curious about the engine, you can ask me anything.

C: 先生，您还是换一家托运吧。
E: Sir, you should choose another carrier.

C: 别来打搅我，人类。
E: Now leave me alone, human.

C: 若你不想学球棒的使用技巧——毕竟这门兵器也委实太过冷门，老夫可以教你单分子线、激光切割枪、或是寻踪破片导弹的使用技巧……
E: If you don't want to learn how to wield a bat — after all, it's hardly a popular weapon — then I can instead teach you a few tricks with the one-dimensional nanowires, laser dissection gun, or frag-seeking missile...

C: 有有有，来，你让我附身在你身上，我偷偷讲给你听听？
E: Yes, yes, yes I do. Come and let me possess you, and then I can whisper it in your ears. Deal?

C: 我专门赶过来看建木的。
E: I came specifically to see Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 都打了十轮了！
E: It's been ten games!

C: 谬谬谬谬谬谬谬…
E: Error error error error error error...

C: 别卷了，求求你了。
E: Stop. Please.

C: 道理我都懂，可是嫉妒心…
E: I get it, but I just can't help feeling envious...

C: 我听说你被批评了？
E: I heard that you were criticized.

C: 趁热吃，别烫嘴。吃完以后心里美。
E: Enjoy them while they are hot, but don't burn your tongue. Fill up your tummy and your heart.

C: 但这是我祖上传下的店铺，我从小就在这铺子里长大……
E: This store is a legacy of my ancestors. I grew up here...

C: 哎，我能理解你，毕竟我也是在金人巷长大的，但我还是签字了…没办法，他们给的实在是太多了。
E: I could understand how you feel, as I, too, grew up in the Aurum Alley. Still, I've penned the contract as their offer is simply irresistible.

C: 那是在准备那个仪式，我爸妈最近都在忙这事。
E: She's getting ready for the ceremony, which my parents have been working on lately.

C: 比如…要是遇到病人在庭院胡闹，该怎么处理呢？
E: For example... what should we do if we encounter patients causing trouble in the courtyard?

C: …休要胡说，吾明明回答得一字不差。
E: ...Don't be ridiculous! I did not misspeak.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，容我为你介绍，这位芙缇尼是我年少时家中的盲仆，我从她这里学到了很多…包括美，也包括很多人生阅历。
E: {NICKNAME}, allow me to introduce you. Futini here was a blind servant in my household during my younger years. I learned a great deal from her... about beauty, and many life experiences.

C: 等你们学完了，就一起去吾师那里喝燕麦粥吧。
E: Once you're done studying, let's all go have some oatmeal porridge at Master's place.

C: 菜谱里也没有。
E: It's not in the recipe book, either.

C: 这么小声干嘛，和迈德漠斯当面说去。至少在最后，你如愿成为了更好的人啊。
E: Why are you whispering? Go tell Mydeimos to his face. At least in the end, you became a better person, just like you wanted.

C: 你好，我吃一点！
E: Hi, I'll have a bite!

C: 有吃有穿，晚上还有暖融融的被窝。这还是人过的日子吗，这简直是元老们过的日子！
E: Food to eat, clothes to wear, and a cozy warm bed at night. Is this even how normal people live? This is living like the Elders!

C: 那就明天见……
E: See her tomorrow...

C: 得到…然后失去，历经挣扎…最终徒劳而返。
E: To gain... and then to lose. To struggle... only to end up with nothing.

C: 嗯。期待与你再次相会…伙伴。
E: Hmm. Looking forward to meeting you again... partner.

C: 呜嗡~荒笛大人，说不定从前也只有我这么大，吃了很多红土，才长成一座山那么大的。
E: Grumph~ Lord Terravox, maybe you were once as small as me too, and only grew as big as a mountain after eating lots of redsoil!

C: 遐蝶姐姐，你有没有试过挽起头发盘成发髻，或者梳起刘海扎成发辫？
E: Hey Castorice, have you ever tried putting your hair up in a bun, or braiding your bangs?

C: 能让你们受伤，是何等劲敌？
E: What kind of formidable enemy could hurt you all?

C: 假如把两者组合起来呢？
E: What if we combine the two?

C: 如果，小小灰想我们了，就捏一捏，娃娃吧！
E: If you ever miss us, just give the doll a little squeeze, Little Gray!

C: 知识过载，害怕了吧？
E: Knowledge overload, scared yet?

C: 站得越高，便越是容易被当作职权的化身，从而忽视那些细微却平凡的部分。
E: The higher you stand, the easier it is for people to see you only the mantle of power, overlooking those small yet ordinary details.

C: 未来属于智械。
E: The future belongs to Intellitrons...

C: 可你已经逼疯十一个室友了！
E: You've already driven <unbreak>11</unbreak> roommates insane!

C: 哦？竟会如此相似?
E: Oh? Do we truly look that alike?

C: 被关押的日子太久了，始终得有些爱好来打发时间。
E: After being locked up for so long, I needed a hobby to help me pass time.

C: 我已经有好几百年没有这种燃起来了的感觉了。
E: I haven't felt so heated up for centuries!

C: 检测中…确定为联盟贵宾身份。
E: Checking... Identity confirmed as a VIP of the Alliance.

C: 好姐姐，那竞锋舰好大啊。
E: Big sis, that Skysplitter is so big.

C: 就能出人头地了！
E: I'll be able to make a name for myself!

C: 坚持才能胜利，加油！
E: The only way to succeed is to persevere! You can do it!

C: 那么你现在准备好了吗？
E: So, are you ready now?

C: 「幽狱大门到底有没有防夹感应呢？」这是你此刻最想知道的问题。
E: "Does the Shackling Prison gate have anti-pinch protection after all?" This is the question you most want to know right now.

C: 材质：服用违禁丹药后的囚犯
E: Materials: A criminal who ingested forbidden medication

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 我嗓子快哑了…有点缺氧。
E: My throat is hoarse... I think I'm lacking air.

C: 应援棒、文化衫、灯牌…
E: Fan lightsticks, fan graphic tees, neon fan signs...

C: 这可是铁臂碰铁臂！
E: This is an Arm vs Arm mirror match!

C: 我买到下一场的前排了。
E: I bought front-row seats for the next match.

C: 宣夜大道上最知名的茶馆，汇聚了全罗浮最懂茶的客人。
E: It is the most famous teahouse on Starwatcher Avenue. Guests who are well-versed in tea knowledge in the Luofu gather there.

C: 宇宙中充满了紧锁的门，仙舟罗浮自然也不例外。
E: The universe is full of locked gates, and the Xianzhou Luofu is no exception.

C: 货运星槎的保险装置紧锁，并不存在「随意开走」这种选项。
E: With the safety device of the freight starskiff tightly locked, the possibility of it being driven off by unauthorized personnel can be ruled out.

C: 尽管迴星港的工人们称其为「失效的种子」，但它内部的玉兆和生物材料「息壤」早已被尽数回收。或许「失效的种皮」会更适合它。
E: Although the workers at the Stargazer Navalia refer to it as a "failed seed," the jade abacus and Fallow Earth inside it have been recollected. Perhaps, we should call it a "failed seed coat" now.

C: 回顾整个制造星槎的过程，你的脑中不禁蹦出了「工业化」三个字。那么，「工业化」到底是什么呢？
E: Looking back on the manufacturing process of starskiffs, the term "industrialization" pops up in your mind. So, what does it mean?

C: 「至目前为止，步离人为首的丰饶之民联军至少与仙舟发生过三次大规模战争。随着前任战首被云骑拘囚，其势力大不如前……」
E: "The coalition of the Denizens of Abundance led by the borisin has had at least three large-scale wars with Xianzhou. Now, the coalition has become a shadow of its former self, following the capture and imprisonment of its former Warhead by the Cloud Knights..."

C: 「叙拉古-III、赤色巴别、奥古尔星环等已死星球的灭亡过程证明，军团中并非只有一意破坏的疯子。」
E: "From the destruction process of dead planets such as Syracuse-III, Red Babel, and the Ogul ring, we can see that there are people in the legion who are not only keen on destruction."

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

C: 「虽然没有明确的证据，但类似的结构不仅出现在军团造物的身体上，在一些受其摧毁的行星上，也会出现类似的虚数流溢现象。」
E: "Although there is no clear evidence to prove it, we can see similar structures on the body of the legion creations. Signs of reversed-progeria are also found on some destroyed planets."

C: 查重率百分之八十…
E: The plagiarism rate is eighty percent...

C: 流光溢彩，流光溢彩~
E: your fantasy~

C: 一只快递箱，以不太体面的方式出现在了地面上。原本尖尖的边角瘪了进去。
E: There is a courier package in a pathetic state on the ground. The edges of the package are all indented.

C: 这箱子沉甸甸的，它装着一个成年人破碎的梦。你决定给它们一个家。
E: This box is heavy. It contains the broken dreams of an adult. You decide to give them a home.

C: 无数怀抱着一丝寻求长生希冀的化外民曾从它身边经过，但没人注意到，行医市集中这个著名地标，是真正天然无公害的长生种。
E: Countless outworlders who long to become a long-life species have walked past the tree, but none of them noticed that the famous landmark of the Healer's Market is a truly natural and harmless long-life species itself.

C: 我要试试黉学的练习题！
E: I wanna give the lyceum's questions a go!

C: 你决定假装没看到。毕竟「巡猎」与「丰饶」的恩怨纠葛，又与你这个「开拓」信徒有什么关系呢？
E: You decide to pretend you didn't see anything. After all, what business does a disciple of Trailblaze have with the feud between The Hunt and Abundance?

C: 地衡司自然不会亏待你。很快，你就收到了一笔举报奖励。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission would never overlook you like that. You soon receive a reward for reporting the case.

C: 你隐约记得「信仰质量理论」这个概念，好像是丹恒给你科普的。简单来说，就是富集了人类信仰的物件，会在人的主观感受上更重。
E: You vaguely remember the concept of the "faith mass theory." You believe it was Dan Heng who taught you about it. Put simply, it states that items filled with the reverence and faith of humanity will subconsciously feel heavier.

C: 如果一个现象只能在人的主观体验中发生，那不就是心理作用吗？你才不信这些「学者」的胡说八道，他们无非是为了骗些研究经费罢了。
E: If a phenomenon only works under the influence of the human subconscious, doesn't that make it no more than a psychological placebo effect? You refuse to believe these so-called scholars. They're just trying to scam grant agencies for money.

C: 那你凑过来点儿。
E: Hmm, well you'll need to choose, first.

C: 那时候绥园人还很多。
E: Back then, Fyxestroll Garden was the place to go.

C: 我现身了啊，他们看不见。气死我了，我鼓起劲吹了口气，他们听见了，然后就开始求我帮他们做题。
E: I did show up, they just couldn't see me. I got frustrated, so I blew a breath of air at them. They heard me and started asking me to help them with their homework.

C: 大部分放在这里的风筝应该是用于纪念逝者，少部分是因为风筝线断了，不小心落在绥园里了——不然，你看，树上甚至也挂着有。
E: Most of the kites placed here are supposed to be dedicated to the dead, and only a few landed here due to snapped strings. Look, why else do you think those kites are on the trees?

C: 紧接着，你听见有个男人反复念叨着什么。
E: Shortly after, you hear a man repeating something to themselves.

C: 门后只有一片颓败的死寂。
E: You hear nothing behind the door but decadent silence.

C: 即便是在梦里，这堆箱子之间也绝不可能藏着一只宝箱怪…大概吧？
E: Even in a dream, there's no way a treasure chest monster can be hiding between these boxes... or is there?

C: 梦中总有一些经历让你没齿难忘，这家店铺旨在帮助人们像复习书本一样重温那份心动。
E: Surely there are some episodes that you simply could not forget in your dream — this shop helps people re-live those tender emotions as if they were revising a book.

C: 人类、皮皮西、智械…这座大型俱乐部欢迎每一位喜爱苏乐达的宾客。这就是匹诺康尼的精神——来者不拒。
E: Humans, Pepeshi, Intellitrons... This massive club welcomes every guest who loves SoulGlad. This is the spirit of Penacony — All are welcome.

C: 头顶那巨型茶杯的大眼睛不再滴溜溜乱转——此刻它正紧紧盯着你。
E: The huge eyes atop the giant teacup stop darting around profusely — it is now fervently staring at you.

C: 几个梦泡占据了沙发前的空间，这些座位现在已经被禁止使用…不过，或许可以试试？
E: A few dream bubbles occupy the space in front of the sofa. These seats are now prohibited from usage... But, why not give it a whirl?

C: 很久、很久以前，早在家族开始着手建设盛会之星以前——那时的匹诺康尼深陷混乱之中，那时的梦境和噩梦基本可以划上等号。
E: A long, long time ago, even before The Family started the construction of the Planet of Festivities, Penacony was in a state of pandemonium. The Dreamscape at that time was no different from a nightmare.

C: …我一直将经典艺术视作一坛佳酿，发酵时间越久就越醇厚，韵味悠长；而匹诺康尼却到处都充斥着气泡丰盈的工业糖浆，欠缺历史的沉淀。
E: ...I always regarded classic art as a fine wine that became richer and more flavorful the longer it was fermented. Meanwhile, Penacony was a place filled with bubbly artificial syrup, lacking in the depth of history.

C: 了解我们，您将拥有迅速累积财富的机会；信任我们，您会获得持续回报的未来。
E: Understand us, and you will own the chance to a swift and bountiful fortune. Trust us, and you will keep reaping rewards of the future.

C: 你有些胆怯地伸出手，小心翼翼地将那团柔软的绒毛置于指尖…然后感受到了前所未有的舒适与安心感。你这时才明白，原来人与人的交流还可以如此愉快。
E: You cautiously reach out, carefully touching that soft fluffy ball with your fingertip... and then a feeling of unprecedented comfort and calm washes over you. It is at this moment that you finally realize how joyful it is to interact with people.

C: …骗人。
E: ...Liar.

C: 希望。
E: I do.

C: 原来如此…我明白了。
E: I see... I get it.

C: 毕竟，谁也不希望在享受梦境的时候惹上麻烦…您说对吧？
E: I mean, no one wants to get into trouble while they're enjoying their dreams... Don't you think?

C: 非常感谢您的体谅，不过与陌生人交流确实是件非常有趣的事。
E: Thank you for your patience. Speaking to strangers is indeed a joyous activity.

C: 所以求求您啦，再多和我说一些您的故事吧？
E: So, could you please tell me a few more of your stories?

C: 为了匹诺康尼的福祉，我居然不得不和理想背道而驰…真是讽刺。
E: It's just... ironic that I have to betray my own ideals for the sake of Penacony.

C: 「黄金的时刻」又度过了安宁的一瞬…真好。
E: Another instant of peace passed in the Golden Hour... Wonderful.

C: 颂歌神啊，为什么要愚弄我？既然赐予我好为人师的慷慨，又何必再给我安上一颗善妒的心——
