E: O god of serenades, why do you mock me so? You've blessed me with the gift of being a passionate teacher, why then, do you burden me with a jealous heart...

C: 不过是只酒瓶子而已，有修的工夫还不如去买个新的，您说呢？
E: It's just a liquor bottle. Instead of spending the effort to mend it, why not just buy a new one, right?

C: 现在他们每天都能享受天伦之乐，顺便赚点外快；我爸负责把货物带进梦境里，我妈负责用伶牙俐齿招呼客人——其乐融融不是吗？
E: Now they get to enjoy life every day and make a little extra cash on the side; my dad is responsible for bringing the goods into the Dreamscape and my eloquent mom is responsible for serving the customers — isn't it a perfect arrangement?

C: 我不想再和所谓的评论家、鉴赏家打交道了——永远不想。
E: I don't wish to deal with the so-called critics and connoisseurs again — never.

C: 在广告牌身上，原本应该印着商品的位置，你却只看到一张美丽的女子面孔。
E: On the billboard where a product should be placed, you can only see the face of a beautiful woman.

C: 我也没见过。
E: I haven't seen her.

C: 好吧…看来我还要继续等下去……
E: Alright... I guess I'll have to keep searching...

C: 太好了，{F#小姐}{M#先生}——您真是个大好人！
E: Thank you, {F#miss}{M#sir}... You truly are a kind person!

C: 正是受好奇心驱使，我才决定千里迢迢来到匹诺康尼，真希望能与这位伟大的同僚亲自见上一面。
E: It was curiosity that spurred me to make the long journey to Penacony. I truly wish that I could meet this great fellow craftsman in person.

C: 只可惜这位「钟表匠」一直不肯露面…我该怎么做才能见到他呢？
E: It is just a shame that this Watchmaker is not willing to show his face... How am I supposed to meet with him?

C: 因为感受到了「喜悦」。
E: It's because you felt "joy."

C: …那我就先走了？
E: ...I should probably leave now?

C: …当然是陪我聊天的报酬呀！
E: ...For the chat, of course!

C: 这点道理都不懂，还想把生意做大做好？我看他们是真的把梦当成现实了吧……
E: They think they can run a successful business when they don't even know this simple fact? I think they truly believe their dreams have become reality...

C: 有什么推荐的吗？
E: Do you have any recommendations?

C: 你在这工作多久了？
E: How long have you worked here?

C: 怎么样，够意思吧？
E: Well, pretty tempting, right?

C: 是时候做出改变了，因为危机总比它看起来更加迫近……
E: It is time for change. Crisis is always closer than it seems.

C: 你有点极端了。
E: That's a little extreme.

C: 还有事，拜拜。
E: I have things to do, bye!

C: 关于之前的风波…
E: About the previous incident...

C: 慢走，欢迎您随时再来。
E: Take care. You are always welcome here.

C: 我很出名吗？
E: Am I famous?

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 唉？这、这样吗？看来我还有很多要学啊……
E: Oh? I—Is that so? I suppose I still have much to learn...

C: 在这个梦里，你是一位出身曜青的仙舟剑客——年少成名、本领高强的你打算离开师门，赶往罗浮争夺剑首之名。
E: In your dream, you assume the role of a sword master from the Xianzhou ship Yaoqing. Young, famous, and skilled, you intend to leave your school and head to the Luofu to compete for the coveted title of Sword Champion.

C: 咩…咩咩，咩！
E: Baa... Baaaaa!

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 但我不会输给它…我已经…不怕它了。
E: But I won't be defeated... I'm no longer... afraid of it.

C: 「帕特鲁鲁鲁电电枪，循此苦旅，击落星辰！」
E: "Patrululu's Zappy Gun! Embark on a challenging journey of striking down the stars."

C: 这是我能免费拿的吗？
E: Is this something I can take for free?

C: 疾风侠出动！疾风——力量！哈哈哈哈哈，跑出租好快乐啊！
E: Quicksilver in action! Speed is power! Hahahahaha, it's so fun to be a cab!

C: 你也没给我「驾驶」选项啊。
E: There's no "Drive" button here.

C: 购买方式可登录飞车官网进行查询，请勿轻信市面上的仿制产品，以免出现任何意外。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。
E: You may purchase it on our official website. Please avoid using counterfeit products on the market to prevent any mishaps. Thank you for your cooperation.

C: 你一口将脆筒吞吃落肚，动作干净利落。
E: You toss a cone into your mouth in a slick move.

C: 我要来找知更鸟。
E: I am here to see Robin.

C: 难道……
E: Could it be...

C: 很久没有遇到愿意和我聊天的好心客人了。
E: It's been a while since I met a kind guest willing to talk with me.

C: 这么多？！
E: Dozens!?

C: 真正的冒险，必是充满曲折险阻、惊心动魄，必是能够目睹最真实的宇宙……
E: A true adventure needs to be full of twists and turns, thrills and excitement, and allow you to witness the truest universe...

C: 聊聊你的朋友。
E: Let's talk about your friends.

C: 我的朋友们都是非常有趣的家伙——
E: All of my friends are endlessly fascinating...

C: 这个嘛…「克劳克影视乐园」归属于「克劳克影业」，是关于钟表小子、哈努兄弟、仓鼠球骑士等卡通角色的乐园。
E: I see... Clock Studios Theme Park belongs to Clock Studios, it is a theme park all about cartoon characters like Clockie, Brother Hanu, and Hamster Ball Knight.

C: 我们辛辛苦苦上百个系统时，甚至挣不来人家一顿饭钱，你说可笑不可笑？
E: We work ourselves to death for a hundred system hours and can't even buy ourselves a good meal. Don't you think that's ridiculous?

C: 你有见过他们吗？
E: Have you met them before?

C: 呵…为什么要怨恨没有任何印象的两个人呢？
E: Hmm... Why would I hate two people that I have no recollection of?

C: 有关六尊隐夜鸫雕像的故事就到此为止了。看得开心吗？如果开心，那么恭喜你——
E: We shall leave the story of the Nightingale Statue for now. Did you enjoy those stories? If you did, then congratulations...

C: …我可以也吃一块吗？
E: ...Can I have a piece, too?

C: 好有趣的狗狗啾！
E: What a fun dog, tweet!

C: 因为狗狗原本的主人是个皮皮西人——哈哈哈哈！
E: Because the dog's old master was a Pepeshi... Hahaha!

C: 就当我没问过。你继续去忙吧。
E: Let's pretend I didn't ask this question. Now, go back to your business.

C: 没用的东西！要是我管理的道具，非得拿鞭子把你抽到服…哎呀！！！
E: You useless piece of junk! If I were your master, this whip would... Ouch!!!

C: …您？可、可…我是梦境鼓励师，您是我的客户。这样的关系…也太危险了啊。
E: ...You? B—But I... I'm a Dreamscape Motivator, and you're my client. Such a relationship... would be far too dangerous.

C: 嘿嘿，很庸俗吧？可有钱真的能做到好多事，不是吗？
E: Hehe. Too basic, right? But really, there's so much you can do if you have money, you know?

C: 把想去的地方全逛个遍，带爸妈到匹诺康尼最好的餐馆吃一顿，给室友每人带件礼物，买几束花放在床头，还有好多还没想到的。
E: Go to all the places I want, take my parents to the best restaurant in Penacony, give all my roommates presents, buy some flowers to put at my bedside, and so many other things I haven't thought of yet.

C: 维修工这份活计虽然很累，但只要肯对自己狠下心来，比起许多看似体面的工作，收入要可观得多。而且我们没有团建！
E: Doing repair work is tough stuff, but if you are willing to be tough on yourself, the pay can be way better than jobs that seem like they'd be more respectable. On top of that, we don't have team-building activities!

C: 瞧！这是我根据球笼竞速发明的改良型飞行棋，规则简单易懂……
E: Look! This is a modified version of Aero-Chess I invented based off the Spheroid Races. The rules are easy to understand...

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 他只会出现在家族守护家人的战争中，将众家人团结为一支同调的军队。被他消灭的人也会被同化，成为我们的一员——从某种角度来说，也算是好处吧，哈哈。
E: He only shows up for The Family's wars, uniting them into a cohesive force — and everyone he destroys ends up getting assimilated, becoming one of us. In many ways, it's a good thing, haha.

C: 想想爱墨瑞得-Ⅲ，想想咱们的主推！想想大卫，想想戴夫，想想席德，想想博纳姆！
E: Think of Emerald-III, and think of all our top picks! Think of David, think of Daeve, think of Sid, and think of Bonham!

C: 你吹那么大声干嘛？
E: Why are you screaming so loud?

C: 梦里还会有盗贼？
E: There are bandits even in a dream?

C: …你会做青椒肉丝吗？
E: ...Do you know how to cook pepper steak?

C: 你发什么疯？别挡路……
E: What madness are you spouting? Get out of the way...

C: 有时候就…哎，心情挺复杂的。不知道路在何方，只能得过且过……
E: Sometimes I... Ah, it's really complicated. I don't know where my path is, so I just have to keep muddling along...

C: 但后来，我发现自己居然渐渐适应了…至少现在我能在路边席地而坐，面不改色，边和人聊天边吃东西了。
E: But, I gradually grew accustomed to all this... At least now I can sit on the roadside without making faces, and talk with people while eating.

C: 也许我会离开流梦礁前往忆域中更加深邃的地方，但在这之前，我想再好好搜集与研究拉扎莉娜的手稿。每次阅读，我总会有新的想法，新的灵感……
E: Perhaps I'll leave the Dreamflux Reef and travel to a deeper place in the Memory Zone, but before I do, I'd like to gather and study Razalina's manuscripts again. Every time I read them, I'll get new ideas and new inspirations...

C: 那是多么美好的梦啊，我遇见了拉扎莉娜女士，她的样子与我想象中的一模一样，小小的身躯，无穷的活力，精辟的观点，优雅的言语……
E: It was such a beautiful dream. I met Madam Razalina, whose appearance was what I'd always imagined. Her body was petite, but she was energetic, sharp-witted, and could express herself elegantly...

C: 挥舞着球棒打败怪物的侠客…这个形象放进动画和游戏里一定很有意思！
E: A hero who swings the baseball bat to defeat monsters? It must be interesting to have such a figure in animations and games!

C: 忆域迷因就像野兽，有些温顺亲人，有些野性暴虐。
E: A Memory Zone Meme is like a wild beast. Some are gentle and kindred, while some are barbaric and tyrannical.

C: 而你们来到这里，带走匹诺康尼的故事，对我们来说，或许也是一种重生吧。
E: And now you are here to take away the tales of Penacony. To us, this is perhaps a kind of rebirth.

C: 有遇到什么有趣的客人吗？
E: Ever meet any interesting customers?

C: 太多了我写下来吧。
E: Hang on. Let me get a pen.

C: 咦？
E: Huh?

C: 不知道「钟表匠」用了什么办法，才让他愿意抛下星空生态学派的首席教授职称，跑到一无所有的梦境里开荒……
E: I don't know how the Watchmaker got him to willingly abandon his post as Head Professor of the Astral Ecology School to come to this forsaken wasteland in the Dreamscape...

C: 关于折纸小鸟…
E: Tell me about the origami birds...

C: 嘿呀，是没见过的家伙啾。
E: Oho, it's someone new, tweet.

C: 啾～客官想找人家聊聊天吗？只要您能想到的问题，人家都知无不言啾。
E: Tweet! Did you wish to speak to me? I've got all the answers, as long as you've got any questions, tweet.

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 但对于一些无机生命来说，玩具这种有趣的「装置」往往比拟造规则的游戏和电子脑中的虚构感官刺激要有吸引力。
E: But to some inorganic beings, toys are fun devices that are more mesmerizing than games with artificial rules and virtual sensory stimulation in electronic brains.

C: 太好了，他们用我的玩具找到了自我，真是让人开心呀~
E: Excellent. They found themselves using my toys. I'm delighted!

C: 哦，真是可惜~
E: Oh, such a pity!

C: 欢迎你加入「钟表匠」的事业，{NICKNAME}。我很荣幸——假如米哈伊尔还在，他一定也会这么觉得。
E: You're welcome to join the Watchmaker's cause, {NICKNAME}. I'd be honored. If Mikhail were still around, I'm sure he would feel the same.

C: 家族建立起盛会之星后，混乱的原初梦境再也无人问津。直到家族人畜无害的面具被米哈伊尔撕碎，才有极少数人意识到那片浮华表象之下潜藏的歪曲动机。
E: After The Family established the Planet of Festivities, the chaotic Primordial Dreamscape was left unchecked. It wasn't until Mikhail ripped off The Family's faux-benevolent mask, that just a handful of people realized that sinister motives lurked beneath that ostentatious representation.

C: 如果真有那么一天，希望我能赶到您的身边，记录下您那一刻无与伦比的「美丽」。
E: If such a day ultimately occurs, I hope that you will hurry back to me, so that I can record your incomparable "beauty" in that moment.

C: 或许清澈的虹膜流光溢彩，倒映出色彩缤纷的梦境。
E: Or perhaps his clear irises would be full of radiance that reflect the vibrant colors of the Dreamscape.

C: 我曾探索过一片纯白的沼泽，那里的生物只要沾染过沼泽中的白泥浆，就会因为污染而渐渐化作枯败僵硬的灰白泥塑；
E: Another time, I explored a completely white swamp. There, any organism that came into contact with the swamp's white mud would gradually turn into a withered and stiff ashen clay sculpture due to the contamination.

C: 或许很多时候他们确实得到了自己想要的…但说实话，比起在达成目的的过程中那些徒劳无益的消耗，这又何尝不是种得不偿失……
E: While they may get what they desire most of the time, truth be told... when compared to the futile effort spent on achieving their objectives, such losses do outweigh the gains, am I right?

C: 这样一个可笑的理由也能支撑着他，可我…我又为什么一直都留在了这里？
E: That man is driven by such an absurd reason, yet I... I have chosen to stay here all this time. Why?

C: 而不安，就是我这种人的财路。
E: And uncertainty is how we make money in this profession.

C: 不就是吃灭绝了种虫子，至于判这么重？这种低等生物的命，难道比我这种智慧生物的更值钱？
E: A death penalty for eating a bug into extinction! Give me a break! They seriously consider the life of such a primitive species to be more precious than an intelligent life form like me?

C: 温控是牛排的命门，因此绝不提供星际快送。上门的食客络绎不绝，预约更是排到三个琥珀纪之后。」
E: "The steak's quality hinges on precise temperature control, so interstellar delivery isn't offered. Such is its demand that reservations are booked up to three Amber Eras ahead."

C: 但不是也有人那样说过吗——「我们是为了采摘苹果而进入果园，但最终我们得到的，是林中一日，斑驳的光线和时间。」
E: As someone once put it: "We set out to the orchard for apples, but we return with a day filled with nature, speckled sunshine, and cherished moments."

C: 托马斯是我丈夫，我们才结婚没多久。他在星际和平公司工作，经常能和一些大人物碰面，时常要负责一些…重要项目～
E: Thomas is my husband, and we just got married. He works at the Interastral Peace Corporation, mixing it up all the time with some high-flyers and leading a few... "important" projects.

C: 呵呵…我在这里是为了寻找能够改变游戏规则的商业机会，不是来交朋友的。
E: Haha, I'm on the hunt for game-changing business deals, not friendships.

C: 我只是个路人。
E: I'm just passing through.

C: 来「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」上的都是各界名流，我和艾丽卡居然能来这儿…真是做梦也想不到。
E: All guests on The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand are elites from various fields. I never imagined Erica and I would be among them.

C: 啾~客官是来找人家的吗？人家很乐意陪客官聊聊天啾~
E: Tweet~ Are you here to see me? I am happy to chat with you, tweet~

C: …啊，我知道了，会不会是您贵人多忘事。先前交接的手续比较多，可能忘了……
E: ...Ah, maybe you've been so busy that you forgot all about it? Yeah, there was a ton of things in the handover, so that's likely the case...

C: 哎，这些住客看着都是非富即贵的，怎么买点东西都这么小家子气，真是一帮难伺候的主儿……
E: *sigh* These guests are either rich or filthy rich. Who would've expected them to turn into stingy misers when shopping! What a difficult bunch of customers...

C: 尽管问吧，我眼下还算有空，想要随便聊聊的无任欢迎——不过说归说，你可别去投诉我……
E: Ask away. I'm free at the moment, so I'm all ears if you wanna chat — as long as you don't tattle on me...

C: 我来视察下你的工作。
E: I'm here for an inspection.

C: 没事，你继续忙你的吧。
E: It's nothing. You can return to what you were doing.

C: 就这样，我选择葬在我梦想夭折的地方。靠着母亲的资助，在折纸大学混到了现在……
E: And that is why I have chosen to be buried in the place where my dreams perished. With the financial support of my mother, I have been able to stay enrolled in Paperfold University until now...

C: 「星核猎手」牌。
E: A piece by Stellaron Hunters.

C: 你左脚踩右脚上天算了。
E: Pfft, you're not trapping anyone with that circular reasoning.

C: 不公的境遇常常是结构性的，市面现有的球笼没有适合皮皮西人的尺寸。赛前我也四处央求同学帮我改装，但没有人愿意把时间浪费在一个皮皮西选手身上。
E: Injustice is often structural, and none of the Spheroids on the market are fitted to a Pepeshi's body size. I begged my classmates to help me modify it before the competition, but no one was willing to waste their time on a Pepeshi contestant.

C: 无意自夸，但就专业水平而言，我们这些年轻教师完全不比这种上课只会念教材的老…咳，老前辈要差。
E: I don't mean to boast, but in terms of professional capability, we young teachers are just as good as these old... ahem, our seniors, who just spend all their time reading out from the textbook.

C: 这你可就问对人了！让我想想…这学期比较出名的怪谈有「死亡使者」、「千面杀手」、「折纸小鸟」以及「神秘信使」，你想听哪个？
E: You asked the right person! Let me think... The more well-known ghost stories from this semester were the "Envoy of Death," "Thousand-Faced Killer," "Origami Bird," and "Mysterious Messenger." Which one would you like to hear about?

C: …啧，群聊开始了，看来是又吵起来了，跟你说会话的功夫这就弹了一大堆消息出来。
E: ...Tsk, it's the group chat. Looks like people are arguing again. Look at all these messages that have piled up just while I was talking with you.

C: 我也想去职场闯荡，可…经理你也知道，现在的工作不太好找，轻松赚钱的职位更是少之又少，我又不想离开匹诺康尼…很麻烦啊。
E: I'd also like to venture into the workforce, but... as you know, it's difficult to land a job now, much less get a relaxing job with easy money. And I don't want to leave Penacony... It's a hassle.

C: …音乐派对的演出结束了，乐器搬走了，乐队成员都散了，我的心也变得空荡荡的了。
E: The music party's performance has ended, the instruments have been moved away, and the band members have all gone their separate ways. My heart is empty now.

C: 对了，我也给你复制一份，这样就不用等年鉴正式刊发出来了。千万别忘了我啊！
E: Oh yeah, I've made you a copy, so you don't have to wait for the yearbook to be published. Don't forget me!

C: 幽默：看看那两个学院，坚持才能优先的，最后受限于自己的认知，做出错误的判断。宣称效益优先的，其实想的都是自己的利益。
E: Humor: Look at those two academies. The first champions aptitude above all else, yet ironically finds itself shackled by its own narrow perspectives, leading to flawed decisions. The second proclaims efficiency as its guiding principle, but in reality, merely pursues its own self-interest.

C: 哼，做得不错啊。没看出来你还挺有当经理的天赋的，匹诺康尼的大股东！
E: Hah, well done. I never took you for someone with a managerial knack, major shareholder of Penacony.

C: 我有些事情想问。
E: I have some things to ask.

C: 你也好不到哪去吧？
E: You're no better than them, though?

C: 嘿嘿，你不会笑话我的想法吧？
E: Hee-hee, you won't laugh at my dream?

C: 谁制造了你？
E: Who created you?

C: 我的{NICKNAME}乘客啊，您真是问到点子上了。我一直在思考这个问题——生而为机器人，究竟是型号决定了功能，还是功能决定了型号？
E: My Nameless {NICKNAME}, you really hit the nail on its head. I have always been contemplating this question: Created as a robot, is it the model that determines my functions, or my functions that determine my model?

C: 最近都在做些什么？
E: What have you been up to lately?

C: *吹个酷炫的口哨*
E: *whistle coolly*

C: 安全起见，还是别乱按了。
E: To be safe, it's better to not randomly press any more buttons.

C: 池中清流汩汩——这里不需要律法，也难承载欢宴，却能让候者暂歇。
E: The clear stream in the pond gurgles gently. This place needs no laws, nor can it host grand feasts, but it offers weary travelers a moment of respite.

C: 就在昨天的梦里。
E: In yesterday's dream?

C: 除了身高哪里都不像。
E: Apart from the height, not in the slightest.

C: 陪我看钟表小子大电影？
E: ...to watch the Clockie blockbuster with me?

C: 看来你是完全不懂喔…
E: You look utterly clueless...

C: 请勿破坏游艺设施。
E: Please do not damage the entertainment facilities.

C: 她又提什么需求了？
E: What's her request this time?

C: 这不让改，那不让碰…再这样下去，我看这活儿是没法干了。
E: I can't change this, and I can't touch that... If this keeps on, there's no way I can work.

C: 我们这儿什么都有…
E: We've got everything here...

C: 听说里面吃的可贵了…
E: I heard the food there is hella expensive...

C: 哈哈，正中下怀！
E: Haha. Just the way I like it!

C: 我正在专注思考…
E: I'm trying to concentrate...

C: 是「蜘蛛小径花园」吗？那个我看了，感觉特别好！
E: It's the Spider Path Garden, right? That's an awesome design!

C: 得想好该怎么说。
E: Gotta figure out what to say first.

C: 你不也没停吗？
E: You didn't stop either.

C: 依我看，恐怕只有让「钟表匠」闻名的第一届海选，才能和今年的相媲美。
E: To me, only that first renowned audition that made the Watchmaker famous can compare to this year's!

C: 容我拒绝。
E: I refuse.

C: 我还是老老实实回去，陪美梦剧团搬我的苏乐达好了。
E: I might as well return to the Sweet Dreams Troupe to lug my SoulGlad like a good lad.

C: 那天的骚乱你也在场吧？我觉得这事没这么简单，感觉里面还有很多故事……
E: Were you there during the disturbance the other day? I doubt this matter's as simple as it looks. I bet there are plenty of stories buried in there...

C: 好耶！
E: Yeah!

C: 呃，记性不错。总之呢，客房工作无小事……
E: Err, not bad, you remembered. In any case, no work in the hotel is too trivial...

C: 巧了，我也是。不过……
E: What a coincidence. Me neither. However...

C: 他本应有更好的发展……
E: He should have such a bright future ahead of him...

C: 人生并不完美…
E: Life isn't perfect...

C: 你注意影响…
E: Be careful of consequences...

C: 这个月投资回报如何？
E: How's the return on this month's investment?

C: 复排大典加班这么久…总算结束了。
E: The overtime done to reschedule the festival... It's finally over.

C: ——可喜可贺，可喜可贺。
E: ...Sincere congratulations.

C: 好吧，看来有人和你想到了相同的事。无论如何，你后续都可以去会会他们。
E: All right, looks like someone else thought of the same thing as you. No matter what, you can seek them out in the future.

C: 学术性的。
E: Academic.

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 但浪费美味的晚餐同样要受惩罚。快点，收拾好桌子。波提欧，别忘了你的牛奶！
E: But wasting a delicious dinner is just as easily punishable. Come now, tidy up the table. And Boothill, don't forget your milk!

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 那就冲个澡吧。
E: Then, let's take a shower.

C: 「超智能病毒」吃掉了你回收箱里的所有垃圾文件。
E: The Supersmart Virus has consumed all the junk files in your recycle bin.

C: 哼…哼…哼……
E: Oink... Oink... Oink...

C: 什么都做！「阿尔戈」原本只做大宗货物的运输，但现在如你所见，大家都不容易，我们也要尽己所能。
E: Everything! Argo used to just carry bulk goods, but times have been rough, so we've expanded our business.

C: 大地兽卡斯托尔、波鲁克斯
E: Let's talk about Castor and Pollux.

C: 虽说我老抱怨他思想陈旧，其实我并不求他做任何改变。
E: Even though I complain about his outdated views, deep down I don't really want him to change.

C: …你、你竟敢威胁我…你…给我等着！
E: ...H—How dare you threaten me...? Just... just you wait!

C: 「啪——」的又一声脆响，却是那位暴怒的食客被丢出门外。你很难想象餐厅老板那并不过分健硕的身躯是如何爆发出如此强大的力量的。
E: Then you hear another loud "pop" as the enraged customer is forcefully thrown out through the door. You can hardly imagine how the seemingly feeble restaurant owner unleashes such a ferocious display of strength.

C: 看看外带的快餐。
E: Take a look at the takeout.

C: 昏光庭院，我要看眼科…
E: Twilight Courtyard? I need to see an eye doctor...

C: 有道理，但是道理也不多，就当你是「自我」吧。
E: Makes sense, but not too much. Fine, treat yourself as the "ego."

C: 用符合道德规范的选项铺垫一下，不就是方便我选有病的选项吗？
E: Setting things up with morally acceptable options... isn't it just making it easier for me to pick the messed-up ones?

C: 嗯，今天没有异常。
E: Nothing strange going on today.

C: 我到过，悬锋城。在那边做饭，很累。
E: I've been to Castrum Kremnos. Cooking there is tiring.

C: 聊聊来奥赫玛之后的研究。
E: Tell me more about your research after arriving in Okhema.

C: …只可惜老伴也好、孩子们也好，一个个都太过忙碌，没有一点闲下来的时间陪老身在花园里坐坐。
E: ...It's a shame my husband and kids are always tied up, too busy to share moments with this old lady.

C: 黄金战争末期的乱世。
E: The aftermath of the Chrysos War's chaos.

C: 「古老的预言无人相信，贪婪和欲念铸就野心；人群中暗流涌动，城邦间烽火燃起。」
E: "Ancient prophecies dismissed, greed's flames ignited. Conspiracies breed, city-states engage in the fight."

C: 「奥凯纳斯的盛会追求肉体极限，竞技者挥汗如雨，喝彩声震天；」
E: "Okeanas' festivals, mortals push their might. Athletes sweat, cheered in contests and fights."

C: 有什么贵宾特权吗？
E: Any perks that come with that?

C: 但…我相信这只是暂时的。奥赫玛的居民一直都很坚强，未来也会是如此——愿刻法勒庇护我们。
E: But... I believe that this is temporary. Okhema's people have always been hardy, and so will the future — may Kephale protect us.

C: 你瞧，又到了泰坦人气投票的月份了。这届的竞争相当激烈，老塞的新专辑确实让很多信徒都失了智，但小墨在时装展上的惊艳亮相也为她带来了不少支持者。
E: You see, it's the time of the year again for the Titan popularity vote. The competition this time round is quite intense — Ol' Thannie's new album has got all the disciples in a zealous frenzy, and Mnestia's fabulous outfit at the fashion exhibition has garnered plenty of supporters.

C: 最为夺目的华服，穿在人面兽心者身上，也遮蔽不住丑陋；相反，一眼望去朴素无华的服饰，若与适合的人共鸣，也能大放异彩。
E: Even the most eye-catching finery when draped across the body of a person with an evil heart cannot conceal their ugliness. By contrast, if completely unremarkable clothing is paired with someone who resonates perfectly, it can create a spectacular image.

C: 与我十分甚至九分像的白厄。
E: My doppelgänger, Phainon.

C: 那什么时候会不方便呢？
E: Like when?

C: 抱歉，我这就走。
E: Sorry. I'll be gone.

C: 喔，是你啊，新来的朋友，今天想聊些什么？
E: Oh, it's you. What would you like to discuss today, my new friend?

C: 那首先必定是——选择靠谱的店！那些小作坊出来的东西看着物美价廉，实际上做工都糙得很，基本上逃不过「漆上有灰尘，釉上有指痕」定律。
E: The first thing is — choose a reliable store! Those smaller stores may seem to have good stuff for cheap, but the craftsmanship is actually terrible. They're basically doomed to have dust on the lacquer and fingerprints on the varnish, as we say in the industry.

C: 这话听上去可能有点冒犯，但——你觉得一个人无所事事地坐在人迹罕至的房顶上的原因应该是什么？
E: This may sound a little offensive, but... why do you think a person might come out to a place rarely visited by others, like a rooftop?

C: 行了，今天就先练到这吧。小毛病很多，但大问题只有一个——
E: Alright, that's enough practice for today. There are lots of small issues, but only one major problem...

C: 真是漂亮的一招。
E: What a beautiful technique.

C: 像他这样的精锐总共只有五名。他们是悬锋伙友中的佼佼者，也是王最亲密的战友。当王不在时，他们就是军中位阶最高的将领。
E: He is one of only five who hold such elite status. They are exemplars among the Kremnos vanguards, and most bosom comrades of the King. When the king is not around, they wield the utmost authority among the ranks.

C: 但纷争并不总意味着死亡，单纯的斗殴也能带来鲜血。尼卡多利的祭司们个个都是摔跤好手，通过肉体的碰撞来敬神。
E: But strife does not always mean death. Even a plain old brawl draws blood. All of Nikador's priests are master grapplers, worshiping our god with the clashing of our flesh.

C: 与其它文明交流，幸运、不幸，我们不善思考，不愿深究。
E: With other civilizations, we exchange. Fortunate or unfortunate, think deeply we do not. Willing to ponder, we are not.

C: 哎，我只能安慰自己，这份永恒的清醒能让我更好服务迷醉的客人，也算是对法吉娜大人的一种侍奉了。
E: *sigh* I can only comfort myself with the thought that this eternal sobriety helps me better serve inebriated guests — a form of servitude to Phagousa, at least.

C: 眼前站着熟悉的蓝色的…红色的…绿色眼睛的朋友，只是他巧嘴滑舌的功夫不知被谁夺了去，人也变得缄默……
E: Before you stands a familiar blue... red... green-eyed friend. His usually glib verbosity has been somehow stolen, his person irrevocably mute...

C: 我占山为王！
E: I'm king of this mountain now!

C: 你听见一阵幽婉的天外之声，像是有谁在雨天悄悄地踩着水潭渐行渐远。
E: You hear a profound celestial sound, like someone quietly pitter-pattering along a stream into the distance on a rainy day.

C: 这天外之音来自那侍奉泰坦之人们的祷告，然而他们的祷告从来不是为了取悦神明，而是为了令神明庇护自己…最虔诚的信徒，或许就是最胆怯的懦夫……
E: This celestial echo comes from the prayers of those serving the Titans. But their prayers were never to entertain the gods, but to have them protect the worshipers... The most devout of disciples, and perhaps also the most craven of all...

C: 我是阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，对大地的信仰如同吉奥里亚的神躯般坚定。我从云石天宫来，洗净我的身体与思想后，正要往城门口去。
E: I am Parmenides of Icatus. My faith in the earth is as firm as the divine body of Georios. I have come from Marmoreal Palace. Now that I have washed my mind and body, I shall head for the city gates.

C: …唔，你不必露出这么悲伤的表情，我曾经因为自己的缺陷而感到自卑，直到阿格莱雅大人偶然点拨了我几句。
E: Don't look so sad. I once struggled with my flaws until Lady Aglaea shared wisdom that changed my perspective.

C: 你可能会觉得奇怪，为什么天空是灰色的？但在我的世界里，情感和色彩是紧密相连的。温暖、宁静、期待...这些感觉在我眼中就是不同深浅的灰色。
E: You might find it strange why the sky is gray, but in my world, emotions and colors are closely linked. Warmth, calmness, anticipation... these feelings are different shades of gray to me.

C: 所以在野外扎营的时候，如果你的餐点一回头就不翼而飞，一旁的大地兽却边吃土边往你这偷瞄，不用怀疑，一定是它馋了。
E: So if you're out camping, and your meal mysteriously vanishes the moment you turn your back, and you spot a dromas nearby, munching on dirt and sneaking glances at you — no doubt about it. It's got a craving!

C: 咳咳，严格来说，这个在奥赫玛是犯法的！不过因为不会造成任何严重后果，所以就算被发现了应该也只会被口头警告吧……
E: Ahem, strictly speaking, this is illegal in Okhema! But since it doesn't cause any serious harm, even if you're caught, you'll probably just get a verbal warning...

C: 我看你就是单纯地酸。
E: I think you're just jealous.

C: 哈哈，我不知道你想到了什么，但不用担心，只是个运动用的辅助装具罢了。
E: Haha, I don't know what you're thinking, but don't worry. It's just a support device for exercise.

C: 我有点记不太全了。毕竟和失败的尝试比起来，成功的只有一小部分而已…
E: I can't quite remember all of it. After all, compared to the failed attempts, there were only a few successes...

C: 「即使{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}无法出让它的天空，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}也赐予了我们大地兽作为补偿。」——道理是这个道理。
E: "Even if {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} cannot give us ownership of their sky, {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} has given us dromases as compensation." That is the logic.

C: 哈哈…这位朋友，你看得还挺津津有味的嘛~那想不想知道他们究竟在吵什么呀？
E: Haha... Friend, you seem quite intrigued. Would you like to know what exactly they're arguing about?

C: 我见过你！门口的那个雕像是你们造的对吧！
E: I've seen you before! You were the one who made that statue at the entrance!

C: 算了吧，我对这些不感兴趣。
E: Hold it right there. I'm not interested in this stuff.

C: 其次，你看看周围的人。形形色色的学者、工匠、甚至是黄金裔，他们都会来这里。我可以直接听到最新的学术动态，而不用被那些老顽固过滤信息。
E: Next, look at the people around. Scholars and craftsmen from all disciplines, even Chrysos Heirs, they all flock here. The latest academic trends are within earshot, unlike the watered-down information fed through a drip by those old fogeys.

C: 哈哈——顾名思义，当然是负责管理和筹备军粮了。不过这可不是个容易的活。
E: Haha... As the name suggests, it's managing and stocking up on military supplies, of course. But it's no easy feat.

C: 还有别的商品吗？
E: Any other products?

C: 「之前的事…严格来说你是这批小机器人的再生父母，全靠你盘活！无以报答，自掏腰包给你升级了一点配置，改装了一些功能，希望你能用得习惯。」
E: "About the past... really, you've been like a reboot parent to these tiny robots, breathing new life into them! There's no way to fully repay you, but I've dipped into my pocket to upgrade your gear and tweak some settings — hope you find the improvements to your liking!"

C: 没什么可看的。
E: Nothing interesting to see.

C: 我现在已经盼着下次休假了，为了这一天早点到来，我必须更加认真地做好本职工作。
E: I'm eagerly anticipating my next vacation, and to make it arrive sooner, I'm committed to working harder at my job.

C: 没什么想听的了。
E: I think I'm good.

C: 念你尚且是初犯，此次我便不再多计较。但今日看来不宜谈论神谕之事，就此告辞！
E: As this is your first offense, I will leave this matter here. However, it seems that our discussion of a prophecy will not be possible today. I bid you farewell!

C: 但是，我拒绝。
E: Thanks, I hate it.

C: 神话里对刻法勒的赞誉，不过是由成功者书写的历史罢了。所谓全知全能，皆因奥赫玛是当今翁法罗斯最鼎盛的城邦。
E: They say that history is written by the winners, and that is precisely what has happened with the constant praise of Kephale in mythology. This so-called all-knowing and all-powerful nature comes from nothing more than the fact that Okhema is the most prospering city in Amphoreus.

C: 尼卡多利，色厉胆薄、好勇无谋，在泰坦中和扎格列斯坐一桌，不值一提。
E: Nikador looks ferocious, but has no spine. They're all brawn and no brain. They sit at the same table as Zagreus and are barely worth a mention.

C: 你这神谕太假了。
E: The prophecy is nonsense.

C: 安德烈是从传信石版上看到我发的会员招募信息以后加入的，他虽然很虔诚，但生活并不古板，喜欢参加这些类似我们这样奇奇怪怪的活动小组。
E: He joined us after seeing my recruitment post on the teleslate. Though deeply faithful, he isn't old-fashioned and enjoys participating in unusual activities like ours.

C: 科洛埃小姐算是协会的创始成员。事情的起因是她有一次来浴场玩，正好碰见我和几个人在图书室读推理小说。她和我们刚好喜欢同一个作家，就这么聊起来了……
E: Miss Clio is practically a founding member of the society. It all started when she came to the baths and bumped into a few of us reading detective novels in the library. She happened to like the same author as us, and that kicked off our conversation...

C: 不不，像我这种卫兵，怎敢对祭祀这种大事妄加议论啊！实在是诚惶诚恐……
E: No, no, as a mere guard, how could I dare to comment on something as sacred as a ritual? The very thought makes me uneasy...

C: 可惜，结果似乎不大好。她被几名泰坦眷属从拉冬追到埃普斯，那可真是一段惊心动魄的逃亡……
E: Sadly, it didn't go so well. She was chased by several Titankins all the way from Ladon to Epos in a thrilling escape...

C: 下次再聊，缇宝明天见！
E: Let's talk another time. I'll see you tomorrow, Tribbie!

C: 小奇美拉用极其清澈的眼神望着你，发出了与平时截然不同的轻柔叫声。
E: The little chimera gazes at you with exceptionally clear eyes, letting out soft, tender calls completely different from its usual tone.

C: 「昏光庭院」存世已久，只是因天空一族式微而逐渐凋亡。风堇让这个名号再临世间，以微光与温柔疗愈众人…想必也背负着殷切的梦想吧。
E: The Twilight Courtyard has existed for a long time, though it faded into obscurity with the decline of the Sky people. Hyacine has brought this name back into the world, healing others with her gentleness and light... She must be carrying her own deep dreams and aspirations.

C: 一束微光从头顶的天井滑下来，它并不耀眼，却足够填满整个庭院。
E: A soft, glimmering ray of light streams in from the skylight above. It's not blinding, but just bright enough to fill the entire courtyard.

C: 也许是命运使然…第一次逐火之旅虽成功归还了数枚火种，却在血与泪中遗憾告败。
E: Perhaps it was fate at work... Though they succeeded in returning several Coreflames during the first Flame-Chase Journey, it ended in blood, tears, and failure.

C: 你想起那浑身黑衣的蒙面剑士，他不算强大，但比你见过的任何敌人都要诡异。寻常战斗中足以致胜的手段，在他面前却三番五次地失效……
E: You recall the masked swordmaster clad in black. It wasn't particularly powerful, but it was more bizarre than any enemy you've faced. Techniques that would normally secure victory failed repeatedly against it...

C: 你猜他们会掏钱吗？
E: Care to guess how many of them actually step up to fund it?

C: 本人柯库翁，来自奥凯纳斯，一座以竞技体育闻名于翁法罗斯的古老城邦。
E: I am Glykon of Okeanas. It is an ancient Amphorean city-state known for competitive sports.

C: 在敌国被杀的战士，曾在处刑前说「我唯一的遗言，就是我只有一次生命可以献给我的城邦。」
E: Before his execution at the hands of the enemy, a soldier said, "The only thing I wish to say in this last moment is that I can only give my life for my city-state once."

C: 墓志铭蕴含着令人动容的力量，而参观墓地的体验无可替代，请让我推荐给你。
E: Epitaphs possess a deeply moving power, thus the experience of visiting a graveyard is invaluable. Please allow me to recommend it.

C: 我想起来了…有位织者发誓抵御黑潮，它正潜伏在<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮造物附近的花丛里</color>，等待着敌人露出破绽呢。
E: I remember now... A weaver has sworn to resist the black tide. It's lurking in the <color=#dbc291ff>flower beds near the black tide's creations</color>, waiting for the enemy to show a weakness.

C: 你搜集了足够的若虫，然后我帮忙解封了一则预言…好吧，你想听的应该不是这个。
E: You've collected enough nymphs, and I helped unseal a prophecy... Well, that's probably not what you wanted to hear.

C: 我们曾经唱过的那些歌谣，那些记录着思念、幸福、哀愁和爱的曲调，从此之后都将被遗忘……
E: The ballads we once sang, those melodies preserving our longing, happiness, sorrow, and love, will all fade into oblivion...

C: 到时候利波会请老师为您创作一首诗歌——他是位可以媲美伊利亚的伟大诗人，您一定会喜欢的！
E: When that time comes, I will ask my teacher to compose a poem for you — He is a great poet who could rival Illia, and I'm sure you'll love it!

C: 哎…马尔库斯他…或许是对的。
E: Ah... Marcus... perhaps he was right after all.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}好呀！这段时间我在跟着达利安大叔强身健体。他一直在守护圣城公民们的安全，我虽然个头小，也能用自己的方式守护大家。
E: Good day, {F#miss}{M#mister}! I've been training with Uncle Dorian lately. While he protects the holy city, I'll guard everyone in my own way — even if I'm small!

C: 就快了…对吧？我不担心这个，但我想知道，大地兽们…对它们而言，新世界究竟是什么？
E: Is coming... right? I don't worry about that, but... what's the new world going to be like... going to be for the dromases?

C: …维尔图斯……
E: ...Virtus...

C: 在这最后的时刻，您仍愿意去满足一个虚掷的愿望…不胜感激。
E: In these final moments, you're still willing to fulfill a pointless wish... I can't thank you enough.

C: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 嗯…有位织者信心满满。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>树丛中</color>，躲避着预料之外的危险呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver full of confidence. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>hiding in the thicket</color>, avoiding an unexpected danger.

C: 或许，你也该跑起来了，贵客。
E: Perhaps it's your turn to start running, honored guest.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「晨昏之瞳有四重，前路之阻亦有四重。凡人唯能窥见其一，其三需问与天外。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The Twilight Iris holds four layers, and so do the trials ahead. Mortals may only glimpse one — the other three lie beyond the sky."</color>

C: 天外，又是天外…预言中这些我不理解的词似乎在变多，恐怕只能由贵客想办法解读了。
E: Beyond the sky again... The prophecies seem to house many of these cryptic terms I am unable to comprehend. It seems, honored guest, that only you can decipher them.

C: 新来的就是天真。
E: Newbies are always so starry-eyed.

C: 可不是！老师都找到家里来了，说这小兔崽子最近老是旷课。
E: You bet! His teacher came knocking, said the little rascal's been skipping class lately.

C: 至于你拜托我收集的关于树庭的信息，现在倒是有些眉目了。
E: As for the info of the Grove you asked me to look into, I've managed to dig up a few leads.

C: 刚刚那只蝴蝶去哪了…咦，我认得你，你是白厄哥哥的好朋友！
E: Where did that butterfly go... Oh, I know you! You're Phainon's friend!

C: 一定要来，我们约好了。孩子们听了外面的故事，一定会高兴地直翘尾巴哪。
E: You have to! It's a promise. When the little ones hear your tales from the outside, they'll wag their tails with joy!

C: 雇佣妖精，夺取剩余价值。
E: Hire fairies, extract surplus value.

C: 这朵花送给你！它就像少女的心房，要用心呵护哦。
E: This flower's for you! It's just like a girl's heart, so you better take good care of it!

C: 那么…剑花在琴歌中盛放，权作泰坦殂前的祭奠…又有点用力过猛了。
E: Then again... the sword-bloom blossoms in the song of the lyre, a requiem for the Titans before their fall... might be a bit too on the nose.

C: 我现在就拿去给阿波罗尼读读，他一定也会对阁下写的诗句赞不绝口的！
E: I'm taking it to Apollonius right now. He'll definitely be full of praise for your verses!

C: 衣匠接过记忆残晶，将它投入汹涌的洋流。
E: The Garmentmaker receives the Memory Crystal Shards and casts them into the surging current.

C: 妖精们，听说这家餐馆的菜肴味道正宗、价格实惠，分量特别大，能让妖精肚子瘪瘪地进来，肚皮鼓鼓地出去迷！
E: Fairies, word is the dishes here are full of flavor, budget-friendly, and served in huge portions. You'll come in with a flat belly and leave with a full one, mem!

C: 每次不是忘带浴巾浴盐就是落下酒水餐饭，就你这记性还好意思在「花园」工作？
E: You either forget the bath salts and towels, or you forget the snacks and drinks. You've got some nerve, working at the Garden with a memory like that.

C: 离去吧，不要占用女士太多时间。温柔的女士，请允许本人自我介绍…
E: Don't waste a lady's time and take your leave. O gentle maiden, please allow me to introduce myself...

C: 七个？他们…不是只去了五个人吗？
E: Seven? Didn't... only five go?

C: 没办法，听说外面很多城市都被黑潮吞没了。外面的情况…不太乐观啊，说不定哪天我们也要面对…
E: Guess there's no other way. I heard lots of cities out there are devoured by the black tide. The situation outside... is not looking very good. Maybe we'll have to face that down ourselves one day...

C: 当然啦！黄金裔都在那儿嘛。
E: Of course! The Chrysos Heirs are all there.

C: 这就不行了？才跑了几步就累成这副德行？出去别说是我的学生，丢人！
E: Is that all you've got? You run a few steps, and you're in such a sorry state already? Don't go telling anyone you're my students, as you'll bring me nothing but shame!

C: 哎，泰坦的力量岂是我们能理解的，说不定吹口气就算赐福呢？很神奇吧，别问，买就对了！
E: Hey, the power of the Titans is beyond our understanding. Maybe blowing a breath could count as a blessing? It's quite magical, right? Don't ask, just buy!

C: 是真的！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}说有些见不得光的话，不能放在明面上说。
E: It's true! {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} says there are some things that cannot be brought to the light, and that some things cannot be said in the open.

C: 你的尾巴，形状好奇怪哦。
E: Your tail's shape is so weird.

C: 又来了，又来了，老师又露出那种表情了啾！
E: He's doing it again. Professor's making that face again, tweet!

C: 啾——猫头鹰老师最好了！！！
E: Tweet... Professor Owl is the best!!!

C: 好久不见，有什么事情我可以帮您？
E: It's been a long time. How may I help you?

C: 并且，我们与「星际和平公司」保持着极为密切的交流。若你行走银河，耳目宽广，多少应该听过我们的名号。
E: Furthermore, we maintain close communications with Interastral Peace Corporation. For someone as well-traveled as yourself, I'm sure you've heard of our reputation.

C: 我还有些问题想问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 你看上去很困。
E: You look sleepy.

C: 你也是年轻人，比我这种老头子说话更有感染力。你要是有空，也去劝劝我那个傻徒弟。
E: You are a youngster too. Your words are more influential than mine. When you have time, please talk to my student.

C: 我还记得那时荒笛大人的目光，胜过了千言万语，像是糅进了千年时光里所有的情感——它并不后悔自己的选择，但那一天也永远改变了它。
E: I still remember Lord Terravox's gaze back then. It was a gaze that relayed beyond a thousand words, one that contained all the emotions accumulated over a millennium. They didn't regret their choice, but that day changed them forever.

C: 我也想和那只大地兽一样站在房顶上，那里的风景一定很好…
E: I'd love to stand on the roof like that dromas. The scenery there must be amazing...

C: 跟水有关的谜题好多…
E: So many water-related puzzles...

C: 衣匠保持缄默，像一位冥思的诗人正等待着灵感破壳。
E: The Garmentmaker remained silent, like a pensive poet awaiting the spark of inspiration.

C: 诶呦，瞧瞧这人，抓我这个不会画画的邻居来凑数就算了，连无辜的路人都不放过。
E: Tsk, what even is this!? Not only did they drag an artistically challenged neighbor such as me into this, they're even roping in innocent bystanders!

C: 那这边呢…长短针是不是比较合适？
E: And how about this here... Would long and short stitches work better?

C: 打来打去，场面十分混乱。
E: Everyone was fighting back and forth. It was total chaos.

C: 有热闹的地方怎么能没有我！
E: What's a party without me around?

C: 嗯…如此有趣且契合的灵魂倒是不多见……
E: Indeed... Such fascinating and compatible souls are rare to find...

C: 多谢夸奖，朋友！既然末日已经过去，我也得重新给自己找些乐子了……
E: I appreciate the kind words, friend! With the apocalypse behind us, I'm on the lookout for fresh amusements...

C: 我就知道，神明总会垂青虔诚的信徒——赞美今日的和平与安宁！
E: I knew it! The gods always smile upon their devout followers. Let's give praise to the peace and tranquility today!

C: 是啊，难得悠闲，我又恰好带着里拉琴，为你弹奏一曲如何？
E: Yeah, it's rare to have such leisure time. And since I happen to have my lyre with me, how about I play you a tune?

C: 唉，英雄阁下，您瞧，不管听多少遍，我还是理解不了这种简洁的交流方式…
E: Alas, dear hero, no matter how many times I hear it, I still can't wrap my head around this... concise way of speaking...

C: 事关重大，你们要做好心理准备。
E: This is no trivial matter, so steel your hearts.

C: 这枚物件，你一定很熟悉了——那位聋哑女孩送我的髀石护身符，我希望能将它转交给你。
E: You must be familiar with this item. It's the talisman made of femoral stone that the non-hearing, non-speaking girl gave me. I'd like to pass it on to you.

C: 记得有人童年还想去悬锋学武？
E: Didn't someone want to practice martial arts in Kremnos when he was a kid?

C: 复明的感觉如何？
E: How does it feel to have your sight back?

C: 是的，但我还不知道，万敌阁下居然也要参加。难道说，你也准备好了手工制品？
E: Yes, but I had no idea that Lord Mydei would be participating too. Don't tell me you've also prepared some handicrafts?

C: 万敌阁下…真的有那么夸张吗？
E: Lord Mydei... is it really going to be that dramatic?

C: 若这是阁下对我的祝愿，我就轻轻收起，珍藏在心中啦。
E: If that is your blessing for me, then I'll gently accept and cherish it.

C: 歌耳戈之子，迈德漠斯，向你致意。
E: Mydeimos, son of Gorgo, sends his regards.

C: 希望我们还能再见，贵客。
E: Hope to see you again, honored guest.

C: 去问问那些你熟悉的朋友吧，也许他们有值得被你铭记之物。
E: Go, and ask the friends you know well. They might have something worth remembering.

C: 我猜你也有东西要送给我？
E: I'm guessing you've got something for me too?

C: 仔细一想，金属质地的若虫跟这里还蛮相配的。
E: Come to think of it, these metallic nymphs really fit in well around here.

C: {NICKNAME}，欢迎你随时来和我聊聊。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're welcome to come and talk to me any time.

C: 哔嘟…即将为您播放「家用寻物仪安全使用指南」，请跟读并背诵全文……
E: Beep, beep, beep... About to play: Home-Use Object Finder Safety Manual. Please follow along and recite the entire document...

C: 哼！小孩子就是没有耐心，这是世间的常识。
E: Hum! Everyone knows that kids are all impatient.

C: 唉，那姑娘老是自作主张…跟她说了多少次了，这点小事我搞得定……
E: *sigh* That girl always makes decisions for me without first consulting me. I've told her many times that I can deal with this myself...

C: 就…太难了呗。
E: Well... it's way too hard.

C: 我这都教了你多少次了，啊？平时讲起理论的时候头头是道，该你上手操作的时候就给我这畏手畏脚？
E: How many times have I taught you this already, huh? When we talk about the theory, you seem to be pretty onto it, but why's it always a cop-out when it comes to the real thing?

C: 区区矿车…看来我也要拿出真本事了……
E: It's just a mine cart... I guess it's time to get serious...

C: 听着很光鲜，但…其实我还是想干点大事。我可不想一辈子被圈在这矿区里。
E: I mean it sounds pretty important... But still I want to do something much bigger in life. I don't want to be trapped in these mines forever.

C: 终于来了，就等你了！今天就是最终考验——怎么说，有没有信心挑战？
E: You're finally here! I've been waiting! Today's your final test — are you up to it?

C: 嗯？怎么想起来问这个？
E: Hmm? Why the sudden interest?

C: 滴答！被开除正好，我就可以拿着剧团的赔偿金去玩咯！
E: Tick-tock! Fine! Fire me then. I'll take the severance pay from the troupe and enjoy myself!

C: 没想到您居然会回应我这个小科员的要求…真是不胜感激！
E: I didn't expect you to respond to my humble request... I'm incredibly grateful!

C: 没办法，维修科人力不足，招也招不到…你平时见不到我是很正常的。
E: It's just how it is. The maintenance team is understaffed. They can't recruit anyone... So that's why you hardly see me around.

C: 好歹是平安解决了。这样一来，我也算是和天才黑客交过手的人了……
E: Anyway, everything turned out alright. In this regard, I guess I'm someone who's taken on a genius hacker, right...

C: 哦？生面孔啊。来我们机械聚落有什么事吗？
E: Huh? A fresh face. What have you come to our robot settlement for?

C: 为了吸引更多参观者，博物馆需要一些实物照片来制作模型。所以，我想请你去给<color=#dbc291ff>反物质兵团的冰雕</color>拍几张照片。
E: We're trying to get more visitors in, so the museum is after some photos from which to model replicas. Can you please go and snap a few pictures of the <color=#dbc291ff>Antimatter Legion's ice sculptures</color>?

C: 我自己也给你准备了些报酬，还希望你能笑纳！
E: I put together something to thank you. Go ahead and take it!

C: 我明白了。那么，接下来是母亲大人执政后的故事——
E: Got it. So, next up, mother's story after she has taken power...

C: 一幅油画作品，描绘了宏阔的行政区全景。
E: An oil painting depicting the Administrative District in its full majesty.

C: 结构复杂的机械构件。互相啮合的齿轮传递着力量，维系着这座城市的运作。
E: A complicated machinery component. The intermeshing system of gears transmits power to sustain the city's functions.

C: 旧世界的古董油灯。在银河中的知识降临雅利洛-Ⅵ之前，它是最寻常的照明工具。
E: An antique oil lamp from the Old World. Before interplanetary knowledge descended onto Jarilo-VI, it was the most common tool for lighting.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了科考基地「炉心」的景色。
E: A work of photography that captures the scenery of the Furnace Core research station.

C: 「她的坚韧与英勇唤来了驱散敌寇的汹涌寒潮，彻底终结了长达三十余年的惨烈战争，和平奇迹般地自战火肆虐的大地再度滋长；」
E: "Her tenacity and valor summoned the turbulent Eternal Freeze to disperse the enemy invaders and completely ended the tragic war that lasted more than thirty years. Miraculously, peace sprouted once again from the land ravaged by war."

C: 胆小的监船工人像是听到了同伴呼唤，亦步亦趋地登上了幽灵星槎…随后星槎像雾气般缓缓消散在迴星港里。从此再没人见过这两位工人了。
E: The timid worker thought he heard his partner calling and boarded the phantom starskiff... Soon after, the starskiff slowly faded from Stargazer Navalia. From then on, no one had ever seen the two workers again.

C: 驭空…你会来吗……
E: Yukong... Will you come...

C: 是岩明大叔，他说自己那天在港口接待事务时偶然看到这事。
E: It's Uncle Yanming. He said he was receiving some guests at the port that day and incidentally saw it.

C: 狐人的奠仪会将逝者们的遗物放上星槎，送出仙舟，航入恒星，与之同辉。
E: The foxian ceremony will place items of the dead onto the starskiff, sending them out of Xianzhou and into the stars to shine brilliantly among them.

C: 这张照片虽说也有黑影，但应该不难看出拍的是什么吧？
E: Despite all the black shadow on this photo, it shouldn't be too hard to see what it is, right?

C: 当然可以，不过我对自己照片的要求可不低，你得认真拍才行哦。
E: Of course, no problem. But I have high standards about my image, so you'll have to take it seriously.

C: 呜呜，呜呜呜——
E: Woo-woo, wubba-woo...

C: 跟我害羞什么呀，来来，让我看看……
E: Don't be coy with me. C'mon, let me see...

C: 我很理解你的仰慕之情，但如果给你开了这个先例，今后的工作可就麻烦了，我这行可不能天天被相机对着啊。
E: I understand your admiration, but if I make this exception for you, then it'll make things hard for me later on. In this line of work, I can't just get caught on film anywhere, y'know.

C: 机兵们不满地离开了……
E: The automatons leave in disappointment...

C: 扑满似乎听懂了你的话，把照片吐了出来便逃走了……
E: The Trotter seems to understand you, and spits out the photo before fleeing...
...Hmph!

C: 哟，码头出什么事啦？
E: Hey, what's going on at the dock?

C: 我们还没取得会长的信任吧。
E: Perhaps we haven't won their trust yet.

C: 来得正好，大家正在向公司这家伙讨说法呢！
E: You're just in time — everyone is asking this IPC goon for an explanation!

C: 证据确凿？抵赖？
E: Conclusive evidence? Deny?

C: 我只是个传声筒，可不是什么秘书。
E: I'm no secretary — more of a messenger.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 公司为什么不能自己运营码头？
E: Why couldn't the IPC operate the dock from the beginning?

C: 「我是个有眼无珠的蠢货！不知天高地厚，只会狺狺狂吠！」
E: I'm a raving idiot howling into the wind!

C: 太好了，我现在就想摆烂了。
E: Maybe he knows when it's time to give up hope.

C: 会长的声音吗？
E: Is that the president speaking?

C: 要我说，也许公司也不是敌人呢？
E: What if... the IPC isn't an enemy?

C: 你小子在这里埋伏我呢？
E: You back-stabbing little...

C: 这件事我完全不懂，拜托给你们了。
E: Wow, that's a lot of information... I haven't wrapped my head around it, but I'm sure you'll do a good job.

C: 就拍「{NICKNAME}与金人巷入口」。
E: Alrighty. "{NICKNAME} at the Alley Entrance".

C: 金人巷商会的各位好啊。
E: Members of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I hope you're all keeping well.

C: 名字有分量有什么用？
E: You are sacrificing its identity in exchange for a fancy brand.

C: 虽然有过磕磕碰碰，有过互不信任，但争吵和矛盾竟然都是为了金人巷能变好…这个过程中只要有人成心使坏，我们都不会像现在这样顺利。
E: Sure, there were clashes and distrust, but virtually everyone was acting in the best interest of the Alley. If that hadn't been the case, the whole thing would have fallen apart.

C: 你站住，我还有些话要说。
E: You, stop. I still have some words to say.

C: 长官，我真的只是来送货的。
E: Captain, I'm really just here to deliver the "goods."

C: 「货物」已到达指定位置，正在投放，请勿移动……
E: The goods have arrived at their designated location. Placement in process. Please do not move...

C: 我也认为自己不应该为他人的失误买单。
E: I agree that I shouldn't have to pay for other people's mistakes.

C: 我会尽量减少攻击性。
E: I'll try to tone down my aggression.

C: 什、什么？！你们居然还上了？凭什么！
E: Wh—What? You already paid back the lease? How!?

C: 你少在那里装糊涂了，这不是都怪你吗？
E: Don't feign ignorance — isn't that all by your own design?

C: 历史数据远比你们的说辞更有说服力，<color=#dbc291ff>你们最好也学会使用数据</color>。
E: Historical data has proved my point. <color=#dbc291ff>It is the reality, not rhetoric that matters</color>.

C: 你怎么可以断定我们没有从历史中学会经验呢？
E: What makes you think we didn't draw any wisdom from history?

C: 请立刻回答我的问题。
E: Please answer the question.

C: 还有一家「尚滋味」的数据是空白，劳烦你能再给我指指路吗？
E: There's another blank place here, the Spices Supreme... Could you please navigate again for me?

C: 原来如此！
E: I see!

C: …哎呀，我又不是不干活，我只不过想晚点再干……
E: ...You see, it's not like I'm not working. I just want to do the work at a later time...

C: 你之前说的信息我仔细思考了一下，感觉应该和「大宇宙时间隧道」有点关系。
E: I have carefully considered the information you mentioned earlier, and I feel this has something to do with the big universe time tunnel.

C: 喂，你这家伙，没事跑这里来做什么？难不成…你是那个家伙的同伙！
E: Hey you, what are you doing here? Are you... are you an accomplice of his!?

C: 呜呜…我也想看看怪物……
E: *sniffle* I want to see monsters...

C: 怎么，不好笑吗？这可是某个客人跟我讲的真人真事！不过梦泡难得，酸梦糖还是很好做的——
E: Aren't you amused? This is an actual story a guest shared with me! But dream bubbles are rare, and making Sour Dream soft candies is relatively straightforward—

C: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
E: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

C: 等等，我的特别好礼！
E: Wait, what about my special reward?

C: 别，别伤害我啾…我是被迫才给石头老板干活的！
E: D—Don't hurt me, tweet... I'm coerced into working for Boss Stone!

C: 真见鬼，监狱怎么突然变成了这个样子？其他人都去哪儿了？
E: Woah, what happened to the prison? Where's everybody else?

C: 看，是哈努老大他们！但怎么过去呢……
E: Look, it's Hanu and the rest! How do we get over there...

C: 咦…这个空间好像变得不太一样了？
E: Wait... this place doesn't seem quite the same, right?

C: （整天接待这种奇奇怪怪的客人还真挺累的，调饮师的工作果然不好做啊。）
E: (Dealing with these weirdos day-in, day-out is indeed quite tiring. Being a drinksmith is certainly no easy feat.)

C: 就是顺手帮你个忙，稍微还点人情罢了。呵呵，完成了。
E: Just doing you a favor and returning the favor. Well, it's done.

C: 汪！我找到舒翁的味道了，走走！
E: Woof! I've caught Siobhan's scent! Let's go!

C: 我们收到的命令是把梦境酒店的怪物彻底清理干净，别管那么多，直接动手吧。
E: We've been ordered to wipe out all the monsters in the hotel in the Dreamscape. Let's just do our job.

C: 既然自认为是调饮师，就用你最擅长的方式来解决问题呗。
E: Now that you're a drinksmith, why don't you solve the problem the best way you know how?

C: 银河球棒侠，是很有名的意思？抱歉，我不是你们这个年代的人。
E: Does being the Galactic Baseballer mean you're really famous? Sorry, I'm not part of your generation.

C: 我们能携手为「开拓」献上*微不足道*的祝福——它可以为寒风中的无名客带来一丝温暖，也可以为行于酷暑土地上的无名客带去一丝微风……
E: We could offer an insignificant blessing for the Trailblaze — we can give the Nameless just a bit of warmth in the winter wind, or a cool breeze in places of excruciating heat...

C: 没想到我就要成为前辈了。
E: I didn't realize I'm about to become a seasoned veteran.

C: 用这么奢华的箱子来装东西，可真有他们的。
E: Using such a luxurious chest to store stuff... they are really quite something.

C: 哦——你拿到了火箭筒，但这次没有用了，钢铁鳄鱼是无敌的。
E: Oh — seems like you've gotten your hands on the rocket launcher, but it's useless this time. The Steely Gator is invincible!

C: 好了，快去试试看吧，这次的故事已经步入高潮…与「石头老板」的战斗绝对很刺激！
E: Alright, go try it out. This story is reaching its climax... the battle against Boss Stone is absolutely thrilling!

C: 咳咳，亲爱的朋友，我在这里等一个有缘人。
E: *cough* My dear friend, I'm waiting for a fated one.

C: 想要知道更多的线索，您可以去会场寻找我的同伴，他们会给你指引方向！
E: If you need more clues, then go look for my companions at the venue. They'll point you in the right direction!

C: 他们也顶着苏乐达吗？
E: Are they also carrying SoulGlad on their head?

C: 这样我也能早点下班了……
E: This way, I'll be able to get off work early too...

C: 最近克劳克影城重新营业，我们剧组成员就都打扮成了《钟表小子》里的角色，用更亲切的方式与观众交流。
E: All our cast members are dressing up as the characters in Clockie for the recent reopening of the theme park. We want to look more approachable while interacting with the audience.

C: 匹诺康尼是怎么制作动画的？
E: How is animation production done in Penacony?

C: 多少年了…自从「钟表匠」先生不知所踪之后，我们便再也没有见过这样的场面。
E: It's been so many years... Since we lost contact with Mr. Watchmaker, we've never seen such a bustling scene.

C: 审核批注：<unbreak>23</unbreak>至<unbreak>53</unbreak>分钟片段，公司机甲对战的怪物「百臂的原罪」疑似影射某位「调弦师」。以及片中含有大量植入广告与「存护」信仰宣传，建议删减后上映。
E: Review: From the <unbreak>23</unbreak>rd to the <unbreak>53</unbreak>rd minute, the monster named "Inherent Sin of Hundred Arms" that the IPC mechas are up against appears to allude to a certain Chordmaster. Additionally, the movie contains a lot of advertisements and elements that promote the belief in Preservation. It is recommended to cut the violating scenes before releasing the movie.

C: 不许动，你怎么跑到这里来的！现在匹诺康尼大剧院禁止对外开放……
E: Halt! Who goes there? The Penacony Grand Theater is currently closed to the public...

C: 他最大的心愿就是把匹诺康尼搞得一团糟——这么没有同理心，还希望别人通过作品来理解他，真是荒谬！
E: Turning Penacony into a chaotic mess is his biggest wish. How can he expect others to understand him through his works when he has zero empathy!?

C: 家族这么小气？
E: Is The Family really that unforgiving?

C: 呵呵，「钟表匠」不都说清楚了吗？钟表小子今后的故事，要由见证未来的我们讲述……
E: Heheh, didn't the Watchmaker say so? The story of Clockie's future is to be told by us, who will be witnessing the future...

C: 这个嘛…其实我们还打算将五部《美梦往事》的故事进行结合，制作一部能让观众一直看下去的「超长篇」电影。
E: Well... we're actually planning on combining the five stories from Dreamjoy Memoir to create a "super extended version" of the movie for our audience to watch for a long time.

C: 匹诺康尼是怎么制作动画的？
E: How is animation production done in Penacony?

C: 美梦小镇啊，请记住我的名字、我的话语——最英勇的广告牌——
E: Let my name and words be etched in the annals of Dreamville — the most heroic billboard!

C: 所以，我们想向各位提出的并非收购——而是合作！强强联手，推出新的动画影片！
E: So, the proposal I'm making isn't an acquisition at all, but a partnership! Together we can be greater by producing a new animation flick!

C: 明白就开拍吧！
E: Start shooting if you've got it!

C: 这个钟表小子只能重复固定的台词，应该是鸢尾花制造的*道具*。
E: This Clockie can only repeat fixed lines. It might be a *prop* made by the Iris Family.

C: 懂了就开拍！
E: Start rolling if you've got it!

C: 可恶，欺辱弱者之人，真是卑鄙！
E: Those who bully the weak are truly despicable!

C: 咳咳，叫得有点累了，有苏乐达给我润润嗓子吗。
E: Ahem, it's tiring doing all this shouting. Any SoulGlad available to soothe my throat?

C: 我记得这瓶苏乐达！
E: I remember this bottle of SoulGlad!

C: 哼，但在剧外，我桶里的智慧已经够多了！
E: Hmph, but outside this show, my can's wisdom is more than enough!

C: 这份重任就拜托您了！
E: This task will be up to you!

C: 您一定能拍出伟大的广告！
E: You can definitely produce a great advertisement!

C: 用甜美抚平镇民的痛苦。
E: Soothe the people's pain with sweetness.

C: 关于苏萨先生。
E: About Mr. Sousa.

C: 再见，咕噜噜，祝导演拍摄顺利！
E: So long, *gurgle*. All the best with the film shoot, director!

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 对对，就是石头。在《钟表小子》的世界观里，石头貌似是很重要的东西，整个美梦小镇是靠石头搭起来的。
E: Yes, yes — stones. In the worldview of Clockie, stone seems to be super important. All of Dreamville is built upon stones.

C: 正直无私的勇者。
E: A righteous, selfless hero.

C: 别着急，我亲爱的朋友，让我慢慢为你介绍。
E: Don't worry, my dear friend — I'll fill you in nice and slow.

C: 这是个好问题！我们曾试着在某位赞助商提供的梦泡上开发，但后来——哦，那枚梦泡里的内容有点太过刺激了，不太适合向大众推广。
E: Great question! We tried developing it on a dream bubble supplied by a sponsor, but... *sigh* the content on that dream bubble was a little bit too exciting to be made available to the public.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 结合「球棒侠」本人的遭遇来看…真是充满教育意义的结局。哈哈，我会考虑采纳的。
E: Combined with what happens to the Galactic Baseballer... it's a real educational ending. Haha, I'll add this outcome into consideration.

C: 代表传奇的黄金球棒、被禁忌封印的黑暗球棒…你认为，「球棒侠」会如何选择呢？
E: The legendary golden bat, or the forbidden dark bat... which bat do you think the baseballer would choose?

C: 也许是，听说那位艺术家的性情颇为古怪，搞不好在作品中动了什么手脚……
E: Maybe, but from what I've heard, that artist is quite the eccentric character. Perhaps they embedded some shenanigans in the dream.

C: 不对吧…让你表演「失望」，你怎么这么雀跃……
E: No... that's not right... You're trying to express disappointment. Why do you sound so chipper?

C: 已经换题啦！现在要表演「惊喜」，不是「失望」……
E: We're already at the next scene! You need to convey surprise now, not disappointment...

C: 为了捍卫苏乐达™的尊严，我将飞上天空，成为最闪亮的猩，呜喳喳喳！
E: To safeguard the integrity of SoulGlad™, I will soar high into the sky and become its shiniest star, whoosh!

C: 好了，快去吧，哈努兄弟。但要小心，有两个坏家伙也盯上了拼图碎片…要么想办法打昏他们，要么就别被他们发现。
E: Now, scurry along, Hanu. But tread carefully – two ne'er-do-wells are also eyeing those jigsaw pieces... Either outsmart them with a quick knockout, or ensure they don't catch you in the act.

C: 竟然真的有一支火箭筒。
E: He wasn't lying. There's actually a bazooka here.

C: 本应优秀的演员们总在被迫扮演着空洞的角色，说着单调的台词，经历一幕又一幕无趣的情节，做着一个又一个限定选项的选择，然后在麻木中草草退场。
E: Outstanding actors are always pigeonholed into vacuous roles, forced to repeat monotonous lines and experience the same vapid scenes and beats over and over, making the same limited choices over and over again, before finally departing in numbness.

C: 它比之前安静了许多，仿佛习惯了这里的环境。但你仍然能听见一声声细微的呼唤——
E: It is much quieter than before, as if it has become used to the environment here. However, you can still hear a faint calling...

C:
演员
 艾迪恩  饰  艾迪恩
  忆域迷因「沉眠」饰 「何物朝向死亡」
E:
Cast
Aideen  as  Himself
Memory Zone Meme "Dormancy"  as  "Something Unto Death"

C: 「雕琢自原始梦境的城市」…前面那个人偶，难道就是爱德华医生的合作伙伴？过去看看吧。
E: "The city chiseled from the Primordial Dreamscape"... Is that puppet over there the one who collaborates with Dr. Edward? Let me check it out.

C: 你为爱德华医生制作梦泡？
E: Do you make dream bubbles for Dr. Edward?

C: 「末王」究竟是什么？
E: What is Terminus?

C: 我不擅长摆什么师父架子，既然爷爷叫我来教你习剑，我绝不藏私。
E: I'm not good at acting all master-like. Since Grandpa asked me to teach you swordplay, I won't hold back any secrets.

C: 你要是输了，你不仅要当众学狗叫，还要大声说「仙舟剑法，狗都不学」，就站在金人巷街口，给每个路过的人讲一遍。
E: And if you lose, you'll have to bark like a dog in public and shout, "Xianzhou swordplay is a total joke!" You'll stand at the entrance of Aurum Alley and say it to everyone passing by.

C: 大家都听到了，我们十五日后见！哈哈哈哈哈，我们走！
E: You all heard it, right? We'll meet again in fifteen days! Hahaha, let's go!

C: 公司的人就是想找个软柿子捏，好卖他们的废铁，没劲。
E: Those IPC guys just want to pick on an easy target so they can promote their scrap metal. So typical.

C: 看来我是顺利通过了考试？是不是？
E: Looks like I passed the test, right?

C: 恭喜恭喜，恭喜你！
E: Yeah! Congratulations!

C: 本来以为教导三月小姐，不过是个兴趣爱好速成班。我现在算是品出些传徒授艺的成就感来了。
E: I thought teaching March was just something of a hobby, but now, actually seeing her progress gives me a sense of accomplishment.

C: 现在，三月觉得自己有几分胜算了？
E: So, what do you think your odds are, March?

C: 好像在仙舟幻戏里看过相同的故事！这位九叔是不是有两个徒弟，一个徒弟被僵尸咬了，还有一个徒弟被女鬼给迷住了……
E: I think I've seen a similar story in a Xianzhou immersia! Does this Uncle Jiu have two disciples, and one of them got bitten by a zombie, and the other got charmed by a female ghost...

C: 哎…生在这样的家庭里，该说不说，这小斯科特还真可怜。
E: Well... little Skott was pretty unfortunate to be born into such a family.

C: 让本大爷好好说你两句啊…你说说你，为了上位，你是一点拟人的事都不干啊！
E: Well, let me tell you something... In your quest to reach the top, you've trampled over everything that's decent!

C: 虽然这个想法很危险，但三月小姐终于学会不择手段赢得胜利了，我心甚慰。
E: Well, even though it's a risky idea, I'm glad you're finally willing to do whatever it takes to win, Miss March.

C: 噫！快别说了，我不吃了，疼就疼吧！
E: Whew! Okay, enough! I'm not taking any medicine. I'll just tough it out!

C: 也许有一天，我们会成为真正的朋友。如果你想来公司工作，我也一定会为你写推荐信。
E: Maybe we'll actually become real friends someday. If you want to come and work for the IPC, I'll gladly write you a recommendation letter.

C: 好好好，你厉害…我要向不夜侯的小老板娘道歉，是我惹事生非、故意找事，全都怪我！
E: Fine, you've got me... I want to apologize to the owner of the Sleepless Earl! It's my fault for causing trouble and making a scene on purpose!

C: 刚才说的都不算啊，现在重来！准备，三、二、一，开始——
E: Hey, none of that counted just now. Let's start over! Ready? Three, two, one... Go!

C: 难道椒丘先生知道哪里有「灵丹妙药」吗？
E: Could you know where there could be a miracle elixir, Mr. Jiaoqiu?

C: 好吃——！
E: Deeeelicious!

C: 这种故事信不得，我就不喝了。
E: This tale is simply unbelievable. I'm not drinking anything.

C: 那倒不必担心，不过是几滴血而已，不会要了妾身的命。
E: Worry not, it's just a few drops. It won't cost me my life.

C: 哇！谢谢灵砂大人！早知道领导这么体贴，当年我就该选丹鼎司而不是太卜司了。
E: Wow! Thank you, Master Lingsha! If I'd known you were such a kind leader, I'd have chosen to go to the Alchemy Commission over the Divination Commission any day!

C: 哦？我这就给太卜大人打小报告。
E: Oh? I will have to report that to the Master Diviner.

C: 我、我…原本是想要寻得绝世剑谱，掌握一门绝技。不过阅读了一遍《孤影剑谱》之后，该怎么说呢，我想帮助他…我想帮助书里的那位剑魔。
E: I—I... originally just wanted to find a powerful sword technique and master an ultimate skill. But, after I read the Solitary Shadow Sword Scroll, I... How should I put it? I want to help him.... I want to help the Blade Demon in the book.

C: 有意思，我们试试看吧——
E: Interesting, let us give it a try...

C: 总之，{NICKNAME}，如果你有空了，记得来找我啊。
E: Either way, {NICKNAME}. If you have time, remember to come back and see me again.

C: 开始今日拍摄。
E: Let's begin today's shoot.

C: 上上下下，大家对此事都没有头绪。直到今天，一位「新朋友」找上我。他称可以解决这一切，但前提是要找到「你」……
E: Not a single one of them has any idea about what this thing is — Until today when a "new friend" came to see me. He said he could solve all of this, but we must find "you" first...

C: 三月七对刚刚的战斗很满意。
E: March 7th seems very satisfied with how the battle went.

C: 我俩的交情，怎么看都是符合标准定义的「朋友」——你出钱，我出力，这难道不是友情最纯粹、最完美的呈现形式吗？
E: No matter how you look at it, our relationship meets the standard definition of "friendship" in every way. You pay with money, and I pay with effort. Is this not friendship in its purest, most perfect form?

C: …还真是符合本人性格的战斗方式。
E: ...Truly a fighting style fitting for his personality...

C: 输了可别怨我。
E: Don't blame me if you lose.

C: 你怎么来参加演武仪典了？
E: Why did you come to participate in the Wardance?

C: 可能是大守护者来保佑你了。
E: Maybe the Supreme Guardian is watching over you.

C: 如果能有你参与，那我们这第一次大型活动可就算是圆满成功了！
E: If you join up, our first major event will be considered a wild success!

C: 这位朋友就是你说的卢卡吧？久仰久仰，最近总能在新闻上看到你～我叫青雀，是太卜司的卜者。
E: Is this the friend that you mentioned? Luka? Pleased to finally meet you. I keep seeing you in the news! My name is Qingque, a diviner from the Divination Commission.

C: 不管怎么说，时隔七百年，竟然还能听到伊戈尔本人的声音，我已经很开心了。
E: Regardless, to be able to hear Igor's actual voice after seven centuries... Makes me more than happy.

C: …你就叫我冷锋吧。在仙舟语中意为「寒冷的剑」。有缘再见了，卢卡。
E: ...You can call me Lengfeng. In the Xianzhou language it means an icy blade. May fate bring us together again, Luka.

C: 我是他的教练。
E: I'm his coach.

C: 波提欧！玩笑别开过头！
E: Boothill! You're going too far!

C: 我这样没见过世面的乡巴佬，本就不该来参加这种比赛。水平差得太远了……
E: I'm such a country bumpkin. I shouldn't have come here in the first place! I'm WAY out of my league....

C: 卢卡你好…我叫藿藿，那位是尾巴大爷。我们是你的粉丝……
E: Hello Luka... I'm Huohuo, and this here is Mr. Tail. We're your fans...

C: 好、好冷！忍不住就打了个哆嗦……
E: C—Cold! I was shivering for a second there...

C: 说话！！！
E: Speak up!!!

C: （藿藿和尾巴已经回家了。我也该回休息室准备复活赛了。）
E: (Huohuo and Tail have gone home. I should also head back to the lounge to prepare for the repechage.)

C: 不过我还不太清楚，这人气复活赛是什么赛制啊？
E: But I'm still not quite clear, what are the rules for this popularity revival match?

C: 卢卡先生，您奋勇挥拳的英姿，一定能让这位骑士感受到您的美。我衷心祝愿您能获得胜利！
E: Mr. Luka, I'm sure the knight will see the beauty in your powerful punches. I truly hope you win!

C: 没关系，就算旧的传奇已经不为人知，我还是可以创造出新的传奇！
E: It's okay. Even though this ancient legend is no longer known, I can still create a new legend myself!

C: 卢卡，准备好加冕成为「铁臂之王」了吗？
E: Luka, are you ready to be crowned as the King of the Iron Arms?

C: 「铁臂」史瓦罗！
E: Svarog "Iron Arm"!

C: 唉…那接下来怎么办。史瓦罗大佬？我们要打一场贝洛伯格内战吗？
E: Eh... What's next, Svarog? Is it Belobogian against Belobogian?

C: 哦？这我还真有兴趣。
E: Oh? That sounds interesting.

C: （可能所谓「强者」本来就是一种心境吧。）
E: (Maybe it's the mentality that makes you strong.)

C: 卢卡先生，这些日子来，我一直都在关注你。在你没有注意到的时候，我在观众席上欣赏了你的每一场比赛。
E: Mr. Luka, I've had my eye on you these past few days. You weren't aware, but I was in the crowd watching all your matches.

C: 发送一封邀请函吧。就当是一个不会成真的祝愿。
E: Send an invitation. Even if it is just a wish that won't come true.

C: 规则更新：不准擅自行动。
E: Rule updated: Do not take action without orders.

C: 身为蒙受长生主恩典的狼，却主动磨掉自己的爪牙，给自己套上枷锁，像狗一样仓惶逃亡，还对孱弱的猎物大施同情心。
E: As wolves graced by the Master of Immortality, they willingly ground down their own fangs and claws and collared themselves. Then they fled with tails tucked between their legs like dogs, and expressed compassion for feeble prey.

C: 把我推开的时候，驮那究竟在想什么？
E: What was Dhyana thinking when she pushed me away?

C: 反有机方程，指令中止。
E: Anti-Organic Equation command terminated.

C: 确认：弟子谨遵教诲。
E: Confirmation: I receive your guidance with faith.

C: 基于以上目标展开推演，结论：破除戒律，抹杀自我。
E: Beginning extrapolation based on the aforementioned objectives. Conclusion: Break the commandments and delete the self.

C: ……只要能达成请愿，我可以献出一切。
E: ...As long as the petition is complete, I will offer everything I have.

C: 两位，我们来一起看看下场擂台赛的对手信息吧。
E: Folks, let's take a look at the opponent's profile for the next Faceoff Match.

C: 唔…搞不好是因为我有病在身，才触发了梦貘的特殊习性？也许对你无效？我也不知道啦，你自己试试看好了。
E: Hmm... Maybe it's because I'm sick, and that triggered the tuskpir's special trait? Maybe it doesn't work on you? I don't know. You should give it a shot.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Hahahahahaha!

C: （目光表示感谢）
E: (Give an appreciative look)

C: 那我们跳过吧。
E: Let's skip then.

C: 不存在这回事，是大家多虑了。
E: There was no such thing. Everyone is just overthinking.

C: 其实意志消沉的是我，想弃赛的也是我。我好想永远待在没人的角落里。
E: Actually, I was the one who was feeling down, and it was also me who wanted to forfeit the match. I just want to stay in a corner where no one can ever find me.

C: 请注意你的问题…
E: Please watch your questions...

C: 前排左手边第二位。
E: Front row, second from the left.

C: 史瓦罗大佬固然很强，但他在雅利洛-Ⅵ星核之灾出现前就存在了，岁数有点太大了。反观卢卡选手还是个小伙子，正值当打之年。
E: Boss Svarog is very strong, but he's an antique who existed before the Jarilo-VI's Stellaron Disaster even appeared. Conversely, Luka's still young and vibrant, a fighter in his prime.

C: 我再说最后一遍——
E: I'll say this one last time...

C: 卢卡选手究竟该如何应对呢？
E: How will Luka deal with them?

C: 你怎么又跑来摆货了？在金人巷给人打工还不够，现在专门跑到庙会来打工了是吧？
E: Why're you here to stack goods again? What, didn't tire of running errands at Aurum Alley, itching for more sweaty labor at the temple fair?

C: 不过说实话，仙舟这些解谜小游戏还是挺好玩的。这庙会明年还办吗？
E: Honestly, these little puzzles from Xianzhou are pretty fun. Are you gonna do this temple fair again next year?

C: 不知道这个人会不会对音乐派对感兴趣……
E: I don't know if this person would be interested in the music party...

C: 哼。破铁罐子也敢在这和我谈音乐，可笑至极！
E: Hmph. You dare debate me on music theory, you heap of scrap! This is a bad joke!

C: …她说啥呢？
E: ...What is she saying?

C: （看观众的反应，乐队演出很成功的样子。去问问现场的评价吧。）
E: (The band's performance is a resounding success from the audience's reactions. Let's go ask what they think.)

C: 什么着装不合规范啦，旋律不符合主流风格啦，开场白太长啦…只要想挑刺，总是能找到毛病的，别放在心上。
E: Stuff like not adhering to dress code, melodies that don't fit into mainstream music, opening speech being too long... As long as they want to nitpick, they will find that needle in the haystack, so don't take it to heart.

C: 先试试吧，我挺想知道佩佩说起话来是什么样的，是那种可爱的类型呢，还是超凶？
E: We have to give it a shot. I'm pretty curious what Peppy's voice sounds like — will it be adorable, or really gruff?

C: 扑满反复扭动着身子，似乎很欢迎你的到来。怎么办，要拿出相机陪它玩一会吗？
E: The Trotter wiggles and waggles about, as if welcoming your presence. Now what? Take out your camera and play with it for a while?

C: 哈哈哈，咱们还有没有什么没讲的笑话？
E: Hahaha, any jokes we missed?

C: 主公！我等在此守候多时了！音律•修行进展极为顺利，就差最后的谱曲事宜了！
E: Sound Master! I have been waiting for some time! Our sound training has been extremely fruitful. All that is left to do is the composition!

C: 吉他•忍徒如此不辞而别，临时逃离战场——此等行径有违忍者的底线。
E: For Ninja Initiate Guitar to depart without a farewell, retreating from the contest so abruptly — such an act breaches the fundamental principles of ninjahood.

C: 冷静点…现在最重要的任务是争取到上台机会。
E: Calm down... What's most important is to gain a chance to get on stage.

C: …我是来看乐队演出的吧，怎么开始说起相声了？
E: ...I came to watch a band perform. Why're they starting a crosstalk show?

C: 音乐原本就是探索未知的过程，有不同的好恶很正常。但是将匹诺康尼的命运，压在几个学生的身上是否有些不妥？
E: Music is fundamentally about discovering the unknown, so it's natural to have diverse tastes. However, isn't it problematic to place the fate of Penacony on the shoulders of a few students?

C: 否则，全员开除！敢和我打赌么，还是说——其实你也不相信她能及时赶到？
E: Otherwise, all members are expelled! Do you have the guts to make a bet with me? Or you don't believe she'll be able to make it back in time?

C: <size=36>喔！！！</size>
E: <size=36>YEAAAAH!!!</size>

C: 缭乱忍侠•AKA乱破！
E: The Dazzling Ninja a.k.a. Rappa!

C: 咕，怎么可能！我们练习了这么长时间的节奏舞步，你居然能够轻易跟上。
E: Ugh, how's that possible! We spent endless hours practicing our moves, but you were able to keep up so easily.

C: 我叫邓恩，也是「机械热潮」的——前键盘手！现在已经退出了，哈哈。
E: I am Dunn, also the Mechanical Fever's... former keyboardist! I've left the band, haha.

C: 好呀好呀，我也想跟它玩。来~转个圈，握握手~
E: Yay! I want to play with it too. Spin around, and shake hands!

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，能帮我个忙吗？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, can you help me out?

C: 还要阻止他们继续使坏！
E: Stop 'em in their tracks, we shutting 'em down!

C: 嗨，还不是折纸大学要举办校庆，再不上线就赶不上咯。不是吹牛啊，我开发的这部作品，怎么都能拿个「最受学生喜爱的移动游戏」奖吧？
E: That's because it's almost time for the Paperfold University anniversary festival. They won't make it if they don't launch now. Not that I'm bragging, but this title I developed? I reckon it can probably clinch a "Most Beloved Mobile Game by Students" award.

C: 磨得起劲的{RUBY_B#桑博}三宝磨{RUBY_E#}，一来一回摇得欢：黎明时分打个样，磨出一份自己吃；再磨一份拿去卖，还磨一份存起来！嘿！♪
E: Well the {RUBY_B#Sampo}magic mill{RUBY_E#} grinds when finished, to and fro the lid in rocking, grinds one measure at the day-break, grinds a measure fit for eating, grinds a second for the market, grinds a third one for the store-house! Ho! ♪

C: 你们抽成多少？
E: What's your commission?

C: 你可真是个小天才。
E: Pretty smart.

C: 交给三月发挥。
E: Leave it to March to concoct a response.

C: 播放《科幻小说》。
E: Play Science Fiction.

C: 三月七出手。
E: Send March 7th.

C: 我们为空间站立过功，你们不能这么对我们！我们要见艾丝妲！
E: We've done so much for the space station, so you can't do this to us! We want to see Asta!

C: 你也失眠了？
E: You can't sleep either?

C: 也许是一场爆炸？一抹景观？又或者是…一次「值日」？
E: Maybe it was an explosion? A touch of scenery? Or is it... another "day's work"?

C: {NICKNAME}！是时候来一场紧张刺激的室内相扑了！你敢与我决战吗？
E: {NICKNAME}! It's time for a round of high-octane indoor sumo wrestling! Dare you fight me?

C: 播放：「快让你们那几十个琥珀纪历史的老旧餐饮机器人享受一下退休生活吧！不如试试空间站的家政机器人，如果好用就让艾丝妲送你们一台。」
E: Next transmission: "Hurry up and let your rundown catering robot enjoy the retired life! It's got to be dozens of Amber Eras old! Why not try the space station's housekeeping robot? Asta will give you one if it's useful."

C: 丽宾超跑，绚丽虹光！
E: Leybent supercars, gorgeously magnificent!

C: 「参展者需要<color=#dbc291ff>依据课题拍摄</color>一组照片，上传并接受点评。在展览结束时，我会综合考虑诸多因素，颁发奖项。」
E: "Participants must shoot a set of photos <color=#dbc291ff>according to the task</color>, upload them, and receive feedback. When the exhibition ends, I will comprehensively consider numerous factors and present the awards."

C: 参展者还可以挑选一位摄影助理呢。{NICKNAME}，有没有兴趣和本姑娘一起参赛？
E: Participants can also choose a photography assistant. {NICKNAME}, interested in joining yours truly?

C: 「舞动青春」。
E: "Disco Youth."

C: 大伙快说词！
E: Quick, say your lines!

C: 「逐梦生态圈」。
E: "Dreamchaser Circle."

C: 话说回来，她到底在船上留下了多少个娃娃？{NICKNAME}，你该抽时间大扫除一下了。
E: Speaking of which, how many dolls did she even leave on the airship? {NICKNAME}, you should use some time to make a clean sweep of them.

C: 不客气，滴~答！
E: You're welcome, tick-tock!

C: 各位评委，各位观众…这就是我们的真实面貌。
E: Judges, audience members... This IS what we really look like.

C: 这可是字面意义的「雅韵」，再切题不过了，当然得拍下来！
E: This is the literal definition of "stately." It fits the theme perfectly, so of course we have to snap some shots!

C: 好像有些阴间了…不过，这儿本来就和阴间差不离。
E: Too creepy... Though they don't stray far from the supernatural theme to begin with.

C: 舞！舞！舞！
E: Dance! Dance! Dance!

C: 好嘞！上传完成，咱们可以去拍下一张照片啦。
E: All right! Upload complete! We can move on to the next photo.

C: 对啦，别忘了把丹恒也叫上。
E: Yes. Don't forget to get Dan Heng here too.

C: 你想起了参展期间帮忙完成摄影作品的朋友们…正巧，这会儿不少人都有空。
E: You recall all your friends who helped complete your photography during the exhibition... Coincidentally, many of them are free right now.

C: 上次见面还是上次。
E: The last time we met was the last time.

C: 原来是您！大人今日到访讲学，实属智慧花园的荣幸！
E: It is you indeed! It is the Garden of Wisdom's utmost honor to be audience to Your Highness' lecture today!

C: 蛮王今日如此有雅致四处闲逛，难不成是又有心碎之事在外散心？
E: For the savage king to be strolling the streets so leisurely... mayhaps you're trying to take your mind off another heartbreaking issue?

C: 哎呀，只是家里长辈的告诫。
E: Ah, they're just warnings from elders at home.

C: 奇美拉都是这样的吗？
E: Are all chimeras like this?

C: 「风堇亲卫队」
E: "Hyacine's Royal Guard"

C: 没错，你要和我签订契约吗？
E: That's right. You want to sign a contract with me?

C: …嗷呜？我的工作已经很饱和，没法再增加了。
E: ...Awoo? I'm pretty loaded up on work already. No need to add some more.

C: 正好所有人都在，就请获奖者来分享{F#她}{M#他}的成功经验吧——
E: Seeing as everyone's here, let's have the winner share {F#her}{M#his} success story!

C: 怎么还要工作？
E: More work? Really?

C: 哈哈，够胆量，要挑战最强的「超级变态关」是吗？拿出你全部的本事，让大哥我看看，你的水平够不够变态！
E: Hah hah! You're brave. You wanna challenge the hardest Super Insane Stage? Show me everything you've got and let me see if you're crazy enough!

C: 哎呀？难道强度不小心上太高了，再来一次吧。
E: Oh? Is the difficulty level too high? Let's try again.

C: (:３っ「两眼一睁，开始竞争」)∋
E: (:３っ "Clear eyes, full hearts, let's win this!")∋

C: 你…嗯，我应该问不出什么吧？
E: Yeah... I guess there's no point asking you anything, is there?

C: ——在介绍选手之前，给现场的各位观众朋友们紧急插播一条好消息！
E: Before we meet our contestants, I have some exciting news to share, so hold onto your seats, everyone!

C: 经阿格莱雅大人赞助、大工匠哈托努斯打造的「金海豹杯」，我们把它带来了现场。各位请看——！
E: Ladies and gentlemen, feast your eyes on the "Gold Seal Cup," generously sponsored by Lady Aglaea and masterfully crafted by Grand Craftsman Chartonus!

C: {F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}，你知道的，我可是等着你开终场香槟啊。
E: Hey {F#missy}{M#bro}, you know I'm saving that victory ambrosia just for you.

C: …对啊，我们就是喜欢「豹豹碰碰大作战」！
E: Exactly, we're here to watch some "Seal Slammers"!

C: 不准走！你忘了什么？
E: Not so fast! Did you forget something?

C: 诶？是缇宁说话把大家冻住了吗？
E: Eh? Did Trinnon's words freeze everyone in place?

C: …这还需要「怪盗的品行测试」吗？我早就知道你在用奖杯钓鱼执法了！你不也和从前一样？还是那么多弯弯绕绕的手段……
E: ...Do you really need to test a thief's virtue? I already knew that you were baiting me with the trophy! You haven't changed at all either. Still the same with your elusive methods...

C: 时间也不早了，希望小灰有个好梦。*我们*告辞了，期待明天和你赛场见哦！
E: It's getting late. Hope you have a good dream tonight, Little Gray. We'll take our leave now. See you at the venue tomorrow!

C: o((◉ω◉ ! )o「救命！我怎么变成海豹了？！」)∋
E: o((◉ω◉ ! )o "Help! Why did I turn into a seal!?" )∋

C: 你说的这游侠，是谁呢？
E: Who is this ranger you speak of?

C: 嗯？什么意思，我不太明白……
E: Huh? I don't understand...

C: 也许我应该品尝一番。
E: Maybe I should give it a taste.

C: 我来给大家都节约点时间吧。别眨眼，猫猫快递，马上就寄——
E: I'll save some time for everyone. Don't blink, the cat express will be right back—

C: 好，就听缇宝大人的。淘汰赛的时候，我们就拿出来。
E: Very well, if that is what Lady Tribbie wishes. Then we'll reveal it during the elimination rounds.

C: 哎哟哎哟，疼、疼，慢点。算您厉害！
E: Oh no, oh no, it hurts, slow down. Fine, you win, you're amazing!

C: 果然，变成小海豹的「代价」也是虚假的。但小灰会遇见奇美拉泡泡，和一位身手矫健的「游侠」，一同对抗金杯破碎的命运？
E: Of course, the "price" of becoming a baby seal is false too. However, will Little Gray meet Chimera Bubbles and a nimble "ranger," to defy the destiny of the breaking trophy?

C: 在几方期待、几方忐忑的心理中，时间照常流逝，来到了冠军赛。
E: With everyone's mixed anticipation and anxiety, time passed normally, and the championship arrived.

C: 朋友，谨慎是好事儿——但也可能让你错过许多乐子！
E: My friend, caution is a good thing — but it can also make you miss out on a whole lot of fun!

C: 通关之后有报酬吗？
E: Are there any rewards for finishing it?

C: 两台街机那个是哪个来着？
E: Which of the arcade machines is which again?

C: 不是？！我的工作只是负责当诱饵啊。都下班了，你怎么还在追我！
E: Hey!? My job was just to be bait! I've gone off work, so stop chasing me!

C: 用你手中的球棒好好感受吧——这无尽的恨意！
E: Feel it with the bat in your hands — Feel this endless hatred!

C: 别客气，我们俩谁跟谁啊。
E: What's mine is yours. Partners in games, yes?

C: 此人赛车叫「专业代打」，但赛前检查时，我们发现球笼赛车里没有驾驶员。
E: This person's racing car is called "Professional Substitute," but during the pre-race inspection, we discovered that there was no driver in the Spheroid racing car.

C: 总之，如你们所见，这只幽灵小鸟强行与我建立了朋友关系……
E: Long story short, this Ghost Bird decided we're friends now, whether I like it or not...

C: 啾啾啾。
E: Tweet tweet tweet.

C: 哼，老子我当然知道，有谁比咱们十王司更了解这些邪门歪道呢……
E: Hmph, like I didn't know that already. Who would know these fiends' ways better than us folks from the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 好吧，好吧，你们说了算……
E: Alright, alright, whatever you say...

C: …而{NICKNAME}，等你回到罗浮，我也一定好好招待你的！
E: ...And {NICKNAME}, once you're back on the Luofu, I'll give you a proper welcome too!

C: 你哪儿来的钱？
E: Where did you get the money from?

C: 您看，我千里迢迢地过来，也没给您带什么特产，一点公司医院的石膏，还望您笑纳。
E: You see, I traveled all this way and didn't get the time to bring anything special for you. This is a little plaster from the IPC hospital. Hope you'll like it.

C: 大伙都来捧场，都来啊！
E: Come one, come all!

C: （看来调饮生效了。）
E: (Looks like the drink is working.)

C: 天才怎么会出现在这里？
E: Why would a genius appear in a place like this?

C: 终究是给的不够多。
E: The salary's still not enough, after all.

C: 站在吧台里左顾右盼、鬼鬼祟祟…小灰毛，你又偷吃什么了？
E: Sneaking around behind the bar, shifty eyes and all... What'd you sneak a bite of this time, Gray Hair?

C: 哎，将军有所不知。细节决定成败，保不准小道消息里，就藏着制敌之道呢~
E: Come now, General. Victory lies in the details. Sometimes, it's those little rumors that hold the key to winning the war~

C: 「梦里全都有」。
E: All-Containing Dream.

C: 「闭嘴」尽力保持着顾客的矜持，但你分明看见难掩的欣赏从它的电子义眼中倾泻而出。
E: "Shush" tries to keep a guest's composure, but you clearly see admiration spilling from its electronic eye.

C: 和公司沾边的事都不太好。
E: Nothing good ever comes from getting mixed up with the IPC.

C: 「拿到『冰火玄莲』之后，{NICKNAME}趁热打铁，跃入另一个炉鼎当中！」
E: "Having plucked the Icefire Lotus, {NICKNAME} seizes an opportunity and leaps into another elixir cauldron!"

C: 我乃龙尊雨别造像，久沐日精月华而禀灵性。
E: I am the statue of Yubie the high elder. Steeped in the essence of moonlight, I have taken consciousness.

C: 总之，第二场试炼便是希望你能寻回至宝，令其物归原主，重定天命。
E: Anyway, the second trial is to find the treasure, return it to its original owner, and reset the wheels of fate.

C: 「{NICKNAME}一到这里，就感受到龙祖的气息在空中弥散…{M#他}{F#她}心中暗想：这大概就是龙尊秘宝的所在地吧！」
E: "When {NICKNAME} arrived at this place, {M#he}{F#she} immediately smelled the presence of Long in the air and thought: This must be where the secret treasures of the high elder lies!"

C: 行了，行了，你别砸了，停！停一下！
E: Fine, fine. Don't break it, stop! Please stop!

C: 陪伴我的小狐狸，离开了…
E: My little foxy has run off...

C: 幻胧长什么样我不是很关心，我只有一个问题…这就完了？
E: I don't care much for what Phantylia looks like. My only question is... Is that it?

C: 放入「天火熔金」
E: Put in the Ignis Aureliae

C: 碎星绝尘剑似乎是它之前的名字，这把神兵随着龙尊沦为罪囚而蒙尘受辱。而今得你妙手重铸，不如重新为它起个名字吧？
E: Star-Shattering Blade of Truth is this weapon's old name, and it's been dragged through the mud since the fall of the high elder. Now that you've re-cast it with skill and precision, why not give it a new name too?

C: 而很不幸，我被要求负责协助这名「特派员」完成工作，处理一些文件整理的内容。
E: And rather unfortunately, I was asked to support this "Task Force" in getting things done as well as to handle all the paperwork.

C: 你觉得自己此刻舒爽极了，像在柔软的云朵间漂浮，仰卧，来回起坐。你捧起一朵云砸向你的同伴三月七……
E: You feel incredibly comfortable almost as if you were floating among soft clouds. You grab a cluster of clouds and playfully toss it at your companion March 7th...

C: 你是{NICKNAME}对吧，正巧我有件事……
E: You are {NICKNAME}, right? It just so happens that I have something...

C: 果然输了…算了！它们强不强又如何呢？设计者随时都能修改以太灵的能力，但永远修改不了我对它们的喜爱！
E: So I did still lose... Forget it! Who cares if they are strong or weak? The designers can rebalance Aether Spirits however they want, they will never change my love for them!

C: 这已经是第一百次对战了，难道传闻是骗人的……
E: That was my hundredth battle... Were the rumors just a lie...?

C: 你短信里说的那个「星际决胜庆典」——那是什么？
E: Mm, you mentioned something about the "Interastral Tournament Festival" — what is that?

C: 我们想要体验这款游戏。
E: We want to try the game out.

C: …嗯？那里怎么闹哄哄的…发生什么事了？
E: ...Hmm? What's all the commotion?

C: 次元扑满…这可是十分稀有的以太灵啊，但强度不高——那群公司员工抢它做什么？
E: A Warp Trotter... This is quite a rare Aether Spirit, but they're not very powerful — why would those IPC folks be after it?

C: 总之，能看到二位还在热情游戏，我也就放心了！
E: In any case, seeing both of you still enthusiastic about the game puts my mind at ease!

C: 哦对，留影器就是你们常说的那<color=#dbc291ff>「相机」</color>！咱的解释二位可听清楚了？
E: Oh, right, you guys call it a <color=#dbc291ff>"camera"</color>! Anyway, did that all make sense?

C: 没懂，能再说一遍吗？
E: I didn't understand, can you explain it again?

C: 他看热闹不嫌事大…
E: Maybe he just enjoys stirring things up...

C: 要不咱让给他们算了…
E: Why don't we just give them what they want?

C: 喂，刚才那个面具男已经走了吧？
E: That mask-guy, he's gone now, right?

C: 哼哼？哼哼哼？
E: Oink? Oink, oink?

C: 黑塔女士——
E: Madam Herta—

C: 话说回来，我倒是好奇一件事——黑塔女士为什么会成为冠军候补呀？
E: I was wondering, Madam Herta, why did you become a championship contender?

C: 没关系，我理解你。
E: It's alright, I know the feeling.

C: 想得美，它可是我们的伙伴！
E: Dream on, that's our friend you're talking about!

C: 哈哈…这可能就是所谓的黑色幽默吧。
E: Haha... Sometimes you just have to laugh at the absurdity of it all.

C: 真是精彩的对决。
E: That was an amazing duel!

C: 诶嘿，成功啦！
E: Yay, we did it!

C: 唉，感觉还是「帝垣琼玉」更好玩。哎你说，要是两个人也能打琼玉牌，那不得比现在火多了？
E: Tsk, I still think Celestial Jade is way more fun. Hey, do you think Celestial Jade would be more popular if two people could play it?

C: 所以，让我领教下外来者的游戏技巧吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: So, please allow me to witness the gaming skills of an outworlder, {NICKNAME}.

C: 就对抗类游戏而言，对手的实力决定了游戏体验精彩与否。相信作为冠军的你，能为这局游戏增色不少。
E: With battling games, it is your opponent's power that decides how amazing your gaming experience is. As the Champion, I know you'll make this a great battle!

C: 聊聊维尔德吧。
E: Let's talk about Wilder.

C: 哼哼…瞧好了吧，我的计算这次可不会再失误了。
E: Mm-hmm... That's right, we won't be making any mistakes this time round!

C: 虽然来得有点迟，但我还是有幸观看了你和卢卡的整场比赛——真是太精彩了。
E: I got here a little late, but I watched your duel with Luka — it was amazing!

C: 是吗？我看你的表情怎么有点意犹未尽？
E: Is that so? You don't look too tired to me.

C: 不出意外的话，他应该会在晚些时候联系你们，告诉你们后续的安排……
