E: I'm sure he'll reach out later and fill you in on the details...

C: 这什么企业文化……
E: You guys sure have a toxic company culture over at the IPC...

C: 事情的来龙去脉，你们应该也清楚了，我也就不再赘述…所以，我这次来，其实只是想要见证你们的选择。
E: You already know its story, so I won't go into too much detail. My main reason for being here is merely to witness your decision.

C: 那位寒鸦小姐同意了呀。我和她说，我打算利用捉岁阳涨粉，再利用粉丝捉岁阳，形成一个正向生态循环…她说没问题。
E: Madam Hanya has already given us the green light. We'll record our heliobi-hunting expeditions to get more followers, and then use the intel from our followers to find more heliobi. It's like a vicious cycle... W—Wait — a virtuous cycle!

C: 我没在园子里见过你…人类，你是谁？
E: I have never seen this one before... Human, who are you?

C: 我瞧白露小姐经常逃家跑到金人巷来玩儿，感觉也是个渴望自由的小孩子啊。
E: Hmm... "wander the world with them." It sounds like Lady Bailu would've been an ideal target — she's always running off to play in Aurum Alley.

C: 你们向白露解释了「罗浮杂俎」的事。
E: You tell Bailu about the website Ghostly Grove

C: 思来想去，实在没有答案。毕竟这可是十王与将军才能操心的事情。
E: Alas, questions like that are above my pay grade. That is for the Ten Lords and the General to figure out.

C: 听说你上一回打碎了十王司的法器，差一些……
E: I heard that you broke one of the Ten-Lords Commission's sacred instruments, and almost—

C: 咱们抓住了白露小姐，那个岁阳就会现身落入我们的陷阱吗？岁阳是这么重情重义的东西吗？
E: If we catch Lady Bailu, will Luxie really follow her into our trap? Do heliobi really have a sense of loyalty to their victims?

C: 你在竭尽全力蛊惑我，看来你对胜负根本也没什么把握。
E: The fact that you're trying so hard to persuade me means that you're not sure of victory either.

C: 看来你们的行动还挺顺利的。
E: It seems that your operations have met with some success.

C: 判官奉行十王诰谕，执行命令，却从没有人向我们解释其含义……
E: Judges are instructed by the Ten Lords to carry out their orders, but no one ever explains their meaning to us...

C: 也许最终这些决策都是正确的，高瞻远瞩的，但我们毕竟也是血肉凡胎，还是会为做出选择的过程不由得感到痛苦。
E: Those choices may be correct and far-sighted, but we are, after all, flesh and blood, and we cannot help but agonize over the process of making them.

C: 这么摆烂的事情能这么理直气壮的说出来，还让人觉得好有道理…太卜司的卜者，真有文化！
E: I never thought slacking off could convince me of anything... the sign of a true scholar! A diviner of the Divination Commission after all!

C: 怎么办…我感觉咱们说服不了她。
E: What do we do... I don't think we can persuade her...

C: 这个游戏你想玩多久，想翻出什么花样，本座尽可以奉陪。
E: However long you want to play this game, and whatever tricks you try to pull, I'll happily play along.

C: 你根本不明白青雀的意思。
E: You don't even understand what Qingque is saying.

C: 是他手下留情了。可笑我连他的动作都没看清，就倒在了地上。
E: He must have spared me. The funny thing is that I didn't even see him move — I just fell straight to the ground.

C: 搭上渡船，前往祈龙坛。
E: Let's catch a ferry and head for Dragonprayer Terrace.

C: 它能传授的可不只有剑术。只要想变得更强，这座剑阵总能让你看到数不清的方法，我说的对吧，「熔炬」老师？
E: Swordsmanship isn't the only thing you can learn. As long as you want to become stronger, these swords will show you countless ways to do so. Isn't that right, Master Apyra?

C: 是啊，熔炬老师答应在此为我展示我剑法中的漏洞，以及如何更上层楼的方法。因此我将「熔炬」老师带到了祈龙坛。这儿曾是彦卿重重受挫的地方。
E: Correct. Master Apyra promised to show me the flaws in my swordplay, and how to take it to the next level. That's why I brought them to Dragonprayer Terrace... where I suffered my most serious setback...

C: 那我还是要感谢各位，竭尽所能将我从迷障中解脱出来…尤其是素裳小姐……
E: Then... to the rest of you, thank you — for bringing me out of that daze... Especially you, Miss Sushang.

C: 可是，我还是藿藿呀。
E: But mom, it's me, Huohuo.

C: 挑战斩邪除恶
E: Challenge "Begone, Evil"

C: 聊天效率真是太高啦！
E: Well, we reached an agreement quickly!

C: 桂乃芬好好招待了情绪低落的藿藿，美食总是有治愈人心的力量。
E: Guinaifen takes good care of the down-in-the-dumps Huohuo. Food always has the power to cure a heavy heart.

C: 这里是？地衡司的办公室？
E: What is this place? An office of the Realm-Keeping Commission?

C: 懒散久了，突然有了雄心壮志想狠狠拼搏一把，这很奇怪吗？
E: Is it really that strange for someone to have a strong burst of ambition after being lazy for a long time?

C: 啊，竟然还是你们几位，真是够辛苦的。不过，去「罗浮杂俎」上发帖求助果然有效。
E: Ah, it's you! You really do work hard. I see posting on the "Ghostly Grove" page really gets things done, though!

C: 这就是帝垣琼玉！作为这套牌戏的再发现者和推广者，我比你更有资格定义帝垣琼玉的形式。
E: This is Celestial Jade! As the person that rediscovered and promoted this game, I am far more qualified than you to decide the form that Celestial Jade takes!

C: 你代表星穹列车和我签下合同，我们一起将帝垣琼玉推广到蛮荒世界里。有了列车，我们会比公司更快一步抢占蓝海市场的。你觉得怎么样？
E: You sign a contract with me as a representative of the Astral Express, then we can spread Celestial Jade to even more remote worlds! With the Express, we can get to untapped markets before the IPC does. What do you think?

C: …这肯定是岁阳作祟吧？
E: ...This must be the work of a heliobus?

C: 毕竟我们四个人才是捉鬼小队嘛。
E: After all, it's not the ghost-hunting squad without any of us, right?

C: 卖不卖得出去，不就全看你们调查结果了嘛。
E: Well, whether I can sell it or not depends on the results of your investigation, does it not?

C: （使用道具）
E: (Try using an item)

C: 我在这里真是受够了，你们快用那个葫芦把我带走吧，我们到有点阳气的地方去吧。
E: I've had enough here. You lot, get me in that gourd and get me out of here. Take me somewhere with some life and yang energy!

C: 还不错。
E: Pretty good.

C: 超燃！捉鬼小队力克无形孽物！
E: EPIC! Ghost-Hunting Squad majestically OWNS Invisible Abomination!

C: …被叫作「大人」还是有些不习惯，麻烦你了。
E: ...I'm still not used to be addressed as a Judge, but thanks.

C: 这算是验证了「降魔机巧鸟」的可行性。藿藿大人请在使用完成后，及时返还。
E: I suppose this verifies the feasibility of the exorcist cycrane. Judge Huohuo, please return it in a timely fashion after using it.

C: 和三月七姑娘打交道…是个累活？
E: Is interacting with Miss March 7th... a tiresome job?

C: 好用就成，等你的好消息{NICKNAME}。
E: Whatever works. We'll wait for your good news, {NICKNAME}.

C: 哦，怪不得之前符箓贴在我身上没反应，原来这家伙藏进了我的宝贝相机里——真狡猾！
E: Oh, no wonder the talisman doesn't react when it's on me. It turns out that the heliobus was hidden in my precious camera! Dastardly!

C: 而且它这么欣赏我的照片，怎么可能是坏人呢！？
E: And since it appreciates my photos, how can it be bad!?

C: 可以，但我要陪同。
E: Sure, but I'll accompany you.

C: 我想把它放归天外。
E: I want to release it somewhere among the stars.

C: 我们每个人都是小队里不可或缺的一份子，没有各位的帮忙，哪会有这么吸引眼球的节目效果呀。
E: Each one of us forms an indispensable part of the squad. Without everyone chipping in, there'd never be such a flashy program.

C: 呼——正好我停下来喝杯茶。
E: Whew — right on time for my tea break.

C: 谁脸红了，我没有！
E: Who's blushing? Not me!

C: 我看人家的感情状态不是说……
E: When I saw the relationship status, didn't it say...

C: 真是搞不懂她…总之她是寄了些点心过来，你也分一些吧。
E: I really don't understand her... Anyway, she mailed over some snacks. Grab some, why dontcha.

C: 腺体所释放出的化学物质，在与鼻腔内的嗅觉细胞结合后，可能会刺激到大脑……
E: The chemicals released from these glands combine with olfactory cells in the nose to potentially stimulate a reaction from the brain...

C: 不知道它窜哪儿去了，外面不太安全，{NICKNAME}，麻烦你去找找它吧。
E: I don't know where it scuttled off to. It's not safe to go outside — {NICKNAME}, can you please find it?

C: 说了半天还是要培育……
E: After all that, it's still just more about nurturing...

C: 能再讲个更吓人的吗？
E: Can you give us a horror story?

C: 但影子将军却说：「不，我们应当进攻他们防守最严密的部分。」六御大都知道影子将军强硬的性格，没人敢提出任何异议。
E: But the shadow general countered: "No, we should assault their most strongly defended part." Fully aware of the shadow general's hardcore nature, none of the Six Charioteers dared raise any objection.

C: （舒翁动过手脚的饮料应该就是这个…咦，怎么有两杯？）
E: (This must be the drink that Siobhan tampered with... Wait, two glasses?)

C: 表层是白色？
E: Is the top layer white?

C: 好像忘记了…
E: I... forgot...

C: 可以帮人家把搅拌棒拿过来嘛，想要尝试好久了…嘻嘻。
E: Could you please bring me the stirring stick? I've been wanting to try it for quite a while... Hee-hee...

C: 「酒店里出现梦泡，是梦境正在坍塌的标志。」
E: "Dream bubbles appearing in the hotel is a sign that the Dreamscape is collapsing."

C: 被点到名的朋友必须从「真心话」和「大冒险」里面选一个！完成挑战后就可以指名下一个怪物！汪…要从谁开始哇？
E: The person who gets called must choose between Truth or Dare! Once you've completed the challenge, you can select the next one! Woof... who should we start with?

C: 汪！还是第一次有怪物找上门来哇！
E: Woof! This is the first time a monster actively shows up here!

C: （拿到了全部碎片，可以去完成拼图了。这次拼出来的会是什么呢？）
E: (Found all the jigsaw pieces. It's time to complete the jigsaw. Wonder what will be the complete image?)

C: ——我可以向你保证。
E: ...I promise you.

C: 汪！那也值得好好庆祝哇！我刚到的时候，这里还什么都没有呢！
E: Woof! Even so, it's still worth celebrating! When I first arrived, there was practically nothing!

C: （和现在的布置有明显差别，也没见到那些怪物们。）
E: (The furnishing is very different from how it looks now, and the monsters are nowhere in sight.)

C: <size=28>快点！！！我不是来看你表演的！</size>
E: <size=28>Hurry up! I'm not here to watch you be flashy!</size>

C: …？你瞅啥？
E: ...? What are you looking at?

C: 只要大家在一起，就不怕那坏人过来欺~
E: If we stick together, we won't need to worry about the bad guys~

C: 它提到了那个忧郁的客人。
E: She mentioned a melancholic customer.

C: 我就不该对个身份低微的服务员抱什么期待！调杯能喝的饮料是他们最大的作用了！
E: I shouldn't have expected anything from a lowly waiter! Making drinks is the only thing you're good for!

C: 喝起来的感觉真棒，这杯饮料就是人家现在需要的！果然还是您最了解人家的心了呀。
E: Fantastic! This drink is exactly what I wanted! You truly understand me the best.

C: 梦里连会说话的广告牌都有，谁知道你是不是真人。
E: You can even find talking billboards in the Dreamscape. Who knows if you're a real person or not?

C: 这是你的真实想法吗？
E: Is that what you really think?

C: …明明是你先问的吧？
E: ...You were the one who asked first, right?

C: 你花费了很多力气将冰块凿成规整的圆柱形，却发现根本塞不进杯子里。
E: You spend plenty of energy trying to chisel the ice into a neat cylindrical shape, only to find that it won't fit in the glass.

C: …淑女。
E: ...Lady.

C: 你要是有兴趣，也可以邀请信任的朋友过来玩。
E: If you're interested, you can also invite your trusted friends here.

C: （…还是好好完成舒翁的委托吧。）
E: (...I should work toward completing Siobhan's assignment.)

C: 因为接受了舒翁的委托。
E: Because I accepted Siobhan's assignment.

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: …嘿！说谁呢！我可都听得到。敢在背后说我坏话，必须给你颜色瞧瞧！
E: ...Hey! Who are you talking about? I heard everything you just said. If you're going to talk smack about me behind my back, I'll have to give you a hard time!

C: 这边，嘿，这边…好狗狗，咱们去玩，跟我来，有个特好玩的地方！
E: Over here. Heh. Over here... good little doggie. Let's play. Come with me. I'll take you to a fun place!

C: 这边，嘿，这边…好狗狗，咱们去玩，跟我来，有个特好玩的地方！
E: Over here. Heh. Over here... good little doggie. Let's play. Come with me. I'll take you to a fun place!

C: 最近有个后辈捣鼓出了个小东西，我估摸着你会喜欢。我跟他打过招呼了，你可以过去玩玩，还挺有意思的。
E: Recently, a young fella made a gadget, and I thought you might like it. I've given him a heads-up. You can go over there and have some fun. It's pretty interesting.

C: 说真的，谢谢你啊{NICKNAME}，你能来玩，是我的荣幸，你的测试数据也帮了我大忙。
E: Seriously, thanks a bunch, {NICKNAME}. It's my honor to have you play it, and your feedback and data are super helpful.

C: 汪汪汪
E: WoofWoofWoof

C: 现在，扑满的出现时机将发生变化，拍摄试试吧。
E: The timing of the Trotter's appearance will now change. Try to take more photos.

C: 这家酒吧建立的时间并不长，但还是留下了不少回忆。
E: This lounge hasn't been around for long, but it's already filled with so many memories.

C: 这么复杂的结构，公司和反物质军团没防到，反倒把自己人给防了。
E: So complicated. They thought they could defend against the IPC or Antimatter Legion, but instead, they just ended up trapping their own people inside.

C: 在通过街机进行对战并获得胜利后，您的ID卡自动将录入对手的信息，获得对方的折纸小鸟皮肤，甚至*技能*！
E: After winning an arcade machine battle, your ID card will automatically save data on your opponent, granting you their Origami Bird skin and abilities!

C: 呃…没这么夸张吧？而且为什么是「也」啊？
E: Um, that's a little overstating it. And what do you mean by "too"?

C: 不…其实我并不擅长玩游戏，只是最近想要稍微散散心，就过来看看。
E: Not really... Games aren't my strong suit, to be honest. But I felt like I needed a change of pace lately, so I decided to pop by.

C: 今天的熟面孔可真不少…没想到这么快就又见面了，诸位。
E: There are quite a number of familiar faces here today... I didn't expect to meet all of you again so soon.

C: 这是一套作战模拟软件，旨在提高使用者的战斗水平。
E: This is a combat simulation software. It's supposed to boost its user's combat proficiency.

C: 有点棘手，还好我技高一筹。
E: It got a little hairy. Good thing I was a little stronger.

C: 看来你的信任十分珍贵，你不想随随便便把它交给公司。
E: Your trust appears to be precious, and you're not willing to give it away to the IPC lightly.

C: 卢卡选手，你是惹到什么人了吗？怎么会有人专门做这种事……
E: Luka, did you make an enemy? Why else would someone go to such lengths to do this...

C: 听说了…真没想到……
E: I heard... it was unexpected...

C: 你听说卢卡那件事了吗？
E: Did you hear about what happened with Luka?

C: 卢卡，你还好吗？
E: Luka, how do you feel?

C: 可事到如今，这些都已烟消云散。而我，回到了罗浮成为丹鼎司的掌事者。
E: Those issues have dissipated into thin air over time. Now, I've returned to the Luofu to oversee the Alchemy Commission.

C: 捕风捉影？哼，言之凿凿！
E: Baseless accusations? Absolute nonsense!

C: 有人看到我站在这擂台上也许会感到奇怪，认定我表里不一，在金钱和利益面前屈膝做了仙舟的叛徒。但我要告诉各位，事情绝不是各位所想的那样的！
E: Some of you might find it odd to see me up here and think I'm just selling out for money, betraying the Xianzhou. But that's not true!

C: 首先，这既不是「你的」发布会，也不是「他的」发布会，这是公司产品的发布会。其次，这和说好的一模一样，铄金先生——这场发布会，将属于获胜的产品。
E: Firstly, this is neither "your" nor "his" event. This is a product launch for the IPC. Secondly, everything is exactly as agreed, Mr. Shuojin — this event belongs to the winning product.

C: 是啊～但也令人心情舒畅，不是吗？
E: Yes, but it's quite satisfying, isn't it?

C: 所以我给了他一个机会——当着我的面拒绝我，旗帜鲜明地继续反对公司。可惜他没有做到。
E: So I gave him a chance — to reject me in my face, clearly continuing his opposition to the IPC. Unfortunately, he didn't take it.

C: 跨越种族传播的反有机病毒，也佐证了这一观点。
E: The spread of the Anti-Organic Virus across the species barrier has also proven this perspective.

C: 虽然寂静领主破坏了模拟宇宙复现的「权杖」系统，但关于下个阶段的研究，她的话倒给了我不错的灵感……
E: Though the Lord of Silence has destroyed the Scepter system reproduced by the Simulated Universe, her words gave me plenty of inspiration for the research's next stage...

C: 显示屏可以打亮，程序也运行正常，问题解决了。
E: The display can now turn on, and the program is running smoothly. The issue is resolved.

C: 空间宽敞、照明舒适，再加上这个足够让帕姆当游泳池的浴缸……
E: With the spacious room, comfortable lighting, and this bathtub that's big enough for Pom-Pom to use as a swimming pool...

C: 除此之外，这个「浴室里的星际旅行」系列，我还买了很多热门好物呢！
E: Besides this, I also bought many popular items from the Interstellar Travel series for the bathroom!

C: 看来这入浴剂没有让你变聪明。
E: It looks like this bath soak didn't make you any smarter.

C: 你展示了萨白尼人的遗产。
E: You show the Sabanians' legacy to him.

C: 你四下张望，目光最终落在那颗紫色的蛋上——它正开始出现裂痕。
E: Glancing around, you see the purple egg, now covered in cracks.

C: 「大撕垃」。
E: "Dromasilla."

C: 实际上，我养了只新的。
E: Actually, this is a new dromas.

C: 咳咳…总之，我很看好它。等几周后大部队回来，我们详细聊聊吧。
E: Ahem... Anyway, I've got a good feeling about this one. Let's talk more about it in detail when the main forces return in a few weeks.

C: 《小小一只大地兽》，全剧终…？
E: The Tiny Little Dromas, The End...?

C: 这下成现场直播了。
E: And now we're live-streaming.

C: 没事，已经解决了。
E: No problem, it's already been solved.

C: 还有机会。
E: There's still a chance.

C: 是时候进行亲子间的「交流」了，当然，事关孩子的心理健康，必须认真对待才行。你决定斟酌下措辞——
E: It's time for a little "heart-to-heart" with your kid. Of course, since it's about its mental well-being, you decide to take it seriously and choose your words carefully—

C: 一个绝佳的点子在你脑海中成形，它百分之百能让你在泡澡比赛中取胜。可惜这里地方太小，写不下。
E: A brilliant idea pops into your head. It would absolutely let you win in the next bath battle. Too bad there's not enough space here to write it down.

C: 看搞笑内容，努力憋笑，并录下自己的反应？不不不，恰恰相反……
E: Watch funny stuff, try hard not to laugh, and record your reaction? No no no, quite the opposite...

C: 支持造物的合法权利！
E: Support the legal rights of creations!

C: …那不就是扫了一眼吗？
E: ...It was just a quick glance, wasn't it?

C: 对我们这种普通科员来说，做出来的东西能让黑塔女士入眼就是莫大的成功了。
E: For regular researchers like us, simply getting something that catches Madam Herta's eye is worth bragging about.

C: 你的对手，便是你的反相。你若是正，它便是邪；你若是恶，它便是善。
E: Your opponent is your inverse. If you are righteous, they are wicked. Contrarily, if you are evil, they are good.

C: 我们与{RUBY_B#凡人}沉睡者{RUBY_E#}的距离最近，履行连接一切分离之物的责任，故被称作「结绳人」。
E: We are closest to the {RUBY_B#mortal}Slumberers{RUBY_E#}, fulfilling our duty to connect all that is separated, hence we are called "the Knot-tiers."

C: 是呀，{NICKNAME}也能理解吧？每个人都有粉扑扑的，路过镜子就走不动路的时候……
E: That's right, {NICKNAME}, you get it too, don't you? Sometimes, you just feel so radiant you can't help but stop in front of a mirror...

C: 我宣布——妖精餐馆首次经营，完美结束！
E: I hereby declare the fairy restaurant's very first day of business has come to a perfect close!

C: 不了，我为人低调。
E: No thanks. I like to keep a low profile.

C: 呀，光顾着聊天，可不能忘了正事呀。
E: Ah, I was talking so much that I almost forgot what you came here for.

C: 呵。用自身为城邦命名，颇有君主的气概。不错，我很中意。
E: Heh. Naming your domain after yourself... Now that's the audacity of a true monarch. Excellent, I approve.

C: 方案？不是很懂…只要吸引更多小妖精来用餐就好了吧？
E: A plan? I don't really get that stuff... Isn't it enough if more fairies come to eat?

C: 遐蝶小姐？原来妖精们请来的评审员是你啊。
E: Miss Castorice? So, you're the special guest judge the fairies invited.

C: 餐馆正式挂牌了！
E: The sign is up! We're official!

C: 获得迷其林星级后，客流量也将增加，餐馆的各项标准自然需要随之提高。
E: With our new star rating, more customers will be showing up. Naturally, the restaurant's standards must rise in every aspect to meet demand.

C: 那就由白厄来担任大堂经理。
E: Then it's settled. Phainon will take over as lobby manager.

C: 除去饼壳的酥脆口感，与蜂蜜的甜意外，似乎还有别的…熟悉的味道。啊，这是……
E: Besides the crisp crust and the sweet honey, there's something else... something familiar. Wait, is this...

C: 嗯。我与另外那位评审员也给出了很高的评价。
E: Yes. The other judge and I both gave very high marks.

C: 被武器限制，作为战士更是不合格。
E: It's just like someone held back by their weapon is unfit to be called a true warrior.

C: 「柠檬乳酪汁烤整角猪」，请。
E: And here's "Roasted Hornswine with Lemon-Cream Sauce." Have a taste.

C: …再一次！
E: Again!

C: 哼，浪费我的研究成果难道就值得夸耀么？
E: Hmph, is wasting my research achievements something to brag about?

C: 倒确实许久，没有见凯撒笑得如此开怀了。
E: It's true... it has been a long time since I've seen the Imperator smile so genuinely.

C: 宴会仍在继续。你悄悄地离开人群，从远处望着这一切……
E: The party continues. You quietly slip away from the crowd, watching everything from afar...

C: 城中的另两个孩子，\n守在女子长眠的病榻边，\n哭声嚎啕。
E: As for the other two children, they were in the city,\nbeside a bed upon which a woman was lying in eternal rest,\nwailing uncontrollably.

C: 黄金战争，\n也恍若阵痛的梦呓。
E: and the Chrysos War\na painful dream.

C: 「*我们*...想念我们。」\n烂漫的孩童说。
E: "We... Miss us."\nThe exuberant child says.

C: 「人们仍未逝去时， 我为他们写下这些诗篇。」 少女的回应仅止于此—— 若想求得一阅， 她只会沉默以对。
E: "Before people pass away, I write down these poems." That is the limit of the girl's answer — And she only responds with silence for requests to read these poems.

C: 那是一对在战争中扬名的宿敌， 其中一位在看过少女的诗篇后，放声大笑—— 「我和那家伙分明你死我活。」 「但在你看来，我们竟然惺惺相惜？」
E: It was a pair of archenemies who gained fame in the war, One of them burst into laughter after reading the girl's poetic words — "He and I clearly wish to kill and tear each other apart." "But in your eyes, you think we are close, unable to part?"

C:
猫儿不善温情，
选择避开你的叨扰。
与她同行赴死的智者，
深邃的眼中仍含着笑。
E:
The cat is not fond of warmth,
and quietly slips away from your intrusions.
And the wise one who journeyed with her to the end
still carries a smile in the depths of his eyes.

C:
黑潮的折磨、
胞族的牺牲，
是无妄的命运，
还是徒劳的呻吟？
E:
The torment of the black tide,
The sacrifice of their kin...
Is it an undeserved destiny,
Or merely futile lament?

C: 「平均下来，我们每走过三个星球， 就会上一次通缉令。」 ——丹恒 「要是当时就能使用隐藏的力量， 他们肯定不敢画得这么丑~」 ——三月七
E: "On average, we got a wanted poster For every three planets we visited." — Dan Heng "If I could've used my hidden powers back then, They wouldn't have dared to draw me this ugly~" — March 7th

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>\n野心勃勃的英杰，\n亦或无所不能的诸神？
E: <color=#9e5738>Who would win?</color>\nThe heroes bursting with ambition,\nOr the omnipotent gods?

C: 今日我偏要渡过<color=#9e5738>「卢比孔」</color>河，\n集合英雄伟力，\n掀起弑神之举。
E: Today, I will insist on crossing the <color=#9e5738>Rubicon</color>.\nGather the might of all heroes\nAnd begin the journey to slay gods.

C: 「将旧律斩碎，作为新律的柴薪」。\n不计代价。
E: "I will chop up the old laws and let them be firewood for the new."\nNo matter the cost.

C: ——翁法罗斯「神礼观众」， 与凯撒*合谋*者， 吕枯耳戈斯， 如是说。
E: ...Amphoreus's "Theoros," The Imperator's co-conspirator, Lycurgus, thus spoke.

C: 烛光共琼浆曳摇，\n佩剑与歌声同响。
E: The candlelight danced and mingled with flowing drink,\nSwords and song ringing out in unison.

C: 海的子民笑她羞涩，\n却无人知晓，在夜深时分，\n礁堡中也会响起旋律。
E: The children of the sea thought she was shy.\nBut little did they know that in the dead of night\nHer castle too echoed with music.

C: 可几束金色的丝缕，\n将她周遭的污浊涤荡一清，\n又舒展作弦。
E: But a few golden strands\nCleansed all the filth around her,\nThen stretched out to become new strings.

C: 少女只当是寻常伤患，\n却听两人以啐骂问候彼此。
E: A simple injury, or so the girl believed,\nYet the two women met with scorn, their words like blades.

C: 「不。天空还需悲悯。」\n「它会用无垠的胸怀，」\n「为世人留存希望的火种。」
E: "No. The sky must not forsake kindness.\nThrough its boundless embrace,\nIt carries the Coreflame of hope for humanity."

C: 白厄是一名士兵，\n血脉中有神性流淌，
E: Phainon is a soldier,\none with divinity coursing through his veins.

C: 自此，他的藏书总是破烂流丢，\n因为每本都被翻阅千遍，\n直到细枝末节皆被熟记。
E: Thus, his books are always worn into shreds.\nFor each book was read endlessly,\nTill he remembered every detail slight.

C: 这无名的男人，\n在无人知晓的角落，\n偶尔，也会深陷恐惧。
E:
This unknown man,
In an unknown corner,
From time to time,
Is swallowed by terror.

C:
我问及此事，
想知道他的动机。
可惜善于解答的学者，
拒绝回答这个问题。
E:
I ask him,
Seeking his motive for this effort.
But the scholar usually so quick to retort,
Refuses to answer, seemingly coming up short.

C: 「世事无常，\n老师可曾思索过遗愿？」
E: "Teacher, in this tumultuous world...\nHave you thought about your will?"

C: 两人并没有下注，甚至赛法利娅未曾露面，而赌局却已开始了。大浴场的好事者们屏息凝神，阿格莱雅则缓缓委身，坐于水旁，似乎心中有数。
E: Neither had placed their wager, and Cifera hadn't even shown up, yet the gamble had already begun. The onlookers at the grand baths held their breath in anticipation, while Aglaea slowly lowered herself to sit by the water, as if knowing exactly what was to come.

C: 路径：海洋。原动力：自否。\n注释：内在世界缺失，回避有效决策。\n预设生态环境成功影响了该电信号的运算逻辑，符合生命为回避「虚无」而选择自我毁灭的模型。大部分死循环进程中，其行为模式与其余电信号高度耦合。
E: Track: Ocean. Primum Mobile: Self-Negation.\nNote: Internal world missing, avoidance in effective decision-making.\nThe preset ecological environment successfully influenced the computational logic of this electrical signal, aligning with the model where life chooses self-destruction to avoid "Nihility." In most dead-loop processes, its behavioral pattern is highly coupled with other electrical signals.

C: 原民间建筑师，受格拉克斯邀请后成为隐夜鸫的筑梦师。作品不拘泥于建筑的原型，在兼顾巧妙创意的同时保证了绝佳的安全性。\n后被曝光其真实身份为涉嫌建筑事故的边陲监狱囚犯，由猎犬家系关押至「安谧的时刻」。\n在橡木家系的公正审判之下，过去的罪行得到惩罚。
E: Formerly a civilian architect who became a Dreamweaver of the Nightingale Family upon Glaux's invitation. His creations are not constrained by the original shape of the building and do not compromise safety while retaining supreme creativity.\nLater, his true identity was revealed to be an inmate of the frontier prison, involved in a construction accident. He was detained in the Moment of Serenity by the Bloodhound Family.\nWith the Oak Family's just tribunal, past transgressions are met with retribution.

C:
然而石头老板并没有放弃，他发誓一定要夺回这个原本属于自己的地方。他封锁了小镇的资源，发起激烈的进攻…资源匮乏加上各种灾害，美梦小镇很快陷入了绝境，镇民们争执不断。
还好钟表小子找来了木头老爷帮忙，在木头老爷的劝说下，镇民重新团结了起来。

石头老板也不敢肆意妄为了，只能暗中给小镇添乱。
但石头老板的诡计每次都会被钟表小子和他的伙伴们拆穿，从来没有对镇民们造成真正的威胁。

日子一天天过去，镇民们逐渐忘记了石头老板的凶恶，但这个坏蛋一定还在觊觎着美梦小镇。终有一日，他和他的爪牙会再次归来……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: Boss Stone did not throw in the towel. Instead, he vowed to reclaim control of the town. He blocked access to resources and launched a vigorous attack in retaliation... Due to the scarcity of resources, coupled with various disasters, Dreamville found itself in dire straits. The townsfolk were in constant dispute. Fortunately, Clockie sought the help of Old Man Wood, who managed to persuade the townsfolk to reunite. Boss Stone dared not act rashly again, thus he resorted to covert actions to wreak havoc in the town. Nevertheless, his tricks never caused any harm to the townsfolk as they were exposed by Clockie and his companions time and again. As days went by, the townsfolk gradually forgot about Boss Stone's wickedness, but there was no doubt the villain still had his eyes upon Dreamville. He and his lackeys were bound to return someday... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C: 不会忘记你给我们带来的欢乐，也感谢你能在关键时刻为乐队挺身而出。愿你永远保持这份热情和勇敢。无论未来是否走在音乐的道路上，你永远都会是「缭乱」最核心的成员。
E: I won't forget the joy you brought us, and I am thankful for you stepping up for the band in their time of need. May you always keep your passion and courage. Regardless if you tread upon the path of music or not, you will always be the most vital core member of The Dazzling.

C: 达凡绮，你的成长实在令人欣慰。你用行动证明了，只要有勇气追随内心的热爱，任何人都能变得不平凡。即使前路艰难，也请你相信自己，相信未来会充满无限可能。加油。
E: Dafanchy, your growth is truly inspiring. You've proven that extraordinary things are possible with passion and courage. Through all the twists and turns ahead, believe in yourself and your talents. There are no limits to what you can achieve in the future. Keep pushing.

C: 不满意
E: Unsatisfactory

C:
这笔「保管费」里，也有丹恒乘客的份。他很感谢你照看他的布匹。

丹恒乘客说，如果这次古法草木染的实验成功，也许还能用来给帕姆做一身新衣服呢～

好期待帕！
E:
This Storage Fee also includes Passenger Dan Heng's share. He is grateful to you for looking after his cloth.

Passenger Dan Heng said that if this ancient method plant coloring experiment is successful, maybe it can even be used to make a new outfit for Pom-Pom~

I'm looking forward to it!

C: 「尽管大守护者在残酷的命运面前落了下风，人性中的光辉亦被逐渐蚕食；但她仍尽力将温情留给人民，助他们求得拯救——如同她对待女儿那般；」
E: "Though the Supreme Guardian lost before her cruel destiny and the light of humanity eroded away, she still tried her best to give whatever gentleness she had to the people and help them toward salvation, just like how she treated her daughter."

C: \n\n我找到了艾丝妲，但她似乎对此也知之不详。好在界种科的辛克尔和<color=#dbc291ff>密卷科的什么人</color>就在附近，这多少算是一条线索。
E: \n\nI found Asta, but she didn't seem to know much about it. Fortunately, Hinkel of the Department of Ecology and <color=#dbc291ff>someone from the Department of Insight are nearby</color>, which is more or less a clue.

E: Q

E: An unexpected counterargument was received on the science forum, but unfortunately, the reasoning couldn't be clarified in the end.

E: When you Submit Report in the Meeting, every unsubmitted Duty Report you have will grant you <color=#f29e38ff>Base Score +#1</color>

E: Last-Minute Goal

E: Inventory Check

E: Sofa (Right)

E: Small Tea Table

E: Display Screen

C: 跟着别人随波逐流
E: Follow the passing currents of other pedestrians

C: 我们完全无法看透彼此…有意思的是，我也有同感。\n那么，正确答案究竟是什么？别心急，等到一同见证尘埃全部落定，我就会向你表明真身。
E: We cannot see through each other at all... Interestingly, I feel the same way.\nThen, what is the correct answer? Don't be in a hurry. When we have witnessed the end of this business together, I will certainly reveal to you my true identity.

C: ——幸运的你来到了避难所的安全屋，没有怪物，只有宝物。
E: — You arrive at the safe house of a shelter. There are no monsters to be found, only treasures.

C: ——在遗迹中，你好像看到了熟悉的身影……
E: — Within the ruins, you seem to detect a familiar silhouette...

C: ——这里的敌人团结一致，互相照应。它们会一起狩猎寻宝者。
E: — Enemies here are united and look out for each other. They hunt treasure hunters together.

C: ——镇守遗迹的强敌藏匿着门卡，想要将其击败，就先破坏强化它们的掩体吧。
E: — Formidable foes that guard the ruins have the door card on them. To defeat them, you should firstly destroy the covers strengthening them.

C: ——出口就在眼前，但敌人拦住了你的去路，将敌人全部打败吧！
E: — The exit is right before you, but there are enemies in your way. Defeat them all!

C: 轮回的命运中，偶尔会出现传送门。传送门有<color=#f29e38ff>开启，关闭</color>两种状态。<color=#f29e38ff>进入相同能量颜色</color>的传送门中的任一个，会被<color=#f29e38ff>传送至另一端</color>，同时传送门会<color=#f29e38ff>关闭</color>。
E: Teleporters occasionally appear in the recurring destiny. Teleporters have two states: <color=#f29e38ff>open and closed</color>. When you enter any teleporter with the <color=#f29e38ff>same energy color</color>, you will be <color=#f29e38ff>teleported to the other end</color>, and the teleporter will <color=#f29e38ff>close</color>.

C: 飞霄的<color=#f29e38ff>惊奇礼物</color>能让飞霄获得大量「飞黄」。
E: Feixiao's <color=#f29e38ff>Surprise Gift</color> will grant Feixiao massive Flying Aureus points.

C: 若玩家应援的选手获得亚军或季军，则返还的点心相应减少。\n若应援的选手未取得前三名，将不会返还点心。
E: If your supported contestant wins 2nd or 3rd place, the amount of snacks returned would be reduced respectively.\nIf the contestant you supported doesn't place in the top three, no snacks will be returned.

C: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#<color=#f29e38ff>拖拽</color>}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#<color=#f29e38ff>右摇杆</color>}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#<color=#f29e38ff>左键</color>}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER_PS#<color=#f29e38ff>右摇杆</color>}可以转动交互镜头。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#<color=#f29e38ff>Drag</color>}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#<color=#f29e38ff>Right Stick</color>}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#<color=#f29e38ff>Left button</color>}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER_PS#<color=#f29e38ff>Right Stick</color>} to rotate the interactive camera.

C: 在飞行的过程中，可以遥控机巧鸟进行上升或者下降。
E: While flying a cycrane, you can control it to ascend or descend.

C: 目标是将<color=#f29e38ff>空载</color>矿车停到<color=#f29e38ff>蓝色</color>阻车器处，<color=#f29e38ff>满载</color>矿车停到<color=#f29e38ff>黄色</color>阻车器处。在<color=#f29e38ff>矿石堆放处</color>可以改变矿车<color=#f29e38ff>空载</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>满载</color>的状态。
E: The goal is to move the <color=#f29e38ff>empty</color> mine carts to the <color=#f29e38ff>blue</color> blockers, and move the <color=#f29e38ff>loaded</color> ones to the <color=#f29e38ff>yellow</color> blockers. You can <color=#f29e38ff>load</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>empty</color> mine carts at <color=#f29e38ff>the ore piles</color>.

C: 每个关卡都将为我方目标提供独特且强大的<color=#f29e38ff>增益效果</color>，同时敌人的<color=#f29e38ff>韧性</color>与<color=#f29e38ff>弱点</color>也会发生改变。利用这些增益效果以及敌人的特性可以极大地提高战斗能力和通关效率。
E: Every stage will provide unique and significant <color=#f29e38ff>buffs</color> to allies, as well as changes to enemies' <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness</color>. Utilize these buffs and enemy traits to greatly increase combat ability and efficiency in the stage.

C: 在将<color=#f29e38ff>宝珠的光芒照向指定地点之后</color>，尝试使用奇迹典籍<color=#f29e38ff>穿梭时空</color>，或许会有新的发现。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>After shining the orb's light to a specific location</color>, try to <color=#f29e38ff>traverse the space-time</color> via the Tome of Miracles. There might be new discoveries to be found.

C: 使用右摇杆，可旋转视角观察。使用左摇杆，可平移画面观察。点击右下角重置按钮可重置视角。
E: Use the right joystick to rotate the camera. Use the left joystick to move the screen. Press the reset button in the bottom right corner to reset your camera.

C: 按下鼠标左键移动鼠标，可旋转视角观察。按下鼠标右键移动鼠标，可平移画面观察。点击右下角重置按钮可重置视角。
E: Press the left mouse key and move the mouse to rotate the camera. Press the right mouse key and move the mouse to move the screen. Click the reset button in the bottom right corner to reset your camera.

C: 关卡中设有行动值计时器，在我方与敌方行动后，会扣除对应行动值
E: The stage contains action value timers. The corresponding action values will be deducted after allies and enemies take action.

C: 「异变机制」：【弱点击破】\n当该敌人被<color=#f29e38ff>击破弱点时会被消灭</color>，并使所有非「王下一桶（投影）」的敌方目标陷入<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破</color>状态。
E: Mutation Mechanic: Weakness Break\n<color=#f29e38ff>Breaking this enemy's Weakness will directly defeat them</color> and inflict <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break</color> on all other enemy targets aside from Lordly Trashcan (Projection).

C: 将三个及以上相邻的「惊梦剧团的圆幕先生（投影）」翻转为【惊喜频道】触发<color=#f29e38ff>【微笑三消】</color>后，可提高<color=#f29e38ff>「关卡增益」</color>档位。\n随着「关卡增益」档位提升，「关卡增益」的<color=#f29e38ff>评级</color>也将提升。
E: After switching 3 or more adjacent Dreamjolt Troupe's Mr. Domescreen (Projection) to the Surprise Channel to trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Grin Sweep</color>, you may upgrade the <color=#f29e38ff>Stage Buff</color> by 1 rank.\nAs you increase your Stage Buff rank, the <color=#f29e38ff>rating</color> for the Stage Buff will also increase.

C: 在本关内消灭<color=#f29e38ff>扑满</color>，可积累大量「战意值」。\n需要在扑满逃跑前尽快消灭扑满。
E: Defeat the <color=#f29e38ff>Trotters</color> in this stage to obtain a large amount of Grit Value.\nYou need to defeat the Trotter before it escapes.

C: 在行动轮数结束前消灭所有敌人，则视为战斗胜利，战斗胜利会对对方造成伤害
E: Defeat all enemies before the Action Cycles end to achieve victory in battle. Achieving victory in battle will deal DMG to opponents.

C: 在「黄金与机械」中，每种「自定义骰」都有不同的被动效果，满足被动效果的要求时，会根据所选的命途，提供不同效果的增益。
E: In Gold and Gears, Custom Dice have different Passive abilities. Every time you fulfill the die's passive ability requirements, different bonuses will be provided based on the chosen Path.

C: 凑齐<color=#f29e38ff>所有的基础特征</color>，「生命烘焙箱」就能计算出<color=#f29e38ff>解析率</color>，\n它预示着发生<color=#f29e38ff>突变的概率</color>。
E: After you have <color=#f29e38ff>all the needed Base Traits</color>, the Lifeform Oven will be able to calculate the <color=#f29e38ff>Resolution Rate</color>.\nThe Resolution Rate indicates <color=#f29e38ff>the probability of a mutation occurring</color>.

C: 以云吟之术消隐身形的刺客，不知受何人所遣。
E: An assassin who conceals their presence using the Cloudhymn technique. It is unclear by whom they are sent.

C: 原本是搭载了通用教材的「圆幕先生」，受到模因病毒的影响，教材变成了蕉材。在蕉石般的严厉与蕉阳般的热情间转换，必不可少的猿工，值得蕉往的猴友。
E: Originally a Mr. Domescreen loaded with the general syllabus. The educational materials became banaducational materials due to the influence of the memetic virus. It shifts between banarocky seriousness and sunny banapassion. An indispensable banamployee and a monkey who's a worthy banafriend.

C: 冉比希厨王争霸的首届冠军，傲然于世的厨艺一度令全宇宙的垃圾桶闻风丧胆。曾有六百六十六名同行，在品尝了他的垃圾作品后失去自信，一蹶不振。为避免这样的惨剧再度发生，无名的厨王从此卸下围裙，离开厨艺的战场，以传道授业为己任。
E: The inaugural winner of the Rumbas culinary competition, his insurmountable culinary skills had once towered above all the trashcans of the universe. There were <unbreak>666</unbreak> peers who lost their confidence and wallowed in apathy after tasting his trash works. To prevent such a tragedy from happening again, the nameless king of chefs took off his apron and left the culinary battlefield, and made it his duty to teach his skills to others instead.

C: 「记忆」普攻
E: Basic ATK (Remembrance)

C: 还好，不难。
E: That wasn't too difficult.

C: 看书…不算爱好，只是过去的习惯。
E: It's not really a hobby, but I used to read a lot...

C: 还是要自己动手才好。
E: Sometimes you gotta do things yourself.

C: 看来，不需要我帮忙。
E: No help required.

C: 面对命运不可抵挡的浪潮，我们总有选择反抗的自由…她必然经历了一场至为惨烈与悲壮的自我抗争。
E: In the face of the seemingly unstoppable tide of destiny, we always have the freedom to resist... She must have fought an extremely tragic but heroic battle against herself.

C: 听科员说，有些奇物是自己主动要求来到空间站的。
E: I heard the researchers say that there are some curios that actively requested to come to the space station.

C: 我可不记得有邀请过你们。
E: I don't remember inviting you.

C: 敌寇，看剑！
E: Enemies and rascals, take my sword!

C: 谢谢…我的信念从未如此坚定。
E: Thank you... I will stand firm for my people.

C: 必须抓住这次机会。
E: I won't waste this chance.

C: 补给充足。
E: Ample supplies.

C: 可算有个盼头了。
E: Good news...? I'll take it.

C: 会打鼓会养花会写报告，这世上还有比佩拉更靠谱的好姑娘吗？
E: She's a flower-growing drummer and a great report writer. Name a more reliable girl. I'll wait.

C: 朗道家世代为大守护者效力，这是荣誉，亦是责任。只有成为民众可以仰赖的盾牌，才能安心接受这「筑城者」的称谓带来的名誉。
E: The Landau family has had the honor and responsibility of serving the supreme guardians for generations. Only by becoming a shield for the people is one worthy of the title "Architect."

C: 克拉拉：成、成功了！
E: Clara: W—We did it!

C: 克拉拉：没事的，史瓦罗先生，这里很安全。
E: Clara: Don't worry, Mr. Svarog. We'll be safe here.

C: 又是一个生存小技巧。
E: Another handy survival skill.

C: 这也太多了……
E: I don't have space for all this...

C: 现在才开始！
E: I'm just getting started!

C: 早前打牌打得手抽筋，托了朋友介绍去的。本来我还有点将信将疑，没想到开了药后，白露小姐拿出一副「帝垣琼玉」，叮嘱我平时多叠叠牌能改善手的灵活性，我立马就肃然起敬了。
E: I got a bit too excited playing Celestial Jade once and sprained my wrist — a friend recommended her to me. I had my doubts at first, but as soon as she'd written out my prescription, she took out a Celestial Jade set. She told me to practice stacking the tiles to improve wrist flexibility. Naturally, I instantly respected her.

C: 天外的行商？居然不在「鸣火」的名录上么…奇怪，我怎么记不清了。
E: A businessman from beyond the sky? And he's not on the Whistling Flames' records... Weird, why can't I remember him?

C: 素裳姑娘好热心哪，每天都要来铺子问上一遍，「生意难不难做啦？我帮你！」，「有没有人打砸啦？我帮你！」……
E: Sushang is very kind and comes to my shop every day to ask: "Is business difficult? I'll help you!" "Did anyone smash your shop? I'll help you!"...

C: 没能…实现啊……
E: It cannot... come to pass...

C: 等得太久，小心煞气枯竭。
E: Waiting drains one's vigor.

C: 我虽不通政事，但也明白灵砂司鼎的任务相当困难繁重。将军也吩咐过我，要不遗余力地协助她，重整丹鼎司的风气。
E: Even though I don't understand politics, I know that Cauldron Master Lingsha's job is quite difficult. The general also told me to do my best to assist her in re-organizing the Alchemy Commission.

C: 她、她说话时怎么没有呼吸起伏，体肤下也不见一丝血行流动的迹象，莫不是个女鬼？
E: Wh—Why does it seem like she doesn't have to breathe? And her skin — why is it cold to the touch? It's like there's no blood running through her veins... Could she be... a ghost?

C: 老花样罢了。
E: Same old tricks.

C: 十王司判官，雪衣。奉十王诰谕还阳行事。有事便讲，吾的时间不多。
E: I am Xueyi, a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. By decree of the Commission, I come to the world of the living to enforce its will. Tell me what you want. I haven't got much time.

C: 炎老经历这么多糟心事，还能对人世兴致不减，值得每一位将军学习啊。
E: Despite all the hardships elder Huaiyan has faced, he still finds joy in the world. He is an example every general should follow.

C: 很精神。要一对一吗？
E: You look pretty lively. How about a one-on-one?

C: 就是你了！
E: Yes, YOU!

C: 驭空大人，你果然没变～
E: Madam Yukong, you haven't changed at all~

C: 这就倦了？需要提提神么？
E: Feeling tired already? Do you require invigoration?

C: 老爷子很厉害。但凡活了这么久却不讨厌自己的人，都很厉害。
E: That old man is quite capable. Anyone who has lived that long and isn't sick of himself must be quite capable.

C: 运气不错。
E: Not bad luck.

C: 据说我醒来时，尾巴就已经是这副模样了…或许是应了求生的渴望，每逢险境，它们就会争先恐后地出现。
E: I heard that when I woke up, my tail was already like this... Perhaps it was in response to my desire to survive. Whenever there's danger, they always rush out.

C: 谢了伙计。
E: Thanks, pal.

C: 要来一场比试么？
E: Care to test your skills?

C: 这就满足了吗？买定离手，全押。
E: That's all? It's settled then — I'm going all-in.

C: 难得碰上一个头脑派的。
E: It's rare to run into someone with brains.

C: 亲爱的忆者，敢不敢把后背交给我呀？
E: My dear Memokeeper, are you bold enough to let me guard your back?

C: 火萤Ⅳ型，已就位。
E: Fyrefly Type-IV, in position.

C: 野草，浆果，清风，蝴蝶…偶尔放放风的时候，我喜欢去植物繁茂的郊外，用自己的双手触碰充满生命力的世界。
E: Wild grass, berries, butterflies, a cool breeze... When I want fresh air, I like to go out where the plants grow wild and touch the life-filled world with my own hands.

C: 我常听人说，「开拓」就是进入一片尚未开辟的新领域，匹诺康尼也经历过类似的历史——苏乐达的美味，美梦剧团的演出，都是经由一次次的「开拓」才完成的…真不容易呀……
E: I often hear people talking about "Trailblazing," like it's finding new places no one's been before. Penacony's had its share of finding new cool stuff too, like how tasty SoulGlad is, and the awesome shows by the Sweet Dreams Troupe! All of that was figured out by some serious "Trailblazing." It sure wasn't a walk in the park...

C: 幸福与苦难，无论何处都这般相似。
E: Misery and bliss, the same no matter where you go.
Oh...

C: 缇宝老师给你鼓掌！夸夸！
E: A round of applause for you! Good job!

C: 何等聒噪！
E: How noisy!

C: 我知道学生私底下会叫我「那老师」「夏老师」「那个夏老师」…至少不是那刻夏。阿、那、克、萨、戈、拉、斯，阿那克萨戈拉斯——这个名字，很难记吗？
E: I know my students would call me "Prof Nax," "Prof Anax," or even "Prof A" behind my back... At least they're not saying "Anaxa." It's A-NAK-SA-GO-RAS. Anaxagoras. Is it that hard to remember?

C: 彻底迷失心智了吗…
E: They completely lost themselves...

C: 诸位，后会有期~
E: Until we meet again, everyone~

C: 我会哭的～
E: I'm gonna cry~

C: 下一个是谁？
E: Who's next?

C: 写下，前所未有的结局！
E: Let's write an ending like never before!

C: The Xianzhou Luofu
E: The Xianzhou Luofu

C: Amphoreus
E: Amphoreus

C: 镜头移动上
E: Move camera up

C: 镜头移动上
E: Move camera up

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
阅读最后的艾格勒启目集，挑战镌写在史诗里的强敌。

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 活动开启后，每日将会开启新的挑战关，共计5关。
● 每一个挑战关拥有三种难度：「简单」「困难」「噩梦」，完成前一个难度的挑战后，解锁下一个难度。
● 每一个挑战关拥有一个独特的关卡机制，「噩梦」难度下，该机制强度大幅提升。
● 进入战斗时，触发所有角色的秘技效果。编队中存在多个无法同时生效的秘技效果时，按编队顺序优先触发靠前的角色的秘技效果。
● 完成「噩梦」难度挑战，将会获得「SS」的评价。
● 「简单」「困难」难度下，敌方强度受「均衡等级」影响；「噩梦」难度不受影响。
● 「简单」「困难」难度下开拓者可以选择试用角色参与挑战，「噩梦」难度下无试用角色。

◆ 限时奖励 ◆
● 活动期间，在关卡内达成指定挑战目标后，可以在「限时奖励」中领取奖励。

◆ 活动提示 ◆
● 「余晖残卷」限时活动结束后，开拓者将无法获取活动期间的限时奖励；但仍可挑战关卡获取「常驻奖励」。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
Read the final Aquila enlightenment and challenge the formidable foes inscribed in the Epic.

◆ Event Rules ◆
● After the event begins, a new Challenge Stage will unlock daily, for a total of 5 stages.
● Each Challenge Stage has three difficulty levels: "Easy," "Hard," and "Nightmare." Complete one difficulty level to unlock the next.
● Each Challenge Stage has a unique stage mechanic that is greatly enhanced in "Nightmare" difficulty.
● When entering combat, Technique Buffs of all characters are triggered. When multiple incompatible Technique Buffs exist in the team lineup, they will be triggered in order of character position.
● Completing a "Nightmare" difficulty challenge will earn you an "SS" rating.
● Enemy strength is affected by the Equilibrium Level in "Easy" and "Hard" difficulties; "Nightmare" difficulty is unaffected.
● Trailblazers can select trial characters for "Easy" and "Hard" difficulties, but trial characters are not available in "Nightmare" difficulty.

◆ Limited-Time Rewards ◆
● During the event period, rewards can be claimed via Limited-Time Rewards upon achieving specific challenge goals within the stages.

◆ Event Reminders ◆
● After the "Remnants of Twilight" limited-time event ends, Trailblazers will no longer be able to obtain the limited-time rewards. However, they can still challenge stages to obtain permanent rewards.

C: 偶尔也让我为你分担一些吧。匹诺康尼…是不是出事了？
E: Let me help you shoulder some of the burden. Did something happen in Penacony?

E: <color=#dbc291ff>You're acting like everything's fine, but I saw you at Dewlight Pavilion... You were clearly at your wit's end.</color>

E: Stowaway?

E: But instead of words, I'd rather answer with a song. That would be more convincing, no?

C: 又出现了？比之前更遥远，这次是在……
E: Again? Further away than before. This time in...

C: 我亲眼看着他一一磨去自己的棱角，把它们藏到内心的最深处。
E: I watched as he smoothed away the sharp corners of himself, bit by bit, hiding them in the deepest corners of his heart.

C: 见过，可这反倒耐人寻味，战果和我预想中全然相反。
E: Yes, but that's what makes this so intriguing. The outcome of the battle was the complete opposite of what I expected.

C: 作为最初的诚意，他向你展示了自己的发现——那个由愚者伪造的「知更鸟遇害」现场。
E: As a show of initial sincerity, he revealed his discovery to you: The crime scene of "Robin's death" that was staged by the Fool.

C: 惊人的重注，让他如愿引动了令使的一刀。家族苦心隐瞒的秘密因此暴露，身处漩涡中心的你，也坠入其中。
E: With such a high-stakes gamble, he succeeded in provoking the Emanator's strike. The Family's carefully guarded secret was exposed, and you, caught in the eye of the storm, were pulled into the chaos.

C: 就让我自己走走吧，多谢，米凯先生。
E: I'll take a walk around by myself, thanks, Mr. Micah.

C: 在这边——
E: Over here...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>45</unbreak>█乐园终将跌入愁苦人世，黎明一旦升起，便要坠毁于白昼。凡是金的，怎可能光华长留？」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>45</unbreak>█Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow, and once dawn breaks, it will shatter in the light of day. How could anything golden abide in glory forever?"</color>

E: Let a Cremator access my memories?

C: {RUBY_B#知更鸟}她{RUBY_E#}已经离开这片区域了，你不可能再追得上。
E: {RUBY_B#Robin}She's{RUBY_E#} already left this area. There's no way you can catch up to her now.

C: 没错，这里…本就是「梦主」希望她来到的地方。并且，希望她自以为掌握了些什么，在最关键的时刻，作出错误的判断。
E: Correct. This place... is where the Dreammaster wanted her to be. And he wanted her to think she'd figured something out, only to make the wrong decision at the most critical moment.

C: 通过此处，便是橡木公馆尽头的大厅。
E: Past this point lies the grand hall at the end of Oak Manor.

C: 成功了，是他先一步消散，让那道力量失去了控制。
E: We did it... He faded first, causing that power to lose control.

C: 遗憾的是，真相不仅如此。早在进入阿斯德纳之初，我们就已经受到了星核的影响。回想起来，你我相遇的那片陌生梦境，或许就是思绪开始游离的预兆。
E: Unfortunately, it didn't stop there. From the early days of our journey into Asdana, we were already affected by the Stellaron. That strange Dreamscape where we met... Maybe it was a sign that your thoughts were beginning to drift away.

C: 这一切都是一场梦？
E: All of this is just a dream?

C: 但无论如何，我们都无法坐视不理。
E: But we can't just stay here and do nothing.

C: 她身处阿斯德纳星系边缘，但还是被卷了进来，只是找到她一个人，我几乎就要油尽灯枯了。
E: She was at the edge of the Asdana system, but she still got dragged into this mess. Just finding her nearly wiped me out.

C: 还没有做好准备…
E: I'm not quite ready yet...

C: 第一次听到的时候，我也这么想——离开匹诺康尼前，哥哥就是这么问我的，我总是忍不住要思考。
E: That was my response as well the first time I heard that question... It's what my brother asked me before I left Penacony. I keep finding myself thinking about it.

C: 哪怕一切终会离我而去…
E: Even if I lose everything at the end...

C: 可后来我才发现，哪有人会给自己起一个不吉利的名字呀？
E: But later, I realized no one would give themselves an unlucky name.

C: 我会继续抗争下去。
E: I will keep fighting.

C: 「虚无」寸光无余，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
E: The Nihility leaves no light unextinguished. By this decree, it shall be ended!

C: 流萤
E: Firefly

C: 「这是耕种者再造世界的经验，也是绘世者的空空妙手。」
E: "This is the experience from cultivators who had remade the world, and the wondrous creations from those who painted the world."

C: 所有人在这种时候，是不是都说不出话？
E: I wonder whether everyone feels speechless at times like this.

C: …抱歉，我不能说。艾利欧告诉我，那会导致很可怕的未来，我仅仅是多说几句，就会让你在下一站死去。
E: ...I'm sorry, but I can't tell you. Elio told me that it would lead to a terrible future. If I say even a few words more, you'll die at the next stop.

C: …哪一次？
E: ...Which one?

C: 「你想问我火漆的事吗？」那老者显露身形，眼神如炬。
E: "Do you want to ask me about the Sealing Wax?" The old man reveals himself, his eyes burning like torches.

C: 生命花园里，身为训练家的你正在检查小奇美拉的工作。
E: In the Garden of Life, as a trainer, you are checking on the little chimera's work.

C: 你的声音愈发洪亮——诸神已然接受这份代价。浓云褪去，柔和的月光倾泻而下，温热与力量一同涌入身躯。你感到前所未有地充沛，仿佛满盈的容器。
E: Your voice grows ever more resonant. The divine has accepted this offering. The thick clouds part, letting gentle moonlight pour down as warmth and power surge through your body. You feel more invigorated than ever before, like a vessel filled to the brim.

C: 「带上我们！甜美的死亡岂容独享？」冥河中沉沦的亡魂们纷纷伸手，试图将你们的船底凿漏，其中甚至混杂着法吉娜的造物。你和船员们用木桨四处敲击，却难以抵御围攻……
E: "Take us with you! Why should you alone savor the sweet embrace of death?" The fallen souls in the River of Souls reach out their hands, trying to puncture holes in your ship's hull, and among them are even Phagousa's creations. You and your crew frantically strike with wooden oars, but struggle to fend off the siege...

C: 你可以质疑我的桶格，但不能质疑我坚固而有力的桶身！看打！
E: You can question my style, but you can't question my sturdy and powerful can body! Take this!

C: 帷幕之后隐隐浮现白漆绘制的图案。三个同心圆，构成了橡木横截面上的年轮，你隐约记起这是橡木家系的家徽。
E: Behind the curtains, white-painted images gradually emerge. Three concentric circles form the growth rings on an oak cross-section. You vaguely recall this as the Oak Family's insignia.

C: 别担心，大家早就替灰宝安排好啦。
E: Don't worry, we've already made arrangements for you, Grayie.

C: 这么快就学会了对战规则，灰宝果然很有天赋呢。
E: You've learned the battle rules so quickly, Grayie. You really are talented!

C: 灰宝想什么呢。小伊卡可是大天马，是天空的孩子，和小奇美拉不是竞争关系啦。
E: What are you thinking, Grayie? Little Ica is a mighty winged horse, a child of the sky. There's no competition between her and Little Chimera.

C: 唔，禁止拉踩！奇美拉在工作之余的生活也很丰富的，小灰要多来体验。
E: Hmm, no throwing shade! Chimeras have got a pretty rich life outside of work too. You should come experience it more often, Little Gray.

C: 认真些，可别让你身披的金织蒙羞。
E: Take this seriously. Don't bring shame to the woven gold you're adorned with.

C: 累计觅宝次数
E: Total Treasure Hunt Count

C: 嗯，我想你了。
E: Mmm. I missed you.
